title_en: France-Italy-Switzerland Deep-Dive: 10-Day Small-Group Tour (Paris to Rome)
title_zh: 法意瑞深度10天精品小团游（巴黎至罗马）
short_en: A 10-day one-way small-group journey from Paris to Rome through Burgundy, the Swiss Alps, Jungfrau, Milan, Venice, Florence and Tuscany.
short_zh: 10天单线精品小团，从巴黎一路深度玩到罗马，途经勃艮第、瑞士阿尔卑斯、少女峰、米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨与托斯卡纳。
desc_en: This 10-day, one-way deep-dive tour runs from Paris all the way to Rome, weaving together the very best of France, Switzerland and Italy. You'll savour Burgundy's vineyards and a Relais & Chateaux castle hotel, ride the GoldenPass panoramic train through the Alps, gaze at Lake Geneva, Chillon Castle and the Jungfrau region, then cross into Italy for Milan, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence, the Cinque Terre coast, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the medieval hill towns of Tuscany before finishing in the Eternal City. With scenic hotels, the GoldenPass rail and all attractions included in one all-inclusive price, it is a relaxed yet richly cultural Alps-to-Mediterranean adventure.
desc_zh: 这是一条10天单线深度行程，从巴黎一路畅游至罗马，将法国、瑞士、意大利的精华串联成线。您将品味勃艮第葡萄酒庄与罗莱夏朵古堡酒店，乘坐金色山口全景观光列车穿越阿尔卑斯，饱览日内瓦湖、西庸城堡与少女峰地区，再进入意大利游览米兰、浪漫的威尼斯、文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨、五渔村海岸、比萨斜塔以及托斯卡纳的中世纪古城，最后抵达永恒之城罗马。景观酒店、金色山口列车与各项门票一价全含，是一段从阿尔卑斯到地中海、轻松而又充满人文气息的旅程。

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Paris to Rome across France, Switzerland and Italy
highlights.zh: 巴黎到罗马单线深度路线，横跨法国、瑞士、意大利

highlights.en: Ride the GoldenPass panoramic train through the Swiss Alps from Lungern to Lucerne
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口全景观光列车，从龙疆穿越阿尔卑斯抵达卢塞恩

highlights.en: Jungfrau region, Lake Geneva, the UNESCO Lavaux vineyard terraces and Chillon Castle
highlights.zh: 少女峰地区、日内瓦湖、世界遗产拉沃葡萄梯田与西庸城堡

highlights.en: Scenic stays: a five-star Relais & Chateaux castle, the lakeside Giessbach hotel and a Tuscan villa
highlights.zh: 景观酒店：五星级罗莱夏朵古堡、湖畔吉斯巴赫酒店与托斯卡纳庄园别墅

highlights.en: Italian icons: Milan Cathedral, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence and the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 意大利经典：米兰大教堂、浪漫威尼斯、文艺复兴佛罗伦萨与比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Cinque Terre coast and medieval Tuscan hill towns: San Gimignano, Siena and Pienza
highlights.zh: 五渔村海岸与托斯卡纳中世纪古城：圣吉米尼亚诺、锡耶纳与皮恩扎

highlights.en: End in Rome, the Eternal City, with the Colosseum, Pantheon and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 终点罗马永恒之城，畅游斗兽场、万神殿与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with city-centre 4-star hotels, all attractions and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含，市中心四星酒店、各项门票全包，无强制购物

includes.en: Scenic and city-centre 4-star hotels (incl. a five-star Relais & Chateaux castle, lakeside Giessbach hotel and a Tuscan villa)
includes.zh: 景观及市中心四星级酒店（含五星罗莱夏朵古堡、湖畔吉斯巴赫酒店与托斯卡纳庄园别墅）

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver
includes.zh: 持证中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Intercity transport throughout the route by private vehicle
includes.zh: 全程城市间专车交通

includes.en: GoldenPass panoramic train ride (Lungern to Lucerne)
includes.zh: 金色山口全景观光列车（龙疆至卢塞恩）

includes.en: Cinque Terre scenic train and listed attraction entries along the itinerary
includes.zh: 五渔村景观火车及行程内所列景点门票

includes.en: Guided coach tour of the Jungfrau region (one of the three optional choices on Day 3)
includes.zh: 乘车游览少女峰地区（第3天三选一项目之一，费用包含）

includes.en: All applicable taxes and fees, all-inclusive
includes.zh: 各项税费，一价全含

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际机票

excludes.en: Visa fees
excludes.zh: 签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅行保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless noted
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐（特别注明者除外）

excludes.en: Optional activities, e.g. Interlaken paragliding (EUR 220), Jungfrau summit panoramic cable car (EUR 230), First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip (EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费推荐项目，如因特拉肯高空滑翔伞（220欧元）、少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）、菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费

excludes.en: Personal expenses
excludes.zh: 个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 第戎（勃艮第）
timeline.description_en: After morning assembly, drive to Dijon, capital of Burgundy, famed for red wine, snails and mustard; visit the old town and Notre-Dame de Dijon. In the afternoon explore a Burgundy winery with its courtyard, cellars and vineyards, with a sommelier-led tasting, then check in to a Relais & Chateaux castle hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早上集合后前往勃艮第大区首府第戎——红酒、蜗牛与芥末之乡，参观第戎老城与第戎圣母院；午后前往勃艮第葡萄产区，参观酒庄庭院、酒窖与葡萄园，由专业侍酒师讲解品鉴，随后入住罗莱夏朵古堡酒店。

timeline.title_en: Bourrais to Lausanne, Vevey, Montreux & Interlaken
timeline.title_zh: 波尔莱斯内 - 洛桑 - 沃韦 - 蒙特勒 - 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Drive to flower-filled Lausanne, stroll the Olympic Park and Ouchy waterfront, then follow Switzerland's most scenic Lake Geneva route past the UNESCO Lavaux vineyard terraces. In the afternoon admire Chillon Castle reflected in the lake before continuing via Lake Thun to the lakeside Giessbach hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往四季鲜花盛开的洛桑，自由游览奥林匹克公园与乌希码头，随后驶上最精彩的日内瓦湖环湖景观之路，途经世界文化遗产拉沃葡萄梯田。下午欣赏倒映湖中的蒙特勒西庸城堡，再经图恩湖入住湖畔吉斯巴赫酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰地区 - 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Head into the Jungfrau region: by coach (included) visit the red-train station at Wilderswil, the dreamy slopes of Grindelwald and views of the Jungfrau and Eiger from Lauterbrunnen. Optional self-paid upgrades to the Jungfrau summit or First gondola are available. Then explore Interlaken town before returning to the Giessbach hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 前往少女峰地区：随车（费用包含）游览维尔德斯维尔的红色火车站、格林德尔瓦尔德梦幻山坡，并在劳特布龙嫩远观少女峰与艾格冰川。亦可自费升级少女峰登顶或菲斯特缆车。之后游览因特拉肯小镇，返回吉斯巴赫酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken to Lungern, Lucerne & Zurich (GoldenPass train)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 龙疆 - 卢塞恩 - 苏黎世（金色山口列车）
timeline.description_en: Visit Lungern lake and village, then board the GoldenPass panoramic train to Lucerne, winding through stunning Alpine scenery. In the afternoon tour Lake Lucerne, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower, before continuing to Zurich for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览龙疆湖及小镇风光，随后乘坐金色山口全景观光列车前往卢塞恩，沿途穿山越岭饱览美景。下午游览卢塞恩湖、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，之后前往苏黎世入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 米兰
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore Zurich's old town, Lake Zurich, Lindenhof park and the Limmat riverside. Then cross the Alps into Italy and visit Milan, taking in the landmark Milan Cathedral (exterior) and the elegant Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Overnight in central Milan.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览苏黎世老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园，漫步利马特河畔。随后沿阿尔卑斯山脉进入意大利，自由参观米兰地标米兰大教堂（外观）与欧洲最美商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。夜宿米兰市中心。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to Venice and explore St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These buildings rising from the water, linked by winding canals, give Venice its unforgettable romance. Overnight in Venice.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建于水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一道，让威尼斯的浪漫久久难忘。夜宿威尼斯。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Drive to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit Santa Maria del Fiore (the Duomo), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazzale Michelangelo, where a panoramic view of the whole city unfolds, a perfect spot for sunrise and sunset. Overnight at a Tuscan villa hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥以及米开朗琪罗广场，在此登高俯瞰，全城风景尽收眼底，是观赏日出日落的绝佳之地。夜宿佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳庄园别墅酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 五渔村 - 比萨 - 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Take the scenic train to the Cinque Terre and explore the colourful cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast. In the afternoon visit Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Square of Miracles, then return to the Tuscan villa hotel. (If weather or rail strikes prevent the Cinque Terre, the coast is toured by coach instead.)
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后乘坐五渔村景观火车，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的彩色渔村。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后返回托斯卡纳庄园别墅酒店。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法前往五渔村，行程将改为乘大巴游览海岸城市。）

timeline.title_en: Florence to San Gimignano, Siena, Pienza & Rome
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 圣吉米尼亚诺 - 锡耶纳 - 皮恩扎 - 罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore the medieval towered town of San Gimignano, then Siena with its old town, cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo and Torre del Mangia (exterior). Continue to Pienza and stop along the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia for photos before driving on to Rome. Overnight in Rome.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览以中世纪塔楼闻名的圣吉米尼亚诺小镇，随后前往锡耶纳，游览古城、锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。之后前往皮恩扎，并在奥尔恰谷绝柏小路自由拍照，再驶往罗马入住酒店。夜宿罗马。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马深度徒步游览
timeline.description_en: After breakfast take a deep-dive walking tour of Rome, the Eternal City and cradle of the Roman Empire. See the Colosseum (exterior) and Pantheon (exterior), and visit the Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (exterior). The tour concludes in the early afternoon. (Rome's centre is a restricted traffic zone, so the day is on foot, about 5 km round trip; wear comfortable shoes.)
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后徒步深度游览永恒之城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地。参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），当天午后结束行程。（罗马古城核心区为车辆禁行区，当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适的鞋。）

meeting_en: Paris, France. Group assembles in central Paris on the morning of Day 1 before departure to Dijon.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎。第1天上午于巴黎市区集合，随后出发前往第戎。

title_en: Paris Art & Culture Panorama: 3-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 巴黎全景人文艺术之旅3天跟团游
short_en: Three days exploring the soul of Paris: a guided Louvre tour, a Seine river cruise, the Palace of Versailles, and the city's elegant fashion boulevards.
short_zh: 三天深度领略巴黎之魂：卢浮宫专人讲解、塞纳河游船、凡尔赛宫，以及奥斯曼大街的优雅时尚。
desc_en: This three-day Paris tour pairs world-class art with the city's living culture. Begin with an in-depth guided visit to the Louvre led by a French national-museum lecturer, then take in Notre-Dame, the Eiffel Tower, and a romantic Seine river cruise. Day two crosses to the Baroque splendour of the Palace of Versailles before returning to the fashion heart of Paris along Boulevard Haussmann. A relaxed final morning and a midday checkout round off the journey, with central 4-star hotels and a Chinese-speaking guide throughout.
desc_zh: 这趟三天巴黎之旅将世界级艺术与城市鲜活的人文风情融为一体。首日由法兰西国家博物馆讲解师带您深度参观卢浮宫，随后游览巴黎圣母院、埃菲尔铁塔，并乘塞纳河游船感受浪漫风光。次日前往巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫，再返回巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街。末日睡到自然醒、午时退房自行散团。全程入住市中心四星级酒店，配中文导游。

highlights.en: In-depth guided Louvre visit led by a French national-museum lecturer
highlights.zh: 由法兰西国家博物馆讲解师带领深度参观卢浮宫

highlights.en: Romantic Seine river cruise past Notre-Dame, the Louvre and the Alexandre III bridge
highlights.zh: 乘塞纳河游船，途经巴黎圣母院、卢浮宫与亚历山大三世大桥

highlights.en: Visit the Baroque masterpiece, the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 参观巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: Stroll the fashion heart of Paris: Boulevard Haussmann, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps
highlights.zh: 漫步巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街、老佛爷百货与春天百货

highlights.en: See Notre-Dame, the Eiffel Tower, Les Invalides and Place de la Concorde
highlights.zh: 饱览巴黎圣母院、埃菲尔铁塔、荣军院与协和广场

highlights.en: Central Paris 4-star hotels (Novotel / Mercure or equivalent)
highlights.zh: 入住巴黎市中心四星级酒店（诺富特/美居或同级）

highlights.en: All listed attraction tickets included — Louvre, Versailles and Seine cruise
highlights.zh: 含全部所列景点门票：卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫与塞纳河游船

highlights.en: Chinese-speaking guide and all-inclusive pricing, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 中文导游、全包价格，无强制购物

includes.en: 2 nights in a 4-star hotel
includes.zh: 四星级酒店2晚

includes.en: 2 buffet or other breakfasts (one per hotel night)
includes.zh: 酒店自助早餐或其他形式早餐共2餐

includes.en: City taxes, entry fees, residence tax, tolls, parking, fuel and guide-driver meal allowances
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费及司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Tourist coach or business van for transfers and touring
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide (under 8 pax: van with Chinese-speaking guide-driver; 8+ pax: coach with driver and Chinese guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游或全程中文司机兼导游（8人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）

includes.en: Luggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Attraction tickets: Louvre (with national-museum lecturer), Versailles (with national-museum lecturer), Seine river cruise
includes.zh: 门票：卢浮宫（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛宫（含国家馆讲解师）、塞纳河游船

excludes.en: International and domestic flights
excludes.zh: 国际及境内机票

excludes.en: Passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist visa fees for countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐

excludes.en: Optional or self-paid activities and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自费或自选项目及个人消费

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：卢浮宫与塞纳河游船
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning at the Louvre with an in-depth themed talk by a French national-museum lecturer. In the afternoon explore Notre-Dame, Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde. Overnight at a Paris 4-star hotel (Novotel / Mercure or equivalent).
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解。下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，随后乘塞纳河游船经荣军院、大小皇宫、协和广场等地。夜宿巴黎四星级酒店（诺富特/美居或同级）。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 凡尔赛 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: After breakfast travel to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs for a guided visit (about 1.5 hours). Return to central Paris in the afternoon for free time on Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with the Opéra Garnier (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. Overnight at a Paris 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往位于巴黎西南郊区的凡尔赛宫，参观游览（约1.5小时）。下午返回巴黎市区，自由游览时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，外观巴黎歌剧院，逛春天百货与老佛爷百货等时尚街区。夜宿巴黎四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：自由上午与散团
timeline.description_en: Wake at your own pace, check out of the hotel by 12:00 and end the tour at leisure.
timeline.description_zh: 酒店睡到自然醒，12:00酒店前台退房，自行散团。

meeting_en: Paris — tour starts and ends in Paris; specific hotel pickup details confirmed in the departure notice.
meeting_zh: 巴黎 — 行程在巴黎集合并结束，具体酒店接送安排以出团通知书为准。

title_en: Mont-Saint-Michel & Loire Valley Castles 2-Day Small-Group Tour from Paris
title_zh: 圣山与卢瓦尔河谷城堡2天精品小团（巴黎出发）
short_en: A 2-day small-group escape from Paris to mystical Mont-Saint-Michel, the Breton city of Rennes and the Loire Valley's grandest castle, Chambord.
short_zh: 巴黎出发2天精品小团，探访神秘的圣米歇尔山、布列塔尼名城雷恩，以及卢瓦尔河谷最恢弘的香波堡。
desc_en: This intimate 4-8 person tour leads you from Paris to one of France's most iconic sights, the tidal island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel, where you photograph the winding river, the sacred mount and grazing sheep across the Normandy flats. You then overnight in Rennes, the historic capital of Brittany, before heading into the Loire Valley to explore Chambord, the largest and most magnificent of the valley's UNESCO-listed Renaissance chateaux. With all attraction entries included and no forced shopping, it is a culture-focused two-day journey blending Breton heritage and French royal grandeur.
desc_zh: 这趟4-8人精品小团带您从巴黎出发，前往法国最具标志性的景点之一——潮汐孤岛上的圣米歇尔山修道院，在诺曼底滩涂上拍摄蜿蜒小河、圣山与羊群的治愈画面。随后夜宿布列塔尼历史名城雷恩，次日深入卢瓦尔河谷，参观河谷城堡群中最大、最恢弘的世界文化遗产——文艺复兴杰作香波堡。全程景点门票一价全含、无强制购物，是一趟融合布列塔尼风情与法兰西皇家气派的2天文化之旅。

highlights.en: Mont-Saint-Michel: France's mystical tidal-island abbey, the third-holiest site in Catholicism
highlights.zh: 圣米歇尔山：法国神秘的潮汐孤岛修道院，天主教第三大圣地

highlights.en: Photograph the winding river, sacred mount and grazing sheep across the Normandy tidal flats
highlights.zh: 在诺曼底滩涂拍摄蜿蜒小河、圣山与羊群的治愈画面

highlights.en: Rennes, the historic capital of Brittany, with its old town and Thabor Garden
highlights.zh: 布列塔尼大区首府雷恩，漫步老城与美丽的他泊花园

highlights.en: Château de Chambord: the largest and grandest castle of the Loire Valley
highlights.zh: 香波堡：卢瓦尔河谷城堡群中最大、最恢弘的城堡

highlights.en: UNESCO-listed Loire Valley, a 280 km ribbon of Renaissance chateaux
highlights.zh: 世界文化遗产卢瓦尔河谷，绵延280公里的文艺复兴城堡群

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: Mont-Saint-Michel Abbey and Chambord entries included
highlights.zh: 一价全含：圣米歇尔山修道院与香波堡门票全包

highlights.en: Intimate 4-8 person small group with no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 4-8人精品小团，无强制购物

highlights.en: Centrally located 4-star hotel in Rennes with Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 雷恩市区4星级酒店，中文司机兼导游全程服务

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 圣米歇尔山 → 雷恩
timeline.description_en: Drive to Mont-Saint-Michel, the independent island off the Normandy coast, to tour the abbey and grounds. Subject to the tides, walk the mirror-like flats at the foot of the mount and head to the favourite photo spot for shots of the winding river, the sacred mount and grazing sheep. Continue to Rennes for the overnight stay.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往诺曼底海岸的独立小岛——圣米歇尔山，游览圣山景区和修道院。根据潮汐情况，漫步山脚下如镜片般的滩涂，并前往热门拍照点，拍摄蜿蜒小河、圣山与羊群的治愈画面，之后前往雷恩入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷恩 → 香波堡 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Rennes, the vibrant capital of Brittany: the old town, the beautiful Thabor Garden and the Parliament of Brittany (exterior). Then drive into the unspoiled Loire Valley to visit Château de Chambord, France's most magnificent castle and a former royal hunting lodge, a Renaissance masterpiece on the UNESCO World Heritage list. Return to Paris to end the trip.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览布列塔尼大区首府、历史与活力之城雷恩，参观雷恩老城、美丽的他泊花园与布列塔尼议会宫（外观）。随后前往原生态的卢瓦尔河谷，参观全法最恢弘的城堡、昔日法国君王狩猎行宫——世界文化遗产香波堡，这座文艺复兴杰作之后返回巴黎，结束美好旅行。

meeting_en: Departs from Paris; pick-up and return in central Paris.
meeting_zh: 巴黎出发，巴黎市区接送，行程结束返回巴黎。

title_en: Normandy & Loire Valley 3-Day Small-Group Tour from Paris
title_zh: 诺曼底与卢瓦尔河谷3天精品小团（巴黎往返）
short_en: A 3-day small-group escape from Paris through Monet's Garden, Honfleur, Mont-Saint-Michel, Saint-Malo and the Loire Valley castles, with Michelin-star dining.
short_zh: 3天精品小团，从巴黎出发探访莫奈花园、翁弗勒尔、圣米歇尔山、圣马洛与卢瓦尔河谷城堡群，入住米其林城堡酒店。
desc_en: This 3-day small-group journey (4-8 travellers) loops out from Paris into Normandy and the Loire Valley, tracing French art, history and gastronomy. Day one follows the Impressionists through Monet's Garden at Giverny, the fishing port of Honfleur and the twin towns of Deauville and Trouville to the gourmet city of Caen. Day two reaches the island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel and the corsair city of Saint-Malo before settling into a Loire Valley chateau hotel. The final day explores the water-borne castle of Chenonceau, the old town of Blois and the majestic royal hunting lodge of Chambord before returning to Paris.
desc_zh: 这趟3天精品小团（4-8人）从巴黎出发，环游诺曼底与卢瓦尔河谷，串联法兰西的艺术、历史与美食。第一天追随印象派脚步，游览吉维尼的莫奈花园、渔港小镇翁弗勒尔以及双子之城多维尔与特鲁维尔，傍晚抵达美食之都卡昂。第二天前往海上孤岛圣米歇尔山与海盗古城圣马洛，随后入住卢瓦尔河谷城堡酒店。最后一天探访建在水上的舍农索城堡、古朴的布洛瓦老城与宏伟的皇家狩猎行宫香波堡，之后返回巴黎，结束旅程。

highlights.en: Monet's Garden at Giverny, birthplace of Impressionist inspiration (open April-October)
highlights.zh: 吉维尼莫奈花园，印象派灵感的发源地（4月初至10月末开放）

highlights.en: Mont-Saint-Michel, the legendary island abbey rising from the Normandy tidal flats
highlights.zh: 圣米歇尔山，矗立于诺曼底潮汐滩涂之上的传奇海上修道院

highlights.en: Saint-Malo, the walled corsair city and Brittany's celebrated gourmet old town
highlights.zh: 圣马洛，被海盗城墙环绕的布列塔尼美食古城

highlights.en: UNESCO Loire Valley castles: Chenonceau, Blois old town and the grand Chambord
highlights.zh: 世界文化遗产卢瓦尔河谷城堡群：舍农索城堡、布洛瓦老城与宏伟的香波堡

highlights.en: Impressionist coast: Honfleur fishing port and the twin towns of Deauville & Trouville
highlights.zh: 印象派海岸：翁弗勒尔渔港与双子之城多维尔、特鲁维尔

highlights.en: Two nights in 5-star Norman chateau hotels, including a Michelin-starred property
highlights.zh: 两晚入住五星级诺曼底城堡酒店，其中一晚为米其林星级酒店

highlights.en: Intimate small group of just 4-8 travellers for a relaxed, cultural deep-dive
highlights.zh: 仅4-8人的轻奢小团，深度文化体验，节奏从容

highlights.en: Optional Michelin-star three-course tasting menu by chef Ivan Vautier in Caen
highlights.zh: 可选名厨伊万沃蒂尔的米其林三道式主厨推荐套餐（卡昂）

includes.en: 2 nights in 5-star chateau hotels (Ivan Vautier Michelin hotel & Chateau d'Artigny or equivalent)
includes.zh: 2晚五星级城堡酒店住宿（伊万沃蒂尔米其林酒店、达赫蒂涅城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店）

includes.en: Daily breakfast
includes.zh: 每日酒店早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程持证中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Private intercity transport for the full route
includes.zh: 全程城际私人交通接送

includes.en: Entries to listed attractions (Monet's Garden, Mont-Saint-Michel, Loire Valley castles)
includes.zh: 行程所列景点门票（莫奈花园、圣米歇尔山、卢瓦尔河谷城堡等）

includes.en: All applicable taxes
includes.zh: 全部相关税费

excludes.en: International and domestic flights
excludes.zh: 国际及境内机票

excludes.en: Visa fees
excludes.zh: 签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐（含可选的伊万沃蒂尔Saveurs三道式主厨推荐套餐，不含酒水）

excludes.en: Optional activities and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自费活动及个人消费

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide-driver
excludes.zh: 司机兼导游小费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 莫奈花园 → 翁弗勒尔 → 多维尔 → 卡昂
timeline.description_en: After gathering in Paris, drive to Monet's Garden in Giverny, then cross the Normandy Bridge to the Impressionist fishing town of Honfleur. Continue to the twin towns of Deauville and Trouville with their well-preserved Norman-Anglo architecture, before reaching the gourmet city of Caen for the night at the Michelin-starred Ivan Vautier hotel (or equivalent 5-star).
timeline.description_zh: 巴黎集合后出发前往吉维尼小镇的莫奈花园，随后横跨诺曼底大桥抵达印象派经典渔港翁弗勒尔。之后游览保留完整诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群的双子之城多维尔与特鲁维尔，傍晚抵达美食之都卡昂，入住伊万沃蒂尔米其林酒店（或同等5星级酒店）。

timeline.title_zh: 卡昂 → 圣米歇尔山 → 圣马洛 → 卢瓦尔河谷
timeline.description_en: In the morning, visit the island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel, walking the mirror-like tidal flats at its foot depending on the tides. Continue to the walled corsair city of Saint-Malo to explore its old town and seaside quarter, then settle into a 5-star chateau hotel in the Loire Valley (Chateau d'Artigny or equivalent).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往诺曼底海上孤岛圣米歇尔山游览，并视潮汐情况漫步山脚下如镜面般的浅水滩涂。随后前往海盗古城圣马洛，游览圣马洛老城及海滨城区，之后入住卢瓦尔河谷的五星级城堡酒店（达赫蒂涅城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店）。

timeline.title_en: Loire Valley → Chenonceau → Blois → Chambord → Paris
timeline.title_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷 → 舍农索 → 布洛瓦 → 香波堡 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Tour the water-borne Chateau de Chenonceau, then head north along the river to the charming old town of Blois. End at Chambord, France's grandest castle and a former royal hunting lodge set amid the wild Loire forests, before returning to Paris where the tour concludes.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览建在水上的舍农索城堡，之后北上沿途参观精致古朴的布洛瓦老城，最后参观全法兰西最恢弘的城堡——香波堡，这座坐落于原生态卢瓦尔河谷丛林中的皇家狩猎行宫。随后返回巴黎，结束美好旅程。

meeting_en: Paris — group assembly at a central Paris meeting point on the morning of Day 1; exact location confirmed in the departure notice.
meeting_zh: 巴黎——第1天上午于巴黎市区集合点集合，具体地点以出团通知书为准。

title_en: Paris & Mont-Saint-Michel 4-Day Art & Heritage Tour
title_zh: 巴黎圣山4天跟团游
short_en: A 4-day deep-dive from the Louvre and Versailles to the island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel and the Loire's Chambord castle.
short_zh: 4天深度之旅，从卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫到海上孤岛圣米歇尔山修道院与卢瓦尔河谷香波堡。
desc_en: This 4-day round trip from Paris pairs two days of in-depth Parisian art and history with two days exploring Normandy and Brittany. Begin with curator-led tours of the Louvre and Versailles, a Seine river cruise and the fashion boulevards of Haussmann, then journey west to the legendary island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel and the Renaissance grandeur of Chambord in the Loire Valley. With a French national-museum lecturer guiding you through royal, religious and Impressionist history, it is an all-inclusive cultural escape that goes far beyond a standard city break.
desc_zh: 这趟从巴黎出发往返的4天行程，将两天巴黎深度艺术人文与两天诺曼底、布列塔尼探索完美结合。先由法国国家博物馆讲解员带您深度参观卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫，乘塞纳河游船、漫步奥斯曼时尚大街，再向西前往传奇的海上孤岛圣米歇尔山修道院，以及卢瓦尔河谷文艺复兴瑰宝香波堡。讲解员为您细说法兰西皇室正史、宗教史与印象派艺术，是一段远超普通城市游的一价全含文化之旅。

highlights.en: Curator-led, in-depth tour of the Louvre by a French national-museum lecturer
highlights.zh: 法国国家博物馆讲解员主题深度精讲卢浮宫

highlights.en: Seine river cruise aboard the famous glass-roofed bateaux-mouches past Notre-Dame and the Louvre
highlights.zh: 乘著名透明船舱苍蝇船夜游塞纳河，途经巴黎圣母院、卢浮宫

highlights.en: Visit the Baroque masterpiece of the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 参观巴洛克圣殿凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: Mont-Saint-Michel island abbey, a UNESCO World Heritage site
highlights.zh: 世界文化遗产——海上孤岛圣米歇尔山修道院

highlights.en: Chambord, the grandest Renaissance castle of the Loire Valley
highlights.zh: 卢瓦尔河谷最恢弘的文艺复兴城堡香波堡

highlights.en: All attractions included — Louvre, Versailles, Seine cruise, Mont-Saint-Michel abbey & Chambord
highlights.zh: 一价全含——卢浮宫、凡尔赛、塞纳河游船、圣山修道院、香波堡门票

highlights.en: Small-group experience (4-8 people) for the Mont-Saint-Michel leg, with no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 圣山段4-8人精品小团，全程无强制购物

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels with daily breakfast and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 市区四星级酒店、每日早餐、中文司机兼导游全程服务

includes.en: 3 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 四星级酒店住宿3晚

includes.en: 3 buffet (or equivalent) breakfasts at the hotels
includes.zh: 酒店内自助式或其他形式早餐共3餐

includes.en: Tourist coach or business minivan transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车交通

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：卢浮宫与市区精华
timeline.description_en: Morning in-depth, themed tour of the Louvre led by a French national-museum lecturer. In the afternoon visit Notre-Dame, the Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde. Overnight at a 4-star hotel in Paris (Mercure, Novotel or equivalent).
timeline.description_zh: 上午由法国国家博物馆讲解员主题深度讲解卢浮宫。下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，随后乘塞纳河游船经过荣军院、大小皇宫、协和广场等地。夜宿巴黎美居或诺富特或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：凡尔赛宫与时尚街区
timeline.description_en: Morning at the heart of Parisian fashion along Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time around the Opera Garnier (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. In the afternoon tour the Palace of Versailles southwest of the city, then check in. Overnight at a 4-star hotel in Paris (Mercure, Novotel or equivalent).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货及老佛爷等时尚街区。下午前往巴黎西南郊区游览凡尔赛宫，之后入住酒店。夜宿巴黎美居或诺富特或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 圣米歇尔山 → 雷恩
timeline.description_en: Drive to the island of Mont-Saint-Michel on the Normandy coast to explore the village and its abbey, viewing the mirror-like tidal flats at the foot of the mount (tide permitting). Stop at the famous photo spot to capture the winding river, the holy mount and grazing sheep, then continue to Rennes. Overnight at a 4-star hotel in Rennes (Novotel or equivalent).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往诺曼底海滩的独立小岛圣米歇尔山，游览圣山景区与修道院，视潮汐情况欣赏山脚如镜般的诺曼底浅滩。前往热门拍照点，拍摄弯弯小河、圣山与羊群的治愈画面，之后前往雷恩入住酒店。夜宿雷恩诺富特或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷恩 → 香波堡 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore the old town of Rennes, the lovely Thabor gardens and the Brittany Parliament (exterior). Then visit Chambord, the largest and most magnificent castle of the Loire Valley and a royal hunting lodge in the classic medieval style. Return to Paris where the tour ends. No hotel tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览布列塔尼首府雷恩老城、美丽的他泊花园及布列塔尼议会宫（外观）。随后前往卢瓦尔河谷参观全法兰西最恢弘的城堡香波堡——这座中世纪典型布局的法国君王狩猎行宫。之后返回巴黎，结束愉快旅程。当晚无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Departs from Paris; round trip returning to Paris.
meeting_zh: 巴黎出发，往返巴黎。

title_en: Provence & French Riviera by High-Speed Rail – 5-Day Tour from Paris
title_zh: 普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸高铁5天跟团游（巴黎出发）
short_en: A 5-day high-speed rail escape from Paris to lavender fields, hilltop villages, the Verdon Gorge and the glamorous French Riviera.
short_zh: 巴黎高铁直达南法5天：薰衣草花海、山顶古镇、凡尔登大峡谷与蔚蓝海岸名城一网打尽。
desc_en: Board the TGV in Paris and reach Provence in just over two hours for a five-day journey through the soul of southern France. Wander medieval hilltop villages like Gordes (the model for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky'), the Sénanque Abbey and Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, lose yourself in the purple lavender fields of Valensole, and gaze over the turquoise Verdon Gorge and Lake of Sainte-Croix. The route then sweeps along the French Riviera through Cannes, Nice, Menton, Monaco and the clifftop village of Èze, with a Mediterranean boat cruise to Saint-Tropez, Van Gogh's Arles and the Roman city of Nîmes before the high-speed train carries you back to Paris.
desc_zh: 从巴黎乘坐法国高铁TGV，两个多小时直抵南法，开启五天的普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸深度之旅。漫步宫崎骏《天空之城》原型——高德古城，以及塞南克修道院、泉水小镇等中世纪山城；置身瓦朗索勒紫色薰衣草花海，俯瞰碧蓝的凡尔登大峡谷与圣十字湖。随后沿蔚蓝海岸串联戛纳、尼斯、芒通、摩纳哥与悬崖小镇埃兹，乘船巡游地中海直达圣特罗佩，并探访梵高笔下的阿尔勒与古罗马名城尼姆，最后乘高铁返回巴黎。

highlights.en: Explore Gordes, the medieval hilltop village said to inspire Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky'
highlights.zh: 探访宫崎骏《天空之城》原型——中世纪山顶古城高德

highlights.en: Stand amid the purple lavender fields of Valensole (in season) and the Sénanque Abbey
highlights.zh: 走进瓦朗索勒紫色薰衣草花海与塞南克修道院（薰衣草花期内）

highlights.en: Overlook the turquoise Verdon Gorge and the Lake of Sainte-Croix
highlights.zh: 俯瞰碧蓝的凡尔登大峡谷与圣十字湖

highlights.en: Two nights in Nice for a deep dive into the French Riviera's coastal gems
highlights.zh: 尼斯连住两晚，深度游览蔚蓝海岸核心城市

highlights.en: Visit Cannes, Menton's 'lemon town', Monaco and the clifftop village of Èze
highlights.zh: 畅游戛纳、芒通柠檬小镇、摩纳哥公国与悬崖小镇埃兹

highlights.en: Cruise the Mediterranean by boat to the legendary resort of Saint-Tropez
highlights.zh: 乘船出海巡游地中海，直达传奇度假胜地圣特罗佩

highlights.en: Direct TGV high-speed rail from Paris, cutting travel time to about 2.5 hours
highlights.zh: 巴黎高铁TGV直达南法，约两个半小时大幅缩短车程

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: included rail, attractions and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 一价全含：含高铁、指定门票及中文司导服务

includes.en: 4 nights in comfortable 2-3 star hotels
includes.zh: 舒适2-3星级酒店4晚

includes.en: Daily buffet (or equivalent) breakfast at the hotel
includes.zh: 酒店内自助式或其他形式早餐

includes.en: City taxes, entry fees, residence taxes, tolls, parking and fuel surcharges within the itinerary
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Tour coach or private business vehicle for ground transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Two-leg direct TGV high-speed train tickets between Paris and southern France
includes.zh: 巴黎往返南法的高铁直达火车票2程

includes.en: Professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide (or a Chinese-speaking guide-driver for groups under 9; coach + professional driver + Chinese guide for 9 or more)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游服务（9人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，9人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: First-entry tickets to: Saint-Tropez sea ferry, perfume museum, and the Èze hanging gardens
includes.zh: 门票：圣特罗佩出海渡轮、香水博物馆、埃兹空中花园首道门票

excludes.en: International flights
excludes.zh: 国际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees for countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动，请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners (not included in the itinerary)
excludes.zh: 行程中不含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entry to any attraction not specified as included (including 'exterior view' sights and any optional/recommended/experience items)
excludes.zh: 未注明费用包含的景点门票（包括标注“外观”的景点及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等未提及包含的项目）

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 阿维尼翁：普罗旺斯山城
timeline.description_en: Take the TGV from Paris to southern France (about 2-3 hours), then tour the most beautiful Provence villages in turn: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the hilltop town of Gordes and the Sénanque Abbey. Continue to Avignon to explore the old town, the Pont d'Avignon (exterior) and the Palais des Papes (exterior) at leisure before checking in.
timeline.description_zh: 乘坐法国高铁TGV前往南法（约2至3小时）。抵达后开启普罗旺斯绝美小镇之旅，依次游览泉水小镇、高德古城与塞南克修道院。之后前往阿维尼翁，自行参观阿维尼翁古城、罗纳河断桥（外观）、教皇宫（外观），随后入住酒店。

timeline.title_en: Avignon → Valensole → Verdon Gorge → Cannes → Nice
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 → 瓦朗索勒 → 凡尔登大峡谷 → 戛纳 → 尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 road (in season) to soak up the purple sea of blooms. In the afternoon visit Europe's Verdon Gorge and the Lake of Sainte-Croix, then the film town and seaside resort of Cannes for the Palais des Festivals and the walk of fame, before arriving in Nice by evening. (If lavender is not in bloom, a ceramics town is visited instead.)
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（花期内），置身浪漫紫色花海。下午游览欧洲的凡尔登大峡谷与圣十字湖，随后前往电影重镇及海滨小城戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道，傍晚抵达尼斯。（如无法参观薰衣草，则改为参观陶瓷小镇。）

timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 → 芒通 → 摩纳哥 → 埃兹 → 尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast visit Menton, the 'lemon town', then the Principality of Monaco and its yacht harbour. Continue to the clifftop village of Èze to gaze over the Mediterranean from its 'eagle's nest' gardens. Return to Nice for free time at the Baie des Anges beach and the Promenade des Anglais.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往芒通游览“柠檬小镇”，随后前往摩纳哥公国，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头。之后前往悬崖小镇埃兹，从地中海风情的“鹫巢”俯瞰地中海。返回尼斯，自由游览天使湾沙滩与英格兰海滨大道等景点。

timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 → 圣特罗佩（出海巡游） → 阿尔勒 → 尼姆
timeline.description_en: Morning to the Riviera town of Saint-Raphaël, then board a boat at Sainte-Maxime to cruise the Mediterranean across to the art town of Saint-Tropez (about 20 minutes). Continue by coach to Arles to see the old town, the Van Gogh café and sunflower fields (in season), arriving by evening in the 'water-spirit city' of Nîmes.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往蔚蓝海岸海滨重镇圣拉斐尔，随后在圣马克西姆乘船出海巡游地中海，直达海洋艺术之城圣特罗佩（约20分钟）。之后乘巴士前往阿尔勒，参观老城区、梵高咖啡馆与向日葵花田（花期内），傍晚抵达水精灵之城尼姆。

timeline.title_zh: 尼姆 / 阿维尼翁 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, take a walking tour of the Roman old town of Nîmes to discover its ancient amphitheatre and the secret Jardin de la Fontaine (about 1 hour). Then depart from Nîmes or Avignon station by TGV back to Paris Gare de Lyon, ending the southern France journey.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马竞技场与神秘花园（约1小时）。随后从尼姆或阿维尼翁火车站乘坐法国TGV高铁抵达巴黎里昂火车站，结束南法旅程。

meeting_en: Paris — departure by TGV high-speed train from a Paris station; the tour returns to Paris Gare de Lyon.
meeting_zh: 巴黎——从巴黎火车站乘坐TGV高铁出发，行程结束返回巴黎里昂火车站。

title_en: France, Switzerland & Italy 6-Day Tour: Paris to Milan One-Way
title_zh: 法瑞意6天跟团游：巴黎至米兰单程路线
short_en: A 6-day one-way journey from Paris to Milan via Geneva, Interlaken, Lucerne and Zurich, with the Louvre, Versailles, a Seine cruise and the Jungfrau region.
short_zh: 6天单程之旅，从巴黎一路游览至米兰，途经日内瓦、因特拉肯、卢塞恩与苏黎世，深度体验卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫、塞纳河游船与少女峰地区。
desc_en: This 6-day one-way escorted tour runs deep from Paris to Milan with no backtracking, cutting coach mileage so you spend more time sightseeing. Begin with two full days in Paris exploring the Louvre with a French national-museum guide, Notre-Dame, a Seine river cruise and Versailles, then cross into Switzerland for Geneva's lakeside old town, the two-lakes Interlaken and Jungfrau region, the fairy-tale village of Lungern, Lucerne and Zurich. The journey closes along the Alps in Milan with its iconic Duomo and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Themes weave together world-class art, French elegance, Alpine lakes and snow peaks, and Italian fashion.
desc_zh: 这是一条从巴黎到米兰的6天单程深度游线路，单程行程不走回头路，大幅降低大巴行车里程，让您把更多时间留给游览。行程以巴黎两整天开篇，由法国国家馆讲解师带您深度品鉴卢浮宫，并游览巴黎圣母院、乘塞纳河游船、参观凡尔赛宫；随后进入瑞士，游览日内瓦湖畔老城、两湖之间的因特拉肯与少女峰地区、童话小镇龙疆、卢塞恩与苏黎世；最后沿阿尔卑斯山脉抵达时尚之都米兰，瞻仰米兰大教堂与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。世界级艺术、法式优雅、阿尔卑斯湖光雪山与意式时尚交织成一段美好旅程。

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre tour led by a French national-museum guide
highlights.zh: 由法国国家馆讲解师带领深度游览卢浮宫

highlights.en: Seine river cruise past Notre-Dame, the bridges and the Louvre
highlights.zh: 乘塞纳河游船，途经巴黎圣母院、各座大桥与卢浮宫

highlights.en: Versailles Palace and the Opera / Haussmann fashion district
highlights.zh: 游览凡尔赛宫与奥斯曼大街、巴黎歌剧院时尚街区

highlights.en: Geneva lakeside old town, Flower Clock and Jet d'Eau
highlights.zh: 日内瓦湖畔老城、花钟与大喷泉

highlights.en: Two-lakes Interlaken and panoramic views of the Jungfrau region
highlights.zh: 两湖之间的因特拉肯与少女峰地区全景

highlights.en: Fairy-tale Lungern village, Lucerne and Zurich along the lakes
highlights.zh: 童话小镇龙疆、卢塞恩与苏黎世的湖光山色

highlights.en: Milan's Gothic Duomo and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II
highlights.zh: 米兰哥特式大教堂与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊

highlights.en: One-way deep route, city-centre 4-star hotels, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路，市中心四星酒店，全程无强制购物

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (Mercure/Novotel and equivalents)
includes.zh: 市中心四星级酒店（美居/诺富特及同等级别）

includes.en: Daily breakfast
includes.zh: 每日酒店早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver service
includes.zh: 持证中文导游兼司机服务

includes.en: Intercity coach transport along the route
includes.zh: 全程城际大巴交通

includes.en: Listed attraction entries (incl. Louvre and Versailles guided visits)
includes.zh: 行程所列景点门票（含卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫讲解游览）

includes.en: In-depth Louvre commentary by a French national-museum guide
includes.zh: 法国国家馆讲解师卢浮宫深度讲解

includes.en: Coach tour of the Grindelwald / Jungfrau scenic area (recommended option one)
includes.zh: 乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德／少女峰景区（推荐项目一，含费用）

includes.en: Local taxes
includes.zh: 当地税费

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Visa fees
excludes.zh: 签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 午餐与晚餐

excludes.en: Optional Jungfrau panoramic cable-car summit (EUR 230)
excludes.zh: 自费少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）

excludes.en: Optional First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round trip (EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）

excludes.en: Personal expenses and gratuities
excludes.zh: 个人消费与小费

excludes.en: Note: in peak season the Louvre in-house guide fee (EUR 10/person) is refunded if commentary is restricted
excludes.zh: 提示：旺季若馆内限制讲解，将退还卢浮宫馆内讲解费10欧元/每位

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：卢浮宫与塞纳河游船
timeline.description_en: Morning in-depth visit to the Louvre with a French national-museum guide presenting selected masterpieces. Afternoon visit to Notre-Dame, the Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and Champ de Mars, followed by a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde.
timeline.description_zh: 上午由法国国家馆讲解师精选主题，深度讲解卢浮宫博物馆。下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，随后乘塞纳河游船观赏荣军院、大小皇宫（外观）与协和广场等地。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：凡尔赛宫与时尚街区
timeline.description_en: Morning in the Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale fashion district, with free time around the Opera (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. Afternoon tour of the Palace of Versailles southwest of the city before returning to the hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往奥斯曼大街与皇家大道时尚中心，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爷等街区。下午前往巴黎西南郊的凡尔赛宫游览，之后返回酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for Geneva, capital of French-speaking Switzerland. On arrival explore the old town, the lakefront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau, and the food-and-shop "Flower Bridge" district before checking into the hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦。抵达后游览日内瓦老城、湖区、花钟与大喷泉，并漫步汇集当地美食与特色商店的“花桥”区域，随后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 → 因特拉肯（少女峰地区）
timeline.description_en: Travel to Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun, with free time on Hoheweg or in nearby villages. Optional add-ons in the Jungfrau region: a coach tour of Grindelwald (included), the Jungfrau panoramic cable-car summit (EUR 230), or the First aerial gondola and Cliff Walk (EUR 70) — choose one only.
timeline.description_zh: 前往位于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯，可自由游览何维克街及宁静村庄。少女峰地区可三选一：乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德（含费用）、自费乘全景缆车登顶少女峰（230欧元），或自费乘菲斯特空中贡多拉与悬崖栈道（70欧元）。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 卢塞恩 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Morning at the idyllic village of Lungern by its lake. Continue to Lucerne for the lake scenery, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower, then on to Zurich for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往世外桃源般的龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖与小镇风光。之后前往卢塞恩，欣赏卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，再前往苏黎世入住。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: After breakfast see Zurich's Grossmunster (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Then cross the Alps to Milan, fashion capital, with free time at the iconic Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街。之后沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往时尚之都米兰，自由参观地标米兰大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊，行程圆满结束。

meeting_en: Paris, France — tour departs from your central Paris hotel (Mercure/Novotel or equivalent); exact pickup confirmed in the final departure notice.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎 — 行程从巴黎市中心酒店（美居/诺富特或同等）出发，具体接团地点以出团通知书为准。

title_en: France-Switzerland-Italy 8-Day Tour: Paris to Rome One-Way Deep Route
title_zh: 法瑞意8天跟团游：巴黎至罗马单程深度路线
short_en: 8-day Paris-to-Rome escorted journey through all four Swiss language regions and Italy's Renaissance cities, with intercity rail, 4-star city hotels and taxes all included.
short_zh: 8天巴黎至罗马单程跟团游，纵贯瑞士四大语区与意大利文艺复兴名城，城际火车、市区四星酒店及税费全含。
desc_en: This 8-day one-way escorted tour runs deep from Paris to Rome, cutting coach mileage by entering and exiting at two different cities. From Lake Geneva and the Jungfrau region to Lucerne, Zurich, Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, Pisa and the medieval hill towns of Siena and Pienza, you traverse all four Swiss language regions and tour one Italian city a day. Hand-picked city-centre 4-star hotels keep sightseeing efficient, and all taxes are included with no hidden fees.
desc_zh: 这条8天单程跟团线路从巴黎一路深度玩到罗马，两点进出大幅缩短大巴行车里程。行程从日内瓦湖与少女峰地区，延伸至卢塞恩、苏黎世、米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、比萨，以及锡耶纳与皮恩扎等中世纪山城，纵贯瑞士四大语区，并在意大利每天游览一座城市。精选市中心四星酒店提升游览效率，各项税费全含、绝无隐藏费用。

highlights.en: Lake Geneva, the flower clock and the Jet d'Eau in Switzerland's French-speaking capital
highlights.zh: 瑞士法语区首府日内瓦：日内瓦湖、花钟与大喷泉

highlights.en: Interlaken and the Jungfrau region between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun, the 'eyes of God'
highlights.zh: 因特拉肯与少女峰地区，畅游有'上帝左右眼'之称的布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间

highlights.en: Lucerne's lakeside, Lion Monument and Chapel Bridge, plus the idyllic village of Lungern
highlights.zh: 卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥，及世外桃源般的龙疆小镇

highlights.en: Milan Cathedral and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II in Italy's fashion capital
highlights.zh: 时尚之都米兰：米兰大教堂与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, St Mark's Basilica, the Bridge of Sighs and Doge's Palace
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯：圣马可广场、圣马可大教堂、叹息桥与总督宫

highlights.en: Florence, cradle of the Renaissance: the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Ponte Vecchio and Piazza della Signoria
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、老桥与市政广场

highlights.en: The Cinque Terre cliffside villages by scenic train, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and Siena's old town
highlights.zh: 景观列车游五渔村悬崖渔村、比萨斜塔与锡耶纳古城

highlights.en: Brand promise: intercity rail included, city-centre 4-star hotels, one-way deep route, no forced shopping, all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 品牌承诺：城际火车全含、市中心四星酒店、单程深度路线、无强制购物、税费全含一价全包

includes.en: Intercity rail as scheduled (e.g. the Cinque Terre scenic train)
includes.zh: 行程内城际火车（如五渔村景观列车）

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (or equivalent) throughout
includes.zh: 全程市中心四星级酒店（或同等级别）

includes.en: Daily breakfast at the hotel
includes.zh: 酒店内每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver
includes.zh: 持证中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Intercity ground transport by private vehicle
includes.zh: 城际专车地面交通

includes.en: Guided coach tour of the Grindelwald / Jungfrau scenery (recommended option one, included)
includes.zh: 乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德/少女峰地区梦幻山坡（推荐项目一，费用包含）

includes.en: Listed sightseeing as per itinerary (most landmarks viewed from outside)
includes.zh: 行程所列景点游览（多数地标为外观游览）

includes.en: All applicable taxes and fees, no hidden charges
includes.zh: 各项税费全含，绝无隐藏费用

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Visa fees and travel insurance
excludes.zh: 签证费及旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners (e.g. the Venetian cuttlefish-ink pasta three-course meal is at own expense)
excludes.zh: 午餐与晚餐（如威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式餐为自理）

excludes.en: Optional Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the Top of Europe (approx. EUR 230)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：少女峰全景缆车登顶（约230欧元）

excludes.en: Optional First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip and Cliff Walk (approx. EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票及悬崖天梭栈道（约70欧元）

excludes.en: Attraction entries not listed in the itinerary and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 行程未列明的景点门票及个人消费

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 司机及导游小费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 -> 日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Depart Paris in the morning for Geneva, capital of French-speaking Switzerland. Explore Geneva's old town, the lakeside, the flower clock and the Jet d'Eau, and stroll the lively flower-bridge district of local food and specialty shops. Overnight at a 4-star hotel near the Geneva harbour in Annemasse.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从巴黎出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦。抵达后游览日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟与大喷泉，并漫步云集当地美食与特色商店的'花桥'区域。入住安纳马斯日内瓦港四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 -> 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Head to Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun. Wander Hoheweg and the quiet villages, or join the included coach tour of the Grindelwald/Jungfrau scenery; optionally ride the panoramic cable car to the Top of Europe (approx. EUR 230) or the First gondola for the Cliff Walk (approx. EUR 70). Overnight at a 4-star lake-and-mountain-view hotel in Sigriswil.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往位于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯。可自由游览何维克街及宁静村庄，或随车游览格林德尔瓦尔德/少女峰地区；亦可自费乘全景缆车登顶少女峰（约230欧元）或乘菲斯特贡多拉游悬崖栈道（约70欧元）。入住锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 -> 龙疆 -> 卢塞恩 -> 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Visit the idyllic lakeside village of Lungern, then Lucerne for its lake scenery, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal water tower. Continue to Zurich for the night at a 4-star hotel in the Limmat valley.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往世外桃源般的龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖与小镇风光。之后抵达卢塞恩，欣赏卢塞恩湖光山色，参观狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔。随后前往苏黎世，入住利马塔尔河谷四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 -> 米兰
timeline.description_en: After breakfast see Zurich Cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse, then cross the Alps to the fashion capital of Milan. Admire the landmark Milan Cathedral (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's finest shopping arcades. Overnight at a 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街，随后沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往时尚之都米兰。抵达后自由参观地标米兰大教堂（外观）及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一——埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。入住四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 -> 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to the water city of Venice. Visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior), where buildings on the water and winding canals create Venice's lingering romance. You may sample Venetian cuttlefish-ink pasta (at own expense). Overnight at a 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯。抵达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观），水上建筑与蜿蜒水巷交织出威尼斯久久难忘的浪漫。可品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式（自理）。入住四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 -> 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Set off for Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Tour the old town: Santa Maria del Fiore (the Duomo, the world's third-largest cathedral), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and Piazza and Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Overnight at a 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨。参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥，以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。入住四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 -> 五渔村 -> 比萨 -> 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Take the scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliffside villages of the Cinque Terre. In the afternoon visit Pisa for the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, then continue to Siena. Note: in bad weather or rail strikes the Cinque Terre may be toured by coach or another means. Overnight at a 4-star hotel in Siena.
timeline.description_zh: 上午乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽五渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其他形式游览海岸线城市。入住锡耶纳四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 -> 皮恩扎 -> 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore Siena's old town: the Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Visit the medieval town of Pienza for Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), pause for photos along the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia, then arrive in Rome where the journey ends.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。之后前往中世纪古城皮恩扎，参观二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观），在奥尔恰谷绝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后结束美好旅程。

meeting_en: Paris, France — tour departs from Paris in the morning and ends in Rome (one-way route).
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎——行程上午从巴黎出发，于罗马结束（单程路线）。

title_en: France-Switzerland-Italy 9-Day Group Tour: Paris to Rome One-Way
title_zh: 法瑞意9天跟团游：巴黎至罗马单程深度线
short_en: A one-way 9-day journey from Paris to Rome through the Swiss Alps and Italy's Renaissance heart, with included transport, city-centre 4-star hotels and no forced shopping.
short_zh: 9天单程之旅，从巴黎一路深入瑞士阿尔卑斯与意大利文艺复兴名城至罗马，含交通、市中心四星酒店，绝无强制购物。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Paris to Rome on a deep, low-mileage route that crosses Switzerland's four language regions before sweeping down through Italy's most storied cities. Stand by Lake Geneva, gaze at the Jungfrau region from Interlaken, wander lakeside Lucerne and the fairy-tale village of Iseltwald, then cross the Alps into fashionable Milan, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence, the cliffside Cinque Terre, leaning Pisa and medieval Siena, finishing in the Eternal City of Rome. With one Italian city explored each day, brand-name city hotels and all taxes included, it pairs Alpine scenery with art and history at an easy, all-inclusive pace.
desc_zh: 采用巴黎进、罗马出的单程优选行程，大幅降低大巴行车里程，贯穿瑞士四大语区并一路深入意大利最具魅力的名城。从日内瓦湖畔出发，在因特拉肯遥望少女峰地区，漫步湖光山色的卢塞恩与童话小镇龙疆，翻越阿尔卑斯进入时尚之都米兰、浪漫水城威尼斯、文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨、悬崖渔村五渔村、比萨斜塔与中世纪古城锡耶纳，最终抵达永恒之城罗马。意大利段每天游览一座城市，精选品牌城市酒店，各项税费一价全含，将阿尔卑斯风光与艺术历史完美结合。

highlights.en: One-way Paris-to-Rome deep route that minimises coach mileage
highlights.zh: 巴黎罗马两点进出，单程深度行程，大幅降低大巴行车里程

highlights.en: Cross all four of Switzerland's language regions in depth
highlights.zh: 贯穿瑞士四大语区，深度游览

highlights.en: Lake Geneva, the Jungfrau region and lakeside Lucerne in the Swiss Alps
highlights.zh: 饱览日内瓦湖、少女峰地区与湖光山色的卢塞恩

highlights.en: Fairy-tale Alpine village of Iseltwald on the Golden Pass route
highlights.zh: 金色山口沿线世外桃源般的童话小镇龙疆

highlights.en: One Italian city explored each day: Milan, Venice, Florence and Rome
highlights.zh: 意大利段每天游览一座城市：米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、罗马

highlights.en: Scenic train along the cliffside Cinque Terre and the Tuscan Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 景观列车游览悬崖渔村五渔村，途经托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷

highlights.en: Brand-name city-centre 4-star hotels for efficient sightseeing and quality rest
highlights.zh: 精选市中心品牌四星酒店，提高游览效率、保证高质量休息

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with all taxes covered and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 税费全含、一价全含，绝无隐藏费用与强制购物

includes.en: 8 nights in city-centre 4-star hotels (or equivalent)
includes.zh: 全程8晚市中心四星级酒店（或同等）

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 每日酒店早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程持证中文司机兼导游

includes.en: All intercity ground transport along the route
includes.zh: 全程城际地面交通

includes.en: Cinque Terre scenic train ride
includes.zh: 五渔村景观列车体验

includes.en: Sightseeing and listed attraction visits per the itinerary
includes.zh: 行程所列景点游览

includes.en: All taxes and fees (all-inclusive, no hidden costs)
includes.zh: 各项税费全含，绝无隐藏费用

excludes.en: International and intra-trip flights
excludes.zh: 国际及行程内机票

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 申根签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners (e.g. Venetian squid-ink pasta set, paid locally)
excludes.zh: 午餐与晚餐（如威尼斯墨鱼面三道式，需自理）

excludes.en: Optional Jungfrau panorama cable car to the summit (approx. EUR 230)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：少女峰全景缆车登顶（约230欧元）

excludes.en: Optional First-Grindelwald aerial gondola return ticket (approx. EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（约70欧元）

excludes.en: Attraction entries marked as exterior-only or not listed
excludes.zh: 标注为外观或未列明的景点门票

excludes.en: Gratuities and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 司导小费及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 -> 日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Depart Paris in the morning for Geneva, capital of Switzerland's French-speaking region. Explore the old town, the Lake Geneva waterfront, the Flower Clock, the Jet d'Eau fountain and the lively Fleur d'Eau bridge area before checking in.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从巴黎出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，游览日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟与大喷泉，并漫步汇集当地美食与特色商店的“花桥”区域，随后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 -> 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Head to Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun. Stroll Hoheweg and the quiet surrounding villages, or join the Grindelwald and Wilderswil Jungfrau-region sights, with optional summit cable car or the First cliff walk available.
timeline.description_zh: 前往位于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街与宁静村庄，或前往格林德尔瓦尔德及维尔德斯维尔少女峰山区，亦可自费登顶少女峰或前往菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 -> 卢塞恩 -> 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Visit the fairy-tale lakeside village of Iseltwald, then continue to Lucerne for the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Drive on to Zurich for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往童话小镇龙疆，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光；之后前往卢塞恩，欣赏卢塞恩湖光山色，参观狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，随后前往苏黎世入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 -> 米兰
timeline.description_en: Tour Zurich's old town with the cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse, then cross the Alps to the fashion capital Milan to see the Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览苏黎世老城：苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街；之后沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往时尚之都米兰，自由参观米兰大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 -> 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to the water city of Venice and visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior), wandering the canals. Optional Venetian squid-ink pasta set dinner (own expense).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与总督宫（外观），漫步蜿蜒水巷。可自费品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 -> 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Continue to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit the old town including the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and the Santa Croce square and church (exterior).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，游览老城：圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥，以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观），随后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 -> 五渔村 -> 比萨 -> 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Ride the scenic train along the Ligurian coast through the cliffside villages of the Cinque Terre. In the afternoon visit Pisa's Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, then continue to Siena. (Cinque Terre may be replaced by a coastal alternative in bad weather or rail strikes.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖上的五渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工，将改以大巴等方式游览海岸城市。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 -> 皮恩扎 -> 罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore medieval Siena's cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the town hall and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Continue to the hill town of Pienza for Piazza Pio II and its cathedral (exterior), with photo stops along the Val d'Orcia cypress lanes en route to Rome.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览锡耶纳古城：锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅（外观）与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）；之后前往皮恩扎古城游览二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观），途中在奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Walk the Eternal City with your guide, seeing the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Free time follows before the tour ends. Note: Rome's old centre is largely pedestrian, with about 5-6 km of walking.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在导游带领下徒步游览永恒之城罗马，参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），之后自由活动并结束愉快旅程。注：罗马古城多为步行街区，当天步行约5-6公里。

meeting_en: Paris, France. The tour departs from Paris on Day 1 and ends in Rome, Italy; exact pickup details are confirmed before departure.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎。行程第1天从巴黎出发，结束于意大利罗马；具体接送细节于出发前确认。

title_en: France & Switzerland Alpine Loop: 5-Day Small-Group Leisure Tour
title_zh: 法瑞环线5天享乐小团
short_en: A relaxed 5-day small-group loop from Paris through Geneva, Bern, Interlaken, the Jungfrau region, Lucerne and Zurich.
short_zh: 5天法瑞环线享乐小团，从巴黎出发，游历日内瓦、伯尔尼、因特拉肯、少女峰地区、卢塞恩与苏黎世。
desc_en: This 5-day small-group loop departs Paris and dives deep into the Swiss Alps, looping through the lakeside old town of Geneva, the medieval UNESCO capital of Bern, the storybook resort of Interlaken beneath the Jungfrau, and the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lucerne and Zurich before returning to Paris. Travellers enjoy the Lake Thun and Lake Brienz 'eyes of God', the Golden Pass scenic rail between Lungern and Lucerne, and a stay at the historic Giessbach castle hotel above Lake Brienz. With seasonal cogwheel trains and lake cruises, optional Jungfrau summit and paragliding add-ons, and city-centre 4-star hotels, it blends Alpine grandeur with leisurely small-group comfort.
desc_zh: 这条5天环线小团从巴黎出发，深入瑞士阿尔卑斯腹地，依次游览日内瓦湖畔老城、被列为世界遗产的中世纪联邦首府伯尔尼、少女峰脚下的童话度假小镇因特拉肯，以及卢塞恩与苏黎世的湖光山色，最后返回巴黎。沿途可饱览有“上帝双眼”之称的图恩湖与布里恩茨湖，乘坐龙疆至卢塞恩段金色山口列车，并入住布里恩茨湖畔的历史名宿吉斯巴赫城堡酒店。行程含季节性齿轮小火车与游船，可自选少女峰登顶、滑翔伞等项目，搭配市中心四星酒店，将阿尔卑斯壮景与小团休闲舒适完美融合。

highlights.en: Stroll Geneva's lakeside old town with the Flower Clock and the iconic Jet d'Eau fountain
highlights.zh: 漫步日内瓦湖畔老城，欣赏花钟与标志性大喷泉

highlights.en: Explore the medieval UNESCO World Heritage old town of Bern, Switzerland's capital
highlights.zh: 游览被列为世界遗产的中世纪联邦首府伯尔尼老城

highlights.en: Take in Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, the storybook 'eyes of God', from Interlaken
highlights.zh: 在因特拉肯饱览有“上帝双眼”之称的图恩湖与布里恩茨湖

highlights.en: Stay at the historic Giessbach castle hotel above Lake Brienz, beside the Giessbach Falls
highlights.zh: 入住布里恩茨湖畔、紧邻吉斯巴赫瀑布的历史名宿吉斯巴赫城堡酒店

highlights.en: Ride the Golden Pass scenic train from Lungern to Lucerne through Alpine peaks
highlights.zh: 乘坐龙疆至卢塞恩段金色山口列车，穿越阿尔卑斯群峰

highlights.en: Discover Lucerne's Chapel Bridge, Water Tower and Lion Monument, plus Zurich's old town
highlights.zh: 探访卢塞恩的卡贝尔廊桥、八角水塔与狮子纪念碑，以及苏黎世老城

highlights.en: Relaxed small group with city-centre 4-star hotels and an included scenic Jungfrau-region drive
highlights.zh: 休闲小团，入住市中心四星酒店，含少女峰地区景观巴士游览

highlights.en: Optional Jungfrau summit cable car, First gondola and paragliding over the Jungfrau
highlights.zh: 可自选少女峰全景缆车登顶、菲斯特空中贡多拉及少女峰滑翔伞

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (4 nights), including the historic Giessbach castle hotel
includes.zh: 市中心四星级酒店住宿（4晚），含历史名宿吉斯巴赫城堡酒店

includes.en: Daily breakfast
includes.zh: 每日酒店早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程持证中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Intercity transport by tourist vehicle and the Golden Pass scenic train (Lungern–Lucerne)
includes.zh: 城际旅游用车及金色山口列车（龙疆—卢塞恩段）

includes.en: Guided scenic drive through the Jungfrau region (Wilderswil red-train station, Grindelwald, Lauterbrunnen viewpoints)
includes.zh: 少女峰地区景观巴士游览（维尔德斯维尔红色火车站、格林德尔瓦尔德、劳特布龙嫩观景）

includes.en: Seasonal cogwheel train and lake cruise (Apr–Oct; replaced by Lucerne cruise / Golden Pass train off-season)
includes.zh: 季节性齿轮小火车及游船（4–10月；非运营期替换为卢塞恩游船／金色山口列车）

includes.en: Local taxes and service charges
includes.zh: 当地税费及服务费

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 申根签证费用

excludes.en: Travel and medical insurance (note: standard travel insurance does not cover high-risk activities such as paragliding)
excludes.zh: 旅游及医疗保险（提示：普通旅游保险不含滑翔伞等高风险项目）

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless specified
excludes.zh: 正餐午餐及晚餐（特别注明者除外）

excludes.en: Optional activities: Jungfrau summit panorama cable car (€230), First aerial gondola round-trip (€70), Interlaken paragliding (€220)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）、菲斯特空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）、因特拉肯高空滑翔伞（220欧元）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide-driver
excludes.zh: 司机兼导游小费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Travel in the morning to Geneva, capital of French-speaking Switzerland, to begin a relaxed holiday. On arrival, explore the old town and lakefront at leisure, taking in the Flower Clock, the great Jet d'Eau fountain and the local eateries and specialty shops clustered along the lakeside.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，开启休闲度假之旅。抵达后自由游览日内瓦老城与湖区，欣赏花钟、大喷泉等景点，漫步云集当地美食与特色商店的湖畔老城。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 → 伯尔尼 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to the federal capital of Bern, a beautifully preserved medieval town of clock towers, fountains, cobbled streets and red-tiled roofs, and explore its UNESCO-listed old town. In the afternoon continue to Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (the 'eyes of God'), where you can opt for a paragliding flight over the Jungfrau region or wander the Höheweg and quiet villages amid greenery.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往瑞士联邦首府伯尔尼，这座保存完好的中世纪小城拥有古朴钟楼、随处可见的喷泉、鹅卵石街道与红瓦屋顶，游览被列为世界遗产的伯尔尼老城。下午前往位于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖（“上帝左右眼”）之间的因特拉肯，可自选滑翔伞鸟瞰少女峰地区，或自由游览何维克街及绿树掩映的宁静村庄。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 少女峰地区
timeline.description_en: Head into the Jungfrau region with an included scenic drive past Wilderswil's famous red railway station, the fairy-tale scenery of Lauterbrunnen and Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau. Optionally ascend the Jungfrau by panorama cable car and cogwheel train to the Sphinx observation deck for views of the snow-capped summit and the great Aletsch Glacier. Overnight at the historic Giessbach castle hotel above Lake Brienz.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往少女峰地区，含景观巴士游览维尔德斯维尔的网红红色火车站、劳特布龙嫩的童话风景及少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德。可自费乘坐全景缆车与齿轮火车登顶少女峰，登上斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰与壮观的阿莱奇冰川。夜宿布里恩茨湖畔的历史名宿吉斯巴赫城堡酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 卢塞恩 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Begin at the idyllic village of Lungern and its lake, then board the Golden Pass scenic train (Lungern–Lucerne section) for a roughly one-hour ride through mountains and valleys. In Lucerne, take in the lake scenery, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Continue to Zurich to visit the Grossmünster cathedral and Lindenhof park along the Limmat river.
timeline.description_zh: 上午抵达龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光，随后乘坐金色山口列车（龙疆—卢塞恩段）约一小时穿山越岭抵达卢塞恩。游览卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，之后前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂、林登霍夫公园并漫步利马特河畔。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Continue exploring Zurich's old town and Lake Zurich in the morning, then set off back to Paris to conclude the journey.
timeline.description_zh: 上午继续游览苏黎世老城区、苏黎世湖等，随后出发返回巴黎，结束愉快行程。

meeting_en: Departs from Paris; pick-up details confirmed in your final tour notice.
meeting_zh: 巴黎出发；具体接团信息以出团通知书为准。

title_en: France, Switzerland & Italy 10-Day Group Tour (Paris to Rome)
title_zh: 法瑞意10天跟团游（巴黎-罗马单程深度路线）
short_en: A 10-day one-way journey from Paris to Rome through the Louvre, Swiss lakes and the Italian Renaissance, travelling by coach and scenic rail with 4-star hotels included.
short_zh: 10天单程深度游，从巴黎一路畅游到罗马，跨越卢浮宫、瑞士湖光山色与意大利文艺复兴名城，全程大巴与景观火车，含四星酒店。
desc_en: This 10-day one-way tour traces a deep route from Paris across the Swiss lakes and Alps and down through Italy's great art cities to Rome, minimising coach mileage so you spend more time sightseeing and less time driving. You begin with two days in Paris (Louvre, Versailles, Seine cruise), cross Switzerland's four language regions via Geneva, Interlaken, Lucerne and Zurich, then explore a different Italian city each day: Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, Pisa, Siena and the Val d'Orcia. A French national-museum lecturer gives in-depth commentary on royal history and the Impressionists, and pricing is fully inclusive with no hidden fees.
desc_zh: 10天单程深度行程，从巴黎出发横穿瑞士湖区与阿尔卑斯山脉，再纵贯意大利艺术名城直抵罗马，单程设计大幅降低大巴行车里程，让您把时间留给游览而非赶路。行程先在巴黎深度两日（卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫、塞纳河游船），随后贯穿瑞士四大语区——日内瓦、因特拉肯、卢塞恩、苏黎世，进入意大利后每天一座城市：米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、比萨、锡耶纳与奥尔恰山谷。由法兰西国家博物馆讲解师深度讲解皇室正史与印象派名作，各项税费一价全含，绝无隐藏费用。

highlights.en: Curated one-way Paris-to-Rome route that cuts coach mileage and adds sightseeing time
highlights.zh: 巴黎至罗马单程优选路线，减少大巴里程、增加游览时间

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre tour led by a French national-museum lecturer (royal history & Impressionists)
highlights.zh: 法兰西国家博物馆讲解师深度讲解卢浮宫（皇室正史与印象派名作）

highlights.en: Baroque masterpiece Versailles and Paris's fashion district around Boulevard Haussmann
highlights.zh: 巴洛克圣殿凡尔赛宫，以及奥斯曼大街时尚艺术街区

highlights.en: Switzerland's four language regions: Geneva lakefront, the Jungfrau area, Lucerne and Zurich
highlights.zh: 贯穿瑞士四大语区：日内瓦湖畔、少女峰地区、卢塞恩与苏黎世

highlights.en: A different Italian city every day: Milan, Venice, Florence, Pisa, Siena
highlights.zh: 意大利每天一城：米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、比萨、锡耶纳

highlights.en: Scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliffside Cinque Terre fishing villages
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖渔村五渔村

highlights.en: Tuscan Val d'Orcia and the medieval gem of Pienza on the way to Rome
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳奥尔恰山谷与中世纪古城皮恩扎，伴您抵达罗马

highlights.en: Intercity rail and coach transfers included, city-centre 4-star hotels, all taxes, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 含城际火车与大巴交通、市中心四星酒店、税费全含、绝无强制购物

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (Mercure/Novotel and equivalent brands)
includes.zh: 市中心四星级酒店（美居/诺富特及同等品牌）

includes.en: Daily breakfast at the hotel
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程持证中文导游兼司机

includes.en: Intercity transport by coach and rail as per itinerary
includes.zh: 行程内城际交通，含大巴及火车

includes.en: French national-museum lecturer for the in-depth Louvre commentary
includes.zh: 法兰西国家博物馆讲解师深度讲解卢浮宫

includes.en: Listed attraction entries (e.g. Louvre, Versailles), Seine river cruise
includes.zh: 行程所列景点门票（如卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫）及塞纳河游船

includes.en: All taxes and fees, fully inclusive with no hidden costs
includes.zh: 各项税费一价全含，绝无隐藏费用

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 申根签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless specified (e.g. Venetian squid-ink pasta set is at own cost)
excludes.zh: 未注明的午餐与晚餐（如威尼斯墨鱼面三道式自理）

excludes.en: Optional Jungfrau activities: coach tour of the region (included option), Jungfrau panorama cable-car to the top (€230), First-Grindelwald aerial gondola return (€70) — choose one only
excludes.zh: 少女峰地区自费三选一：乘车游览少女峰地区（含选项）、少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）、菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返（70欧元）

excludes.en: Versailles guided commentary refunded if group under 3 people; Louvre in-museum guide fee €10/person refunded in peak season when restricted
excludes.zh: 凡尔赛不足3人退还官导讲解（改用讲解器）；旺季卢浮宫限制馆内讲解时退还讲解费10欧元/人

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费

excludes.en: Personal expenses and any items not listed as included
excludes.zh: 个人消费及一切未列入包含项的费用

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-卢浮宫-巴黎
timeline.description_en: Morning in-depth tour of the Louvre with a French national-museum lecturer, then afternoon sightseeing of Notre-Dame, Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and Champ de Mars, capped by a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde.
timeline.description_zh: 上午由法兰西国家博物馆讲解师深度讲解卢浮宫；下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）与战神广场，并乘塞纳河游船饱览荣军院、大小皇宫、协和广场等市中心景点。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-凡尔赛-巴黎
timeline.description_en: Morning at the fashion heart of Paris around Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale — the Opera (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. In the afternoon, visit the Palace of Versailles in the city's south-western suburbs before checking in.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街与皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爷；下午前往西南郊的凡尔赛宫游览，之后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Depart for Geneva, capital of Switzerland's French-speaking region. Explore the old town, Lake Geneva, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau, and wander the Flower Bridge district of local food and shops before checking in near Annemasse.
timeline.description_zh: 出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，游览日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟与大喷泉，并漫步汇集当地美食与特色商店的“花桥”区域，之后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦-因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Travel to Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun — the “left and right eyes of God.” Stroll the Höheweg, or choose one optional Jungfrau experience: a coach tour of the region, the Jungfrau panorama cable-car to the Top of Europe, or the First cliff walk. Overnight at a snow-mountain lake-view hotel in Sigriswil.
timeline.description_zh: 前往坐落于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间、有“上帝左右眼”之称的因特拉肯，可自由游览何维克街，或自费三选一登少女峰地区：乘车游览、全景缆车登顶“欧洲之巅”，或菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-卢塞恩-苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Morning at the idyllic lakeside village of Iseltwald (Lungern), then on to Lucerne for its lake views, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Continue to Zurich for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览世外桃源般的龙疆小镇及湖光山色，之后前往卢塞恩，欣赏卢塞恩湖、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，随后抵达苏黎世入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-米兰
timeline.description_en: After breakfast see Zurich's Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse, then cross the Alps to fashion capital Milan to admire the Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街，之后沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往时尚之都米兰，自由参观米兰大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰-威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to the water city of Venice to see St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior), wandering the canals and bridges of the “Pearl of the Adriatic.” A Venetian squid-ink pasta set meal is available at own cost.
timeline.description_zh: 前往水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与总督宫（外观），漫步水巷桥梁间感受“亚得里亚海明珠”的浪漫。可自费品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Head to the birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence. Explore the old town: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazza Santa Croce with its basilica (exterior).
timeline.description_zh: 前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，游览老城：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥，以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-五渔村-比萨-锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Visit the Cinque Terre's cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast by scenic train, then on to Pisa for the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, before overnighting in Siena. (If weather or rail strikes prevent the Cinque Terre, a coach coastal tour replaces it.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖上的五渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后抵达锡耶纳入住酒店。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改乘大巴游览海岸线城市。）

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳-皮恩扎古城-罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore medieval Siena — the Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall and Torre del Mangia (exterior) — then the hilltop town of Pienza and its Val d'Orcia views, pausing for photos along the cypress lanes before reaching Rome and the journey's end.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览中世纪古城锡耶纳：锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）；之后前往皮恩扎古城，俯瞰奥尔恰山谷，并在丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后结束美好旅程。

meeting_en: Tour departs from Paris, France. Pickup and start point in central Paris confirmed in your final departure notice.
meeting_zh: 行程从法国巴黎出发。巴黎市区集合与接送地点以出团通知书为准。

title_en: France, Switzerland & Italy 14-Day Escorted Tour (Paris to Rome One-Way)
title_zh: 法瑞意14天跟团游（巴黎至罗马单程路线）
short_en: A 14-day Paris-to-Rome one-way grand tour through France, Switzerland and Italy, with city-centre 4-star hotels, expert history talks and all taxes, tickets and ferries included.
short_zh: 巴黎至罗马单程14天，深度畅游法国、瑞士、意大利，入住市中心四星酒店，专业历史讲解，税费、门票、轮渡全含。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Paris to Rome on this 14-day grand tour that links France, Switzerland and Italy with minimal backtracking. Begin with the Louvre, Versailles and a Seine river cruise in Paris, cross Switzerland's four language regions via Geneva, the Jungfrau region, Lucerne and Zurich, then descend into Italy for Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, Siena and the Tuscan countryside. The journey closes in Rome and the Amalfi Coast, with Capri's Blue Grotto, Positano, Amalfi and the ruins of Pompeii. Highlights include six in-depth history talks and four guided city walks, boutique city-centre 4-star hotels, and an all-inclusive price covering taxes, attraction tickets and ferries.
desc_zh: 这条14天单程行程从巴黎一路深入罗马，串联法国、瑞士与意大利，单程推进、大幅减少折返。先在巴黎游览卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫并乘塞纳河游船；随后穿越瑞士四大语区，途经日内瓦、少女峰地区、卢塞恩与苏黎世；再南下意大利畅游米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、锡耶纳及托斯卡纳田园。旅程在罗马与阿马尔菲海岸收尾，探秘卡普里岛蓝洞、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲及庞贝古城遗址。行程含六场深度历史讲解、四场城市漫步，入住市中心精品四星酒店，税费、景点门票、出海轮渡全含。

highlights.en: One-way Paris-to-Rome deep route that minimises coach mileage and backtracking
highlights.zh: 巴黎罗马单程深度路线，大幅降低大巴行车里程与折返

highlights.en: Cross Switzerland's four language regions: Geneva, the Jungfrau region, Lucerne and Zurich
highlights.zh: 贯穿瑞士四大语区：日内瓦、少女峰地区、卢塞恩与苏黎世

highlights.en: Italy highlights every day: Milan, Venice, Florence, Cinque Terre, Siena, Rome and the Amalfi Coast
highlights.zh: 意大利每天一城：米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、锡耶纳、罗马及阿马尔菲海岸

highlights.en: Six in-depth history talks plus four guided city walks, including a national-museum guide at the Louvre
highlights.zh: 六场深度历史讲解、四场城市漫步，含卢浮宫国家博物馆讲解师精讲

highlights.en: Seine river cruise, Versailles Palace, Capri's Blue Grotto and the ruins of Pompeii
highlights.zh: 塞纳河游船、凡尔赛宫、卡普里岛蓝洞与庞贝古城遗址

highlights.en: Boutique city-centre 4-star hotels for efficient sightseeing and quality rest
highlights.zh: 精选市中心精品四星酒店，提高游览效率，确保高质量休息

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: taxes, attraction tickets and ferries fully covered with no hidden costs
highlights.zh: 税费全含：各项税费、景点门票、出海轮渡全含，绝无隐藏费用

highlights.en: Scenic train ride along the Ligurian coast to the cliffside villages of the Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五渔村

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels throughout (Mercure/Novotel and equivalents)
includes.zh: 全程市中心四星级酒店（美居/诺富特及同等酒店）

includes.en: Daily breakfast
includes.zh: 每日酒店早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver and intercity ground transport
includes.zh: 持证中文导游兼司机及城际地面交通

includes.en: All listed attraction entries and city-walk guiding
includes.zh: 行程所列景点门票及城市漫步讲解

includes.en: Six in-depth history talks and four guided city walks
includes.zh: 六场深度历史讲解及四场城市漫步

includes.en: Ferries and out-to-sea boat transfers listed in the itinerary (e.g. Capri, Amalfi Coast)
includes.zh: 行程所列出海轮渡及船程（如卡普里岛、阿马尔菲海岸）

includes.en: Day 4 guided coach tour of the Grindelwald region (recommended option one)
includes.zh: 第4天乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德地区（推荐项目一，费用包含）

includes.en: All taxes and service fees, with no hidden costs
includes.zh: 各项税费及服务费全含，绝无隐藏费用

excludes.en: International flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲国际机票

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 申根签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless specified (e.g. Venice squid-ink pasta set is at own expense)
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐（除非特别注明，如威尼斯墨鱼面三道式自理）

excludes.en: Optional activities: Jungfrau panorama cable car to the summit (€230), First aerial gondola round-trip (€70), Capri Blue Grotto boat fees and tips
excludes.zh: 自费项目：少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）、菲斯特空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）、卡普里岛蓝洞船费及小费

excludes.en: Capri island local transport (cable car/taxi) after disembarking
excludes.zh: 卡普里岛登岛后的当地交通（缆车/出租车）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费

excludes.en: Personal expenses and anything not listed under inclusions
excludes.zh: 个人消费及未列入包含项的其他费用

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-卢浮宫-巴黎
timeline.description_en: Morning guided visit to the Louvre with a French national-museum specialist. In the afternoon see Notre-Dame, Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides and the Grand & Petit Palais.
timeline.description_zh: 上午由法兰西国家馆讲解师精讲卢浮宫；下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，随后乘塞纳河游船饱览荣军院、大小皇宫、协和广场等市中心景点。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-凡尔赛-巴黎
timeline.description_en: Morning at the Haussmann and Royal boulevards, with the Opera Garnier (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. In the afternoon tour the Palace of Versailles southwest of the city before checking in.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往奥斯曼大街与皇家大道，自由游览巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爷等时尚街区；下午游览巴黎西南郊的凡尔赛宫，之后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Depart for Geneva, capital of French-speaking Switzerland. Explore the old town, Lake Geneva, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau, and stroll the lively Flower Bridge district before checking in near Annemasse.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，游览日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟与大喷泉，漫步汇集当地美食与特色商店的“花桥”区域，随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦-因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Travel to Interlaken between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun. Stroll Hoheweg or join the included coach tour of the Grindelwald region; optional add-ons reach the Jungfrau summit by panorama cable car or the First cliff walk. Overnight at a lakeside alpine hotel in Sigriswil.
timeline.description_zh: 前往布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街等地，或参加包含的格林德尔瓦尔德乘车游览；可自费乘全景缆车登顶少女峰或前往菲斯特悬崖栈道。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-龙疆-卢塞恩-苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Visit the idyllic village and lake of Lungern, then Lucerne for the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Continue to Zurich for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往世外桃源般的龙疆小镇游览龙疆湖；之后游览卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，随后前往苏黎世入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-米兰
timeline.description_en: See Zurich's old town: the Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Cross the Alps to fashion capital Milan to admire the Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览苏黎世老城：苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街；之后沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往时尚之都米兰，自由参观米兰大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰-威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to the water city of Venice to see St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior). Optional squid-ink pasta set at own expense.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与总督宫（外观）；可自费品尝威尼斯墨鱼面三道式特色大餐。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Head to the cradle of the Renaissance, Florence, to visit the old town: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Santa Croce Square and Basilica (exterior).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，游览老城景点：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥、圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-五渔村-比萨-锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Ride the scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliffside fishing villages of the Cinque Terre. In the afternoon see Pisa's Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Square of Miracles before continuing to Siena.
timeline.description_zh: 上午乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳-皮恩扎-罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore old-town Siena: the Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall and Mangia Tower (exterior). Visit Pienza and Pius II Square, photograph the Val d'Orcia cypress lanes, then drive to Rome.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览锡耶纳古城：锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）；午餐后前往皮恩扎游览二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观），途经奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: A guided walking tour of the Eternal City: the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), followed by free time. The day involves about 5-6 km on foot.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在导游带领下徒步游览“永恒之城”罗马：斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观）、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），之后自由活动。当天步行约5-6公里。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马-那不勒斯/索伦托-卡普里岛-索伦托
timeline.description_en: Ferry from Naples or Sorrento to Capri. At leisure on the island: stroll the seafront, visit the Blue Grotto by boat, or see the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) overlooking the bay. Return by ferry to Sorrento for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往那不勒斯或索伦托乘渡船至卡普里岛。岛上自由活动：海边漫步、乘船探秘蓝洞，或游览奥古斯都花园（外观）俯瞰海湾；之后乘渡船返回索伦托入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-阿马尔菲-波西塔诺-索伦托
timeline.description_en: A full-day Amalfi Coast cruise by boat: visit the clifftop village of Positano, then Amalfi for panoramic coastal views, before returning to the hotel in Sorrento.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后开启阿马尔菲海岸一日游，乘船前往悬崖村庄波西塔诺，再乘船至阿马尔菲欣赏海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回，入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-庞贝-那不勒斯-罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore the ruins of Pompeii, then visit Naples old town with the Royal Palace (exterior) and Castel Nuovo (exterior). Transfer to Rome in the afternoon to conclude the tour.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址；之后游览那不勒斯老城、那不勒斯皇宫（外观）与新堡（外观）；下午前往罗马，结束愉快旅程。

meeting_en: Paris, France — the tour begins in Paris and ends one-way in Rome, Italy. Exact pickup details are confirmed in the pre-departure notice.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎集合 — 行程于巴黎出发，单程结束于意大利罗马。具体接团安排以出团通知书为准。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 11-Day Tour: Paris to Rome
title_zh: 法意瑞11天跟团游：巴黎至罗马
short_en: An 11-day one-way journey from Paris to Rome through France, Switzerland and Italy, with the Jungfrau, Burgundy wine country, the Alps and Renaissance Italy.
