short_zh: 11天从巴黎一路畅游至罗马，纵贯法国、瑞士与意大利，登顶少女峰、品勃艮第美酒、穿越阿尔卑斯、饱览文艺复兴名城。
desc_en: This 11-day small-group tour traces a single deep route from Paris to Rome, never doubling back. Begin with the Louvre, Versailles and a Seine cruise in Paris, drink in Burgundy's wine country at Dijon, then cross into Switzerland via fairy-tale Colmar to summit the Jungfrau and ride the GoldenPass panoramic train. Continue into Italy through Milan, Venice, Tuscany, the Cinque Terre, Pisa and Florence, finishing amid the ancient grandeur of Rome. Expert national-museum guides, scenic 5-star and castle hotels and an all-inclusive design make this a relaxed yet richly cultural Grand Tour.
desc_zh: 这条11天精品小团线路从巴黎一路向南直抵罗马，单程深度、不走回头路。先在巴黎参观卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫并乘塞纳河游船，再到勃艮第首府第戎品味红酒与美食，经童话小镇科尔马进入瑞士，登顶少女峰、乘坐金色山口观光列车。随后进入意大利，途经米兰、威尼斯、托斯卡纳、五渔村、比萨与佛罗伦萨，最终在永恒之城罗马收束行程。全程配国家博物馆讲解员、入住雪山湖景与古堡五星酒店、一价全含，是一段轻松而文化厚重的欧洲深度之旅。

highlights.en: Summit the Jungfrau by cable car and stand on the Sphinx Observation Deck above the Aletsch Glacier
highlights.zh: 乘缆车登顶少女峰，在斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre and Versailles tours led by French national-museum guides
highlights.zh: 法兰西国家博物馆讲解员深度讲解卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: Ride the GoldenPass panoramic train through the Swiss Alps (Lungern–Lucerne)
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口观光列车（龙疆—卢塞恩段）穿越瑞士阿尔卑斯

highlights.en: Burgundy wine road: visit a famed estate near Romanée-Conti with guided tasting
highlights.zh: 勃艮第红酒之路：探访罗曼尼·康帝产区名庄并由侍酒师深度品鉴

highlights.en: Scenic stays including a Burgundy medieval castle, a Swiss lakeside mountain hotel and a Tuscan 5-star
highlights.zh: 入住勃艮第中世纪古堡、瑞士雪山湖景酒店与托斯卡纳五星酒店

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Paris to Rome with no backtracking, three full days across Switzerland
highlights.zh: 巴黎至罗马单程深度线路、不走回头路，超长三天纵览瑞士全景

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: all listed attractions, trains, cruises and cable cars covered
highlights.zh: 一价全含：卢浮宫、凡尔赛、勃艮第酒庄、金色山口、五渔村、少女峰缆车等门票项目全包

highlights.en: Flights & intercity transport, city-centre 4-star hotels, Chinese-speaking guide, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 含交通与城际接送、市中心四星酒店、中文导游、无强制购物

includes.en: 2 nights 5-star hotels and 8 nights comfortable 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 2晚五星级酒店 + 8晚舒适型四星级酒店

includes.en: 10 breakfasts (hotel buffet or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计10餐

includes.en: City tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, tolls, parking, fuel and guide-driver meal allowances
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费及司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Business van or tour coach intercity transport
includes.zh: 商务旅行车或旅游巴士城际交通

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese guide-driver (van for under 8 pax; coach + driver + Chinese guide for 8+ pax)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文华人司机兼导游（8人以下为商务车+司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+职业司机+中文导游）

includes.en: 1 checked bag (23 kg) plus 1 carry-on per person
includes.zh: 每人1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: All listed attraction entries: Louvre (with official guide), Versailles (with official guide), Seine cruise, Burgundy estate visit & tasting, GoldenPass train (Lucerne–Lungern), Cinque Terre train, Venice island ferry, Jungfrau cable-car package
includes.zh: 全部所列门票：卢浮宫首道门票及官导讲解、凡尔赛宫首道门票及官导讲解、塞纳河游船、勃艮第酒庄参观门票及品酒、金色山口列车（卢塞恩-龙疆段）、五渔村小火车、威尼斯运河上岛渡轮、少女峰缆车套票

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees for the countries visited
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Guide and driver gratuities: 10 EUR per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费：共10欧元/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中未注明的午餐与晚餐

excludes.en: Optional activities and all personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自选项目及一切个人消费

excludes.en: Note: in peak season the Louvre may restrict in-museum guiding; in that case 20 EUR per person is refunded. Versailles has no official guide for groups under 3 (audio guide used instead).
excludes.zh: 备注：旺季卢浮宫可能限制馆内讲解，届时退还馆内讲解费20欧元/每位；凡尔赛不足3人无官导讲解，由讲解器代替。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 — 卢浮宫与塞纳河游船
timeline.description_en: Morning tour of the Louvre with a French national-museum guide. In the afternoon visit Notre-Dame and Île de la Cité, see the Champ de Mars and Eiffel Tower (exterior), and take a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and the Musée d'Orsay. Overnight in a Paris 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午由法兰西国家博物馆讲解员深度讲解卢浮宫；下午参观巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，途经战神广场及埃菲尔铁塔（外观），乘塞纳河游船饱览荣军院、大小皇宫、奥赛博物馆等沿岸景点。夜宿巴黎美居/诺富特或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 — 凡尔赛宫
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to the Palace of Versailles southwest of Paris, exploring the classical splendour of the Louis dynasty. Return to the city in the afternoon for the fashion district around Boulevard Haussmann — the Opéra (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. Overnight in Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎西南郊的凡尔赛宫，探访路易王朝的古典奢华；下午返回市区，漫步奥斯曼大街与皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爷百货等时尚街区。夜宿巴黎四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 第戎（勃艮第）
timeline.description_en: Head to Dijon, capital of Burgundy and home of red wine, snails, mustard and Charolais beef. Tour Dijon's old town and Notre-Dame de Dijon, then visit a Burgundy wine estate — its courtyard, cellars and vineyards — with a guided tasting. Overnight in a Burgundy castle hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往法国美食之都、勃艮第首府第戎，参观第戎老城与第戎圣母院；午餐后前往勃艮第葡萄酒产区，参观名庄的庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园与酒窖，由侍酒师讲解并品鉴红白葡萄酒。夜宿勃艮第古堡酒店或第戎市区同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 第戎 → 科尔马 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Morning in fairy-tale Colmar — inspiration for Miyazaki's Howl's Moving Castle — with its old town, the Maison des Têtes and Pfister House. In the afternoon continue to Zurich for the old town, Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Overnight in Zurich.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览法国童话小镇科尔马（宫崎骏《哈尔的移动城堡》原型地），漫步老城区，欣赏人头屋与普菲斯泰屋等建筑；下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世老城、大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街。夜宿苏黎世皇冠假日或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 少女峰 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Visit the village of Grindelwald, then ride cable cars to the summit of the Jungfrau and the Sphinx Observation Deck for views over snow-capped peaks and the Aletsch Glacier. Continue to Interlaken to stroll Höheweg and the surrounding alpine villages. Overnight at a Swiss mountain-and-lake-view 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观格林德尔瓦尔德小镇与梦幻山坡，乘缆车登顶少女峰，在斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰白雪皑皑的群峰与阿莱奇冰川；之后前往因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街与周边宁静村庄。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 龙疆 → 卢塞恩 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Visit Lungern and its lake, then board the GoldenPass panoramic train to Lucerne through mountains and valleys. In Lucerne see the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower along the lake, then drive on to Milan. Overnight in central Milan.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览龙疆湖与小镇风光，乘金色山口观光列车前往卢塞恩，一路穿山越岭欣赏风景；下午游览卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿米兰UNA或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Morning in Milan: the Sforza Castle (exterior), the landmark Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's finest shopping arcades. In the afternoon transfer to Venice. Overnight in a Venice 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观米兰的斯福尔扎古堡（外观）、地标米兰大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊；下午前往威尼斯。夜宿威尼斯VOCO洲际或希尔顿大使或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Free morning to explore St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior), where waterborne palaces and winding canals capture Venice's romance. Then transfer to a 5-star spa hotel in Tuscany's Montecatini. Overnight in Tuscany.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与总督宫（外观），感受这座水上之城的浪漫风情；之后入住托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA五星酒店。夜宿托斯卡纳五星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 五渔村 → 比萨
timeline.description_en: Visit the Cinque Terre, five cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast. In the afternoon continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli. (If weather or rail strikes prevent the Cinque Terre, the coast is toured by coach or other means.) Overnight in Tuscany.
timeline.description_zh: 上午沿利古里亚海岸前往五渔村，游览悬崖上的五座彩色渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其他方式游览海岸城市。）夜宿托斯卡纳五星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 比萨 → 佛罗伦萨 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Morning in Florence, cradle of the Renaissance: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica (exterior). In the afternoon drive to Rome to check in and rest. Overnight in a Rome 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）；下午前往罗马，抵达后入住酒店休息。夜宿罗马圣马丁或现代或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 — 永恒之城与送别
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore Rome, birthplace of the Roman Empire: the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). The historic centre is a vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL) toured on foot — roughly 5 km of walking, so wear comfortable shoes. The tour ends in Rome.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览古罗马帝国发祥地、被称为永恒之城的罗马，参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）。罗马古城核心景点位于车辆禁行区（ZTL），当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。行程于罗马结束。

meeting_en: Paris, France. The tour begins in central Paris (city-centre 4-star hotel); pickup and exact start details are confirmed in your departure notice.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎。行程从巴黎市中心开始（市中心四星级酒店），具体接团及出发安排以出团通知书为准。

title_en: France, Switzerland & Italy 11-Day Group Tour (Paris to Rome One-Way)
title_zh: 法意瑞11天跟团游（巴黎至罗马单程深度线路）
short_en: Cross France, Switzerland and Italy in one deep 11-day journey from Paris to Rome, with the Louvre, the Alps, Venice, Florence and the Eternal City.
short_zh: 11天单程深度穿越法、瑞、意三国，从巴黎到罗马，遍览卢浮宫、阿尔卑斯山、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨与永恒之城。
desc_en: This 11-day one-way tour traces a deep route from Paris to Rome, crossing France, Switzerland and Italy without doubling back, so coach mileage stays low and every day reveals a new city. Begin with curated Louvre and Versailles masterpiece talks in Paris, follow the Alps through Geneva, Interlaken, Lucerne and Zurich, then journey south through Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre and Tuscany before finishing in ancient Rome. The trip pairs five in-depth history talks and four city walks with comfortable city-centre 4-star hotels, all taxes included and no hidden fees.
desc_zh: 这条11天单程线路从巴黎一路深入至罗马，贯穿法国、瑞士、意大利三国，全程不走回头路，大幅降低大巴行车里程，每天游览一座新城市。行程以巴黎卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫的主题精讲开篇，沿阿尔卑斯山穿越日内瓦、因特拉肯、卢塞恩与苏黎世，再南下米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村与托斯卡纳，最终抵达古老的罗马。全程包含5场深度历史讲解与4场城市漫步，入住市中心舒适四星酒店，各项税费一价全含，绝无隐藏费用。

highlights.en: Curated Louvre masterpiece talk by a national-museum guide and an in-depth visit to the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 国家博物馆讲解师精讲卢浮宫杰作，深度游览巴洛克圣殿凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: Seine River cruise past Notre-Dame, the Eiffel Tower and Paris's most romantic landmarks
highlights.zh: 乘塞纳河游船，饱览巴黎圣母院、埃菲尔铁塔等浪漫地标

highlights.en: Alpine highlights across Switzerland: Geneva, the Jungfrau region, fairy-tale Iseltwald, Lucerne and Zurich
highlights.zh: 穿越瑞士阿尔卑斯精华：日内瓦、少女峰地区、童话小镇龙疆、卢塞恩与苏黎世

highlights.en: Italy a city a day: Milan's Duomo, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence and the colourful Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 意大利每天一城：米兰大教堂、浪漫水城威尼斯、文艺复兴佛罗伦萨与五彩五渔村

highlights.en: Tuscan scenery through Siena, Pienza and the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 穿行托斯卡纳：锡耶纳、皮恩扎与奥尔恰谷的丝柏树小径

highlights.en: Ancient Rome on foot — the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步探访古罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: One-way deep route Paris to Rome — no backtracking, less coach time, more sightseeing
highlights.zh: 巴黎罗马两点进出单程深度线路——不走回头路，行车更少，游览更深

highlights.en: Intercity transport, city-centre 4-star hotels and all taxes included — no forced shopping, no hidden fees
highlights.zh: 城际交通、市中心四星酒店与各项税费全含——无强制购物，绝无隐藏费用

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (Mercure/Novotel-class brand hotels)
includes.zh: 市中心四星酒店（美居/诺富特等品牌酒店）

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver and intercity coach transport
includes.zh: 持证中文导游兼司机及城际大巴交通

includes.en: Listed sightseeing and attraction entries per the itinerary (incl. Louvre and Versailles guided talks)
includes.zh: 行程所列景点游览及门票（含卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫讲解）

includes.en: Seine River cruise and Day 4 coach tour of the Grindelwald/Jungfrau region
includes.zh: 塞纳河游船及第4天格林德尔瓦尔德/少女峰地区乘车游览

includes.en: Five in-depth history talks and four city walks
includes.zh: 5场深度历史讲解与4场城市漫步

includes.en: All applicable taxes and fees (all-inclusive pricing)
includes.zh: 各项税费（一价全含）

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 申根签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners (incl. Venetian cuttlefish-ink set meal noted as at own expense)
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐（含威尼斯墨鱼面三道式，需自理）

excludes.en: Optional activities: Jungfrau panoramic cable car summit (€230) or First-Grindelwald aerial gondola return ticket (€70)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）或菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）

excludes.en: Personal expenses and gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 个人消费及导游、司机小费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 — 卢浮宫与市区精华
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning at the Louvre with a curated masterpiece talk by a national-museum guide. In the afternoon tour Notre-Dame, Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower and Champ de Mars, then take a Seine River cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde. Overnight in a Paris 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在国家博物馆讲解师带领下精讲游览卢浮宫；下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，随后乘塞纳河游船饱览荣军院、大小皇宫、协和广场等地标。夜宿巴黎四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 — 凡尔赛宫与时尚街区
timeline.description_en: Explore the Haussmann and Royale fashion district in the morning, with the Opera Garnier, Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. In the afternoon visit the Palace of Versailles, then return to Paris. Overnight in a Paris 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览奥斯曼大街与皇家大道时尚中心，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爷百货；下午前往凡尔赛宫深度游览，之后返回巴黎市区。夜宿巴黎四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Drive to Geneva, capital of French-speaking Switzerland. Tour the old town, lakefront, Flower Clock, Jet d'Eau and the lively Flower Bridge district. Overnight near Geneva (Annemasse) in a 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，游览日内瓦老城、湖区、花钟与大喷泉，并漫步汇集当地美食与特色商店的“花桥”区域。夜宿安纳马斯日内瓦港四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 → 因特拉肯（少女峰地区）
timeline.description_en: Head to Interlaken between Lakes Brienz and Thun. Stroll the village or join the included coach tour of the Grindelwald/Jungfrau scenery; optional summit by panoramic cable car (€230) or First gondola cliff walk (€70). Overnight at a lake-and-mountain hotel in Sigriswil.
timeline.description_zh: 前往坐落于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯，可自由游览小镇，或随车游览格林德尔瓦尔德/少女峰山区经典景色；可自费乘全景缆车登顶少女峰（230欧元）或菲斯特空中贡多拉游悬崖栈道（70欧元）。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 卢塞恩 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Visit the idyllic lakeside village of Iseltwald, then Lucerne with its lake views, Lion Monument, Chapel Bridge and Water Tower. Continue to Zurich. Overnight in a Zurich 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览世外桃源般的龙疆小镇与龙疆湖，随后前往卢塞恩，欣赏卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，之后前往苏黎世。夜宿苏黎世四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Tour Zurich's old town — the Grossmunster (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Drive across the Alps to fashion-capital Milan to see the Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Overnight in a Milan 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览苏黎世老城：苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街；之后沿阿尔卑斯山前往时尚之都米兰，自由参观米兰大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。夜宿米兰四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to the water city of Venice to see St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior). Optionally sample a Venetian cuttlefish-ink set meal (own expense). Overnight in a Venice 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 前往水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观）；可品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式（自理）。夜宿威尼斯四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Head to the birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence. Tour the old town: the Duomo (Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Santa Croce (exterior). Overnight in a Florence 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，游览老城景点：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥、圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。夜宿佛罗伦萨四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Ride the scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the clifftop fishing villages of the Cinque Terre. In the afternoon visit Pisa's Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, then continue to Siena. (If rail is disrupted, the coast is toured by coach.) Overnight in a Siena 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改乘大巴游览海岸线城市。）夜宿锡耶纳四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 皮恩扎 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Tour medieval Siena — the Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico and Torre del Mangia (exterior). Visit the hilltop town of Pienza, then drive to Rome with a photo stop on the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia. Overnight in a Rome 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 游览中世纪古城锡耶纳：锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）；之后游览皮恩扎古城，途经奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马入住酒店。夜宿罗马四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 — 永恒之城
timeline.description_en: Explore ancient Rome on foot with your guide (about 5-6 km, as the old city is largely pedestrian): the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain. Free time follows before the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 在导游带领下徒步游览古罗马（因古城多为步行街区，步行约5-6公里）：斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观）、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），之后自由活动，结束愉快旅程。

meeting_en: Paris, France — tour departs from Paris (city-centre hotel; pickup details per the final tour confirmation).
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎——行程从巴黎出发（市中心酒店，具体接团安排以出团通知书为准）。

title_en: Provence & French Riviera 5-Day Small-Group Tour (Avignon Round-Trip)
title_zh: 普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸5天跟团游（阿维尼翁往返）
short_en: Five days through Provence's lavender fields, hilltop villages and the French Riviera, with a Saint-Tropez sea cruise and two nights in Nice.
short_zh: 5天畅游普罗旺斯薰衣草花田、山间古镇与蔚蓝海岸，含圣特罗佩出海巡游，尼斯连住两晚。
desc_en: A locally-joined 5-day loop from Avignon through the heart of southern France. Wander Provence's storybook villages of Gordes and Sénanque, drift into Valensole's purple lavender fields, sail the Mediterranean to Saint-Tropez and explore the glamorous Riviera from Cannes and Nice to Menton, Monaco and the clifftop village of Eze. The journey closes with the Roman heritage of Arles and Nîmes, blending floral landscapes, coastal cruising and ancient history.
desc_zh: 目的地参团的5天环线，从阿维尼翁出发深入法国南部腹地。漫步高德、塞南克等普罗旺斯童话小镇，徜徉瓦朗索勒紫色薰衣草花海，乘船巡游地中海直抵圣特罗佩，再从戛纳、尼斯一路游览芒通、摩纳哥与悬崖小镇埃兹等蔚蓝海岸名城；最后探访阿尔勒与尼姆的古罗马遗迹，将花田、海上巡游与千年历史融为一体。

highlights.en: Gordes hilltop village, inspiration for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky', and Sénanque Abbey
highlights.zh: 宫崎骏《天空之城》原型——高德古城，以及塞南克修道院

highlights.en: Valensole lavender fields in full purple bloom (in season)
highlights.zh: 瓦朗索勒薰衣草花田，盛放成紫色花海（花期内）

highlights.en: Mediterranean sea cruise to Saint-Tropez (ferry ticket included)
highlights.zh: 乘船出海巡游地中海直抵圣特罗佩（含渡轮门票）

highlights.en: Two nights in Nice for an in-depth taste of the French Riviera
highlights.zh: 尼斯连住两晚，深度游览蔚蓝海岸核心城市

highlights.en: Insta-worthy stops: lemon town Menton, clifftop Eze and legendary Saint-Tropez
highlights.zh: Ins打卡名所：柠檬小镇芒通、悬崖小镇埃兹、传奇圣特罗佩

highlights.en: Eze exotic clifftop garden and a perfume museum, both included
highlights.zh: 埃兹空中花园与香水博物馆门票全含

highlights.en: Verdon Gorge and the Tiffany-blue Lac Sainte-Croix
highlights.zh: 欧洲峡谷凡尔登大峡谷与蒂芙尼蓝的圣十字湖

highlights.en: Roman heritage of Arles and Nîmes, with Van Gogh's café and ancient arenas
highlights.zh: 阿尔勒与尼姆的古罗马遗迹，含梵高咖啡馆与古罗马竞技场

includes.en: 4 nights in comfortable 2-3 star hotels
includes.zh: 舒适2-3星级酒店4晚

includes.en: Daily hotel buffet or equivalent breakfast
includes.zh: 酒店内自助式或同等形式早餐

includes.en: City tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, tolls, parking and fuel charges within the itinerary
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Tourist coach or business van transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or Chinese-speaking driver-guide (under 9 pax: van + driver-guide; 9+ pax: coach + driver + guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或中文司机兼导游（9人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，9人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）

includes.en: One 23kg checked bag and one carry-on per person
includes.zh: 每人1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: First-entry tickets to the Saint-Tropez sea ferry, perfume museum and Eze exotic garden
includes.zh: 圣特罗佩出海渡轮、香水博物馆、埃兹空中花园首道门票

excludes.en: International flights and personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 国际机票及个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家所需的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify coverage of high-risk activities)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否涵盖）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共10欧元/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners throughout the trip
excludes.zh: 行程中的午餐与晚餐

excludes.en: Entries to sights not marked as included (incl. 'exterior view' sights and optional/recommended activities)
excludes.zh: 未注明包含的景点门票（含标注"外观"的景点及推荐、可选、体验等项目）

excludes.en: Extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing outside the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用

excludes.en: Personal expenses such as drinks, taxis and phone calls
excludes.zh: 饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等私人消费

timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 → 普罗旺斯小镇 → 阿维尼翁
timeline.description_en: Join the tour in the afternoon at a hotel in Avignon's old town, then set off through Provence's most beautiful villages: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the hilltop town of Gordes (inspiration for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky') and Sénanque Abbey. Return to Avignon to explore the old town, the broken Pont d'Avignon and the Papal Palace (exterior) at leisure. Overnight in Avignon.
timeline.description_zh: 当天下午在阿维尼翁老城酒店上团，随后开启普罗旺斯绝美小镇之旅，依次游览泉水小镇、宫崎骏《天空之城》原型高德古城、塞南克修道院。之后返回阿维尼翁，自行参观古城、罗纳河断桥（外观）与教皇宫（外观），随后入住酒店。夜宿阿维尼翁。

timeline.title_en: Avignon → Valensole → Lac Sainte-Croix → Cannes → Nice
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 → 瓦朗索勒 → 圣十字湖 → 戛纳 → 尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 road (in lavender season), then tour the Verdon Gorge and Lac Sainte-Croix. Continue to the film-festival city of Cannes for the Palais des Festivals and the walk of stars, then stroll the seafront. Arrive in Nice by evening. Note: if lavender is out of season the visit is replaced by a pottery town.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路薰衣草花田（花期内），随后游览欧洲峡谷凡尔登大峡谷及圣十字湖。之后前往电影名城戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道并自由漫步海滨大道，傍晚抵达尼斯。备注：薰衣草一般6月中下旬至7月下旬绽放，如团期内无法参观则改为陶瓷小镇。

timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 → 芒通 → 摩纳哥 → 埃兹 → 尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast visit the 'lemon town' of Menton, then the Principality of Monaco and its yacht harbour. Continue to the clifftop village of Eze and gaze over the Mediterranean from its 'eagle's nest' setting, driving the cliff road named after Princess Grace. Return to Nice to explore the Bay of Angels beach and the Promenade des Anglais. Overnight in Nice.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往芒通游览"柠檬小镇"，随后前往摩纳哥公国，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头。之后前往悬崖小镇埃兹，从充满地中海风情的"鹫巢"俯瞰地中海，行驶以格蕾丝公主命名的峭壁公路。返回尼斯后自由参观天使湾沙滩与英格兰海滨大道。夜宿尼斯。

timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 → 圣拉斐尔 → 圣特罗佩 → 阿尔勒 → 尼姆
timeline.description_en: Travel to the Riviera resort of Saint-Raphaël, then board a boat at Sainte-Maxime for a Mediterranean cruise to the art town of Saint-Tropez (about 20 minutes). Continue by coach to Arles to see the old town, Van Gogh's café and the sunflower fields, before reaching the 'water-spirit city' of Nîmes for the night. Note: sunflowers bloom June-July and may be harvested early in hot weather.
timeline.description_zh: 早上前往蔚蓝海岸海滨重镇圣拉斐尔，随后在圣马克西姆乘船出海巡游地中海（约20分钟），直达海洋艺术之城圣特罗佩。之后乘巴士前往阿尔勒，参观老城区、梵高咖啡馆并欣赏向日葵花田，傍晚抵达水精灵之城尼姆入住。备注：向日葵花期6-7月，如天气炎热提前收割则无法游览花田。

timeline.title_zh: 尼姆 → 阿维尼翁（行程结束）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast take a walking tour of the old Roman city of Nîmes, exploring its ancient arena and the Jardin de la Fontaine. Then transfer from Nîmes to Avignon's old-town hotel, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马竞技场与神秘花园。随后从尼姆前往阿维尼翁老城酒店下团，结束南法旅程。

meeting_en: Avignon — tour joins in the afternoon at a hotel in Avignon's old town (e.g. Ibis Budget Avignon Centre) and ends back in Avignon on the final day.
meeting_zh: 阿维尼翁——当天下午在阿维尼翁老城酒店（如阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店）上团，最后一天回到阿维尼翁下团。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 9-Day Tour: Paris to Rome with Jungfrau
title_zh: 法意瑞9天跟团游：巴黎到罗马·登顶少女峰
short_en: A 9-day one-way journey from Paris to Rome through Burgundy wine country, the Swiss Alps, Jungfrau, the GoldenPass rail, Milan, Venice, Tuscany and Cinque Terre.
short_zh: 9天单程深度游，从巴黎一路抵达罗马，途经勃艮第酒乡、瑞士阿尔卑斯、少女峰、金色山口列车、米兰、威尼斯、托斯卡纳与五渔村。
desc_en: This 9-day small-group tour traces a single, no-backtracking route from Paris through three countries to the Eternal City of Rome. You will savour Burgundy's wine route and a château stay, wander the fairytale lanes of Colmar, ride the GoldenPass panoramic train and ascend the Jungfrau to the Sphinx observatory, then sweep through Milan, romantic Venice, a two-night stay in Tuscany, the cliffside villages of Cinque Terre, Pisa and Renaissance Florence. The journey blends alpine scenery, Italian art cities and all-inclusive comfort, with two five-star and six four-star hotels along the way.
desc_zh: 这趟9天精品小团采用单程不走回头路的路线，从巴黎穿越法意瑞三国，一路抵达永恒之城罗马。行程品味勃艮第红酒之路并入住中世纪古堡酒店，漫步童话小镇科尔马，乘坐金色山口全景列车，登顶少女峰斯芬克斯观景台，再经时尚之都米兰、浪漫水城威尼斯、托斯卡纳两晚深度停留、悬崖上的五渔村、比萨与文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨。阿尔卑斯雪山风光与意大利艺术名城交织，全程一价全含，沿途入住两晚五星、六晚四星酒店。

highlights.en: Ascend the Jungfrau by cable car to the Sphinx observatory for views over the Aletsch Glacier
highlights.zh: 乘缆车登顶少女峰，在斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川

highlights.en: Ride the GoldenPass panoramic train (Lucerne–Lungern) through the heart of the Swiss Alps
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口全景观光列车（卢塞恩—龙疆段），穿行瑞士阿尔卑斯山间

highlights.en: Burgundy wine route with a château stay and a guided estate tasting near La Romanée-Conti
highlights.zh: 勃艮第红酒之路，入住古堡酒店并在罗曼尼·康帝产区名庄品鉴红酒

highlights.en: Romantic Venice — St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the island ferry
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯——圣马可广场、叹息桥与上岛渡轮

highlights.en: Cinque Terre's five cliffside fishing villages by the local coastal train
highlights.zh: 乘小火车游览五渔村，欣赏利古里亚海岸悬崖上的五座渔村

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence and the cliff-perched art cities of Italy
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨与意大利艺术名城

highlights.en: One-way deep route with no backtracking, travelling by private coach with scenic rail segments included
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线不走回头路，全程专属大巴并含沿途观光列车段

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing, city-centre 4-star hotels plus two 5-star stays, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含，市中心四星酒店加两晚五星，无强制购物

includes.en: 2 nights five-star hotels and 6 nights four-star hotels
includes.zh: 2晚五星级酒店及6晚四星级酒店

includes.en: 8 buffet or equivalent breakfasts at the hotels
includes.zh: 酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计8餐

includes.en: City taxes, entry fees, residence tax, tolls, parking and fuel, driver-guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating fees
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Tour coach or business travel vehicle for transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (under 8 pax: business vehicle + driver-guide; over 8 pax: coach + driver + guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance of 1 piece up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attraction tickets: Burgundy estate visit and tasting, GoldenPass train (Lucerne–Lungern), Cinque Terre train, Venice island ferry, Jungfrau cable-car package
includes.zh: 门票：勃艮第酒庄参观及品酒费用、金色山口列车（卢塞恩—龙疆段）、五渔村小火车、威尼斯上岛渡轮、少女峰缆车套票

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify coverage if high-risk activities are involved)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动，请核实保险是否包含该项目）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费：共计10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners other than the special meals included in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外的午餐与晚餐

excludes.en: Any optional activities and personal expenses not listed
excludes.zh: 未列明的自选活动及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 第戎（勃艮第）
timeline.description_en: Drive to Dijon, capital of the Burgundy wine region and home of snails, mustard and roses; explore the old town and Dijon Cathedral. After lunch, visit a Burgundy wine estate's courtyard, workshop, vineyards and cellars. Overnight in a Burgundy château or an equivalent 4-star hotel in central Dijon.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往勃艮第首府、红酒与蜗牛及玫瑰芥末原产地第戎，参观第戎老城与第戎圣母院。午餐后前往勃艮第葡萄产区，参观酒庄庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖。夜宿勃艮第古堡酒店或第戎市区同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 第戎 → 科尔马 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to Colmar, the fairytale town that inspired Miyazaki's Howl's Moving Castle, strolling the old town, Maison des Têtes and Maison Pfister. In the afternoon continue to Zurich for the old town, Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Overnight at a Zurich 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往童话小镇科尔马（宫崎骏《哈尔的移动城堡》原型地），游览老城区、人头屋与普菲斯泰屋。下午前往苏黎世，游览老城、苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街。夜宿苏黎世同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 少女峰 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Visit the village of Grindelwald and its dreamy slopes, then ride the cable car to the summit of the Jungfrau and the Sphinx observatory for views of the snow-capped peak and the Aletsch Glacier. Continue to Interlaken at leisure. Overnight at a 4-star mountain-and-lake-view hotel in Sigriswil or equivalent.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往格林德尔瓦尔德小镇与梦幻山坡，随后乘缆车登顶少女峰，登上斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰与阿莱奇冰川。之后前往因特拉肯自由游览。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 龙疆 → 卢塞恩 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Visit Lungern and its lake, then board the GoldenPass panoramic train to Lucerne through the Alps. In Lucerne see the lake, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower, before heading to fashion capital Milan. Overnight at a central Milan 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往龙疆游览龙疆湖与小镇风光，乘坐金色山口观光列车穿山越岭前往卢塞恩。下午游览卢塞恩湖、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿米兰市中心同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to Milan's Sforza Castle (exterior), the landmark Milan Cathedral (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II shopping arcade. In the afternoon travel on to Venice. Overnight at a Venice 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观米兰斯福尔扎古堡（外观）、地标米兰大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。下午前往威尼斯。夜宿威尼斯同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Freely explore St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior), soaking up the romance of the water city. Then transfer to a five-star resort hotel in Tuscany. Overnight at a Montecatini SPA hotel or equivalent 5-star in Tuscany.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与总督宫（外观），感受水城浪漫。之后入住托斯卡纳五星酒店。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等五星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 五渔村 → 比萨
timeline.description_en: Travel to Cinque Terre to admire the five cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast, then continue to Pisa for the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli. Overnight back at the Tuscany 5-star hotel. Note: in bad weather or rail strikes the Cinque Terre visit may switch to a coach or other coastal sightseeing.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场。夜宿托斯卡纳同等五星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工等无法游览五渔村，行程将改为大巴或其他形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_zh: 比萨 → 佛罗伦萨 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Visit Florence — the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). In the afternoon continue to Rome and check in. Overnight at a Rome 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览佛罗伦萨，参观圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。下午前往罗马并入住酒店。夜宿罗马同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore the Eternal City: the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Rome's old-town sights lie within the ZTL, so the day is on foot (about 5 km round trip) before the tour concludes.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览永恒之城罗马，参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观）、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）。罗马古城主要景点位于车辆禁行区（ZTL），当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，行程结束。

meeting_en: Tour begins in Paris, France; the route ends in Rome (one-way, no backtracking).
meeting_zh: 行程从法国巴黎出发，于罗马结束（单程，不走回头路）。

title_en: Provence & French Riviera 5-Day Tour from Nice
title_zh: 尼斯出发普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸5天跟团游
short_en: A 5-day deep dive into the Côte d'Azur and Provence from Nice — Monaco, Èze, Saint-Tropez sailing, Avignon, lavender fields and Verdon Gorge.
short_zh: 尼斯出发5天深度畅游蔚蓝海岸与普罗旺斯：摩纳哥、埃兹、圣特罗佩出海、阿维尼翁、薰衣草花田与凡尔登大峡谷。
desc_en: Starting and ending in Nice, this 5-day group tour weaves together the glamour of the French Riviera and the romance of Provence. Drive the clifftop Princess Grace coast road to Menton, Monaco and the eagle's-nest village of Èze, cruise the Mediterranean to Saint-Tropez, then head inland to Roman Nîmes, the 'castle in the sky' hilltop town of Gordes, Sénanque Abbey and the papal city of Avignon. The journey climaxes among Valensole's lavender fields, the turquoise Lake Sainte-Croix and the Verdon Gorge before a final glide along the red carpets of Cannes back to Nice. All-inclusive pricing with city-centre hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver and no forced shopping.
desc_zh: 本5天跟团游以尼斯为起终点，将蔚蓝海岸的璀璨与普罗旺斯的浪漫串联成一线。沿格蕾丝公主峭壁公路游览柠檬小镇芒通、摩纳哥与悬崖上的“鹫巢”埃兹，乘船出海巡游地中海直抵圣特罗佩；随后深入内陆，探访古罗马名城尼姆、宫崎骏笔下“天空之城”原型高德古城、塞南克修道院与教皇之城阿维尼翁。行程在瓦朗索勒薰衣草花海、蒂芙尼蓝的圣十字湖与凡尔登大峡谷达到高潮，最后漫步戛纳红毯星光大道返回尼斯。一价全含，入住市区酒店，配中文司机兼导游，全程无强制购物。

highlights.en: Drive the Princess Grace clifftop coast road with sweeping Mediterranean views over Cap-Ferrat and Villefranche
highlights.zh: 驰骋格蕾丝公主峭壁公路，俯瞰费拉角与滨海自由城的地中海美景

highlights.en: Visit Monaco, the lemon town of Menton, and the eagle's-nest clifftop village of Èze
highlights.zh: 游览摩纳哥公国、柠檬小镇芒通与悬崖小镇“鹫巢”埃兹

highlights.en: Mediterranean sailing from Sainte-Maxime across to the legendary sun city of Saint-Tropez
highlights.zh: 从圣马克西姆乘船出海，巡游地中海直达传奇“太阳城”圣特罗佩

highlights.en: Explore Roman Nîmes and the hilltop village of Gordes — the real-world model for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky'
highlights.zh: 探访古罗马名城尼姆与宫崎骏《天空之城》原型——高德古城

highlights.en: Discover Provence's gems: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, Sénanque Abbey and the papal city of Avignon
highlights.zh: 畅游普罗旺斯瑰宝：泉水小镇、塞南克修道院与教皇之城阿维尼翁

highlights.en: Wander the Valensole lavender fields, turquoise Lake Sainte-Croix and the Verdon Gorge (in season)
highlights.zh: 徜徉瓦朗索勒薰衣草花海、蒂芙尼蓝圣十字湖与凡尔登大峡谷（花期内）

highlights.en: Stroll the Cannes Palais des Festivals and Walk of Fame on the glamorous seafront
highlights.zh: 漫步戛纳影节宫与星光大道，感受海滨大道的电影之都风情

highlights.en: All-inclusive local departure tour: city hotels, listed attraction entries, Chinese-speaking guide-driver, two nights in Nice, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 目的地参团一价全含：市区酒店、含景点门票、中文司机兼导游、尼斯连住两晚、全程无强制购物

includes.en: 4 nights in comfortable city-centre 2-3 star hotels
includes.zh: 舒适市区2-3星级酒店4晚

includes.en: Daily buffet (or equivalent) breakfast at the hotel
includes.zh: 酒店内自助式或其他形式早餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary operating fees: city/tourist tax, residence tax, entry fees, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel surcharges
includes.zh: 行程内执行费用：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费等

includes.en: Coach or business van intercity transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车交通

includes.en: Chinese-speaking guide-driver service (under 9 pax: van with Chinese-speaking driver-guide; 9+ pax: coach with professional driver and Chinese-speaking guide)
includes.zh: 中文导游服务（9人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，9人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 行李额：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: First-entry tickets for the Saint-Tropez sailing ferry, the perfume museum and the Èze exotic garden
includes.zh: 圣特罗佩出海渡轮、香水博物馆、埃兹空中花园首道门票

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际机票

excludes.en: Passport fees and Schengen visa (tourist visa) fees
excludes.zh: 护照费用及申根（观光）签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Guide and driver gratuities: 10 EUR per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费：共计10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners throughout the tour
excludes.zh: 行程中午餐及晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entries to attractions not listed as included (including 'exterior view', 'recommended', 'optional' and 'experience' items)
excludes.zh: 行程中未注明包含的景点门票（含标注“外观”、“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等项目）

excludes.en: Extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程外额外延长的住宿、交通及观光费用

excludes.en: Personal expenses (drinks, taxis, phone calls, etc.) and any optional/experience activities and free-time spending
excludes.zh: 个人消费（饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等）及自由活动、体验项目产生的费用

timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 → 芒通 → 摩纳哥 → 埃兹 → 尼斯
timeline.description_en: Meet the group at the B&B Hotel Nice Aéroport Arenas, then visit the lemon town of Menton and the Principality of Monaco with its yacht harbour. Drive the Princess Grace clifftop road to the eagle's-nest village of Èze for Mediterranean views, then return to Nice for free time at the Baie des Anges beach and the Promenade des Anglais. Overnight in Nice.
timeline.description_zh: 在B&B尼斯竞技场酒店集合上团，前往柠檬小镇芒通，随后游览摩纳哥公国及游艇码头。沿格蕾丝公主峭壁公路抵达悬崖小镇埃兹，俯瞰地中海风光，之后返回尼斯，自由游览天使湾沙滩与英格兰海滨大道。夜宿尼斯。

timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 → 圣拉斐尔 → 圣特罗佩 → 阿尔勒 → 尼姆
timeline.description_en: Head to the Riviera resort of Saint-Raphaël, then sail the Mediterranean from Sainte-Maxime to the art town of Saint-Tropez (about 20 min crossing). Continue by coach to Arles to see its old town and the Van Gogh café, with sunflower fields in season. Arrive in the Roman city of Nîmes for the night. Note: sunflower season is June-July and may end early in hot weather.
timeline.description_zh: 前往蔚蓝海岸海滨重镇圣拉斐尔，从圣马克西姆乘船出海巡游地中海直达海洋艺术之城圣特罗佩（航程约20分钟）。乘巴士前往阿尔勒，参观老城区与梵高咖啡馆，欣赏向日葵花田（花期内）。傍晚抵达水精灵之城尼姆入住。备注：向日葵花期6-7月，气候炎热时可能提前收割。

timeline.title_zh: 尼姆 → 阿维尼翁 → 南法小镇 → 阿维尼翁
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, walk the old Roman city of Nîmes, then head into Provence to visit Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the hilltop village of Gordes (the model for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky') and Sénanque Abbey. Continue to Avignon to explore the old town, the Pont d'Avignon (exterior) and the Palais des Papes (exterior). Overnight in central Avignon.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后徒步游览水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马遗迹。之后前往普罗旺斯，依次游览泉水小镇、高德古城（宫崎骏《天空之城》原型）与塞南克修道院。继而抵达阿维尼翁，自行参观古城、罗纳河断桥（外观）与教皇宫（外观）。夜宿阿维尼翁老城。

timeline.title_en: Avignon → Valensole → Lake Sainte-Croix → Cannes → Nice
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 → 瓦朗索勒 → 圣十字湖 → 戛纳 → 尼斯
timeline.description_en: Set off for the lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 (in lavender season), then visit Europe's Verdon Gorge and turquoise Lake Sainte-Croix. Continue to the film and seaside town of Cannes for the Palais des Festivals, Walk of Fame and a free stroll along the seafront, arriving in Nice in the evening. Overnight in Nice. Note: lavender typically blooms mid-to-late June; if unavailable, a ceramics town is substituted.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路薰衣草花田（花期内），置身浪漫紫色花海。下午游览欧洲峡谷凡尔登大峡谷与圣十字湖，随后前往电影海滨小城戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道并自由漫步海滨大道，傍晚抵达尼斯。夜宿尼斯。备注：薰衣草一般6月中下旬绽放，如无法参观则改为陶瓷小镇。

timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 — 离团
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, sleep in and check out at your leisure, or join the group transfer into central Nice where the tour disbands. End of the trip.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后可睡到自然醒自行退房离开，或跟团至尼斯市区解散，结束美好旅行。

meeting_en: Nice — group meets at the B&B Hotel Nice Aéroport Arenas (or equivalent 3-star hotel); local-departure tour starting and ending in Nice.
meeting_zh: 尼斯——在B&B尼斯竞技场酒店（或同等3星级酒店）集合上团；目的地参团，尼斯出发、尼斯结束。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 14-Day Deep-Dive Small-Group Tour (Paris to Rome)
title_zh: 法意瑞深度14天精品小团游（巴黎出发，罗马结束）
short_en: A 14-day Paris-to-Rome small-group journey through France, Switzerland and Italy, with curated museum talks, scenic rail and the Amalfi Coast.
short_zh: 14天巴黎到罗马一线深度小团游，串联法国、瑞士与意大利，含国家馆专题讲解、景观列车与阿马尔菲海岸。
desc_en: This 14-day boutique small-group tour traces a single deep route from Paris all the way to Rome, weaving together three countries without doubling back. Begin with two unhurried days in Paris and Versailles guided by French national-museum lecturers, glide through Burgundy and the Swiss Lake Geneva and Jungfrau regions by scenic Golden Pass rail, then descend into Italy for Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, the Tuscan hill towns and the Eternal City. The journey ends on the Sorrento peninsula with an Amalfi Coast cruise and the legendary Blue Grotto of Capri. With art-history deep dives, lake-and-mountain landscapes and an all-inclusive small-group format, it is a culture-and-scenery odyssey across the heart of Europe.
desc_zh: 这条14天精品小团线路从巴黎一路深入直抵罗马，单线不走回头路地串联法国、瑞士与意大利三国。行程以巴黎与凡尔赛两天由法兰西国家馆讲解师陪同的深度艺术之旅开篇，随后穿越勃艮第，乘金色山口景观列车饱览日内瓦湖与少女峰地区的湖光山色，再南下意大利游览米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、托斯卡纳山城与永恒之城罗马。旅程在索伦托半岛收尾，出海畅游阿马尔菲海岸、探秘卡普里岛蓝洞。深度艺术史讲解、湖山美景与一价全含的小团形式，共同成就这场横跨欧洲腹地的文化与风景之旅。

highlights.en: French national-museum lecturers give themed deep-dive talks at the Louvre and Versailles
highlights.zh: 法兰西国家馆讲解师在卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫进行主题深度讲解

highlights.en: Scenic Golden Pass panoramic train from Lungern to Lucerne through the Alps
highlights.zh: 乘金色山口观光列车从龙疆至卢塞恩，穿越阿尔卑斯山如画风景

highlights.en: Lake Geneva scenic route with the UNESCO Lavaux vineyard terraces and Chillon Castle
highlights.zh: 日内瓦湖景观之路，途经世界遗产拉沃葡萄梯田与西庸城堡

highlights.en: Jungfrau region: Interlaken, Grindelwald and Lauterbrunnen alpine scenery
highlights.zh: 少女峰地区：因特拉肯、格林德尔瓦尔德与劳特布龙嫩的高山风光

highlights.en: Italy's icons: Milan Cathedral, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence and the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 意大利经典：米兰大教堂、浪漫威尼斯、文艺复兴佛罗伦萨与比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Cinque Terre cliffside fishing villages and the Tuscan hill towns of San Gimignano, Siena and Pienza
highlights.zh: 五渔村悬崖渔村，以及圣吉米尼亚诺、锡耶纳、皮恩扎托斯卡纳山城

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast cruise to Positano and Amalfi, plus Capri's Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 出海畅游阿马尔菲海岸的波西塔诺与阿马尔菲，并探秘卡普里岛蓝洞

highlights.en: All-inclusive 4-8 person small group: city-centre hotels, all listed attractions, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 4-8人一价全含精品小团：市中心酒店、所列景点全含、无强制购物

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (with select 5-star château / Tuscan villa / sea-view stays)
includes.zh: 市中心四星级酒店（含精选五星城堡、托斯卡纳庄园及海景酒店）

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver with dedicated vehicle, 7x24 concierge service
includes.zh: 持证中文导游兼司机、专车专导，7x24小时管家服务

includes.en: Intercity ground transport and the Golden Pass scenic train segment
includes.zh: 城际地面交通及金色山口景观列车区段

includes.en: All listed attraction entries and experiences (all-inclusive pricing)
includes.zh: 所列景点门票及游玩体验（一价全含）

includes.en: National-museum lecturer talks at the Louvre and Versailles
includes.zh: 卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫国家馆讲解师讲解

includes.en: All applicable taxes and fees
includes.zh: 各项税费

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Visa fees
excludes.zh: 签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless otherwise noted
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐（特别注明者除外）

excludes.en: Optional activities: Interlaken paragliding (EUR 220), Jungfrau panorama cable-car summit (EUR 230), First-Grindelwald aerial gondola return (EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：因特拉肯高空滑翔伞（220欧元）、少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）、菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返（70欧元）

excludes.en: Capri Blue Grotto boatman fees and tips (EUR 2-5 customary tip), Capri island transport
excludes.zh: 卡普里岛蓝洞船工费及小费（约2-5欧元小费）、卡普里岛上交通费用

excludes.en: Gratuities
excludes.zh: 小费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 卢浮宫 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning at the Louvre with a French national-museum lecturer giving a themed deep-dive talk. Then tour central Paris: Notre-Dame, Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower and Champ de Mars (exteriors), and a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在卢浮宫由法兰西国家馆讲解师进行主题深度讲解，随后游览巴黎市中心：巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）与战神广场，并乘塞纳河游船饱览荣军院、大小皇宫（外观）与协和广场。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 凡尔赛宫 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: After breakfast visit the Palace of Versailles with an in-depth national-museum lecturer talk on its Baroque and Rococo treasures. Return to central Paris in the afternoon for the fashion district around Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with the Opera Garnier (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往凡尔赛宫，由国家馆讲解员深度讲解其巴洛克与洛可可艺术瑰宝；下午返回巴黎市区，游览奥斯曼大街、皇家大道时尚区，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爷。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 第戎
timeline.description_en: Drive to Dijon, capital of Burgundy and home of red wine, snails and Dijon mustard, to see the old town and Dijon's Notre-Dame. After lunch visit a Burgundy wine estate with courtyard, cellars and vineyards and a professional sommelier, then check in to a Relais & Chateaux castle hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 驱车前往勃艮第大区首府第戎——红酒、蜗牛与玫瑰芥末之乡，参观第戎老城与第戎圣母院；午餐后游览勃艮第酒庄的庭院、酒窖与葡萄园，由专业侍酒师讲解，随后入住罗莱夏朵城堡酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 勃艮第 - 洛桑 - 蒙特勒 - 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Visit flower-filled Lausanne, the Olympic park and Ouchy waterfront, then follow the scenic Lake Geneva route past the UNESCO Lavaux vineyard terraces. Admire Chillon Castle reflected in the lake at Montreux before continuing via Lake Thun to the hotel near Interlaken.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览繁花似锦的洛桑，自由参观奥林匹克公园与乌希码头，随后沿日内瓦湖景观之路途经世界遗产拉沃葡萄梯田；下午欣赏蒙特勒倒映湖中的西庸城堡，途经图恩湖前往因特拉肯附近酒店入住。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰地区 - 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Explore the Jungfrau region: by coach to Wilderswil's red train station, Grindelwald's classic alpine slopes and Lauterbrunnen, or optionally take the railway up to the Jungfrau and Sphinx observation deck overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. Stroll Interlaken's Hoheweg and quiet villages set among the mountains.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往少女峰地区，可随车游览维尔德斯维尔的红色火车站、格林德尔瓦尔德经典山景与劳特布龙嫩，或自费乘火车登上少女峰与斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川；之后漫步因特拉肯小镇的何维克街与宁静村庄。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 龙疆 - 卢塞恩 - 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Visit Lungern and its lake, then ride the Golden Pass panoramic train through the mountains to Lucerne. Tour Lake Lucerne, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal water tower, then continue to Zurich for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览龙疆湖及小镇风光，随后乘金色山口观光列车穿山越岭抵达卢塞恩；下午游览卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，之后前往苏黎世入住。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 米兰
timeline.description_en: Explore Zurich's old town, Lake Zurich, Lindenhof park and the Limmat riverside, then cross the Alps to Milan. Admire the landmark Milan Cathedral (exterior) and one of Europe's finest shopping arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览苏黎世老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园，漫步利马特河畔；随后沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往米兰，自由参观地标米兰大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世长廊。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to Venice and take in St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the ornate Doge's Palace (exterior) - water-borne architecture and winding canals that make Venice unforgettably romantic.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观）；水上建筑与蜿蜒水巷交织，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久萦绕。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Head to Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazzale Michelangelo, where panoramic city views are especially beautiful at sunrise and sunset.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥与米开朗琪罗广场，登高俯瞰全城风景，日出日落时分尤为动人。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 五渔村 - 比萨 - 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Travel to the Cinque Terre to explore the colourful cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast. In the afternoon visit Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, before returning to Florence.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，参观比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后返回佛罗伦萨。

timeline.title_en: Florence - San Gimignano - Siena - Pienza - Rome
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 圣吉米尼亚诺 - 锡耶纳 - 皮恩扎 - 罗马
timeline.description_en: A Tuscan day through hilltop towns: medieval San Gimignano with its towers, Siena's old town and cathedral and Piazza del Campo, and Pienza, followed by photo stops along the cypress-lined country roads of the Val d'Orcia before arriving in Rome.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览中世纪塔楼之城圣吉米尼亚诺，随后前往锡耶纳，游览古城、大教堂（外观）与田野广场，再到皮恩扎古城；之后在奥尔恰谷的丝柏小路自由拍照，前往罗马入住。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Discover the Eternal City of Rome on foot: the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). In the afternoon transfer to Sorrento. Rome's centre is a vehicle-restricted (ZTL) zone, so expect about 5 km of walking - wear comfortable shoes.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览永恒之城罗马，徒步参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观）、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）；下午前往索伦托入住。罗马古城核心在车辆禁行区（ZTL），当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿轻便舒适鞋。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 阿马尔菲 - 波西塔诺 - 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Set out on a charming Amalfi Coast boat day: cruise to the clifftop village of Positano, then on to Amalfi for sweeping coastal views before sailing back. (If sea conditions force the cruise to be cancelled, the day switches to a coach visit of Sorrento's old town and the cruise fee is refunded.)
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人的阿马尔菲海岸游船一日游：乘船前往悬崖村庄波西塔诺，再前往阿马尔菲欣赏海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回。（如遇海上极端天气取消出海，将改为乘大巴游览索伦托老城，出海费用退还游客。）

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 那不勒斯 - 卡普里岛 - 那不勒斯 - 罗马
timeline.description_en: Ferry from Naples to Capri, a Mediterranean paradise. Stroll the seafront, visit the Blue Grotto, take a boat around the island or walk up to the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the bay. Ferry back to Naples and return to Rome, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从那不勒斯码头乘渡船抵达地中海天堂卡普里岛，可海边漫步、参观蓝洞、乘船环岛或前往奥古斯都花园俯瞰海湾；之后乘渡船返回那不勒斯，再返回罗马，在罗马市区结束愉快旅程。

meeting_en: Paris, France - tour departs from Paris (group transfers and hotel details confirmed in the final departure notice).
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎——行程于巴黎出发（具体集合与酒店安排以出团通知书为准）。

title_en: Paris & Normandy 5-Day Boutique Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 巴黎诺曼底5天精品小团
short_en: A 5-day art-and-history journey from Paris through Versailles to Normandy's coast, Mont-Saint-Michel and the Loire chateaux, in a 4-8 person small group.
short_zh: 5天艺术人文之旅，从巴黎、凡尔赛宫一路深入诺曼底海岸、圣米歇尔山与卢瓦尔河谷城堡，4-8人精品小团。
desc_en: This boutique small-group tour traces the roots of French art and culture, from the masterpieces of the Louvre and the Baroque grandeur of Versailles to the Impressionist landscapes of Normandy. With a national-museum lecturer guiding you through royal and religious history, you will cross the Normandy Bridge to Honfleur, Deauville and Caen, stand before the island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel, wander the corsair city of Saint-Malo, and end among the fairy-tale chateaux of the Loire Valley. A round trip from Paris, it pairs Michelin-level dining and five-star castle hotels with deep cultural commentary for groups of just 4-8 travellers.
desc_zh: 这趟精品小团循着法兰西艺术与文化的源头：从卢浮宫的旷世杰作、凡尔赛宫的巴洛克瑰宝，到诺曼底的印象派风光。由法国国家博物馆讲解员带您深度领略皇室正史与宗教艺术，跨越诺曼底大桥前往翁弗勒尔、多维尔与卡昂，登临海中孤岛圣米歇尔山，漫步海盗古城圣马洛，最后徜徉于卢瓦尔河谷的童话城堡群。行程从巴黎往返，配以米其林星级美食与五星城堡酒店，专为4-8人小团打造深度文化体验。

highlights.en: Themed deep-dive lecture inside the Louvre by a French national-museum guide
highlights.zh: 由法国国家博物馆讲解员在卢浮宫做主题深度讲解

highlights.en: Versailles Palace with expert commentary on its Baroque and Rococo art
highlights.zh: 凡尔赛宫巴洛克与洛可可艺术专题深度讲解

highlights.en: Monet's Garden at Giverny and the Impressionist harbour town of Honfleur
highlights.zh: 吉维尼莫奈花园与印象派经典小镇翁弗勒尔

highlights.en: Mont-Saint-Michel, the UNESCO island abbey, and the corsair city of Saint-Malo
highlights.zh: 世界遗产海中孤岛圣米歇尔山与海盗古城圣马洛

highlights.en: Loire Valley chateaux: Chenonceau on the water, Blois old town and grand Chambord
highlights.zh: 卢瓦尔河谷城堡：水上舍农索城堡、布洛瓦老城与恢弘的香波堡

highlights.en: Five-star Michelin castle hotels (Ivan Vautier, Chateau d'Artigny)
highlights.zh: 入住伊万沃蒂尔、达赫蒂涅城堡等五星米其林城堡酒店

highlights.en: Intimate 4-8 person small group with city-centre 4-star Paris hotels
highlights.zh: 4-8人轻奢小团，巴黎入住市中心4星级酒店

highlights.en: No forced shopping, deep cultural commentary throughout the route
highlights.zh: 全程无强制购物，深度文化讲解贯穿始终

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels in Paris and 5-star castle/Michelin hotels in Normandy and the Loire
includes.zh: 巴黎市中心4星级酒店，诺曼底与卢瓦尔河谷5星城堡/米其林酒店

includes.en: Daily breakfast
includes.zh: 每日酒店早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver
includes.zh: 持证中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Private intercity transport throughout the itinerary
includes.zh: 全程城际包车交通

includes.en: Listed attraction entries (Louvre, Versailles, Mont-Saint-Michel, Loire chateaux, etc.)
includes.zh: 行程所列景点门票（卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫、圣米歇尔山、卢瓦尔河谷城堡等）

includes.en: French national-museum lecturer for in-depth commentary
includes.zh: 法国国家博物馆讲解员深度讲解

includes.en: Seine River cruise in Paris
includes.zh: 巴黎塞纳河游船

includes.en: Local taxes and service fees
includes.zh: 当地税费及服务费

excludes.en: International and domestic flights
excludes.zh: 国际及境内机票

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 申根签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless noted (e.g. optional Ivan Vautier 3-course Saveurs set menu)
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐（除注明者外，如可选的伊万沃蒂尔三道式主厨推荐套餐）

excludes.en: Optional activities and recommended dining add-ons
excludes.zh: 可选项目及推荐餐饮加项

excludes.en: Personal expenses and gratuities for guide-driver
excludes.zh: 个人消费及司导小费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-卢浮宫-巴黎
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to the Louvre with a themed deep-dive lecture by a French national-museum guide. In the afternoon explore Notre-Dame, Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and Champ de Mars, then take a Seine River cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观卢浮宫，由法国国家博物馆讲解员做精选主题深度讲解；下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，随后乘塞纳河游船经过荣军院、大小皇宫、协和广场等地，全天畅游巴黎市中心景点。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-凡尔赛宫-巴黎
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs for a guided tour highlighting its Baroque masterpiece architecture, the pinnacle of the Sun King era. Return to the city for the fashion district of Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time at the Opera Garnier (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往巴黎西南郊的凡尔赛宫，深度游览太阳王时代的巴洛克登峰之作；下午返回市区，前往奥斯曼大街与皇家大道时尚中心，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爷等时尚地标。

timeline.title_en: Paris → Monet's Garden → Honfleur → Deauville → Caen
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-莫奈花园-翁弗勒尔-多维尔-卡昂
timeline.description_en: Depart for Monet's Garden at Giverny, then cross the Normandy Bridge to the Impressionist harbour town of Honfleur. Visit the twin Norman-Anglo towns of Deauville and Trouville before reaching Caen, Normandy's culinary capital. Overnight at the Michelin five-star Ivan Vautier hotel, with an optional three-course chef's dinner.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往吉维尼小镇的莫奈花园，随后跨越诺曼底大桥抵达印象派经典小镇翁弗勒尔；之后游览保留完整诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群的双子之城多维尔与特鲁维尔，傍晚前往诺曼底美食之都卡昂，入住米其林五星伊万沃蒂尔酒店，可选三道式主厨晚宴套餐。

timeline.title_zh: 卡昂-圣米歇尔山-圣马洛-卢瓦尔河谷
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to Mont-Saint-Michel, the UNESCO island abbey set on the Normandy tidal flats. Continue to the walled corsair city of Saint-Malo to explore its old town and seafront, then transfer to the Loire Valley for the night at the five-star Chateau d'Artigny.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往诺曼底海滩上的孤岛圣米歇尔山，依潮汐情况游览山脚如镜的浅水滩涂；之后前往海盗古城圣马洛，游览被海盗城墙环绕的老城与海滨城区，随后驱车前往卢瓦尔河谷大区，入住五星达赫蒂涅城堡酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷-布洛瓦-香波堡-巴黎
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to Chateau de Chenonceau, the chateau built over the water, then north to the charming old town of Blois. Finish at Chambord, the grandest of all French chateaux and a royal hunting lodge set in the wild Loire woodland, before returning to Paris to conclude the tour.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览建在水上的舍农索城堡，之后北上参观精致古朴的布洛瓦老城，最后参观卢瓦尔河谷最恢弘的城堡——法国君王狩猎行宫香波堡，沿原生态河谷叢林饱览美景后返回巴黎，结束美好旅程。

meeting_en: Paris (round trip starting and ending in Paris); pickup details confirmed in your departure notice.
meeting_zh: 巴黎（从巴黎出发并返回巴黎）；具体接团安排以出团通知书为准。

title_en: South of France 6-Day Small-Group Tour: Provence & the French Riviera
title_zh: 南法6天精品小团：普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸
short_en: A 6-day small-group escape through Provence's lavender, pink salt lakes and the Cote d'Azur, with round-trip TGV from Paris.
short_zh: 6天精品小团，畅游普罗旺斯薰衣草、粉红盐湖与蔚蓝海岸，巴黎高铁直达往返。
desc_en: Travel one-way deep into the south of France on this 6-day small-group tour, departing Paris by high-speed TGV into the heart of Provence. From the hilltop village of Gordes and the Senanque Abbey to the flamingo-filled pink salt lakes of Aigues-Mortes, then along the glamorous Cote d'Azur through Cannes, Saint-Paul-de-Vence, Antibes, Monaco, Eze and Nice, the route blends lavender fields, Mediterranean fjords and ancient Roman heritage. The journey ends amid the Roman monuments of Nimes before a TGV ride back to Paris, with two-night hotel stays for a relaxed pace and an all-inclusive price.
desc_zh: 这趟6天精品小团带您深度畅游法国南部，从巴黎乘高速TGV直达普罗旺斯腹地。行程串联山城高德古城、塞南克修道院，到火烈鸟栖息的艾格莫尔特粉红盐湖，再沿魅力四射的蔚蓝海岸游览戛纳、圣保罗德旺斯、昂提布、摩纳哥、埃兹与尼斯，融合薰衣草花海、地中海峡湾与古罗马遗迹。最后在尼姆的古罗马遗址间收尾，乘TGV返回巴黎；多处连住两晚、节奏轻松，一价全含。

highlights.en: Round-trip high-speed TGV from Paris straight into the south of France
highlights.zh: 巴黎高速TGV往返直达南法，减少舟车劳顿

highlights.en: Gordes hilltop village and the Senanque Abbey in the heart of Provence
highlights.zh: 普罗旺斯腹地的高德古城与塞南克修道院

highlights.en: Pink salt lakes of Aigues-Mortes with flamingos and the Pont de Gau bird park
highlights.zh: 艾格莫尔特粉红盐湖与蓬德高鸟类公园，邂逅火烈鸟

highlights.en: Lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 (in season)
highlights.zh: 瓦朗索勒与D907公路薰衣草花海（花期内）

highlights.en: Cote d'Azur glamour: Cannes, Saint-Paul-de-Vence, Monaco, Eze and Nice
highlights.zh: 蔚蓝海岸风情：戛纳、圣保罗德旺斯、摩纳哥、埃兹与尼斯

highlights.en: Calanques boat cruise from Cassis along dramatic Mediterranean cliffs
highlights.zh: 卡西斯出发的卡朗格峡湾游船，欣赏壮丽地中海峭壁

highlights.en: Roman heritage in Arles and Nimes, in the footsteps of Van Gogh
highlights.zh: 阿尔勒与尼姆的古罗马遗迹，追寻梵高足迹

highlights.en: Intimate 4-8 person small group with city-centre 4-star hotels and all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 4-8人精品小团，入住市区四星酒店，一价全含

includes.en: 5 nights in 4-star hotels (room type not selectable due to special properties)
includes.zh: 四星级酒店5晚（因选用特殊酒店，不可选择房型）

includes.en: 5 hotel buffet or equivalent breakfasts
includes.zh: 酒店自助早餐或其他形式早餐5餐

includes.en: Round-trip direct TGV high-speed rail tickets between Paris and Avignon/Nimes
includes.zh: 巴黎至阿维尼翁/尼姆火车站往返高铁直达火车票

includes.zh: 门票：埃兹山顶植物园、卡西斯峡湾游船、香水博物馆、蓬德高鸟类公园、艾格莫尔特盐湖及观光火车

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 -> 阿维尼翁（普罗旺斯小镇）
timeline.description_en: Take the TGV from Paris to the south of France on your own (about 2-3 hours, no guide on board). On arrival, meet the group and tour the Provence villages: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the hilltop town of Gordes (the model for Miyazaki's Castle in the Sky) and the Senanque Abbey (exterior), then check in near Avignon.
timeline.description_zh: 当天自行乘坐法国TGV高铁前往南法（约2-3小时，高铁上无导游陪同）。抵达后集合，游览普罗旺斯小镇：泉水小镇、宫崎骏《天空之城》原型高德古城、塞南克修道院（外观），随后入住阿维尼翁北部酒店。

timeline.title_en: Avignon -> Aigues-Mortes -> Marseille (pink salt lakes & flamingos)
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 -> 艾格莫尔特 -> 马赛（粉红盐湖与火烈鸟）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Avignon old town with the broken Pont d'Avignon and the Papal Palace (exteriors). Visit the Pont de Gau bird park and the town of Aigues-Mortes, riding the sightseeing train around the pink salt lakes. In the afternoon head to Marseille for the Palais Longchamp, Notre-Dame de la Garde and the Old Port before checking in.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自行参观阿维尼翁古城、罗纳河断桥（外观）、教皇宫（外观），随后前往蓬德高鸟类公园和艾格莫尔特，乘坐观光火车游览粉红盐湖。下午前往马赛，可游览隆尚宫、守护圣母圣殿与马赛旧港，之后入住酒店。

timeline.title_en: Marseille -> Valensole -> Cannes -> Saint-Paul-de-Vence -> Antibes (lavender & Riviera)
timeline.title_zh: 马赛 -> 瓦朗索勒 -> 戛纳 -> 圣保罗德旺斯 -> 昂提布（薰衣草与海岸）
timeline.description_en: Drive to the Valensole and D907 lavender fields (in season). In the afternoon visit the film city of Cannes - the Palais des Festivals and walk of stars - then the medieval hilltop art village of Saint-Paul-de-Vence. Reach Antibes in the evening to explore its old town, then check in. If lavender is not in bloom, a ceramics village is visited instead.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路薰衣草花田（花期内），置身浪漫紫色花海。下午前往电影名城戛纳，参观影节宫与星光大道，随后前往山顶中世纪艺术村庄圣保罗德旺斯。傍晚抵达昂提布，自行游览老城后入住酒店。如花期外无法参观薰衣草，则改为参观陶瓷小镇。

timeline.title_en: Antibes -> Menton -> Monaco -> Eze -> Nice -> Antibes (Grace Kelly's road)
timeline.title_zh: 昂提布 -> 芒通 -> 摩纳哥 -> 埃兹 -> 尼斯 -> 昂提布（格蕾丝公主之路）
timeline.description_en: Start in the lemon town of Menton, then drive Princess Grace's clifftop corniche road past Villefranche-sur-Mer to Monaco and its yacht harbour. Continue to the cliff village of Eze for Mediterranean views and a perfume museum, then return to Nice for the Baie des Anges beach and the Promenade des Anglais before returning to Antibes.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从昂提布出发前往芒通游览“柠檬小镇”，随后行驶摩纳哥格蕾丝公主峭壁大道，途经海滨自由城，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头。下午前往悬崖小镇埃兹俯瞰地中海，参观香水博物馆，随后返回尼斯，自由参观天使湾沙滩与英格兰滨海大道，之后返回昂提布酒店。

timeline.title_en: Antibes -> Cassis -> Arles -> Nimes (calanques & Van Gogh)
timeline.title_zh: 昂提布 -> 卡西斯 -> 阿尔勒 -> 尼姆（峡湾与梵高）
timeline.description_en: Drive along the Mediterranean to Cassis for a boat cruise through the calanques - sheer cliffs and turquoise water at Port-Miou, Port-Pin and En-Vau. Continue to the historic city of Arles to see the Roman arena and Van Gogh's landscapes, then reach Nimes in the afternoon to stroll the well-preserved Roman old town, and check in.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从昂提布沿地中海前往迷人的卡西斯，乘游轮欣赏卡朗格峡湾险峻悬崖与碧蓝海水（Port-Miou、Port-Pin、En-Vau）。随后前往历史名城阿尔勒，探索古罗马竞技场与梵高笔下的经典景观。下午抵达尼姆漫步古城，感受保存完好的罗马遗迹，随后入住酒店。

timeline.title_en: Nimes -> Paris (Roman Nimes, then TGV home)
timeline.title_zh: 尼姆 -> 巴黎（尼姆古城，乘高铁返回）
timeline.description_en: Walk through the old town of Nimes, the city of water nymphs, exploring its Roman grandeur and secret gardens. Then take the TGV on your own from Nimes or Avignon station back to Paris (no guide on board), ending the southern France journey.
timeline.description_zh: 当天徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌与神秘花园。随后从尼姆或阿维尼翁火车站自行乘坐法国TGV高铁返回巴黎（高铁上无导游陪同），结束南法旅程。

meeting_en: Departs Paris; travellers take the TGV on their own to Avignon (south of France), where the group meets on arrival. Train ticket is name-registered - bring your passport and e-ticket.
meeting_zh: 巴黎出发；游客自行乘坐TGV高铁前往阿维尼翁（南法），抵达后集合。火车票为实名制，请携带护照及电子版火车票。

title_en: France 9-Day Boutique Small-Group Tour: Normandy, Loire Castles & the French Riviera
title_zh: 法国9天精品小团：诺曼底、卢瓦尔城堡与南法蔚蓝海岸
short_en: A 9-day boutique small-group journey from Normandy's Impressionist coast and Loire châteaux to Provence lavender and the French Riviera, TGV-linked and all-inclusive.
short_zh: 9天精品小团之旅：从诺曼底印象派海岸、卢瓦尔河谷城堡，到普罗旺斯薰衣草与南法蔚蓝海岸，TGV高铁直达，一价全含。
desc_en: This 9-day boutique small-group tour (4-8 guests) loops out of Paris to two of France's most evocative regions. The first half traces Normandy and the Loire: Monet's garden at Giverny, the Impressionist harbour of Honfleur, Mont-Saint-Michel, the corsair city of Saint-Malo, and the Loire Valley châteaux of Chenonceau and Chambord, with nights in a Michelin-starred spa hotel and a 17th-century château. A high-speed TGV then whisks you south to Provence and the Côte d'Azur, where lavender fields, the pink salt lakes of Aigues-Mortes, Cannes, Monaco, Èze, Nice, the Cassis calanques and the Roman cities of Arles and Nîmes unfold before a TGV return to Paris. Themes throughout: Impressionist art, medieval castles, Mediterranean colour and gourmet culture.
desc_zh: 这条9天精品小团线路（4-8人成行）从巴黎出发，深入法国最具风情的两大区域。前半程探索诺曼底与卢瓦尔河谷：吉维尼的莫奈花园、印象派渔港翁弗勒尔、圣米歇尔山、海盗之城圣马洛，以及卢瓦尔河谷的舍农索城堡与香波堡，夜宿米其林星级SPA酒店与十七世纪城堡酒店。随后乘坐TGV高铁南下普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸，依次邂逅薰衣草花田、艾格莫尔特粉色盐湖、戛纳、摩纳哥、埃兹、尼斯、卡西斯峡湾，以及阿尔勒与尼姆的古罗马名城，最后乘高铁返回巴黎。全程串联印象派艺术、中世纪城堡、地中海色彩与美食文化。

highlights.en: Monet's Garden at Giverny and the Impressionist harbour town of Honfleur
highlights.zh: 吉维尼莫奈花园与印象派渔港小镇翁弗勒尔

highlights.en: Mont-Saint-Michel island abbey and the corsair walled city of Saint-Malo
highlights.zh: 海上孤岛圣米歇尔山修道院与海盗城墙古城圣马洛

highlights.en: Loire Valley châteaux — Chenonceau on the water and the majestic Chambord
highlights.zh: 卢瓦尔河谷城堡——水上城堡舍农索与雄伟的香波堡

highlights.en: Provence highlights: lavender fields, Gordes hilltop village and the pink salt lakes of Aigues-Mortes
highlights.zh: 普罗旺斯精华：薰衣草花田、高德山顶古城与艾格莫尔特粉色盐湖

highlights.en: French Riviera in full: Cannes, Monaco's Grace Princess road, Èze, Nice and the Cassis calanque cruise
highlights.zh: 尽览蔚蓝海岸：戛纳、摩纳哥格蕾丝公主大道、埃兹、尼斯与卡西斯峡湾游船

highlights.en: Roman heritage and Van Gogh's Provence at Arles and Nîmes
highlights.zh: 阿尔勒与尼姆的古罗马遗产及梵高笔下的普罗旺斯

highlights.en: Boutique small group (4-8), Michelin-starred spa hotel + château stay, two-night stays for comfort
highlights.zh: 4-8人精品小团，米其林星级SPA酒店与城堡酒店，两晚连住更舒适

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with TGV high-speed rail, city-centre hotels, all 10 listed activities and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含，含TGV高铁、市中心酒店、十项精选活动门票，绝无强制购物

includes.en: Accommodation: 1 night 5-star Michelin spa hotel, 1 night 5-star château hotel, 6 nights 4-star hotels (room type not selectable due to special properties)
includes.zh: 住宿：五星SPA酒店1晚、五星城堡酒店1晚、四星级酒店6晚（特殊酒店不可选房型）

includes.en: 8 hotel breakfasts (buffet or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店自助早餐或其他形式早餐共8餐

includes.en: Local operating costs: city/tourist tax, residence tax, city-entry fees, tolls, parking, fuel, guide-driver meal allowances
includes.zh: 执行费用：城市税、居住税、进城费、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等

includes.en: Private business touring vehicle
includes.zh: 商务旅行车

includes.en: Return TGV high-speed rail tickets, Paris to Avignon/Nîmes
includes.zh: 巴黎至阿维尼翁/尼姆往返TGV高铁直达火车票

includes.en: Chinese-speaking guide-driver service
includes.zh: 中文司机兼导游服务

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece of 23kg checked luggage plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Attraction entries: Monet's Garden (closed in winter; open early April to end October), Chambord, Chenonceau (first entry), Èze exotic garden, Cassis calanque cruise, Perfume Museum, Pont de Gau bird park, Aigues-Mortes salt lakes & sightseeing train
includes.zh: 门票：莫奈花园（冬季关闭，每年四月初至十月末开放）、香波堡、舍农索城堡首道门票、埃兹山顶植物园、卡西斯峡湾游船、香水博物馆、蓬德高鸟类公园、艾格莫尔特盐湖及观光火车

excludes.en: International flights to/from France
excludes.zh: 往返法国的国际机票

excludes.en: Passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家所需的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否承保）

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not listed (e.g. the recommended Ivan Vautier 3-course dinner in Caen)
excludes.zh: 未列明的午餐与晚餐（如卡昂推荐的伊万沃蒂尔三道式晚宴套餐）

excludes.en: Optional activities and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自选活动及个人消费

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide-driver
excludes.zh: 司机兼导游小费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 莫奈花园 → 翁弗勒尔 → 多维尔 → 卡昂
timeline.description_en: Depart Paris for Monet's Garden in Giverny, then cross the Normandy Bridge to the Impressionist fishing town of Honfleur. Continue to the twin towns of Deauville and Trouville with their well-preserved Norman-Anglo architecture, before reaching the Normandy gastronomic capital of Caen for the night, with the Ivan Vautier three-course dinner recommended.
timeline.description_zh: 从巴黎出发前往吉维尼小镇的莫奈花园，随后横跨诺曼底大桥抵达印象派经典渔港小镇翁弗勒尔。之后游览保留完整诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群的双子之城多维尔与特鲁维尔，傍晚抵达诺曼底美食之都卡昂入住，推荐品尝伊万沃蒂尔三道式晚宴套餐。

timeline.title_zh: 卡昂 → 圣米歇尔山 → 圣马洛 → 卢瓦尔河谷
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to the island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel, viewing the mirror-like tidal flats at its foot depending on the tide. Then explore the corsair city of Saint-Malo, its old town and seaside quarter, before transferring to the Loire Valley to check in at a château hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往海上孤岛圣米歇尔山，依潮汐情况游览山脚下如镜面般的浅滩。随后探访海盗之城圣马洛，游览圣马洛老城及海滨城中区，之后前往卢瓦尔河谷大区入住城堡酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷 → 布洛瓦 → 香波堡 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Visit Chenonceau, the château built across the water, then the charming old town of Blois en route to Chambord, the grandest château in France and a former royal hunting lodge. Return to Paris for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览建在水上的舍农索城堡，沿途参观精致古朴的布洛瓦老城，再前往全法兰西最恢弘的城堡、法王狩猎行宫香波堡，之后返回巴黎入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 阿维尼翁（TGV高铁）
timeline.description_en: Self-board a TGV high-speed train south (no guide on board, approx. 2-3 hours). On arrival, begin the Provence villages tour: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse spring town, the hilltop old town of Gordes, and the Sénanque Abbey (exterior), then check in near Avignon.
timeline.description_zh: 当天自行乘坐TGV高铁前往南法（高铁上无导游陪同，约2至3小时）。抵达后集合，开启普罗旺斯小镇之旅，依次游览泉水小镇、高德古城、塞南克修道院（外观），随后入住阿维尼翁北部酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 → 艾格莫尔特 → 马赛
timeline.description_en: Self-explore Avignon's old town, the broken Rhône bridge and the Papal Palace (exteriors), then visit the Pont de Gau bird park and the town of Aigues-Mortes, riding the sightseeing train past the pink salt lake. Afternoon in Marseille — Palais Longchamp, Notre-Dame de la Garde and the Old Port — then check in.
timeline.description_zh: 自行参观阿维尼翁古城、罗纳河断桥与教皇宫（外观），随后前往蓬德高鸟类公园与南法小镇艾格莫尔特，乘坐观光火车游览粉红盐湖。下午游览马赛，可选隆尚宫、守护圣母圣殿与马赛旧港，之后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 马赛 → 瓦朗索勒 → 戛纳 → 圣保罗德旺斯 → 昂提布
timeline.description_en: Head to the Valensole lavender fields along the D907 (in bloom season). Afternoon in Cannes — the Palais des Festivals and Walk of Fame and the seafront promenade — then the medieval art village of Saint-Paul-de-Vence. Evening in Antibes to explore the old town, then check in. (If lavender is out of season, a ceramics town replaces it.)
timeline.description_zh: 前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（花期内），置身浪漫紫色花海。下午前往南法电影重镇戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道并漫步海滨大道，随后前往山顶中世纪艺术村庄圣保罗德旺斯。傍晚抵达昂提布自行游览老城后入住酒店。（如非薰衣草花期则改为参观陶瓷小镇。）

timeline.title_en: Antibes → Menton → Monaco → Èze → Nice → Antibes
timeline.title_zh: 昂提布 → 芒通 → 摩纳哥 → 埃兹 → 尼斯 → 昂提布
timeline.description_en: Drive to the "lemon town" of Menton, then the Princess Grace cliff road and the Moyenne Corniche, past Villefranche-sur-Mer, to Monaco and its yacht harbour. Afternoon at the clifftop village of Èze overlooking the Mediterranean and a perfume museum, then free time at Nice's Angel Bay beach and the Promenade des Anglais before returning to Antibes.
timeline.description_zh: 从昂提布出发前往“柠檬小镇”芒通，随后驶上摩纳哥格蕾丝公主大道与Moyenne Corniche峭壁之路，途经海滨自由城，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头。下午前往悬崖小镇埃兹俯瞰地中海，拜访香水博物馆，随后返回尼斯自由游览天使湾沙滩与英格兰海滨大道，傍晚返回昂提布入住。

timeline.title_zh: 昂提布 → 卡西斯 → 阿尔勒 → 尼姆
timeline.description_en: From Antibes drive along the coast to Cassis for a boat cruise through the calanques — steep cliffs, turquoise water and the famous Calanque En-Vau. Continue to the historic city of Arles to see the Roman amphitheatre and Van Gogh's landscapes, then on to Nîmes for the old town and well-preserved Roman remains. Overnight in Nîmes.
timeline.description_zh: 从昂提布沿地中海驶向卡西斯，乘游轮欣赏险峻悬崖、碧蓝海水与卡朗格峡湾独特地貌。随后前往历史名城阿尔勒，探访古罗马竞技场与梵高笔下景观，下午抵达尼姆漫步古城，感受保存完好的罗马遗迹，夜宿尼姆酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 尼姆 → 巴黎（TGV高铁）
timeline.description_en: Walk through the Roman old town of Nîmes — the water-spirit city — exploring its Roman glory and gardens. Then self-board a TGV high-speed train from Nîmes or Avignon (no guide on board) to conclude the southern France journey.
timeline.description_zh: 当天徒步参观“水精灵之城”尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌与神秘花园，随后从尼姆或阿维尼翁火车站自行乘坐TGV高铁（高铁上无导游陪同），结束南法旅程。

meeting_en: Paris — group assembles in Paris on Day 1 before departure; tour also ends in Paris via TGV return.
meeting_zh: 巴黎——第1天在巴黎集合后出发；行程同样以乘坐TGV返回巴黎结束。

title_en: Southern France & French Riviera 8-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 南法蔚蓝海岸8天精品小团
short_en: An 8-day small-group loop from Paris through Burgundy, the Alpine lakes, Provence lavender fields and the French Riviera, with TGV high-speed rail.
short_zh: 8天精品小团，从巴黎出发，畅游勃艮第酒乡、阿尔卑斯湖畔、普罗旺斯薰衣草花海与蔚蓝海岸，搭乘TGV高铁直达。
desc_en: This 8-day small-group journey traces a deep route from Paris down to the Mediterranean and back by TGV high-speed rail. You overnight in a Relais & Châteaux castle hotel in Burgundy's wine country, wander the Alpine lakeside town of Annecy, explore Provence's hill towns and lavender fields, and spend two nights in Nice on the French Riviera. Highlights include Monaco, the corniche cliff roads, a Mediterranean boat cruise to Saint-Tropez, and the pink salt lakes and flamingos of the Camargue. With a 6-8 person small group, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all listed attractions included, it blends Burgundy gastronomy, Alpine scenery, and azure-coast glamour.
desc_zh: 8天精品小团深度环线，从巴黎一路南下直抵地中海，再乘TGV高铁返回。行程入住勃艮第酒乡的罗莱夏朵古堡酒店，漫步阿尔卑斯湖畔小镇安纳西，探访普罗旺斯山城与薰衣草花海，并在蔚蓝海岸尼斯连住两晚。亮点包括摩纳哥、峭壁海岸公路、乘船巡游地中海直达圣特罗佩，以及卡马格的粉红盐湖与火烈鸟家园。6-8人精品小团，中文司机兼导游全程陪同，列明景点一价全含，融合勃艮第美食、阿尔卑斯风光与蔚蓝海岸的优雅风情。

highlights.en: Overnight in a Relais & Châteaux 18th-century castle hotel in Burgundy wine country
highlights.zh: 入住勃艮第酒乡18世纪罗莱夏朵古堡酒店

highlights.en: Two nights in Nice with day trips along the French Riviera and to Monaco
highlights.zh: 尼斯连住两晚，畅游蔚蓝海岸并探访摩纳哥

highlights.en: Provence lavender fields at Valensole and the Verdon Gorge & Lake Sainte-Croix
highlights.zh: 瓦朗索勒薰衣草花海，凡尔登大峡谷与圣十字湖

highlights.en: Gaud hill town, the real-life model for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky'
highlights.zh: 高德古城，宫崎骏《天空之城》的原型

highlights.en: Mediterranean boat cruise from Sainte-Maxime to the 'sun city' of Saint-Tropez
highlights.zh: 从圣马克西姆乘船出海，巡游直达阳光之城圣特罗佩

highlights.en: Aigues-Mortes pink salt lakes and the Camargue flamingo bird park
highlights.zh: 艾格莫尔特粉红盐湖与卡马格蓬德高火烈鸟鸟类公园

highlights.en: TGV high-speed rail between Paris and southern France, saving long road hours
highlights.zh: 巴黎往返南法搭乘TGV高铁直达，大幅减少乘车时间

highlights.en: 6-8 person small group with Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all listed attractions included
highlights.zh: 6-8人精品小团，中文司机兼导游，列明景点一价全含

includes.en: 7 nights' accommodation: 1 night in a 5-star Relais & Châteaux castle hotel + 6 nights in 4-star city hotels (room type not selectable due to special hotels)
includes.zh: 7晚住宿：1晚五星级古堡酒店 + 6晚四星级酒店（特殊酒店不可选房型）

includes.en: 7 buffet or other-style breakfasts at the hotels
includes.zh: 酒店自助早餐或其他形式早餐共7餐

includes.en: One-way TGV high-speed direct rail ticket between Paris and Avignon/Nîmes (A line: south→Paris; B line: Paris→south)
includes.zh: 阿维尼翁/尼姆与巴黎之间单程高铁直达火车票（A线：南法至巴黎；B线：巴黎至南法）

includes.en: Private business touring vehicle for intercity transport
includes.zh: 商务旅行车城际交通

includes.en: Chinese-speaking guide-driver service throughout
includes.zh: 中文司机兼导游全程服务

includes.en: City taxes, entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, parking, fuel and driver-guide meal allowances
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费及司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Listed attraction tickets: Burgundy winery visit & wine tasting, Èze hilltop botanical garden, Saint-Raphaël boat cruise, perfume museum, Camargue (Pont de Gau) bird park, Aigues-Mortes salt lakes & sightseeing train
includes.zh: 门票：勃艮第酒庄参观及品酒、埃兹山顶植物园、圣拉斐尔出海渡轮、香水博物馆、蓬德高鸟类公园、艾格莫尔特盐湖及观光火车

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece of 23 kg checked luggage + 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

excludes.en: International flights to/from France
excludes.zh: 往返法国的国际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动，请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中未注明的午餐和晚餐

excludes.en: Optional activities and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自选活动及个人消费

excludes.en: Gratuities for the guide-driver
excludes.zh: 司机兼导游的小费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 第戎
timeline.description_en: Morning meet-up at Place d'Italie in Paris, then head to Dijon, capital of Burgundy and France's gastronomic heart, home of red wine, snails, mustard and white cattle. Tour Dijon's old town, then follow the Route des Grands Crus through the Romanée wine region with a winery visit (subject to opening). Overnight in a Relais & Châteaux castle hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在巴黎意大利广场集合，前往法国产酒名区勃艮第首府第戎，这里是红酒、蜗牛、芥末与白牛的原产地，也是法国美食之都。参观第戎老城，午餐后开启罗曼蒂产区的名酒之路，按酒庄开放情况安排酒庄参观。夜宿罗莱夏朵古堡酒店或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 第戎 → 安纳西
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the romantic Alpine lakeside town of Annecy. The medieval town backs onto the Alps with the beautiful Lake Annecy to its southeast. Stroll the old town, the lakeshore and the Pont des Amours. Overnight in a 4-star hotel in central Annecy.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往法式情调的浪漫小镇安纳西。这座中世纪小城背靠阿尔卑斯山，东南方是美丽的安纳西湖。游览安纳西湖、安纳西老城与爱情桥等景点。夜宿安纳西诺富特或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 安纳西 → 南法小镇 → 阿维尼翁
timeline.description_en: Set off for Provence and tour its hill villages in turn: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the Gaud hill town (the model for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky') and Sénanque Abbey. Return to Avignon to explore the old city, the broken Pont d'Avignon on the Rhône, and the Palais des Papes on your own. Overnight in a 4-star hotel by the Avignon bridge.
timeline.description_zh: 早上出发前往普罗旺斯地区，依次游览泉水小镇、高德古城（宫崎骏《天空之城》原型）、塞南克修道院。返回阿维尼翁，自行参观阿维尼翁古城、罗纳河断桥与教皇宫。夜宿阿维尼翁断桥美居或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 → 瓦朗索勒 → 圣十字湖 → 尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to the lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 road (in season), immersed in a purple flower sea. In the afternoon visit Europe's Verdon Gorge and Lake Sainte-Croix, then continue to Nice for a free visit to the old town and a stroll along the Bay of Angels. Overnight in a 4-star hotel in central Nice. (If lavender is not in bloom during the tour dates, a ceramics town is visited instead.)
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（花期内），置身浪漫紫色花海。下午游览欧洲峡谷凡尔登大峡谷及圣十字湖，之后前往尼斯，自由参观尼斯老城、漫步天使湾。夜宿尼斯中心美居或诺富特同等4星级酒店。（如团期内无法观赏薰衣草，则改为参观陶瓷小镇。）

timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 → 埃兹 → 摩纳哥 → 芒通 → 尼斯
timeline.description_en: Drive from Nice to the cliff-top village of Èze overlooking the Mediterranean, and visit a perfume museum to learn how fragrances are made. In the afternoon take the Moyenne Corniche cliff road past Villefranche-sur-Mer, visit Monaco and its yacht harbour, then continue to the 'lemon town' of Menton. Overnight in the same 4-star Nice hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早上从尼斯出发前往悬崖小镇埃兹俯眺地中海，参观香水博物馆了解香水的生产调配过程。下午沿南法著名的峭壁之路Moyenne Corniche行车，欣赏海滨自由城，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头，之后前往芒通游览“柠檬小镇”。夜宿尼斯同一家4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 → 戛纳 → 圣拉斐尔 → 圣特罗佩 → 马赛
timeline.description_en: Head to Cannes to see the Palais des Festivals and seafront, then follow the Corniche d'Or to the resort town of Saint-Raphaël. From Sainte-Maxime, cruise the Mediterranean by boat to the artistic seaside town of Saint-Tropez (about 20 minutes), then continue to Marseille. Overnight in a 4-star hotel in Marseille.
timeline.description_zh: 早上出发前往戛纳，参观戛纳影节宫和海滨，随后沿玫瑰海岸前往海滨重镇圣拉斐尔，再从圣马克西姆乘船出海巡游地中海，直达海洋艺术之城圣特罗佩（游船约20分钟），之后前往马赛入住酒店。夜宿马赛皇冠或诺富特同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 马赛 → 艾格莫尔特 → 尼姆
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour Marseille — optionally the Palais Longchamp park, Notre-Dame de la Garde basilica and the Old Port. In the afternoon visit the Pont de Gau bird park and the town of Aigues-Mortes, then ride the Aigues-Mortes sightseeing train to the pink salt lakes. Continue to the medieval city of Nîmes. Overnight in a 4-star hotel in Nîmes.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览马赛市区，可选参观隆尚宫公园、守护圣母圣殿与马赛旧港。下午前往蓬德高鸟类公园和南法小镇艾格莫尔特，乘坐观光火车游览粉红盐湖，之后前往中世纪古城尼姆。夜宿尼姆Arenes伯爵公寓或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 尼姆 → 巴黎
