timeline.description_en: Walk through the old Roman city of Nîmes, exploring its ancient grandeur and the Jardin de la Fontaine. Then board a TGV high-speed train from Nîmes or Avignon station to Paris Gare de Lyon, ending the southern France journey.
timeline.description_zh: 当天徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌与神秘花园，随后从尼姆或阿维尼翁火车站乘坐法国TGV高铁抵达巴黎里昂火车站，结束南法旅程。

meeting_en: Paris — morning meet-up at Place d'Italie; the tour returns to Paris by TGV on Day 8.
meeting_zh: 巴黎——上午在意大利广场集合；第8天搭乘TGV高铁返回巴黎。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 12-Day Deluxe Small-Group Tour (Paris to Rome)
title_zh: 法意瑞12天精品小团深度游（巴黎至罗马）
short_en: A 12-day one-way journey from Paris to Rome through the Swiss Alps, with expert Louvre & Versailles talks, scenic rail, lake castles and Renaissance cities.
short_zh: 12天巴黎到罗马单程深度之旅，穿越瑞士阿尔卑斯，含卢浮宫与凡尔赛专业讲解、观光列车、湖畔古堡与文艺复兴名城。
desc_en: This 12-day small-group adventure runs one-way from Paris to Rome, threading France, Switzerland and Italy into a single deep route. Begin with curator-led talks at the Louvre and Versailles, descend through Burgundy's vineyards to the shores of Lake Geneva, then ride the GoldenPass panoramic train and explore the Jungfrau region around Interlaken. Cross the Alps into Italy for Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, Pisa, the Tuscan hill towns and finally the eternal city of Rome. With city-centre 4-star hotels, scenic châteaux stays, included attractions and no forced shopping, it blends art, alpine landscapes and Italian romance.
desc_zh: 这是一段12天的精品小团之旅，从巴黎单程直抵罗马，将法国、瑞士与意大利串联成一条深度环线。旅程以卢浮宫和凡尔赛宫的国家馆讲解师专题讲解开篇，经勃艮第酒乡南下日内瓦湖畔，乘坐金色山口全景观光列车，畅游因特拉肯与少女峰地区。随后翻越阿尔卑斯进入意大利，游览米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、比萨、托斯卡纳山城，最终抵达永恒之城罗马。全程入住市中心四星酒店，含景观古堡住宿与门票，无强制购物，融艺术、阿尔卑斯风光与意式浪漫于一体。

highlights.en: Curator-led deep-dive talks inside the Louvre and the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫国家馆讲解师专题深度讲解

highlights.en: GoldenPass panoramic train from Lungern to Lucerne through the Alps
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口全景观光列车，从龙疆穿越阿尔卑斯抵卢塞恩

highlights.en: Jungfrau region & Interlaken, with Lake Geneva, Chillon Castle and the Lavaux vineyard terraces
highlights.zh: 少女峰地区与因特拉肯，日内瓦湖、西庸城堡与世界遗产拉沃葡萄梯田

highlights.en: Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, Pisa and Rome's ancient landmarks
highlights.zh: 威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、比萨及罗马古迹

highlights.en: One-way deep route Paris to Rome with all intercity transport included
highlights.zh: 巴黎至罗马单程深度环线，含全程城际交通

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels plus scenic château and Tuscan villa stays
highlights.zh: 市中心四星酒店，外加景观古堡与托斯卡纳庄园住宿

highlights.en: Listed attraction entries included with no forced shopping stops
highlights.zh: 含行程所列景点门票，全程无强制购物

highlights.en: Small group of 4-8 travellers with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 4-8人精品小团，配中文导游兼司机

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (plus listed château/villa stays), twin/double sharing
includes.zh: 市中心四星级酒店（含行程所列古堡/庄园），双人间住宿

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程持证中文导游兼司机

includes.en: Private vehicle and all intercity ground transport
includes.zh: 专属车辆及全程城际地面交通

includes.en: GoldenPass panoramic train ride (Lungern–Lucerne)
includes.zh: 金色山口全景观光列车（龙疆至卢塞恩）

includes.en: Seine river cruise in Paris and Lake Geneva scenic drive
includes.zh: 巴黎塞纳河游船及日内瓦环湖景观线

includes.en: Coach tour of the Jungfrau region (Option 1 included)
includes.zh: 乘车游览少女峰地区（推荐项目一，费用包含）

includes.en: Entry to listed attractions per itinerary (e.g. Louvre, Versailles)
includes.zh: 行程所列景点门票（如卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫）

includes.en: Local taxes and service charges
includes.zh: 当地税费及服务费

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Visa fees and travel insurance
excludes.zh: 签证费用及旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless otherwise noted
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐（行程另有注明者除外）

excludes.en: Optional activities: Interlaken paragliding (€220), Jungfrau panoramic cable car summit (€230), First aerial gondola return ticket (€70)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：因特拉肯高空滑翔伞（220欧元）、少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）、菲斯特空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）

excludes.en: Personal expenses and items not listed in the inclusions
excludes.zh: 个人消费及未列入费用包含的项目

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：卢浮宫与市区精华
timeline.description_en: Morning curator-led talk at the Louvre, then explore Notre-Dame, Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and Champ de Mars, followed by a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde. Overnight at a Paris 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午由国家馆讲解师在卢浮宫进行专题讲解，下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，随后乘塞纳河游船观赏荣军院、大小皇宫及协和广场。夜宿巴黎四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：凡尔赛宫
timeline.description_en: After breakfast visit the Palace of Versailles with a curator-led talk on its Baroque masterpieces. Return to the city for the Haussmann fashion district, Opera Garnier (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. Overnight in Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往凡尔赛宫，由讲解员深度讲解宫殿巴洛克艺术瑰宝。下午返回市区，游览奥斯曼时尚大街、巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货及老佛爷。夜宿巴黎。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎至第戎与勃艮第
timeline.description_en: Drive to Dijon, capital of Burgundy, to see the old town and Notre-Dame de Dijon. In the afternoon visit a Burgundy wine estate with vineyards, cellars and a sommelier-led tasting, then check in to a Relais & Châteaux castle hotel (or equivalent 5-star).
timeline.description_zh: 前往勃艮第首府第戎，参观第戎老城与第戎圣母院。午后游览勃艮第酒庄的葡萄园与酒窖，由专业侍酒师讲解品酒，随后入住罗莱夏朵城堡酒店（或同等五星级酒店）。

timeline.title_zh: 洛桑、蒙特勒与因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Free time in flower-filled Lausanne and the Ouchy waterfront, then the scenic Lake Geneva route past the Lavaux vineyard terraces (a UNESCO site). Admire Chillon Castle reflected in the lake at Montreux before continuing past Lake Thun to Interlaken. Overnight at the lakeside Giessbach hotel (or equivalent 4-star).
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览鲜花盛开的洛桑及乌希码头，随后驶上日内瓦湖景观之路，途经世界文化遗产拉沃葡萄梯田。下午欣赏蒙特勒湖中倒影的西庸城堡，经图恩湖前往因特拉肯。夜宿湖畔吉斯巴赫酒店（或同等四星级酒店）。

timeline.title_zh: 少女峰地区
timeline.description_en: Explore the Jungfrau region: by coach through Wilderswil, Lauterbrunnen and Grindelwald (included), or optionally summit the Jungfrau by cogwheel railway to the Sphinx observation deck overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. Stroll Interlaken before returning to the Giessbach hotel (or equivalent 4-star).
timeline.description_zh: 前往少女峰地区，可随车游览维尔德斯维尔、劳特布龙嫩与格林德尔瓦尔德（费用包含），或自费乘高山铁路登顶少女峰，在斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川。之后漫步因特拉肯小镇。夜宿吉斯巴赫酒店（或同等四星级酒店）。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯至卢塞恩与苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Visit Lungern and its lake, then board the GoldenPass panoramic train to Lucerne through the Alps. Explore Lake Lucerne, the Lion Monument, Chapel Bridge and the octagonal water tower before driving on to Zurich. Overnight at a Zurich 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览龙疆湖及小镇，乘金色山口全景观光列车穿越阿尔卑斯前往卢塞恩。下午游览卢塞恩湖、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，随后前往苏黎世。夜宿苏黎世四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世至米兰
timeline.description_en: See Zurich's old town, lake, Lindenhof and the Limmat riverside, then cross into Italy to Milan for the landmark Duomo (exterior) and the elegant Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Overnight at a Milan 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观苏黎世老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园及利马特河畔，随后前往米兰，自由参观米兰大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世长廊。夜宿米兰四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰至威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to romantic Venice and visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior), wandering the city's waterways. Overnight at a Venice 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 前往浪漫的威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与总督宫（外观），漫步水巷之间。夜宿威尼斯四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯至佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Head to Florence, cradle of the Renaissance: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (Duomo), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazzale Michelangelo with its panoramic city view. Overnight at a Tuscan-style villa hotel (or equivalent 4-star).
timeline.description_zh: 前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥及米开朗琪罗广场，登高俯瞰全城风光。夜宿托斯卡纳风格庄园酒店（或同等四星级酒店）。

timeline.title_zh: 五渔村与比萨
timeline.description_en: Visit the Cinque Terre, the cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast, then continue to Pisa for the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Square of Miracles. Return to the villa hotel near Florence. If rail strikes or weather prevent the Cinque Terre, the coast is toured by coach instead.
timeline.description_zh: 前往利古里亚海岸悬崖上的五渔村游览，下午前往比萨，参观比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场。返回佛罗伦萨庄园酒店。如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法前往五渔村，将改乘大巴游览海岸城市。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳山城至罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore San Gimignano with its medieval towers and Piazza della Cisterna, then Siena's old town, cathedral (exterior) and Piazza del Campo, followed by Pienza and the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia. Continue to Rome. Overnight at a Rome 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览中世纪万塔古城圣吉米尼亚诺，自由参观古塔与水井广场。随后前往锡耶纳古城、大教堂（外观）与田野广场，再游皮恩扎与奥尔恰谷丝柏小径，之后前往罗马。夜宿罗马四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马徒步深度游
timeline.description_en: Walking tour of the Eternal City: the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). The tour ends in the early afternoon. Much of central Rome is a limited-traffic zone, so wear comfortable shoes for the roughly 5 km of walking.
timeline.description_zh: 徒步深度游览永恒之城罗马，参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观）、西班牙广场及特莱维喷泉（外观）。午后结束行程。罗马古城核心景点位于车辆禁行区内，全天步行约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。

meeting_en: Paris, France — tour departs from Paris (typically your central Paris hotel); the journey ends one-way in Rome.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎——行程从巴黎出发（通常于巴黎市区酒店集合），单程结束于罗马。

title_en: France-Italy-Switzerland 11-Day Small-Group Tour (Rome to Paris)
title_zh: 法意瑞11天小团游（罗马出发，巴黎结束）
short_en: An 11-day one-way journey from Rome to Paris through Italy's Renaissance cities, the Swiss Alps and Jungfrau, French wine country and Paris - scenic rail and attractions all included.
short_zh: 11天单程深度游，从罗马一路畅游至巴黎，遍览意大利文艺复兴名城、瑞士阿尔卑斯少女峰、法国勃艮第酒乡与巴黎，观光列车与景点门票一价全含。
desc_en: This 11-day small-group tour traces a single deep route from Rome to Paris across three countries, never doubling back. In Italy you explore Eternal-City Rome, Renaissance Florence, the cliff-side Cinque Terre, romantic Venice and fashionable Milan; in Switzerland you ride the GoldenPass scenic train through Lucerne and Interlaken and ascend the Jungfrau to the Sphinx observatory; in France you visit fairytale Colmar, a Burgundy chateau and vineyard, Versailles, the Seine and the Louvre. Highlights include two nights at a five-star Tuscan spa hotel, a Burgundy castle stay, the GoldenPass railway, the Jungfrau cable-car pass and a wine-estate tasting - all bundled into one all-inclusive price.
desc_zh: 11天精品小团沿罗马至巴黎的单程深度路线，横跨意大利、瑞士、法国三国，全程不走回头路。意大利段游览永恒之城罗马、文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨、悬崖上的五渔村、浪漫水城威尼斯与时尚之都米兰；瑞士段乘坐金色山口观光列车穿越卢塞恩与因特拉肯，登顶少女峰斯芬克斯观景台；法国段探访童话小镇科尔马、勃艮第古堡与酒庄、凡尔赛宫、塞纳河与卢浮宫。行程亮点包括托斯卡纳五星SPA酒店连住两晚、勃艮第中世纪古堡酒店、金色山口列车、少女峰缆车套票及酒庄品酒，全部一价全含。

highlights.en: Eternal City Rome: Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 永恒之城罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence and the cliff-side villages of Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨与悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Romantic Venice and Gothic Milan Cathedral, plus a Tuscan five-star spa stay
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯、哥特式米兰大教堂，连住托斯卡纳五星SPA酒店

highlights.en: GoldenPass scenic train through Lucerne and Interlaken, summiting the Jungfrau to the Sphinx observatory
highlights.zh: 金色山口观光列车穿越卢塞恩与因特拉肯，登顶少女峰斯芬克斯观景台

highlights.en: Fairytale Colmar, a Burgundy castle hotel and a vineyard wine tasting
highlights.zh: 童话小镇科尔马、勃艮第中世纪古堡酒店与酒庄品酒

highlights.en: Versailles, a Seine river cruise and the Louvre - included with official guided entry
highlights.zh: 凡尔赛宫、塞纳河游船与卢浮宫，含官方导览门票

highlights.en: Intercity scenic rail included; central 4-star (and 5-star Tuscan) hotels
highlights.zh: 含城际观光列车；市中心四星酒店（含托斯卡纳五星）

highlights.en: All attractions included, no forced shopping, one-way deep route, all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 景点门票全含、不进购物店、单程深度路线、一价全含

includes.en: 2 nights five-star hotel and 8 nights comfortable four-star hotels
includes.zh: 2晚五星级酒店及8晚舒适型四星级酒店

includes.en: 10 breakfasts (hotel buffet or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店自助早餐或其他形式早餐共10餐

includes.en: Tourist/city taxes, city-entry fees, road, bridge, parking and fuel fees, and driver-guide meal allowances
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费及司导餐补等执行费用

includes.en: Tour coach or business travel van
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or full Chinese-speaking driver-guide (under 8 pax: van + driver-guide; over 8 pax: coach + driver + Chinese guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Attraction tickets: Louvre first entry with official guide, Versailles first entry with official guide, Seine river cruise, Burgundy estate visit and wine tasting, GoldenPass train (Lucerne-Zweisimmen), Cinque Terre train, Venice lagoon ferry, Jungfrau cable-car pass
includes.zh: 门票：卢浮宫首道门票及官导讲解、凡尔赛宫首道门票及官导讲解、塞纳河游船、勃艮第酒庄参观及品酒、金色山口列车（卢塞恩-龙疆段）、五渔村小火车、威尼斯运河上岛渡轮、少女峰缆车套票

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees for the countries visited
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (confirm coverage if itinerary includes high-risk activities)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如行程涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Guide and driver gratuities: 10 EUR per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费：共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not listed
excludes.zh: 未列明的午餐与晚餐

excludes.en: Any personal expenses and optional activities not listed in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程未列明的个人消费及自费项目

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet the group and explore the Eternal City, birthplace of the Roman Empire. See the Colosseum and Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain. Rome is explored on foot (about 5 km round trip); check in from 14:00. Overnight at a Rome 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 集合后游览永恒之城罗马，古罗马帝国的发祥地。参观斗兽场、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉。罗马古城为步行游览，往返约5公里，14点后可入住酒店。夜宿罗马四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 佛罗伦萨 - 比萨
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for Florence, cradle of the Renaissance. Visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazza Santa Croce (Santa Croce church exterior). Overnight at a Tuscan 5-star spa hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥及圣十字广场（圣十字教堂外观）。夜宿托斯卡纳五星级SPA酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 比萨 - 五渔村 - 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Visit the five colourful cliff-side villages of Cinque Terre along the Ligurian coast in the morning, then continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli. Overnight at the Tuscan 5-star spa hotel. (If rail strikes or bad weather prevent the Cinque Terre visit, the coast is toured by coach instead.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村五渔村，下午前往比萨游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场。夜宿托斯卡纳五星级SPA酒店。（如遇罢工或恶劣天气无法游览五渔村，将改为大巴游览海岸线城市。）

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 - 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to Venice in the morning. Freely visit St Mark's Basilica and St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (exteriors), wandering the water city's bridges and canals. Overnight at a Venice 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往威尼斯，自由参观圣马可大教堂、圣马可广场、叹息桥与总督宫（外观），漫步水巷与桥梁间的浪漫水城。夜宿威尼斯四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 米兰
timeline.description_en: Drive to Italy's fashion capital, Milan. Visit the Sforza Castle (exterior), the landmark Gothic Milan Cathedral (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. Overnight at a central Milan 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往意大利时尚之都米兰，参观斯福尔扎古堡（外观）、地标米兰大教堂（外观）及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。夜宿米兰市中心四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 卢塞恩 - 龙疆 - 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Tour Lucerne's lakeside, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Ride the GoldenPass scenic train (about one hour) through the mountains to Zweisimmen, then continue to Interlaken to stroll Hoheweg and the surrounding villages. Overnight at a Sigriswil 4-star alpine lake-view hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车（约1小时）穿山越岭前往龙疆，再前往因特拉肯自由游览何维克街及宁静村庄。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰 - 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Visit the village of Grindelwald and its dreamlike slopes, then take the cable car to the summit of the Jungfrau and the Sphinx observatory for views of the snow-capped peak and Europe's Aletsch Glacier. Continue by coach to Zurich. Overnight at a Zurich 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观格林德尔瓦尔德小镇与梦幻山坡，乘坐缆车登顶少女峰，在斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰皑皑雪峰与欧洲阿莱奇冰川。随后乘车前往苏黎世。夜宿苏黎世四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 科尔马 - 第戎
timeline.description_en: Tour Zurich's old town, the Grossmunster (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Then cross into France to fairytale Colmar - inspiration for Miyazaki's Howl's Moving Castle - to see the old town, the House of Heads and the Pfister House. Overnight at a Burgundy castle hotel (or a Dijon 4-star hotel).
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览苏黎世老城、苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街。之后前往法国童话小镇科尔马（宫崎骏《哈尔的移动城堡》原型地），游览科尔马老城、人头屋与普菲斯泰屋。夜宿勃艮第古堡酒店（或第戎市区四星级酒店）。

timeline.title_zh: 第戎 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Visit a Burgundy wine estate - its courtyard, workshop, vineyard and cellar - with a sommelier-led tasting of three to five reds and whites. Explore Dijon old town and Notre-Dame de Dijon, then continue to Paris. Overnight at a Paris 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往勃艮第葡萄产区，参观酒庄庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，由专业侍酒师讲解并品鉴三至五杯红白葡萄酒。游览第戎老城与第戎圣母院，下午前往巴黎。夜宿巴黎四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 凡尔赛 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Visit the Palace of Versailles in the morning. In the afternoon see Notre-Dame and the Ile de la Cite, the Champ de Mars and the Eiffel Tower (exterior), and take a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and the Musee d'Orsay (exteriors). Overnight at a Paris 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎西南郊的凡尔赛宫游览；下午参观巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、战神广场与埃菲尔铁塔（外观），并乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院、大小皇宫、奥赛博物馆（外观）等地。夜宿巴黎四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 卢浮宫 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Visit the world-famous Louvre Museum in the morning (standard entry ticket, about one hour), then explore the fashion district of Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time at the Opera Garnier (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. The tour ends at Place d'Italie.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观举世闻名的卢浮宫博物馆（含普通散客门票，游览约1小时），随后前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街与皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爷百货等时尚街区，最后于意大利广场结束行程。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy. The group meets in central Rome; the historic centre is a vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL) and is explored on foot, so wear comfortable shoes.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马。于罗马市中心集合；古城区为车辆禁行区（ZTL），当天为步行游览，请穿着轻便舒适的鞋子。

title_en: Switzerland Panorama Loop: 5-Day Small-Group Alpine Tour
title_zh: 瑞士全景环线5天享乐小团
short_en: A 5-day small-group loop from Zurich through the Swiss Alps, Liechtenstein, the Jungfrau region, Matterhorn and Lake Geneva.
short_zh: 5天小团从苏黎世出发，深度环游瑞士阿尔卑斯雪山冰川、列支敦士登、少女峰地区、马特洪峰与日内瓦湖。
desc_en: This 5-day small-group escape loops out of Zurich and back, threading together the icons of the Swiss Alps. Cross into the tiny principality of Liechtenstein, ride the famed Glacier Express segment past the Devil's Bridge, soak up Lucerne's lakeside charm and spend two nights amid the lakes and peaks of the Interlaken-Jungfrau region. The route climbs toward the Matterhorn at car-free Zermatt before finishing along the Lake Geneva shore with the UNESCO old town of Bern. With a 6-15 person group, fixed airport and station transfers, and lake-view hotels, it is a relaxed all-round tour of Switzerland's greatest panoramas.
desc_zh: 5天享乐小团从苏黎世出发再返回，串联起瑞士阿尔卑斯的众多名片。穿越迷你公国列支敦士登，体验著名的冰川列车梅德尔冰峰、魔鬼桥精彩路段，徜徉湖光山色的卢塞恩，并连续两晚入住因特拉肯-少女峰大区的雪山湖景酒店。行程登临无车小镇采尔马特，远眺阿尔卑斯擎天柱马特洪峰，最后沿日内瓦湖一线游览洛桑与世界遗产伯尔尼老城。6-15人小团、机场与火车站固定时间接送、雪山湖景酒店，轻松饱览瑞士全景之美。

highlights.en: Two icons in one day: Zurich's financial old town and the fairytale castle principality of Liechtenstein
highlights.zh: 一日双景：苏黎世金融老城与童话般的城堡之国列支敦士登

highlights.en: Glacier Express scenery on the Chur-Andermatt leg, past Medelser peak and the Devil's Bridge
highlights.zh: 冰川列车库尔-安德玛特段，途经梅德尔冰峰与天险魔鬼桥

highlights.en: Lucerne's lakeside charm, Chapel Bridge, Water Tower and the Lion Monument
highlights.zh: 卢塞恩湖光山色，卡贝尔廊桥、八角水塔与狮子纪念碑

highlights.en: Two nights in the Interlaken-Jungfrau region with full Jungfrau-area panoramas
highlights.zh: 连续两晚住宿因特拉肯-少女峰大区，饱览少女峰地区全貌

highlights.en: Car-free Zermatt and the triangular Matterhorn, the symbol of the Swiss Alps
highlights.zh: 无车小镇采尔马特与阿尔卑斯象征——三角山峰马特洪峰

highlights.en: Lake Geneva scenic line: Geneva's Flower Clock and fountain, Lausanne's Olympic Park, UNESCO Bern old town
highlights.zh: 日内瓦湖环湖风景线：日内瓦花钟与大喷泉、洛桑奥林匹克公园、世界遗产伯尔尼老城

highlights.en: Small group of 6-15 with fixed Geneva, Zurich, airport and station transfers
highlights.zh: 6-15人享乐小团，日内瓦、苏黎世、机场与火车站固定时间接送

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels with Alpine lake views and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 城市核心区4星级雪山湖景酒店，全程无强制购物

includes.en: 4-star hotels (or equivalent) in city-centre / Alpine locations
includes.zh: 城市核心区或阿尔卑斯地区4星级酒店（或同等级）

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程中文持证导游兼司机

includes.en: Intercity transport by tour coach along the listed route
includes.zh: 按既定路线的城际旅游车交通

includes.en: Tasch-Zermatt scenic shuttle train as noted in the itinerary
includes.zh: 行程内含塔什-采尔马特观光列车

includes.en: Sightseeing of all listed attractions and old-town walking tours
includes.zh: 行程所列景点游览及老城区步行游览

includes.en: Fixed-time transfers at Geneva, Zurich, the airport and train station
includes.zh: 日内瓦、苏黎世、机场与火车站固定时间接送

includes.en: Local taxes and service fees
includes.zh: 当地税费及服务费

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Visa fees and visa-related costs
excludes.zh: 签证费及相关费用

excludes.en: Travel and personal insurance (required for optional adventure activities)
excludes.zh: 旅游及个人保险（自费探险项目需自行购买相应保险）

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐

excludes.en: Optional Glacier Express Chur-Andermatt booking (ticket + seat reservation + service fee)
excludes.zh: 自费冰川列车库尔-安德玛特段（含车票、订座费与预订服务费）

excludes.en: Optional Jungfrau summit cogwheel train and panorama railway (EUR 230)
excludes.zh: 自费乘景观缆车及齿轮火车登顶少女峰（230欧元）

excludes.en: Optional First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip (EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）

excludes.en: Optional Interlaken tandem paragliding (EUR 220)
excludes.zh: 自费因特拉肯高空滑翔伞（220欧元）

excludes.en: Optional Matterhorn Glacier Paradise cable car (own simple meal required, unguided)
excludes.zh: 自费马特洪峰冰川天堂缆车（无导游陪同，需自备简餐）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide-driver and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 导游司机小费及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 -> 列支敦士登 -> 弗利姆斯
timeline.description_en: After morning assembly, tour Zurich's old town, the Grossmunster cathedral, Bahnhofstrasse, Lake Zurich and Lindenhof park along the Limmat. In the afternoon cross into Liechtenstein to see its capital Vaduz and Vaduz Castle (exterior), then continue to Flims to check in at the Me and All Hyatt hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后游览苏黎世老城区、苏黎世大教堂、班霍夫大街、苏黎世湖与林登霍夫公园，漫步利马特河畔；下午前往列支敦士登，游览首都瓦杜兹与瓦杜兹城堡（外观），之后前往弗利姆斯入住Me and All凯悦酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 库尔 -> 安德玛特 -> 卢塞恩 -> 龙疆 -> 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Head to Andermatt, with the option to ride the Glacier Express from Chur past Alpine passes, the Medelser peak and the Devil's Bridge. Continue to Lucerne for the lake, the Lion Monument, Chapel Bridge and octagonal Water Tower, then visit the village of Lungern and its lake before checking in near Interlaken.
timeline.description_zh: 早上前往安德玛特，可自费从库尔乘坐冰川列车，途经阿尔卑斯山口、梅德尔冰峰与魔鬼桥；之后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，再前往龙疆小镇游览龙疆湖及小镇风光，随后入住因特拉肯附近酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 -> 少女峰地区 -> 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Explore the Jungfrau region, visiting Wilderswil for the red Swiss train, Lauterbrunnen's storybook scenery and Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau. Optionally ride Europe's high-altitude railway up to the Jungfrau and the Sphinx observatory to overlook the snow-capped peak and the Aletsch Glacier, then enjoy free time in Interlaken.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往少女峰地区，可随车游览维尔德斯维尔的红色瑞士火车、劳特布伦嫩的童话风景与少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德；亦可自费乘坐欧洲高海拔铁路登顶少女峰，在斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰与阿莱奇冰川，之后自由游览因特拉肯小镇。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 -> 采尔马特 -> 安纳马斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to car-free Zermatt, where only small electric vehicles and horse carriages run, for free time in the village. Optionally take the cable car to Matterhorn Glacier Paradise for spectacular views of the iconic triangular peak, then continue to the Novotel at Annemasse near Geneva for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往采尔马特，自由参观这座没有汽车、仅有少量电瓶车和马车的小镇；亦可自费乘缆车前往马特洪峰冰川天堂，欣赏雪山冰川之巅的壮丽美景，随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 -> 洛桑 -> 伯尔尼 -> 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Visit Geneva's old town, the lakefront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain, then stop at Lausanne's Ouchy waterfront and Olympic Park. In the afternoon explore the UNESCO-listed medieval old town of Bern with its clock tower and cobbled streets, before returning to Zurich where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往日内瓦，游览老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟与大喷泉；之后前往洛桑，停留乌希码头并自由游览奥林匹克公园；下午前往瑞士联邦所在地伯尔尼，游览被列入世界遗产名录的中世纪老城区，之后返回苏黎世，结束美好旅程。

meeting_en: Zurich, Switzerland. Fixed-time pickups are arranged at Geneva, Zurich, the airport and the train station.
meeting_zh: 瑞士苏黎世。日内瓦、苏黎世、机场及火车站均提供固定时间接送。

title_en: Switzerland & Italy 8-Day Tour: Zurich to Rome One-Way
title_zh: 瑞士意大利8天跟团游：苏黎世至罗马单程线路
short_en: An 8-day one-way journey from Zurich to Rome — Golden Pass rail, Alpine peaks, Milan, Venice, Florence, Cinque Terre and the Eternal City.
short_zh: 8天单程之旅，从苏黎世直抵罗马——金色山口列车、阿尔卑斯雪山、米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村与永恒之城罗马。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Zurich to Rome on this 8-day Switzerland-Italy escape. Begin among Swiss lakes and the Golden Pass scenic railway, overnight beneath the Jungfrau and at the infinity-pool Cambrian hotel in Adelboden, then cross the Simplon Pass past the Matterhorn into Italy. From there discover Milan, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence, the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre and Pisa, ending with a free day to wander Rome's timeless ruins. A deep, one-direction route that trades backtracking for more sightseeing time and city-centre comfort.
desc_zh: 这条8天瑞士意大利单程线路，带您从苏黎世一路畅游至罗马。旅程始于瑞士湖光山色与金色山口观光列车，夜宿少女峰山脚及阿德尔博登的无边泳池寒武纪酒店，随后翻越辛普朗山口、远眺马特洪峰进入意大利。接着探访米兰、浪漫威尼斯、文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨、悬崖上的五渔村与比萨，最后以罗马自由活动一整天收尾，漫步千年古迹。单向深度路线，减少折返、增加游览时长，并享受市中心住宿的舒适便利。

highlights.en: Ride the Golden Pass scenic train through the Swiss Alps to Lungern
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口观光列车穿越瑞士阿尔卑斯山直达龙疆镇

highlights.en: Overnight at the infinity-pool Cambrian hotel in Adelboden with panoramic Alpine views
highlights.zh: 夜宿阿德尔博登无边泳池寒武纪酒店，尽享阿尔卑斯雪山全景

highlights.en: Cross the Simplon Pass past the iconic Matterhorn and car-free Zermatt into Italy
highlights.zh: 翻越辛普朗山口，途经标志性的马特洪峰与无车小镇采尔马特进入意大利

highlights.en: Explore Milan, romantic Venice and Renaissance Florence
highlights.zh: 畅游米兰、浪漫威尼斯与文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨

highlights.en: Scenic train to the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre and the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 搭乘景观列车游览悬崖上的五渔村，并造访比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Full free day in Rome — Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 罗马自由活动一整天——斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: High-speed rail and flights included with city-centre 4-star hotels and a one-way deep route
highlights.zh: 含高铁与机票、市中心四星级酒店，单程深度路线

highlights.en: Small group of 6-15, all-inclusive pricing with no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 6-15人精品小团，全含报价，绝无强制购物

includes.en: Four selected signature experiences included
includes.zh: 包含精选四项特色体验活动

includes.en: High-speed rail direct into Switzerland (shortens travel time)
includes.zh: 高铁直达瑞士，缩短乘车时间

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels for all nights
includes.zh: 全程市中心四星级酒店住宿

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver
includes.zh: 持证中文导游兼司机

includes.en: Intercity transport and the Golden Pass scenic train ride
includes.zh: 城际交通及金色山口观光列车段

includes.en: Listed sightseeing per the itinerary
includes.zh: 行程所列游览项目

includes.en: Applicable taxes and fees
includes.zh: 相关税费

excludes.en: International flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Visa fees
excludes.zh: 签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners (e.g. Venice cuttlefish-ink pasta three-course meal at own expense)
excludes.zh: 午餐与晚餐（如威尼斯墨鱼面三道式大餐自理）

excludes.en: Optional activities: Jungfrau / First panoramic cable cars, Matterhorn Glacier Paradise cable car, and the Cambrian Alpine spa (bring swimwear)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：少女峰／菲斯特全景缆车、马特洪峰冰川天堂缆车、寒武纪阿尔卑斯景观温泉（请自备泳衣）

excludes.en: Hot-spring fees on departures rerouted to the Leukerbad area (Apr 26 / May 3 / Jul 12 / Jul 26)
excludes.zh: 改住洛伊克巴德地区温泉酒店团期（4月26日／5月3日／7月12日／7月26日）的温泉费用

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 卢塞恩 → 龙疆 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Meet in Zurich and see the Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Continue to Lucerne for the Lion Monument, Chapel Bridge and octagonal water tower, then board the Golden Pass scenic train to Lungern, riding through the Alps to the Jungfrau region. Overnight at the Victoria Meiringen or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 苏黎世集合，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街，前往卢塞恩观赏狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角形水塔，随后乘坐金色山口观光列车前往龙疆，穿山越岭抵达少女峰大区。夜宿迈林根维多利亚或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 少女峰地区 → 阿德尔博登
timeline.description_en: Enjoy Interlaken between Lakes Brienz and Thun, with free time to stroll its villages. Optionally take the panoramic cable car up the Jungfrau (Top of Europe) to the Sphinx observatory and Aletsch Glacier, or visit the cliff walk at First (own expense). Overnight at the infinity-pool Cambrian hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯，自由漫步宁静村庄；可自费乘全景缆车登顶少女峰（欧洲之巅），前往斯芬克斯观景台与阿莱奇冰川，或自费前往菲斯特悬崖栈道。夜宿无边泳池寒武纪酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 阿德尔博登 → 采尔马特 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Drive to car-free Zermatt for free time among its electric carts and carriages, with an optional cable car to Matterhorn Glacier Paradise. Cross the majestic Simplon Pass into Italy and continue to the fashion capital, Milan. Overnight at the Milan UNA or BW, or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往无车小镇采尔马特自由参观，可自费乘缆车前往马特洪峰冰川天堂欣赏雪山冰川美景；随后翻越雄伟的辛普朗山口进入意大利，前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿米兰UNA或BW或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: See Milan's Sforza Castle (exterior), the landmark Duomo (exterior) and the elegant Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II shopping arcade, then travel on to Venice in the afternoon. Overnight at the Venice voco or Hilton Ambassador, or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观米兰斯福尔扎古堡（外观）、地标米兰大教堂（外观）与华丽的埃马努埃莱二世拱廊，下午出发前往威尼斯。夜宿威尼斯洲际voco或希尔顿大使或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Visit Venice's main island for St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and Doge's Palace (exterior), with a chance to try Venice's signature cuttlefish-ink pasta (own expense). Continue to Florence for the night. Overnight at the Florence Hilton Garden Inn or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往威尼斯大岛参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观），可品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式（自理）。之后前往佛罗伦萨入住酒店。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿花园或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Take the scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliffside villages of Cinque Terre, then head to Pisa for the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Square of Miracles before returning to Florence. (In bad weather or a rail strike, the coast is toured by coach or other means instead.) Overnight at the Florence Hilton Garden Inn or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线乘景观列车游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后返回佛罗伦萨。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴等形式游览海岸线城市。）夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿花园或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore the birthplace of the Renaissance, visiting Florence's old town: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (Duomo), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior) with its square. Continue to Rome for the night. Overnight at the Rome San Martino / Hotel Moderno, or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨老城：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥、圣十字教堂（外观）及圣十字广场。之后前往罗马入住酒店。夜宿罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 — 自由活动与散团
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, store your luggage at the hotel and enjoy a full free day in Rome before the tour disbands. Recommended sights: the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后可将行李寄存酒店前台，罗马自由活动一整天，随后自行散团。推荐景点：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉。

meeting_en: Zurich, Switzerland — group meets in Zurich on Day 1; tour ends in Rome (disbands after the free day). Optional departures from Frankfurt or Paris by high-speed rail.
meeting_zh: 瑞士苏黎世——第1天在苏黎世集合，行程于罗马结束（自由活动后散团）。可选择从法兰克福或巴黎乘高铁出发。

title_en: France-Italy-Switzerland In-Depth Small-Group Tour: Rome to Paris (10 Days)
title_zh: 法意瑞深度10天精品小团游：罗马至巴黎
short_en: A 10-day one-way journey from Rome to Paris across Italy, Switzerland and France, with Cinque Terre, the GoldenPass scenic train, Jungfrau and Burgundy wine country.
short_zh: 10天罗马至巴黎单程深度之旅，串联意大利、瑞士与法国，乘五渔村景观火车与金色山口列车，登少女峰，访勃艮第酒乡。
desc_en: This one-way 10-day small-group tour runs deep from Rome to Paris, weaving together three countries in a single seamless route. You begin in the Eternal City of Rome, roll through Tuscany's medieval hill towns, the cliffside villages of Cinque Terre, Renaissance Florence, romantic Venice and fashionable Milan, then cross the Alps into Switzerland for Lucerne, the GoldenPass scenic train, Interlaken and the Jungfrau region. The journey closes through Lake Geneva, a five-star Relais & Châteaux castle stay and the wine and gastronomy heartland of Burgundy before reaching Paris. With scenic landmark hotels, an all-inclusive price covering taxes, attractions and experiences, and an intimate small-group format, it is a culturally rich, slow-paced grand tour of Western Europe.
desc_zh: 这是一条从罗马一路深入直抵巴黎的10天单程精品小团之旅，将意大利、瑞士、法国三国景致串成一条无缝路线。旅程始于古罗马帝国发祥地、被誉为永恒之城的罗马，途经托斯卡纳中世纪山城、悬崖之上的五渔村、文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨、浪漫水城威尼斯与时尚之都米兰，随后翻越阿尔卑斯山进入瑞士，游卢塞恩、乘金色山口景观列车、抵因特拉肯与少女峰地区，最后沿日内瓦湖、入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店，并探访美酒美食之乡勃艮第，终抵巴黎。全程入住景观酒店，一价全含各项税费、门票与体验项目，精品小团形式，深度而从容地领略西欧人文风光。

highlights.en: Explore Rome, cradle of the Roman Empire, with the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 深度探访古罗马帝国发祥地罗马，外观斗兽场、万神殿，游西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Ride the Cinque Terre scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliffside fishing villages
highlights.zh: 乘五渔村景观火车沿利古里亚海岸，畅游悬崖上的彩色渔村

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Ponte Vecchio and Piazzale Michelangelo
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、老桥与米开朗琪罗广场登高俯瞰全城

highlights.en: Romantic Venice and fashionable Milan with its iconic Gothic Duomo
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯与时尚之都米兰，瞻仰哥特式米兰大教堂

highlights.en: Ride the classic GoldenPass scenic train through the picture-perfect Swiss Alps
highlights.zh: 乘瑞士经典金色山口景观列车，尽览阿尔卑斯如画风景

highlights.en: Jungfrau region and a stay at the lakeside Giessbach hotel, a Crash Landing on You filming location
highlights.zh: 畅游少女峰地区，入住《爱的迫降》取景地——布里恩茨湖畔吉斯巴赫景观酒店

highlights.en: Lake Geneva, a five-star Relais & Châteaux castle stay and Burgundy wine country with cellar tasting
highlights.zh: 环游日内瓦湖，入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店，探访勃艮第酒乡并由专业侍酒师讲解品酒

highlights.en: All-inclusive small-group tour: flights, rail, taxes, attractions and experiences covered, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含精品小团：交通、税费、门票与体验项目全含，无强制购物

includes.en: 9 nights in city-centre 4-star hotels plus a 5-star Relais & Châteaux castle and scenic landmark hotels
includes.zh: 9晚市区四星级酒店，并含五星罗莱夏朵古堡及托斯卡纳庄园、吉斯巴赫等景观酒店

includes.en: Daily breakfast at the hotels
includes.zh: 酒店内每日自助早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver with a private vehicle for the small group
includes.zh: 持证中文导游兼司机，精品小团专车专导

includes.en: All intercity transport along the one-way Rome-to-Paris route
includes.zh: 罗马至巴黎单程全程城际交通

includes.en: Scenic train rides: Cinque Terre coastal train and the GoldenPass line
includes.zh: 景观列车体验：五渔村景观火车及金色山口列车

includes.en: Listed attraction entries and experience activities (e.g. guided Jungfrau-area touring by coach)
includes.zh: 行程所列景点门票与体验项目（如随车游览少女峰地区）

includes.en: Burgundy winery visit with professional sommelier tasting
includes.zh: 勃艮第酒庄参观及专业侍酒师品酒服务

includes.en: All taxes and service fees (all-inclusive pricing)
includes.zh: 各项税费及服务费（一价全含）

includes.en: 7x24 concierge / butler service
includes.zh: 7x24小时管家服务

excludes.en: International flights to Rome and from Paris
excludes.zh: 往返罗马、巴黎的国际机票

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 申根签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless otherwise noted
excludes.zh: 除特别注明外的午餐及晚餐

excludes.en: Optional activities: Jungfrau panoramic summit cable car (approx. EUR 230) and First aerial gondola round-trip (approx. EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：少女峰全景缆车登顶（约230欧元）及菲斯特空中贡多拉往返票（约70欧元）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide-driver and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 导游司机小费及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet the group and explore Rome, the Eternal City and birthplace of the Roman Empire. View the Colosseum, the Pantheon, the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain on a walking tour through the historic centre. Overnight in a Rome 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 集合后游览永恒之城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地。步行游览历史城区，外观斗兽场、万神殿，游西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉。夜宿罗马四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome → Pienza → Siena → San Gimignano → Florence
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳 → 圣吉米尼亚诺 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Travel through Tuscany: the cypress lanes and old town of Pienza, then Siena with its cathedral, Piazza del Campo and Mangia Tower, and the medieval towers of San Gimignano. Overnight at a Tuscan villa hotel near Florence.
timeline.description_zh: 穿越托斯卡纳：游皮恩扎丝柏小路与古城，再访锡耶纳古城、大教堂、田野广场与曼吉亚塔楼，以及以中世纪塔楼闻名的圣吉米尼亚诺小镇。夜宿佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Visit Pisa's Leaning Tower and the Piazza dei Miracoli, then ride the scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre. Return to the Tuscan villa hotel. (Weather or rail strikes may switch Cinque Terre to a coach alternative.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午游比萨斜塔与奇迹广场，随后乘景观火车沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖上的五渔村彩色渔村，之后返回佛罗伦萨别墅酒店。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工，五渔村将改为大巴等形式游览海岸城市。）

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Discover Renaissance Florence: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Piazza della Signoria, Ponte Vecchio and Piazzale Michelangelo for sweeping city views. Transfer to Venice in the afternoon. Overnight in a Venice 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 游文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨：参观圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥，并登米开朗琪罗广场俯瞰全城美景。下午前往威尼斯。夜宿威尼斯四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Free time in Venice to admire St Mark's Basilica, St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace among the canals. Continue to Milan in the afternoon. Overnight in a Milan 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由游览威尼斯，外观圣马可大教堂、圣马可广场、叹息桥与总督宫，感受水城浪漫。下午前往米兰。夜宿米兰四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Free time in Milan to view the Gothic Duomo and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Cross the Alps to Zurich in the afternoon, visiting the old town, Lake Zurich, Lindenhof park and the Limmat riverside. Overnight in a Zurich 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由游览米兰，外观地标米兰大教堂与埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往苏黎世，参观苏黎世老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园，漫步利马特河畔。夜宿苏黎世四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 卢塞恩 → 龙疆 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Visit Lucerne's lake, Lion Monument, Chapel Bridge and water tower, then ride the classic GoldenPass scenic train to Lungern through stunning Alpine scenery, and continue to Interlaken. Overnight at the Giessbach lakeside hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，随后乘金色山口景观列车前往龙疆，沿途饱览瑞士秀美风光，再前往因特拉肯自由游览。夜宿吉斯巴赫景观酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 少女峰 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Tour the Jungfrau region: by coach via Wilderswil's red train, Lauterbrunnen's fairy-tale scenery and Grindelwald, or choose optional add-ons such as the Jungfrau summit cable car or the First aerial gondola. Overnight at the Giessbach lakeside hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 前往少女峰地区，可随车游览维尔德斯维尔红色火车、劳特布龙嫩童话风景与格林德尔瓦尔德，亦可自费选乘少女峰全景缆车登顶或菲斯特空中贡多拉。夜宿吉斯巴赫景观酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 蒙特勒 → 沃韦 → 洛桑 → 波尔莱斯内
timeline.description_en: Admire Chillon Castle reflected in Lake Geneva at Montreux, then a scenic drive past the Lavaux vineyard terraces (a World Heritage site) to Lausanne and its Ouchy waterfront and Olympic Park. Continue to a five-star Relais & Châteaux castle hotel. Overnight at the castle hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往蒙特勒，欣赏西庸城堡在湖中的倒影；沿日内瓦湖畔行经世界文化遗产拉沃葡萄梯田，抵洛桑，游乌希码头与奥林匹克公园。随后前往波尔莱斯内入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店。夜宿五星古堡酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 波尔莱斯内 → 第戎 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Visit Dijon, capital of Burgundy, with its old town and Notre-Dame de Dijon. After lunch, tour a Burgundy winery's courtyard, workshop, vineyards and cellar with a professional sommelier tasting, then transfer to Paris where the tour ends at Place d'Italie.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往美酒美食之乡第戎，参观第戎老城与第戎圣母院；午餐后游览勃艮第葡萄产区酒庄的庭院、工坊、葡萄园与酒窖，由专业侍酒师讲解品酒。随后前往巴黎市意大利广场散团。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in the city centre on Day 1; check-in to the hotel from 14:00 (luggage can be stored at reception earlier).
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马 — 第1天于罗马市区集合；当天14点后可凭订单入住酒店（亦可提前在酒店前台寄存行李）。

title_en: Southern Italy 4-Day Tour: Rome, Capri, Amalfi Coast & Pompeii
title_zh: 意大利南部4天跟团游：罗马、卡普里岛、阿马尔菲海岸与庞贝
short_en: A 4-day round trip from Rome through the Amalfi Coast, Capri Island and Pompeii, with sea-view hotels and all ferries and entries included.
short_zh: 罗马往返4天南意之旅，深度游览阿马尔菲海岸、卡普里岛与庞贝古城，入住海景酒店，渡船与门票全含。
desc_en: Begin in the Eternal City of Rome with a walking tour of its ancient landmarks, then head south to the sun-drenched Sorrento Peninsula. Over four days you cruise to the legendary Blue Grotto of Capri, sail the dramatic cliffs of the Amalfi Coast to Positano and Amalfi, and step back two thousand years amid the ruins of Pompeii. With two nights in a sea-view hotel in Sorrento, a one-way deep-route design and all key ferries and entries included, this is southern Italy at its most relaxed.
desc_zh: 行程从永恒之城罗马开始，由导游带领徒步游览古罗马的著名地标，随后南下阳光灿烂的索伦托半岛。四天里，您将乘船探秘卡普里岛传奇的蓝洞，沿阿马尔菲海岸壮丽的悬崖航行至波西塔诺与阿马尔菲，并在庞贝古城遗址中追溯两千年前的文明。索伦托两晚海景酒店、单程深度路线设计，以及关键渡船与门票全含，让您以最轻松的方式领略南意之美。

highlights.en: Walking tour of ancient Rome: Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps & Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步游览古罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Cruise to Capri Island, home of the world-famous Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 乘船前往卡普里岛，探访世界闻名的蓝洞

highlights.en: Boat tour of the Amalfi Coast to the cliffside villages of Positano & Amalfi
highlights.zh: 乘船环游阿马尔菲海岸，探访悬崖小镇波西塔诺与阿马尔菲

highlights.en: Explore the buried ancient city of Pompeii with a national-museum guide
highlights.zh: 在国家馆讲解师带领下探索庞贝古城遗址

highlights.en: Two nights in a Sorrento sea-view hotel wrapped by the Bay of Naples
highlights.zh: 索伦托两晚三面环海的海湾景观酒店

highlights.en: One-way deep route minimizes coach time for a relaxed pace
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线设计，大幅减少大巴行车里程，节奏轻松

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels, daily breakfast and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 市区四星级酒店、每日早餐及全程中文司机兼导游

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: city taxes, island ferries and the Amalfi cruise fully covered
highlights.zh: 全含报价：城市税、登岛渡船与阿马尔菲出海费用全含，绝无隐藏费用

includes.en: 3 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 四星级酒店3晚住宿

includes.en: 3 breakfasts (hotel breakfast or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店早餐或其他形式餐饮共计3餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes: city tax, entry tax, residence tax, road/bridge tolls and island-landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费及登岛费等

includes.en: Tourist coach or business minivan transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车交通

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (or Chinese-speaking guide-driver for groups of 8 or fewer)
includes.zh: 职业司机加中文导游（8人及以下安排商务车加中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: One 23kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Activities & entries: Sorrento–Amalfi boat tour, round-trip Capri ferry, Pompeii entry (incl. national-museum guide)
includes.zh: 活动及门票：索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）

excludes.en: International flights
excludes.zh: 国际往返机票

excludes.en: Passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10€ per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共计10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entries not marked as included, incl. 'exterior view' sights and any recommended/optional/experience items
excludes.zh: 未注明费用包含的景点，包括标注“外观”的景点及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等项目

excludes.en: Optional Capri Blue Grotto: boat tour not included; a 2–5€ tip to the local boatman is customary
excludes.zh: 卡普里岛蓝洞自费项目：出海费用不含，按当地习俗需向船工支付2-5欧小费

excludes.en: Extra nights, personal expenses (drinks, taxis, phone) and other transport not listed
excludes.zh: 额外延长住宿、私人消费（饮料、出租车、电话费等）及未提及的其他交通费用

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet your guide in the morning for a walking tour of the Eternal City. See the Colosseum and Pantheon (exterior), and stroll the Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (exterior) before free time. Note: Rome's old town is largely pedestrian, so expect a 5–6 km walk. Overnight at a 4-star hotel in Rome.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后由导游带领徒步游览永恒之城罗马，参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），漫步西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），之后自由活动。提示：罗马古城多为步行街区，当天徒步约5-6公里。夜宿罗马4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 索伦托 → 卡普里岛 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, transfer to Naples/Sorrento and take the ferry to Capri Island. Walk the seafront, visit the Blue Grotto by boat, or explore the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the bay (all on a free-activity basis). Return by ferry to Sorrento. Overnight at a 4-star sea-view hotel in Sorrento. Note: the Blue Grotto is a natural site and may close in high tides or rough seas.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往那不勒斯/索伦托，乘渡船抵达卡普里岛。可海边漫步、自行乘船探秘蓝洞，或前往奥古斯都花园俯瞰海湾（均为自由活动）。之后乘渡船返回索伦托，入住4星级海景酒店。备注：蓝洞为自然景观，遇涨潮或风浪等可能关闭。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 阿马尔菲 → 波西塔诺 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Set out on a charming full-day boat tour of the Amalfi Coast. Sail to the cliffside village of Positano, then on to Amalfi for sweeping coastal views, before cruising back to your hotel. Overnight at a 4-star sea-view hotel in Sorrento. Note: in extreme sea conditions the cruise may be replaced by a coach visit to Sorrento old town, with the boat fee refunded.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人的阿马尔菲海岸游船一日游，乘船前往悬崖小镇波西塔诺，再前往阿马尔菲欣赏海岸全景，之后乘船返回酒店。夜宿索伦托4星级海景酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出海活动将改为大巴参观索伦托老城，出海费用退还。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 庞贝 → 那不勒斯 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore the ruins of ancient Pompeii, buried by Vesuvius in 79 BC. Continue to Naples to see the old town, the Royal Palace (exterior) and Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon transfer back to Rome, where the tour ends. No accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索被维苏威火山掩埋的庞贝古城遗址。之后前往那不勒斯游览老城，参观那不勒斯皇宫（外观）与新堡（外观）。下午返回罗马，行程结束。当晚无住宿。

meeting_en: Rome — group meets in the morning of Day 1 for the walking tour; the tour starts and ends in Rome.
meeting_zh: 罗马——第1天上午集合开始徒步游览，行程罗马开始、罗马结束。

title_en: Italy, Switzerland & France in 6 Days: Milan to Paris One-Way Tour
title_zh: 意大利-瑞士-法国6天跟团游（米兰至巴黎单程线路）
short_en: A 6-day one-way journey from Milan to Paris through the Swiss Alps, Lucerne, Interlaken, Geneva, the Louvre and Versailles.
short_zh: 6天单程之旅，从米兰出发横穿瑞士阿尔卑斯山，途经卢塞恩、因特拉肯、日内瓦，最后游览巴黎卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫。
desc_en: Travel one-way from fashion-capital Milan across the Swiss Alps to romantic Paris on this 6-day small-group tour. Discover Zurich's old town, the lakeside scenery of Lucerne and the storybook village of Iseltwald, the twin lakes around Interlaken beneath the Jungfrau, and Geneva's lakefront before crossing into France. In Paris you enjoy an in-depth Louvre tour led by a French national-gallery lecturer, a Seine river cruise, and the Baroque splendour of the Palace of Versailles. The deliberate one-way routing greatly reduces backtracking and coach mileage so more time is spent sightseeing.
desc_zh: 这条6天精品小团采用单程线路，从时尚之都米兰出发，横穿瑞士阿尔卑斯山，一路抵达浪漫的巴黎。沿途游览苏黎世老城、卢塞恩的湖光山色与童话般的伊塞尔特瓦尔德（龙疆）小镇、少女峰脚下因特拉肯的“两湖”风光，以及日内瓦湖畔，随后进入法国。在巴黎，由法国国家馆讲解师带您深度讲解卢浮宫，乘塞纳河游船，并参观巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫。单程路线大幅减少折返和大巴里程，把更多时间留给观光。

highlights.en: One-way deep route Milan to Paris that cuts coach mileage and backtracking
highlights.zh: 米兰至巴黎单程深度线路，大幅降低大巴行车里程，减少折返

highlights.en: Cross the Swiss Alps from Zurich and Lucerne to Interlaken at the foot of the Jungfrau
highlights.zh: 横穿瑞士阿尔卑斯山，从苏黎世、卢塞恩一路到少女峰脚下的因特拉肯

highlights.en: Lakeside scenery of Lucerne and the fairy-tale village of Iseltwald (Crash Landing on You filming location)
highlights.zh: 卢塞恩湖光山色与《爱的迫降》取景地——童话小镇伊塞尔特瓦尔德（龙疆）

highlights.en: Geneva lakefront with the Flower Clock, Jet d'Eau and old town
highlights.zh: 日内瓦湖畔的花钟、大喷泉与老城区

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre tour led by a French national-gallery lecturer
highlights.zh: 由法国国家馆讲解师带领的卢浮宫深度讲解

highlights.en: Seine river cruise past Notre-Dame, the Eiffel Tower and more
highlights.zh: 乘塞纳河游船，饱览巴黎圣母院、埃菲尔铁塔等沿岸景观

highlights.en: Baroque masterpiece: the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 巴洛克艺术瑰宝——凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels with daily breakfast and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星酒店、每日早餐，全程无强制购物

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (or equivalent), 5 nights
includes.zh: 市中心四星级（或同等）酒店，共5晚

includes.en: Daily breakfast at hotels
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程持证中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Intercity transport by coach along the route
includes.zh: 沿线城市间大巴交通

includes.en: Listed attraction entries including the Louvre (with French national-gallery lecturer) and Palace of Versailles
includes.zh: 行程列明的景点门票，包括卢浮宫（含法国国家馆讲解师讲解）及凡尔赛宫

includes.en: Seine river cruise in Paris
includes.zh: 巴黎塞纳河游船

includes.en: Recommended Option 1: coach tour of the Grindelwald area / Männlichen scenic slopes
includes.zh: 推荐项目一：乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德地区/梦幻山坡瑞士山景

includes.en: Local taxes and service charges
includes.zh: 当地税费及服务费

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际机票

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 申根签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐

excludes.en: Optional Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the top (Top of Europe): EUR 230 per person
excludes.zh: 自费项目：少女峰全景缆车登顶（Top of Europe）：每人230欧元

excludes.en: Optional First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round trip (First Cliff Walk): EUR 70 per person
excludes.zh: 自费项目：菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（悬崖天空步道）：每人70欧元

excludes.en: Other personal expenses and optional activities
excludes.zh: 其他个人消费及自费项目

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 司机及导游小费

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 -> 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Assemble in Milan and freely visit the Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's finest shopping arcades. In the afternoon drive to Zurich to see the Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse and the banks of the Limmat. Overnight in Zurich.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在米兰集合，自由参观地标米兰主教堂（外观）及欧洲最美的商业拱廊之一——埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街，并漫步利马特河畔。夜宿苏黎世。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 -> 卢塞恩 -> 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Travel to Lucerne for the lake scenery, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal water tower. Continue to the storybook village of Iseltwald on its lake, then on to Interlaken at the foot of the Jungfrau. Overnight near Sigriswil with mountain-lake views.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往卢塞恩，欣赏卢塞恩湖湖光山色，参观狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥及八角型水塔；之后前往童话小镇伊塞尔特瓦尔德（龙疆），游览龙疆湖及小镇风光；下午前往少女峰脚下的因特拉肯。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 -> 少女峰 -> 日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Explore Interlaken between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun. Choose between a coach tour of the Grindelwald scenic slopes (included), the optional Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the Top of Europe (EUR 230), or the optional First gondola and Cliff Walk (EUR 70) - one option only. Then drive to Geneva. Overnight near Geneva.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯。可三选一：乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德梦幻山坡（费用包含）、自费少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）、或自费菲斯特空中贡多拉及悬崖天空步道（70欧元）。随后乘车前往日内瓦。夜宿日内瓦附近。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 -> 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Stroll the lively Flower Bridge district near the hotel, then visit Geneva's old town, the lakefront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau. In the afternoon drive to Paris. Overnight in Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览酒店旁的“花桥”区域，这里云集日内瓦特色美食与商店，并参观日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟及大喷泉等景点。下午乘车前往巴黎。夜宿巴黎。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：卢浮宫与市中心
timeline.description_en: Enjoy an in-depth themed tour of the Louvre led by a French national-gallery lecturer. In the afternoon see Notre-Dame, Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde. Overnight in Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫，由法国国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解；下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，之后乘塞纳河游船经过荣军院、大小皇宫、协和广场等景点。夜宿巴黎。备注：旺季若馆内限制讲解，将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/人。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 -> 凡尔赛 -> 巴黎
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore the fashion district along Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with the Opera Garnier (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. In the afternoon visit the Palace of Versailles, then return to Place d'Italie in Paris where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货及老佛爷百货等时尚街区。下午前往凡尔赛宫游览，随后返回巴黎意大利广场，结束愉快行程。

meeting_en: Milan: assemble around 09:00 at the tourist coach parking by Sforzesco Castle (Castello Sforzesco, Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza, 20121 Milano MI, Italy).
meeting_zh: 米兰：约09:00在米兰斯福尔扎城堡旅游大巴停车站集合，地址：Castello Sforzesco, Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza, 20121 Milano MI, Italie。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 8-Day One-Way Tour: Rome to Paris
title_zh: 法意瑞8天跟团游：罗马至巴黎单程深度线
short_en: An 8-day one-way escape from Rome to Paris through Tuscany's hill towns, Venice, the Italian Lakes, and Switzerland's alpine lakes and Jungfrau region.
short_zh: 8天单程深度游，从罗马一路北上至巴黎，串联托斯卡纳古城、威尼斯、米兰、苏黎世与少女峰区，畅游瑞士湖光山色。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Rome to Paris on this 8-day France-Italy-Switzerland tour that maximises sightseeing while cutting down on coach mileage. In Italy you visit a different city each day — the medieval gem of Siena, the Val d'Orcia cypress lanes around Pienza, Pisa's Leaning Tower, the cliff-hugging villages of Cinque Terre, Renaissance Florence, and romantic Venice. Crossing into Switzerland you take in Zurich, Lucerne, the fairy-tale lakeside town of Iseltwald, Interlaken between its two lakes, and the Jungfrau region, before finishing along Lake Geneva and returning to Paris. Brand-name 4-star hotels, all taxes included, and no hidden costs make this a relaxed, all-inclusive route.
desc_zh: 这条8天法意瑞单程线从罗马一路北上至巴黎，单程行程深度游览，大幅降低大巴行车里程。在意大利每天一座城：中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳、奥尔恰谷绝美丝柏树小径与古城皮恩扎、比萨斜塔、悬崖上的五渔村、文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨、水城威尼斯。进入瑞士后贯穿四大语区深度游览：苏黎世、卢塞恩、童话般的龙疆小镇、两湖之间的因特拉肯与少女峰区，最后沿日内瓦湖返回巴黎。全程精选品牌四星酒店，各项税费全含，绝无隐藏费用。

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Rome to Paris — less coach time, more sightseeing
highlights.zh: 罗马至巴黎单程深度线，大幅降低大巴行车里程

highlights.en: A different Italian city every day: Siena, Pisa, Florence, Venice
highlights.zh: 意大利每天一座城：锡耶纳、比萨、佛罗伦萨、威尼斯

highlights.en: Val d'Orcia cypress lanes and the medieval hill town of Pienza
highlights.zh: 奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城皮恩扎、绝美丝柏树小径

highlights.en: Scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the Cinque Terre villages
highlights.zh: 景观列车沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the canals
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯：圣马可广场、叹息桥与蜿蜒水巷

highlights.en: Switzerland's four language regions: Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken & Jungfrau
highlights.zh: 瑞士四大语区贯穿游览：苏黎世、卢塞恩、因特拉肯与少女峰区

highlights.en: Lakeside Iseltwald and Lake Geneva's old town, flower bridge and fountain
highlights.zh: 童话龙疆小镇与日内瓦湖畔花桥、老城及大喷泉

highlights.en: Brand 4-star hotels, all taxes included, no forced shopping or hidden fees
highlights.zh: 品牌四星酒店，各项税费全含，无强制购物、绝无隐藏费用

includes.en: 7 nights in brand-name 4-star city hotels
includes.zh: 7晚品牌四星级酒店住宿

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程中文导游兼司机

includes.en: Intercity transport by coach along the route
includes.zh: 全程城际大巴交通

includes.en: Cinque Terre scenic train / coastal sightseeing
includes.zh: 五渔村景观列车/海岸线观光

includes.en: Day-7 included option: coach tour of the Grindelwald 'Dreamy Slope' scenery
includes.zh: 第7天含项目：乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景——梦幻山坡

includes.en: Listed sightseeing as per itinerary
includes.zh: 行程所列景点游览

includes.en: All applicable taxes and fees
includes.zh: 各项税费全含

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Visa fees
excludes.zh: 签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐

excludes.en: Optional Jungfrau panoramic summit cable car (€230)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）

excludes.en: Optional First aerial gondola round-trip from Grindelwald (€70)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：菲斯特格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）

excludes.en: Personal expenses and optional activities
excludes.zh: 个人消费及其他自费项目

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Meet in Rome in the morning and drive to the medieval hill town of Pienza, stopping for photos along the Val d'Orcia cypress lanes and visiting Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior). Continue to Siena to see its cathedral, the Piazza del Campo, the town hall and Torre del Mangia (all exterior). Overnight in Siena.
timeline.description_zh: 上午罗马集合，出发前往中世纪古城皮恩扎，途中在奥尔恰谷绝美丝柏树小径自由拍照，游览二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观）。之后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（均外观）。夜宿锡耶纳。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 比萨 → 五渔村 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to Pisa for the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli. Then travel to the Cinque Terre to explore the colourful cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast before checking in. Overnight in Florence. (If bad weather or rail strikes prevent the Cinque Terre visit, coastal sightseeing by coach replaces it.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和奇迹广场。随后沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五彩渔村五渔村，之后入住酒店。夜宿佛罗伦萨。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法前往五渔村，将改为乘大巴游览海岸线城市。）

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore the cradle of the Renaissance, Florence — the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and the Basilica of Santa Croce and its square (exterior). Then transfer to Venice for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场、老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住。夜宿威尼斯。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Morning tour of romantic Venice: St Mark's Basilica, St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (all exterior), with the city's canals and waterways. Afternoon transfer to the fashion capital, Milan. Overnight in Milan.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂、圣马可广场、叹息桥与华丽的总督宫（均外观），漫步于建在水上的浪漫水城。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿米兰。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: After breakfast see Milan's landmark Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's finest shopping arcades. In the afternoon cross the Alps to Zurich for the cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse and a stroll along the Limmat. Overnight in Zurich.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰地标米兰主教堂（外观）与欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街，漫步利马特河边。夜宿苏黎世。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 卢塞恩 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Drive to Lucerne for its lake scenery, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and octagonal Water Tower. Continue to the idyllic lakeside village of Iseltwald, then on to Interlaken at the foot of the Jungfrau. Overnight near Lake Thun.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔；之后前往世外桃源般的龙疆小镇赏湖光小镇风光；下午前往少女峰山脚下的因特拉肯。夜宿图恩湖区。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 少女峰 → 日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Morning in Interlaken between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun: stroll free time, or choose one optional activity — the included Grindelwald coach scenery tour, the Jungfrau panoramic summit cable car (€230) to the Top of Europe, or the First aerial gondola and Cliff Walk (€70). Continue to Geneva. Overnight near Geneva.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览有上帝左眼右眼之称的布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯，可自由漫步何维克街与宁静村庄；或三选一参加自费/含项目：含项目乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德梦幻山坡、少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）至欧洲之巅、或菲斯特空中贡多拉与悬崖天梭栈道（70欧元）。随后前往日内瓦。夜宿日内瓦附近。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to the 'Flower Bridge' district by the hotel, packed with local food and specialty shops, then Geneva's old town, the lakefront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain. In the afternoon drive back to Paris, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览酒店旁的花桥区域，这里云集日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城、湖区、花钟和大喷泉等景点；下午乘车返回巴黎，结束美好旅程。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in the morning of Day 1; the tour ends in Paris on Day 8.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——第1天上午集合；行程于第8天在巴黎结束。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland in Depth: 9-Day Rome-to-Paris Group Tour
title_zh: 法意瑞深度9天跟团游（罗马进巴黎出单程线路）
short_en: A 9-day one-way journey from Rome to Paris through Tuscany, the Cinque Terre, Venice, Milan and the Swiss Alps, with city-centre 4-star hotels and all-inclusive pricing.
short_zh: 9天单程深度游，从罗马一路畅游托斯卡纳、五渔村、威尼斯、米兰直至瑞士阿尔卑斯雪山，最终抵达巴黎；全程市中心四星酒店，一价全含。
desc_en: This 9-day one-way tour runs deep across France, Italy and Switzerland, entering in Rome and finishing in Paris so you never backtrack. From the Eternal City you wind through Tuscan hill towns Pienza and Siena, the leaning tower of Pisa and the cliffside fishing villages of the Cinque Terre, then on to Renaissance Florence, romantic Venice and fashionable Milan. Crossing the Alps you reach Zurich, Lucerne, the storybook lakeside town of Iseltwald, the Jungfrau region and Interlaken, before following Lake Geneva to a grand finale in Paris. With one city visited per day in Italy and all four Swiss language regions covered, it pairs efficient routing with hand-picked city-centre 4-star hotels.
desc_zh: 9天单程深度行程贯穿法国、意大利与瑞士，罗马进、巴黎出，全程不走回头路。从永恒之城罗马出发，途经托斯卡纳的皮恩扎与锡耶纳古城、比萨斜塔，以及悬崖上的五渔村，再前往文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨、水城威尼斯与时尚之都米兰。翻越阿尔卑斯山脉后抵达苏黎世、卢塞恩、童话般的龙疆小镇、少女峰地区与因特拉肯，最后沿日内瓦湖畔一路返回巴黎。意大利段每天深度游览一座城市，并贯穿瑞士四大语区，行程高效之余，精选市中心四星酒店保障舒适。

highlights.en: Explore Rome on foot — the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步深度探访罗马——斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Tuscan hill towns Pienza & Siena and the UNESCO Val d'Orcia cypress lanes
highlights.zh: 游览托斯卡纳古城皮恩扎与锡耶纳，邂逅世界遗产奥尔恰谷的绝美绝柏树小径

highlights.en: Scenic train ride along the cliffside Cinque Terre and the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览悬崖上的五渔村，打卡比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence, romantic canal-laced Venice and fashionable Milan
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨、水巷浪漫的威尼斯与时尚之都米兰

highlights.en: Swiss highlights: Zurich, Lucerne, the storybook town of Iseltwald, Interlaken & the Jungfrau region
highlights.zh: 瑞士精华：苏黎世、卢塞恩、童话小镇龙疆、因特拉肯与少女峰地区

highlights.en: One-way Rome-to-Paris deep route — no backtracking, minimal coach mileage
highlights.zh: 罗马进巴黎出单程深度线路，不走回头路，大幅降低大巴行车里程

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star brand hotels for high sightseeing efficiency and quality rest
highlights.zh: 精选市中心四星品牌酒店，提高游览效率并确保高质量休息

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing — taxes and fees fully covered, no hidden costs
highlights.zh: 税费全含，一价全含，绝无隐藏费用

includes.en: 8 nights in city-centre 4-star hotels (or equivalent)
includes.zh: 8晚市中心四星级酒店（或同等级酒店）

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 每日酒店早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程持证中文导游兼司机服务

includes.en: Intercity transport by coach as per itinerary
includes.zh: 行程所列城市间交通（旅游巴士）

includes.en: Cinque Terre scenic train ride
includes.zh: 五渔村景观列车车票

includes.en: Sightseeing as listed in the itinerary (most landmarks viewed from the exterior)
includes.zh: 行程所列景点游览（多数景点为外观游览）

includes.en: Day 8 option one: coach tour of the Grindelwald / Jungfrau region ("Dream Slope")
includes.zh: 第8天推荐项目一：乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景——梦幻山坡（费用包含）

includes.en: All applicable taxes and fees (all-inclusive)
includes.zh: 各项税费（一价全含）

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Visa fees
excludes.zh: 签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless otherwise noted
excludes.zh: 未特别注明的午餐与晚餐

excludes.en: Day 8 optional Jungfrau panorama cable car to the top (approx. €230)
excludes.zh: 第8天自费项目：少女峰全景缆车登顶（约230欧元）

excludes.en: Day 8 optional First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round trip (approx. €70)
excludes.zh: 第8天自费项目：菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（约70欧元）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费

excludes.en: Personal expenses and any items not listed in the inclusions
excludes.zh: 个人消费及其他未列入包含项目的费用

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet your group in the morning and explore Rome on foot with your guide through the historic centre of the ancient empire, the "Eternal City". View the Colosseum, the Pantheon, the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (all from the exterior), then enjoy free time. Overnight in a Rome 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，在导游带领下徒步游览古罗马帝国的发祥地、被誉为永恒之城的罗马历史中心。参观斗兽场、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），之后自由活动。夜宿罗马四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Leave Rome for the hill town of Pienza, stopping to photograph the famous cypress lanes of the Val d'Orcia, then visit Pius II Square and Pienza Cathedral (exterior). After lunch continue to Siena to see the cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the town hall and the Mangia Tower (exterior). Overnight in a Siena 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中于绝柏树小径自由拍照，之后游览二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观）。午餐后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。夜宿锡耶纳四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 比萨 → 五渔村 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Square of Miracles, then visit the Cinque Terre, riding along the Ligurian coast to admire the beautiful cliffside fishing villages. Overnight in a Florence 4-star hotel. (If bad weather or a rail strike prevents the Cinque Terre visit, the coast will be toured by coach or other means instead.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场。随后前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村。夜宿佛罗伦萨四星级酒店。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工等导致无法游览五渔村，行程将改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。）

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour the cradle of the Renaissance, Florence: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge, and Santa Croce Square and Basilica (exterior). Then travel to Venice. Overnight in a Venice 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场、老桥、圣十字广场及圣十字教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯。夜宿威尼斯四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the splendid Doge's Palace (exterior), where the beautiful waterborne architecture and winding canals capture Venice's romance. Then continue to the fashion capital of Milan. Overnight in a Milan 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观），感受水上城市威尼斯的浪漫风情。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿米兰四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Milan's landmark Duomo (exterior) and one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon travel to Zurich to see the Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse and the banks of the Limmat River. Overnight in a Zurich 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）以及欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街，并漫步利马特河畔。夜宿苏黎世四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 卢塞恩 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Drive to Lucerne to enjoy the lake's scenery, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Continue to the storybook town of Iseltwald for its lake and village views, then head to Interlaken, at the foot of the Jungfrau, the "Roof of Europe". Overnight in a Sigriswil 4-star lake-and-mountain-view hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角形水塔。之后前往童话小镇龙疆，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光；下午前往欧洲屋脊少女峰山脚下的小镇因特拉肯。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 少女峰地区 → 日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning at Interlaken, set between the jewel-like Lake Brienz and Lake Thun. Choose one of three options (pick one only): a free stroll through the town; or, at extra cost, the Jungfrau panorama cable car to the Top of Europe (approx. €230) for the Sphinx Observatory and Aletsch Glacier; or the First-Grindelwald aerial gondola (approx. €70) for the First Cliff Walk. Then travel to Geneva. Overnight in an Annemasse / Geneva 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览坐落于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯。三个项目任选其一（不可兼选）：自由漫步小镇；或自费乘少女峰全景缆车登顶——欧洲之巅Top of Europe（约230欧元），游览斯芬克斯观景台与阿莱奇冰川；或自费乘菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉（约70欧元），游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道First Cliff Walk。之后前往日内瓦。夜宿安纳马斯/日内瓦四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: In the morning stroll the "Flower Bridge" district beside the hotel, full of local delicacies and specialty shops, and visit Geneva's old town, the lakefront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain. In the afternoon travel by coach back to Paris, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览酒店旁的花桥区域，这里云集日内瓦各种当地美食与特色商店，参观日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟与大喷泉等景点。下午乘车返回巴黎，结束愉快旅程。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in the morning of Day 1 in central Rome (exact assembly point confirmed in your departure notice).
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——第1天上午于罗马市区集合（具体集合地点以出团通知书为准）。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland in 9 Days: Rome to Paris Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 法意瑞9天精品小团：罗马出发 巴黎结束
short_en: A 9-day one-way small-group journey from Rome to Paris through Tuscany, Cinque Terre, Venice, Milan and the Swiss Alps with the GoldenPass train and Jungfrau, ending on the Burgundy wine road.
short_zh: 9天罗马至巴黎单程精品小团，畅游托斯卡纳、五渔村、威尼斯、米兰与瑞士阿尔卑斯，搭乘金色山口列车登顶少女峰，终于勃艮第红酒之路。
desc_en: This nine-day one-way tour starts in the Eternal City of Rome and ends in Paris, weaving together the highlights of Italy, Switzerland and France without ever backtracking. Trace the Renaissance in Florence, marvel at the clifftop villages of Cinque Terre, drift through romantic Venice and admire Milan's gothic cathedral. Cross into Switzerland for the GoldenPass scenic train, the lakeside charm of Interlaken and a cable-car ascent to the Jungfrau's Sphinx viewing platform. The journey closes in the storybook town of Colmar and Burgundy, where a winery visit and tasting cap a route built around scenic hotels and all-inclusive pricing.
desc_zh: 这趟九天单程之旅从永恒之城罗马出发、以巴黎收尾，串联意大利、瑞士与法国的精华景致，全程不走回头路。在佛罗伦萨追寻文艺复兴的光芒，惊叹于五渔村的悬崖渔村，徜徉浪漫水城威尼斯，仰望米兰哥特式大教堂。随后进入瑞士，乘坐金色山口观光列车，漫步湖畔小镇因特拉肯，搭乘缆车登顶少女峰斯芬克斯观景台。旅程最终来到童话小镇科尔马与勃艮第产区，以一场酒庄参观与品酒收官，全程入住景观酒店、一价全含。

highlights.en: Explore the Eternal City of Rome: Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 深度探访永恒之城罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence and the leaning Tower of Pisa on the Square of Miracles
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨与比萨奇迹广场的比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Cinque Terre's five clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coast
highlights.zh: 利古里亚海岸线上的五渔村悬崖渔村美景

highlights.en: Romantic Venice, gothic Milan Cathedral, and the GoldenPass scenic train through the Alps
highlights.zh: 浪漫威尼斯、哥特式米兰大教堂，乘金色山口观光列车穿越阿尔卑斯

highlights.en: Cable-car ascent of the Jungfrau to the Sphinx viewing platform above the Aletsch Glacier
highlights.zh: 搭乘缆车登顶少女峰，于斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川

highlights.en: Fairytale Colmar (Miyazaki's Howl's Moving Castle) and a Burgundy winery visit with tasting
highlights.zh: 童话小镇科尔马（宫崎骏《哈尔的移动城堡》原型）及勃艮第酒庄参观品酒

highlights.en: One-way deep route with no backtracking; flights, rail and all listed attractions included
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线不走回头路，含列车与全部所列景点门票，一价全含

highlights.en: Scenic stays: 2 five-star Tuscany hotels, a Swiss alpine lake-view hotel and a Burgundy château
highlights.zh: 景观酒店：2晚五星托斯卡纳酒店、瑞士雪山湖景酒店与勃艮第中世纪古堡

includes.en: 2 nights in 5-star hotels and 6 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 2晚五星级酒店及6晚四星级酒店

includes.en: 8 breakfasts (hotel buffet or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共8餐

includes.en: City taxes, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking, fuel and driver-guide meal allowances
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费及司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Tour coach or business van for intercity transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Chinese-speaking driver-guide or professional driver plus Chinese guide (van + driver-guide for groups under 8; coach + driver + guide for 8+)
includes.zh: 中文导游或全程中文司机兼导游（8人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）

includes.en: Luggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attraction tickets: Burgundy winery visit and tasting, GoldenPass train (Lucerne-Zweisimmen section), Cinque Terre train, Venice island ferry, Jungfrau cable-car package
includes.zh: 门票：勃艮第酒庄参观及品酒费用、金色山口列车（卢塞恩-龙疆段）、五渔村小火车、威尼斯上岛渡轮、少女峰缆车套票

excludes.en: International flights and personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 国际机票及个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify coverage for high-risk activities if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Guide and driver gratuities: 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners other than the special meals included in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内包含的特色餐外的餐饮

excludes.en: Optional activities and any personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自费项目及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet and explore Rome, the cradle of the Roman Empire and the 'Eternal City'. See the Colosseum, the Pantheon, the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (all viewed from outside), then check in to your hotel after 2pm. Rome's old town is a vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL), so the day is explored on foot (around 5km round trip).
timeline.description_zh: 集合后游览古罗马帝国发祥地、被称为永恒之城的罗马。参观斗兽场、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），14点后入住酒店。罗马古城为车辆禁行区（ZTL），当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 佛罗伦萨 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Drive to Florence, cradle of the Renaissance, to see the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Overnight at a five-star spa hotel in Tuscany's Montecatini Terme.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。入住托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼五星级SPA酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 五渔村 → 比萨 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning in Cinque Terre, visiting the five beautiful clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coast. In the afternoon head to Pisa for the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Square of Miracles. (If weather or a rail strike prevents the Cinque Terre visit, the coast is toured by coach or another means.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线依次游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和奇迹广场。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。）

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to Venice and explore at leisure: St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). The city of 118 islands, 177 canals and 401 bridges lives up to its name as the 'Pearl of the Adriatic'.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往威尼斯，自由参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观）。由118个小岛、177条水道与401座桥梁连成一体的水城，浪漫风情久久萦绕。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Drive to Italy's fashion capital Milan to see the medieval-to-Renaissance Sforza Castle (exterior), the landmark Milan Cathedral (exterior) — a gothic masterpiece begun in 1387 and 500 years in the making, with some 6,000 marble statues — and the elegant Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II shopping arcade.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往意大利时尚之都米兰，参观中世纪至文艺复兴时期的堡垒斯福尔扎古堡（外观），随后参观米兰标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）——始建于1387年、历经500年建成、拥有约6000座大理石雕像的哥特式杰作，以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 卢塞恩 → 龙疆 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Head to Lucerne for its lake scenery, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Board the GoldenPass scenic train (about an hour) over the mountains to Zweisimmen, then continue to Interlaken to stroll Höheweg street. Overnight at an alpine lake-view hotel in Sigriswil.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角形水塔。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车（约1小时）穿山越岭前往龙疆，再前往因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街等宁静村庄。入住锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 少女峰 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Visit the village of Grindelwald and its dreamy slopes, then ride the cable car to the top of the Jungfrau and the Sphinx viewing platform, looking out over the snow-capped peak and Europe's Aletsch Glacier. Continue to Zurich for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往格林德尔瓦尔德小镇与梦幻山坡，之后乘缆车登顶阿尔卑斯著名景区少女峰，前往斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰与欧洲阿莱奇冰川。之后前往苏黎世入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 科尔马 → 第戎
timeline.description_en: Tour Zurich's old town, the Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Then cross into France to fairytale Colmar — inspiration for Miyazaki's Howl's Moving Castle — to wander the old town, the Maison des Têtes and the Pfister House. Overnight in a medieval Burgundy château or a 4-star hotel in central Dijon.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览苏黎世老城、苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街。后前往法国童话小镇科尔马——宫崎骏《哈尔的移动城堡》原型及《中餐厅2》取景地，游览科尔马老城、人头屋与普菲斯泰屋。入住勃艮第中世纪古堡酒店或第戎市区4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 第戎 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Visit a Burgundy winery — touring the courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and cellars with a sommelier-led tasting of three to five wines. Explore Dijon's old town and the gothic Notre-Dame de Dijon, then drive to Paris, where the tour ends at Place d'Italie.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往勃艮第葡萄产区，参观酒庄庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，由专业侍酒师讲解并品鉴三到五杯红白葡萄酒。游览第戎老城与哥特式第戎圣母院，下午前往巴黎，抵达后于意大利广场结束行程。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in central Rome on Day 1; the old town is explored on foot.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——第1天在罗马市区集合，古城区为步行游览。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 14-Day Tour: Rome to Paris One-Way Deep Route
title_zh: 法意瑞14天跟团游：罗马至巴黎单程深度路线
short_en: A 14-day one-way journey from Rome to Paris through Italy's coasts and Renaissance cities, the Swiss Alps and lakes, ending in romantic Paris.
short_zh: 14天单程深度之旅，从罗马一路游览意大利海岸与文艺复兴名城、瑞士阿尔卑斯湖光山色，最终抵达浪漫巴黎。
desc_en: This 14-day one-way tour traces a deep route from Rome to Paris across three countries. In Italy you explore the Eternal City, the Amalfi Coast and Capri's Blue Grotto, ancient Pompeii, Tuscany's Val d'Orcia, Siena, the Cinque Terre, Florence and Venice. You then cross the Alps into Switzerland for Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken and the Jungfrau region, before finishing with three full days in Paris including the Louvre, a Seine river cruise and the Palace of Versailles. The one-way design keeps coach mileage low while delivering one city a day in Italy, four Swiss language regions, six guided history walks and four city walks.
desc_zh: 这条14天单程线路串联三国，从罗马深度直达巴黎。意大利段游览永恒之城罗马、阿马尔菲海岸与卡普里岛蓝洞、千年庞贝古城、托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷、锡耶纳、五渔村、佛罗伦萨与威尼斯；随后翻越阿尔卑斯山进入瑞士，游览苏黎世、卢塞恩、因特拉肯与少女峰地区；最后在巴黎安排三整天，含卢浮宫、塞纳河游船与凡尔赛宫。单程设计大幅降低大巴行车里程，意大利每天一城，贯穿瑞士四大语区，含六场深度历史讲解与四场城市漫步。
