highlights.en: Deep exploration of Rome, birthplace of the Roman Empire and the Eternal City
highlights.zh: 深度探访古罗马帝国发祥地、永恒之城罗马

highlights.en: Capri island and the world-famous Blue Grotto on the Amalfi Coast
highlights.zh: 卡普里岛与世界闻名的蓝洞，畅游阿马尔菲海岸

highlights.en: Ancient Pompeii, the city buried and reawakened after a thousand years
highlights.zh: 沉睡千年的庞贝古城，重见天日的辉煌遗迹

highlights.en: Tuscany's Val d'Orcia, Siena, the leaning tower of Pisa and the cliffside Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷、锡耶纳、比萨斜塔与悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence and the romantic canals of Venice
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨与浪漫水城威尼斯

highlights.en: Swiss Alps, lakes and the Jungfrau region across four language areas
highlights.zh: 瑞士阿尔卑斯山湖光山色与少女峰地区，贯穿四大语区

highlights.en: Three full days in Paris: Louvre with a national gallery guide, Seine cruise and Versailles
highlights.zh: 巴黎三整天：卢浮宫国家馆讲解、塞纳河游船与凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: One-way deep route, city-centre 4-star hotels, no forced shopping and all-inclusive taxes
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线、市中心四星酒店、绝无强制购物、税费全含

includes.en: City-centre or equivalent 4-star hotels throughout
includes.zh: 全程市中心或同等4星级酒店

includes.en: Daily breakfast at the hotel
includes.zh: 每日酒店早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver service
includes.zh: 持证中文导游兼司机服务

includes.en: Intercity ground transport along the route
includes.zh: 全程城际地面交通

includes.en: Capri ferry and Amalfi Coast cruise as per itinerary
includes.zh: 行程所列卡普里岛渡船及阿马尔菲海岸出海游船

includes.en: Six guided history talks and four city walks, including a Louvre national-gallery guide
includes.zh: 六场深度历史讲解与四场城市漫步，含卢浮宫国家馆讲解

includes.en: Listed sightseeing as per itinerary (most landmarks viewed from outside)
includes.zh: 行程所列景点游览（多数地标为外观参观）

includes.en: All taxes and fees, with no hidden charges
includes.zh: 各项税费全含，绝无隐藏费用

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Visa fees and travel insurance
excludes.zh: 签证费用及旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless otherwise noted
excludes.zh: 正餐（午餐及晚餐），另有说明者除外

excludes.en: Blue Grotto entry and boatmen tip of EUR 2-5 (Capri)
excludes.zh: 蓝洞游览费用及2-5欧元船工小费（卡普里岛）

excludes.en: Optional Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the top (EUR 230)
excludes.zh: 自费少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）

excludes.en: Optional First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round trip (EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）

excludes.en: Optional Capri cable car, taxis and island transport
excludes.zh: 卡普里岛缆车、出租车及岛上交通自费

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver, and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 导游司机小费及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and walk the historic centre of Rome with your guide, viewing the Colosseum and Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (exterior). The day's walk is about 5-6 km as central Rome is largely car-free.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，在导游带领下徒步游览罗马历史中心，外观斗兽场、万神殿，游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）。罗马古城禁止车辆行驶，当天步行约5-6公里。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马-那不勒斯/索伦托-卡普里岛-索伦托
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, take a ferry from Naples or Sorrento to Capri. Stroll the seafront, explore the Blue Grotto by boat or visit the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the bay, then ferry back to Sorrento for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从那不勒斯或索伦托乘渡船前往卡普里岛。可海边漫步、乘船探秘蓝洞，或游览奥古斯都花园俯瞰海湾，之后乘渡船返回索伦托入住。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-阿马尔菲-波西塔诺-索伦托
timeline.description_en: Enjoy a boat day exploring the Amalfi Coast. Cruise to the cliffside village of Positano, then on to Amalfi for panoramic coastal views, before returning by boat to your Sorrento hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 全天乘游船探索阿马尔菲海岸，先前往悬崖村庄波西塔诺，再前往阿马尔菲欣赏海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回索伦托酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-庞贝-那不勒斯-罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore the ruins of ancient Pompeii, then visit Naples old town with the Royal Palace and Castel Nuovo (exterior). Drive to Rome in the afternoon to check in.
timeline.description_zh: 上午探索庞贝古城遗址，之后游览那不勒斯老城，外观那不勒斯皇宫与新堡。下午前往罗马入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马-皮恩扎-锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Drive into Tuscany to visit the hill town of Pienza, with photo stops along the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia. Continue to Siena to see the cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo and the Mangia Tower (exterior).
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马前往皮恩扎古城，途中在奥尔恰谷绝柏树小径自由拍照，之后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳-比萨-五渔村-佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Visit Pisa's Square of Miracles and the Leaning Tower (exterior), then ride the scenic train to the Cinque Terre to admire the colourful cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast, ending in Florence.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览奇迹广场与比萨斜塔（外观），随后乘景观列车游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸欣赏悬崖上的彩色渔村，之后入住佛罗伦萨。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-威尼斯
timeline.description_en: In Renaissance Florence, see the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), then travel on to Venice for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，外观圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂，之后前往威尼斯入住。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-米兰
timeline.description_en: Visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (exterior) in romantic, canal-laced Venice, then drive to the fashion capital of Milan.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览浪漫水城威尼斯，外观圣马可大教堂、圣马可广场、叹息桥与总督宫，之后前往时尚之都米兰。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰-苏黎世
timeline.description_en: See Milan's landmark Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, then cross the Alps to Zurich to visit the Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse and the banks of the Limmat.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由参观米兰主教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世长廊，下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街，漫步利马特河边。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-卢塞恩-因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Visit Lucerne with the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower, then see the lakeside village of Lungern before reaching Interlaken at the foot of the Jungfrau.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往卢塞恩，游览狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，之后游览龙疆小镇及湖景，下午抵达少女峰山脚下的因特拉肯。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-少女峰-日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Enjoy Interlaken between Lakes Brienz and Thun. Choose one option only: an included coach tour of the Grindelwald scenery, the optional Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the top (EUR 230), or the optional First cliff-walk gondola (EUR 70). Continue to Geneva for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯。三选一项目：含费的格林德尔瓦尔德山景大巴游览，或自费少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元），或自费菲斯特悬崖栈道贡多拉（70欧元）。之后前往日内瓦入住。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦-巴黎
timeline.description_en: Stroll Geneva's Flower Bridge district and old town, see Lake Geneva, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau, then drive on to Paris in the afternoon.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览日内瓦花桥区域与老城，参观日内瓦湖、花钟与大喷泉，下午乘车返回巴黎。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎（卢浮宫与塞纳河游船）
timeline.description_en: Tour the Louvre Museum with a French national gallery guide, then visit Notre-Dame, Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, and take a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde.
timeline.description_zh: 上午由法兰西国家馆讲解师带领深度参观卢浮宫；下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）与战神广场，并乘塞纳河游船经过荣军院、大小皇宫、协和广场等景点。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-凡尔赛-巴黎
timeline.description_en: Explore Paris's fashion district along Boulevard Haussmann, viewing the Opera Garnier (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette, then visit the Palace of Versailles southwest of the city before the tour concludes in Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街与皇家大道，外观巴黎歌剧院，自由游览春天百货与老佛爷百货，下午前往凡尔赛宫游览，返回巴黎结束行程。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — the group assembles in central Rome on the morning of Day 1.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——第1天上午在罗马市中心集合。

title_en: Italy in Depth: Venice to Rome 5-Day Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利经典5天跟团游：威尼斯进、罗马出
short_en: A one-way 5-day journey from the canals of Venice through Renaissance Florence, the cliffside Cinque Terre and medieval Tuscany to eternal Rome.
short_zh: 5天单程深度游，从水城威尼斯一路经文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨、悬崖五渔村与中世纪托斯卡纳古城，直抵永恒之城罗马。
desc_en: This 5-day single-direction tour traces Italy's most iconic landscapes from north to south with no backtracking. Begin among the romantic canals of Venice, then immerse yourself in the Renaissance treasures of Florence before riding the scenic train through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre and past the Leaning Tower of Pisa. Wind through the medieval hill towns of Siena and Pienza overlooking the UNESCO-listed Val d'Orcia, and finish on foot in Rome, the "Eternal City," exploring the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain.
desc_zh: 这是一条由北至南、单程不走回头路的5天意大利深度行程。旅程从浪漫的水城威尼斯启程，随后沉浸于文艺复兴宝库佛罗伦萨；乘坐景观列车饱览悬崖上的五渔村，途经比萨斜塔；再穿行于中世纪山城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷；最终徒步探访“永恒之城”罗马，欣赏斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉。

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, St Mark's Basilica, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace amid the canals
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯：圣马可广场、圣马可大教堂、叹息桥与总督宫，尽览水巷风情

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence with the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria and the Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、市政广场与老桥

highlights.en: Scenic train ride through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre along the Ligurian coast
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖渔村五渔村

highlights.en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa and the Square of Miracles
highlights.zh: 比萨斜塔与奇迹广场

highlights.en: Medieval Tuscan hill towns Siena and Pienza overlooking the UNESCO Val d'Orcia and cypress lanes
highlights.zh: 中世纪托斯卡纳古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷与丝柏小径

highlights.en: Rome the "Eternal City": Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain on a guided walk
highlights.zh: “永恒之城”罗马：导游带领徒步游览斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Single-direction deep-dive itinerary with no backtracking and city-centre 4-star brand hotels
highlights.zh: 单程深度行程不走回头路，精选城市中心四星品牌酒店

highlights.en: Cinque Terre scenic train and Venice island ferry included; Chinese-speaking guide throughout
highlights.zh: 含五渔村景观列车与威尼斯登岛轮渡，全程中文导游

includes.en: 4 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 四星级酒店住宿4晚

includes.en: 4 hotel breakfasts or equivalent meals
includes.zh: 酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计4餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes and fees (city tax, entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees)
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费（游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等）

includes.en: Tourist coach or business travel vehicle
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a full-trip Chinese-speaking driver-guide (groups of 8 or fewer use a business vehicle with a combined driver-guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: 1 checked bag (23 kg) plus 1 carry-on per person
includes.zh: 每人1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Cinque Terre scenic train and Venice island ferry tickets
includes.zh: 五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (confirm high-risk activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费共计10欧元/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not listed (e.g. Venice's signature squid-ink pasta set menu is at own expense)
excludes.zh: 未列明的午餐与晚餐（如威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式自理）

excludes.en: Personal expenses and any optional activities
excludes.zh: 个人消费及任何自费项目

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Meet in Venice and explore the floating city built across 118 islands, linked by canals and bridges. See St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the ornate Doge's Palace (exterior). Optionally try the local squid-ink pasta set menu (own expense). Overnight at the voco Venice / Hilton or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 威尼斯集合，游览由118个小岛、177条水道与401座桥梁连成一体的水上之城。参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）及华丽的总督宫（外观）。可自理品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式。夜宿威尼斯洲际voco酒店或希尔顿大使酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Drive in the morning to Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance. Tour the old town: the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore, the world's third-largest cathedral), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and Piazza and Basilica di Santa Croce (exterior). Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，游览老城景点：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥，以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Head to Cinque Terre in the morning and ride along the Ligurian coast to admire the cliffside fishing villages. In the afternoon visit Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Square of Miracles, then continue to Siena. Note: in bad weather or rail strikes the Cinque Terre visit may switch to coach or another form of coastal sightseeing. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往游览五漁村，沿利古里亚海岸线欣赏悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工等导致无法游览五渔村，行程将改为乘大巴或其他形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 皮恩扎 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore the old town of Siena: the Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Continue to the hill town of Pienza for Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), pausing for photos along the cypress lanes of the Val d'Orcia en route to Rome. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma / Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅（外观）与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。之后前往皮恩扎古城游览二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观），途中在奥尔恰谷丝柏小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, take a guided walking tour of Rome, the "Eternal City" and cradle of the ancient Roman Empire. See the Colosseum (exterior) and Pantheon (exterior), and visit the Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (exterior), followed by free time before the tour ends. Note: most of central Rome is pedestrian-only with vehicles barred, so the day involves roughly 5-6 km of walking.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国发祥地，被称为“永恒之城”。参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），自由活动后结束愉快旅程。备注：罗马古城多为步行街区禁止车辆通行，当天徒步行程约5-6公里。

meeting_en: Venice, Italy — group assembles in Venice on Day 1; tour ends in Rome.
meeting_zh: 意大利威尼斯——第1天于威尼斯集合，行程于罗马结束。

title_en: Italy in Depth: Milan to Rome 6-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利深度6日小团游（米兰出发 罗马结束）
short_en: A one-way 6-day journey through Italy's greatest hits — Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, Pisa, Siena, Pienza and Rome — with 4-star hotels and a Chinese-speaking guide.
short_zh: 6天单程深度玩转意大利经典：米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、比萨、锡耶纳、皮恩扎与罗马，入住四星酒店，中文导游全程陪同。
desc_en: Travel one-way across the best of Italy in six unforgettable days, from the fashion capital of Milan to the eternal city of Rome. The route links the canals of Venice, the Renaissance heart of Florence, the cliffside villages of the Cinque Terre, the leaning tower of Pisa, and the medieval hill towns of Siena and Pienza set in the Val d'Orcia. Carefully designed as a single forward-moving deep itinerary with no backtracking, the trip pairs Italy's iconic sights with hand-picked central 4-star hotels for efficient sightseeing and quality rest.
desc_zh: 六天单程畅游意大利精华，从时尚之都米兰一路抵达永恒之城罗马。行程串联起威尼斯的水巷、文艺复兴之心佛罗伦萨、悬崖上的五渔村、比萨斜塔，以及奥尔恰谷中的中世纪山城锡耶纳与皮恩扎。线路设计为单程深度遊覽、不走回头路，将意大利的标志性景点与精选市区四星酒店相结合，既提升游览效率，又保证优质休息。

highlights.en: Milan's 500-year-old Gothic Duomo and the elegant Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II
highlights.zh: 历时500年建成的米兰哥特式大教堂与优雅的埃马努埃莱二世拱廊

highlights.en: Romantic Venice — St Mark's Square, St Mark's Basilica, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯——圣马可广场、圣马可大教堂、叹息桥与总督宫

highlights.en: Florence, cradle of the Renaissance, with the Duomo, Piazza della Signoria and the Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、市政广场与老桥

highlights.en: Scenic train ride to the cliffside fishing villages of the Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Pisa's Leaning Tower and the Piazza dei Miracoli, plus medieval Siena and Pienza in the Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 比萨斜塔与奇迹广场，以及奥尔恰谷中的中世纪古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎

highlights.en: Eternal Rome on foot — the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步探访永恒之城罗马——斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: One-way deep itinerary with no backtracking and a licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 单程深度行程、不走回头路，全程中文司机兼导游带领

highlights.en: Central 4-star hotels, all listed attractions included and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星酒店、所列景点门票全含、无强制购物

includes.en: 5 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 四星级酒店5晚

includes.en: 5 meals (hotel breakfast or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店早餐或其他形式餐饮共计5餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes and fees (city tax, entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.)
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费（游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等）

includes.en: Coach or business van transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or full-trip Chinese-speaking guide-driver (groups of 8 or fewer travel by business van with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed activities and tickets: Cinque Terre scenic train and Venice island ferry
includes.zh: 活动及门票：五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡

excludes.en: International flights
excludes.zh: 国际往返机票

excludes.en: Passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify coverage if the itinerary involves high-risk activities)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动，请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共计10欧元/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not listed (e.g. the Venetian squid-ink pasta set menu is at your own expense)
excludes.zh: 未列明的午餐和晚餐（如威尼斯墨鱼面三道式餐为自理）

excludes.en: Optional activities and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自费项目及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 米兰（全天自由活动）
timeline.description_en: Free day in Milan to explore at your own pace. We suggest visiting the landmark Milan Cathedral (exterior) and one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the evening, meet your guide in the city centre and transfer to your hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 米兰全天自由活动，可自行安排游览。建议自行参观米兰标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。傍晚与导游在市区集合，前往酒店入住。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for the water city of Venice. Visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior), wandering the romantic canals. You can also try Venice's signature squid-ink pasta set menu (at your own expense).
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观），漫步浪漫水巷。您还可品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式餐（自理）。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Travel to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Explore the old town: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and Piazza Santa Croce with its basilica (exterior), before checking in to your hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥，以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Take the scenic train to explore the Cinque Terre, the beautiful cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast. In the afternoon, visit Pisa's Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, then continue to Siena to check in. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike prevents the Cinque Terre visit, the coast will be toured by coach or another means.
timeline.description_zh: 上午乘景观列车游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线欣赏悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其他形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 皮恩扎 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour the old city of Siena — the Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Continue to the hill town of Pienza for Piazza Pio II and its cathedral (exterior), then drive to Rome, stopping for photos on the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia along the way.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。之后前往皮恩扎古城参观二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观），途中在奥尔恰谷绝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, your guide leads a walking tour of Rome, the Eternal City and birthplace of the Roman Empire. See the Colosseum (exterior) and Pantheon (exterior), and visit the Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (exterior). Free time, then the tour ends. Note: most of central Rome is car-free; the day's walk covers roughly 5-6 km.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在导游带领下徒步游览永恒之城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地。参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）。自由活动后结束愉快旅程。备注：罗马古城多为步行街区，当天徒步约5-6公里。

meeting_en: Milan city centre — meet your guide in central Milan on Day 1 before transferring to the hotel.
meeting_zh: 米兰市中心——第1天在米兰市区与导游集合，随后前往酒店入住。

title_en: Italy in Depth: 8-Day Venice to Rome Tour
title_zh: 意大利全景深度8天跟团游（威尼斯进 罗马出）
short_en: An 8-day one-way journey from Venice to Rome through Florence, Cinque Terre, Tuscany, the Amalfi Coast and Capri's Blue Grotto.
short_zh: 8天单程深度游，从威尼斯一路南下至罗马，途经佛罗伦萨、五渔村、托斯卡纳、阿马尔菲海岸与卡普里岛蓝洞。
desc_en: This 8-day one-way tour traces the length of Italy from the romantic canals of Venice down to the Eternal City of Rome. Along the way you explore Renaissance Florence, the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre by scenic train, the leaning tower of Pisa, the medieval hill towns of Siena and Pienza in the Val d'Orcia, and the dramatic Amalfi Coast with Capri's Blue Grotto, Positano and the ruins of Pompeii. With one city explored each day, a one-way deep route to cut down on coach mileage, City Walks led by officially licensed guides and all taxes, entries and ferries included, it is a relaxed yet richly cultural way to see the best of Italy.
desc_zh: 这是一条8天单程深度线路，从浪漫水城威尼斯一路南下直达永恒之城罗马。沿途游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨、乘坐景观列车探访悬崖上的五渔村、比萨斜塔、托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷中的中世纪古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，再到壮美的阿马尔菲海岸，探秘卡普里岛蓝洞、波西塔诺以及沉睡千年的庞贝古城。每天深度游览一座城市，单程路线大幅减少大巴里程，由官方认证导游带领City Walk，税费、门票与出海轮渡全含，让您轻松而深入地领略意大利精华。

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, St Mark's Basilica, the Bridge of Sighs and Doge's Palace
highlights.zh: 浪漫威尼斯：圣马可广场、圣马可大教堂、叹息桥与总督宫

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence with the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore and the Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨，圣母百花大教堂与老桥

highlights.en: Cinque Terre by scenic coastal train and the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览五渔村，比萨斜塔与奇迹广场

highlights.en: Medieval Siena and Pienza above the UNESCO Val d'Orcia, with the iconic cypress lane
highlights.zh: 中世纪古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰谷与绝美丝柏树小径

highlights.en: The Eternal City: Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain on foot
highlights.zh: 永恒之城罗马：徒步游览斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Capri island and the world-famous Blue Grotto, plus an Amalfi Coast boat cruise to Positano
highlights.zh: 卡普里岛与世界奇景蓝洞，阿马尔菲海岸出海环游波西塔诺

highlights.en: Pompeii: walk the ruins of a city frozen by Vesuvius two thousand years ago
highlights.zh: 庞贝古城：漫步被维苏威火山掩埋的千年遗址

highlights.en: Flights and rail not required: one-way deep route, city-centre 4-star hotels, licensed guides, no forced shopping and all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路、市中心四星酒店、官方认证导游、绝无强制购物、税费门票全含

includes.en: 7 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 四星级酒店7晚

includes.en: 7 meals: hotel breakfasts or equivalent
includes.zh: 酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计7餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes: city/tourist tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Tour coach or business van for intercity transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车交通

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: business van with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机加中文导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车加中文司机兼导游全程带领）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attractions and activities: Cinque Terre scenic train, Venice island ferry, Sorrento-Amalfi coast boat cruise, Capri round-trip ferry, and Pompeii entry with national-site lecturer
includes.zh: 行程内活动及门票：五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）

excludes.en: International flights and personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 国际机票及个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify coverage if high-risk activities are involved)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费共10欧元/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners other than the special meals noted in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内特色餐外的午餐与晚餐费用

excludes.en: Entries to attractions not stated as included, including sights marked exterior view, recommended or optional
excludes.zh: 未注明包含的景点门票（含标注外观、推荐、可选、体验等项目）

excludes.en: Optional and free-time activities: e.g. the Capri Blue Grotto boat (boatman tip of 2-5 EUR customary), Venice gondola, restricted-zone shuttle trains/electric taxis; plus extra accommodation, taxis, drinks and other personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自由活动及推荐项目：如卡普里蓝洞人力船（习惯支付2-5欧元小费）、威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车/电瓶车等，以及额外住宿、出租车、饮料等个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Meet in Venice and explore the romantic city on the water: St Mark's Basilica and Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the ornate Doge's Palace (exterior views). Wander the canals of the 'Pearl of the Adriatic', built across 118 islands and linked by hundreds of bridges. Overnight in a 4-star hotel in Venice.
timeline.description_zh: 威尼斯集合后，游览这座水上浪漫之城：圣马可大教堂、圣马可广场、叹息桥与华丽的总督宫（外观）。漫步于由118个小岛、177条水道和401座桥梁连成一体的'亚得里亚海明珠'。夜宿威尼斯四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Travel to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Tour the old city: the world's third-largest church Santa Maria del Fiore (the Duomo), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Overnight in a 4-star hotel in Florence.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，游览老城景点：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）。夜宿佛罗伦萨四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 五漁村 - 比萨 - 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Ride the scenic train along the Ligurian coast to visit the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre, then continue to Pisa for the Leaning Tower and the Piazza dei Miracoli (exterior), before settling into your hotel in Siena. Overnight in a 4-star hotel in Siena. Note: if bad weather or rail strikes prevent the Cinque Terre visit, the coast is toured by coach or alternative means instead.
timeline.description_zh: 乘坐景观列车沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽五渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住。夜宿锡耶纳四星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 - 皮恩扎 - 罗马
timeline.description_en: Tour the old town of Siena: the Cathedral, Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall and the Torre del Mangia (exteriors). Continue to the hill town of Pienza for Piazza Pio II and its cathedral, with a free photo stop on the famous cypress lane, before reaching Rome. Overnight in a 4-star hotel in Rome. Note: much of Rome is car-free; expect about 5-6 km on foot.
timeline.description_zh: 游览锡耶纳古城：锡耶纳大教堂、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。午后前往皮恩扎古城游览二世广场与大教堂，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，随后抵达罗马入住。夜宿罗马四星级酒店。备注：罗马多为步行街区，当天徒步约5-6公里。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: A guided walking tour of the Eternal City, cradle of the Roman Empire. See the Colosseum and Pantheon (exteriors), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Overnight in a 4-star hotel in Rome. Note: most sights lie within the car-free old city; expect about 5-6 km on foot.
timeline.description_zh: 在导游带领下徒步游览古罗马帝国发祥地、被誉为'永恒之城'的罗马。参观斗兽场、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）。夜宿罗马四星级酒店。备注：罗马古城禁止车辆行驶，当天徒步约5-6公里。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 索伦托 - 卡普里岛 - 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Transfer to Naples/Sorrento and take the ferry to Capri, the Mediterranean's paradise island. Free time to stroll the seafront, explore the Blue Grotto by boat, or visit the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the bay. Return by ferry to Sorrento. Overnight in a 4-star hotel in Sorrento. Note: on-island activity is free time; transport and the Blue Grotto boat are not included and the grotto may close in high tide, wind or swell.
timeline.description_zh: 前往那不勒斯/索伦托乘渡船抵达地中海天堂岛卡普里岛。自由海边漫步、自行乘船探秘蓝洞，或前往奥古斯都花园俯瞰海湾；之后乘渡船返回索伦托入住。夜宿索伦托四星级酒店。备注：登岛后自由活动，不含岛上交通；蓝洞为自然景观，遇涨潮风浪关闭时无法入内，蓝洞费用不含。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 阿马尔菲 - 波西塔诺 - 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Set off on a charming boat day trip along the Amalfi Coast. Cruise to the clifftop village of Positano, then on to Amalfi for panoramic views of this UNESCO World Heritage coastline, before returning by boat. Overnight in a 4-star hotel in Sorrento. Note: in extreme sea conditions the cruise is replaced by a coach visit to Sorrento old town and the cruise fee is refunded.
timeline.description_zh: 踏上迷人的阿马尔菲海岸游船一日游：乘船前往悬崖村庄波西塔诺，再前往阿马尔菲欣赏世界文化遗产海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回。夜宿索伦托四星级酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，游船取消并改为大巴游览索伦托老城，出海费用退还。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 庞贝 - 那不勒斯 - 罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore the ruins of ancient Pompeii, the city buried by Vesuvius and frozen for two thousand years, including its amphitheatre. Continue to Naples to see the old town, the Royal Palace and Castel Nuovo (exteriors). Drive to Rome in the afternoon, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 前往庞贝探索古城遗址，了解被维苏威火山掩埋、沉睡千年的庞贝文明（含露天剧场）。之后前往那不勒斯游览老城、那不勒斯皇宫与新堡（外观）。下午返回罗马，结束美好行程。

meeting_en: Venice, Italy. The group meets in Venice on Day 1 to begin the southbound journey to Rome.
meeting_zh: 意大利威尼斯。第1天在威尼斯集合，开始一路南下至罗马的行程。

title_en: Italy Panorama 9-Day Group Tour: Milan to Rome & the Amalfi Coast
title_zh: 意大利全景9天跟团游：米兰至罗马及阿马尔菲海岸
short_en: A 9-day one-way journey from Milan to Rome through Venice, Florence, Cinque Terre, Tuscany, Capri and the Amalfi Coast.
short_zh: 9天单程深度游，从米兰一路畅游威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、托斯卡纳、卡普里岛与阿马尔菲海岸，终至罗马。
desc_en: This 9-day deep-dive tour traces Italy from north to south, one city a day, on a single one-way route that keeps coach time low and sightseeing high. Glide through romantic Venice, soak up the Renaissance soul of Florence, ride the scenic train along Cinque Terre, wander medieval Siena and the Val d'Orcia, and lose yourself in the eternal city of Rome. The journey ends in the south with the island of Capri's Blue Grotto, the cliffside villages of the Amalfi Coast, and the buried ancient city of Pompeii. With city-centre 4-star hotels, included attractions and ferries, and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver, it is an all-inclusive panorama of Italy.
desc_zh: 这条9天深度线路自北向南纵贯意大利，每天一座城市，全程单程不走回头路，大幅降低大巴行车里程、提升游览效率。漫游碧波上的浪漫水城威尼斯，感受文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨的艺术之魂，乘景观列车饱览悬崖渔村五渔村，探访中世纪古城锡耶纳与世界遗产奥尔恰山谷，再深度探访永恒之城罗马。行程南端深入卡普里岛蓝洞、阿马尔菲海岸的悬崖小镇，以及沉睡千年的庞贝古城。精选市中心四星酒店、含景点门票与出海轮渡、配中文司机兼导游，是一次税费全含的意大利全景之旅。

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, St Mark's Basilica and the Bridge of Sighs on the water city
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯：圣马可广场、圣马可大教堂与叹息桥

highlights.en: Florence, cradle of the Renaissance: the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria and the Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、市政广场与老桥

highlights.en: Scenic train ride through Cinque Terre's clifftop fishing villages, plus the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车畅游五渔村悬崖渔村，并游览比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Medieval Siena, the hilltop town of Pienza and World Heritage views over the Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 中世纪古城锡耶纳、山顶小城皮恩扎与世界遗产奥尔恰山谷美景

highlights.en: Eternal Rome on foot: the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步深度游永恒之城罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Capri island and the legendary Blue Grotto, with a boat cruise of the Amalfi Coast and Positano
highlights.zh: 卡普里岛与传奇蓝洞，出海环游阿马尔菲海岸与波西塔诺

highlights.en: The buried ancient city of Pompeii and the old town of Naples
highlights.zh: 沉睡千年的庞贝古城与那不勒斯老城

highlights.en: Brand promise: one-way deep route, city-centre 4-star hotels, included attractions & ferries, all taxes included, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 品牌承诺：单程深度线路、市中心四星酒店、含景点门票与出海轮渡、税费全含、绝无强制购物

includes.en: 8 nights in 4-star hotels (city-centre / well-located brand hotels)
includes.zh: 四星级酒店8晚（市中心或地理位置优越的品牌酒店）

includes.en: 8 hotel breakfasts (or equivalent meals)
includes.zh: 酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计8餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes and fees: city tourist tax, entry-to-town fees, accommodation tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Tour coach or business van transport between cities
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车的城际交通

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: business van with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Luggage allowance: 1 piece of 23 kg checked baggage plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Included activities & tickets: Cinque Terre scenic train, Venice island ferry, Sorrento–Amalfi coast boat cruise, Capri round-trip ferry, Pompeii entry ticket (with national-site interpreter)
includes.zh: 活动及门票：五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）

excludes.en: International flights and personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 国际段机票及个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist / Schengen visa fees for the countries visited
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家所需的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保单是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities to guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共计10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners other than the special meals listed in the itinerary (e.g. Venice's cuttlefish-ink pasta set menu is at own expense)
excludes.zh: 除行程内包含的特色餐外的午、晚正餐费用（如威尼斯墨鱼面三道式自理）

excludes.en: Entries to sights not marked as included, including all 'exterior view' sights and recommended / optional / experience items
excludes.zh: 未注明含费用的景点门票，包括所有标注"外观"的景点及"推荐""可选""体验"等项目

excludes.en: Capri Blue Grotto: rowboat boatman fee plus a customary EUR 2–5 tip; Blue Grotto may close in high tide, wind or rough seas
excludes.zh: 卡普里岛蓝洞：人力船工费及按当地习俗的2-5欧元小费；如遇涨潮、风浪等当地宣布关闭则无法入内

excludes.en: Capri island transport after landing (cable car / taxi on the ~1.3 km route), Venice gondola, restricted-zone sightseeing trains and electric taxis
excludes.zh: 卡普里岛登岛后交通（约1.3公里山路的缆车/出租车）、威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车及电瓶出租车等

excludes.en: Extended accommodation, personal spending (drinks, taxis, phone), optional / night activities and any item not listed as included
excludes.zh: 延长住宿、私人消费（饮料酒类、出租车、电话费）、自由活动及推荐项目等未包含费用

timeline.title_zh: 米兰（全天自由活动）
timeline.description_en: Free day in Milan. We suggest visiting the landmark Milan Cathedral (Duomo, exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. Meet the guide in the city centre and check in. Overnight at Royal Garden Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 米兰全天自由活动。建议自行参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。之后与导游在市区集合并入住酒店。夜宿皇家花园酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for the water city of Venice. Visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). You may also sample Venice's signature cuttlefish-ink pasta set menu (own expense). Overnight at voco Venice / Hilton Venice Ambassador or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观）。在此还可品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式（自理）。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Travel to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Tour the old town: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and Piazza & Basilica di Santa Croce (exterior). Overnight at Hilton Florence Metropole or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥，以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Visit Cinque Terre in the morning, riding the scenic train along the Ligurian coast past clifftop fishing villages. In the afternoon see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, then continue to Siena. Overnight at Four Points by Sheraton Siena or a similar 4-star hotel. Note: in bad weather or rail strikes the Cinque Terre visit may switch to coach or another coastal route.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线乘景观列车游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工等，行程将改为乘大巴或其他形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 皮恩扎 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Tour the old town of Siena: the Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall and Torre del Mangia (exterior). After lunch visit the hilltop town of Pienza, with Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), then drive to Rome with a photo stop on the famous cypress-lined lane of the Val d'Orcia. Overnight at Sheraton Roma / Mantegna or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等。午餐后前往皮恩扎古城，参观二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观），之后前往罗马，途中在奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径自由拍照。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马（永恒之城）
timeline.description_en: A guided walking tour of Rome, cradle of the ancient Roman Empire. See the Colosseum (exterior) and Pantheon (exterior) standing on the ruins of the ancient capital, and visit the Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (exterior). Free time afterwards, returning to the hotel around 16:30. The walk is about 5–6 km as central Rome is largely a pedestrian zone. Overnight at Sheraton Roma / Mantegna or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在导游带领下徒步游览历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国发祥地，被称为永恒之城。参观矗立在古都遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）。之后自由活动，约16:30返回酒店。罗马古城多为步行街区，当天徒步约5-6公里。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 那不勒斯/索伦托 → 卡普里岛 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Drive to Naples/Sorrento and take the ferry to Capri. On the island, stroll the seafront and visit the Blue Grotto, take a boat tour around the island, or explore Capri town and the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the bay. Return by ferry to Sorrento. Overnight at a Sorrento coast 4-star hotel. Note: getting around Capri is on your own (cable car / taxi on the ~1.3 km route, extra cost); the Blue Grotto is a natural site and may close in high tide or rough seas — boatman fee plus a customary EUR 2–5 tip are not included.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往那不勒斯/索伦托乘渡船抵达卡普里岛。当天可自行海边漫步后参观蓝洞，或乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行游览卡普里城中的奥古斯都花园俯瞰海湾；之后乘渡船返回索伦托码头入住酒店。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。备注：登岛后自由活动，约1.3公里山路的缆车/出租车需额外付费；蓝洞如遇涨潮、风浪可能关闭，人力船工费及2-5欧元小费不含。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 阿马尔菲 → 波西塔诺 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: A charming boat cruise exploring the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. Sail to the cliffside village of Positano, then on to Amalfi for a panorama of the coast's seaside towns, before cruising back. Overnight at a Sorrento coast 4-star hotel. Note: in extreme sea conditions the cruise is cancelled for safety; the day switches to a coach visit of Sorrento old town and the boat fee is refunded.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人的游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往悬崖村庄波西塔诺，再前往阿马尔菲欣赏海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回入住酒店。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于安全将取消出海，改为乘大巴参观索伦托老城，出海游船费用退还。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 庞贝 → 那不勒斯 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore the ruins of ancient Pompeii and the lost Pompeian civilisation. Continue to Naples to tour the old town, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon return to Rome, where the journey ends.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。之后前往那不勒斯游览老城、那不勒斯皇宫（外观）与新堡（外观）。下午返回罗马，在罗马结束美好行程。

meeting_en: Milan city centre — meet the guide in central Milan on Day 1 before hotel check-in. The tour ends in Rome.
meeting_zh: 米兰市区——第1天在米兰市区与导游集合后入住酒店。行程于罗马结束。

title_en: Grand Italy South & Sicily: 12-Day Venice to Palermo Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利南北两岛纵贯12天小团游：威尼斯到巴勒莫
short_en: A 12-day one-way deep dive across Italy from romantic Venice to Sicily's Palermo, with Tuscany 5-star stays, the Amalfi Coast, Pompeii and Mount Etna.
short_zh: 12天单程纵贯意大利，从浪漫水城威尼斯一路畅游至西西里巴勒莫，入住托斯卡纳五星酒店，遍览阿马尔菲海岸、庞贝古城与埃特纳火山。
desc_en: This 12-day one-way journey traces Italy from north to south and across two islands, pairing Renaissance art cities with the Mediterranean's most dramatic coastlines. Begin in romantic Venice and Tuscany, take in Florence and eternal Rome, then sweep down the Sorrento Peninsula, Amalfi Coast and Puglia's fairy-tale trulli towns. A ferry crossing brings you to Sicily for Mount Etna, Taormina, Syracuse, the Valley of the Temples and finally Palermo. With scenic-train and ferry rides, two nights in a 5-star Tuscan estate and seaside 4-star hotels, it is a slow, in-depth route that maximises sightseeing time.
desc_zh: 这条12天单程线路横跨意大利南北、纵览三海两岛，将文艺复兴艺术之都与地中海最壮丽的海岸线串联在一起。行程从浪漫的威尼斯与托斯卡纳启程，途经文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨与永恒之城罗马，随后南下索伦托半岛、阿马尔菲海岸与普利亚童话般的特鲁利蘑菇屋小镇。跨海渡轮带您登上西西里岛，探访埃特纳火山、陶尔米纳、锡拉库萨、神殿之谷,最终抵达巴勒莫。沿途搭乘景观列车与渡轮,入住托斯卡纳五星庄园酒店及海滨四星酒店,单程深度暢游,大幅增加游览时间。

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square and Basilica, the Bridge of Sighs and winding canals
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯：圣马可广场与大教堂、叹息桥与蜿蜒水巷

highlights.en: Two nights in a 5-star Tuscan estate SPA hotel in the wellness town of Montecatini
highlights.zh: 连住两晚托斯卡纳五星庄园SPA酒店，坐落于康养度假胜地蒙特卡蒂尼

highlights.en: Scenic train along the Cinque Terre cliffside fishing villages, plus the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 搭乘景观列车饱览五渔村悬崖渔村，并游览比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Florence and eternal Rome: the Duomo, Colosseum, Pantheon and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 佛罗伦萨与永恒之城罗马：圣母百花大教堂、斗兽场、万神殿与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast cruise to cliffside Positano, plus Pompeii and the island of Capri
highlights.zh: 阿马尔菲海岸游船前往悬崖小镇波西塔诺，并探访庞贝古城与卡普里岛

highlights.en: Puglia's UNESCO trulli town of Alberobello and the cave city of Matera
highlights.zh: 普利亚世界遗产蘑菇屋小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛与千年石窟之城马泰拉

highlights.en: Sicily in depth: Mount Etna, Taormina, Syracuse and the Valley of the Temples
highlights.zh: 深度畅游西西里：埃特纳火山、陶尔米纳、锡拉库萨与神殿之谷

highlights.en: All attractions and taxes included, no forced shopping, all-inclusive one-way deep route
highlights.zh: 门票税费全含、无强制购物、单程深度线路、一价全含

includes.en: Accommodation: 2 nights in a 5-star hotel and 9 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels (11 nights total)
includes.zh: 酒店：五星酒店2晚，舒适型四星酒店9晚，共计11晚住宿

includes.en: 11 breakfasts (in-hotel or equivalent)
includes.zh: 餐饮：酒店内早餐或其他形式早餐11餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes: city tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees
includes.zh: 税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内所有税费

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel van
includes.zh: 交通：旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout (groups of 8 or fewer travel by van with a guide-driver)
includes.zh: 导游：职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司兼导）

includes.en: Luggage allowance: one 23kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attractions and tickets: Venice island ferry, Cinque Terre scenic train, Rome Colosseum and Pantheon, Pompeii, Capri return ferry, Salerno-Positano boat, Maniace Castle, Taormina amphitheatre, Valley of the Temples
includes.zh: 活动及门票：威尼斯上岛船票、五渔村景观列车、罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、卡普里岛往返渡轮、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺船票、马尼亚切城堡、陶尔米纳圆形剧场、神殿之谷

excludes.en: International flights and the return flight from Palermo to your home city (no guide on board)
excludes.zh: 国际机票及巴勒莫返回所在城市的机票（航班无导游陪同）

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 签证：行程所列国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 小费：导游和司机小费共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners other than any special meals noted in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，不含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entries to sights not marked as included (including 'exterior view' sights and any recommended/optional/experience items), e.g. the Capri Blue Grotto and Etna summit cable car (Blue Grotto: a EUR 2-5 boatman tip is customary)
excludes.zh: 门票：未注明含费的景点（含标注“外观”及推荐/可选/体验等项目），如卡普里岛蓝洞、埃特纳火山登顶缆车（蓝洞除人力船工费外另付2-5欧小费）

excludes.en: Extra nights, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary, and personal expenses such as drinks
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外的住宿、交通、观光费用；私人消费如饮料酒水等

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Tour the floating city of Venice, viewing St Mark's Basilica and Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (exteriors). A local cuttlefish-ink pasta lunch is recommended before transferring to Tuscany. Overnight in a 5-star Tuscan estate SPA hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与总督宫（外观）；午餐推荐品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面，之后前往托斯卡纳入住五星庄园SPA酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Visit the Cinque Terre cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast in the morning, then see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli. Note: in bad weather or rail strikes the Cinque Terre may be visited by coach or another coastal route instead.
timeline.description_zh: 上午沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其他方式游览海岸城市。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 佛罗伦萨 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance: the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Transfer to Rome in the afternoon. Overnight in a 4-star Rome hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）；下午前往罗马入住四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 索伦托半岛
timeline.description_en: Discover Rome, the Eternal City: the Colosseum and Pantheon, plus the Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (exterior). Transfer to the Sorrento Peninsula. Note: Rome's old city is largely pedestrianised, so the day is a 5-6km walking tour. Overnight in a 4-star seaside hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览历史名城罗马，参观斗兽场、万神殿，游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），之后前往索伦托半岛入住四星海滨酒店。备注：罗马古城禁车，多为步行街区，当天徒步约5-6公里。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 庞贝 → 卡普里岛 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Explore the ruins of Pompeii in the morning, then stroll clifftop Sorrento before taking a ferry to the island of Capri for free time (optional Blue Grotto boat trip, island boat tour or the Gardens of Augustus). Return ferry to Sorrento. Overnight in a 4-star seaside hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨探访庞贝古城遗址，随后漫步海崖小城索伦托，之后乘渡船前往卡普里岛自由活动（可自费游览蓝洞、环岛或奥古斯都花园），再乘渡船返回酒店。备注：卡普里登岛后自由活动，蓝洞为自然景观，受潮汐风浪影响可能关闭，费用不含。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 波西塔诺 → 萨勒诺 → 巴里
timeline.description_en: Take a scenic boat cruise to cliffside Positano, the jewel of the Amalfi Coast, with its blue sea, white sands and colourful lanes. Cruise back to Salerno, then transfer to Bari. Overnight in a 4-star Bari hotel. Note: in extreme sea conditions the Positano cruise may be replaced by a coach visit to Salerno (cruise fee refunded).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后乘游船前往悬崖彩色小镇波西塔诺，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸明珠的蓝海白沙与浪漫街巷，随后乘船返回萨勒诺，之后前往巴里入住四星酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气取消出海，将改乘大巴参观萨勒诺，游船费用退还。

timeline.title_en: Bari → Polignano a Mare → Alberobello → Matera
timeline.title_zh: 巴里 → 滨海波利尼亚诺 → 阿尔贝罗贝洛 → 马泰拉
timeline.description_en: Tour Bari's old town and the Basilica of San Nicola (exterior), then visit clifftop Polignano a Mare above a turquoise bay. In the afternoon wander the UNESCO trulli stone houses of fairy-tale Alberobello. Transfer to Matera for the night. Overnight in a 4-star Matera hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览巴里市区与圣尼古拉大教堂（外观），随后前往依崖而建的绝美小镇滨海波利尼亚诺；下午走进童话般的阿尔贝罗贝洛，漫步联合国教科文世界遗产特鲁利石屋村落，之后前往马泰拉入住四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉 → 科森扎 → 墨西拿 → 卡塔尼亚
timeline.description_en: Explore Matera's ancient Sassi cave dwellings, stone churches and old monasteries. Continue to Cosenza's old town, then take the San Giovanni-Messina ferry across to Sicily, visiting Messina's old town en route. Overnight in a 4-star Catania hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午探访拥有数千年居住史的石头之城马泰拉，深入Sassi老城区，穿梭于石砌阶梯、洞穴教堂与古修道院之间；随后前往科森扎老城，乘圣乔瓦尼-墨西拿渡轮跨海至西西里，参观墨西拿老城，之后前往卡塔尼亚入住四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 → 陶尔米纳 → 埃特纳火山 → 卡塔尼亚
timeline.description_en: Visit the World Natural Heritage Mount Etna, exploring the volcanic landscape on foot (optional cable car to the summit), then the clifftop town of Taormina with Piazza IX Aprile and its Greek theatre. Return to Catania. Note: the summit cable car is not included and may close due to ash, weather or maintenance. Overnight in a 4-star Catania hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往世界自然遗产埃特纳火山，可自由参观火山景观或自费乘缆车登顶，随后前往陶尔米纳小镇，游览四月九日广场与希腊露天圆形剧场，当晚返回卡塔尼亚酒店。备注：本产品不含登顶缆车费用，缆车受火山灰、天气及检修等因素影响可能停运。

timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 → 锡拉库萨 → 卡塔尼亚
timeline.description_en: Visit Syracuse, setting of the film Malena and birthplace of Archimedes: Maniace Castle, the Fountain of Arethusa, Ortigia island and the Cathedral square. Return to Catania for free time among its elegant buildings, broad avenues and the Ionian Sea. Overnight in a 4-star Catania hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往《西西里岛的美丽传说》拍摄地、阿基米德故乡锡拉库萨，游览马尼亚切城堡、林仙泉、奥提伽岛与奥尔蒂贾大教堂广场；之后返回卡塔尼亚自由游览，欣赏典雅建筑、宽广大道与碧波荡漾的爱奥尼亚海。

timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 → 阿格里真托 → 切法卢 → 巴勒莫
timeline.description_en: Head to the ancient Greek town of Agrigento to tour its old town and the World Heritage Valley of the Temples, then continue via Cefalu to Palermo. Overnight in a 4-star Palermo hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往古希腊小镇阿格里真托，游览老城与世界遗产神殿之谷，随后经切法卢前往巴勒莫入住四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴勒莫 → 送机
timeline.description_en: Free time in Palermo's old town to visit the lively fish market, the Quattro Canti, the 12th-century Norman Palace (exterior) and the Teatro Massimo (exterior). The guide arranges one group airport transfer (around 16:00 local time) to conclude the trip. Note: Palermo's old town is a vehicle-restricted (ZTL) zone, so the day is a 3-4km walking tour and the onward flight is not included.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由游览巴勒莫老城区，拜访人文气息浓厚的老城鱼市，游览四角广场、1200年的诺曼皇宫（外观）与马西莫剧院（外观）等景点，随后导游统一安排一次送机（当地时间约16:00），结束愉快行程。备注：老城为车辆禁行区（ZTL），当天步行约3-4公里，不含巴勒莫返程机票。

meeting_en: Tour departs from Venice, Italy. Itinerary follows option A (start Venice, end Palermo); the reverse option B starts in Palermo and ends in Venice.
meeting_zh: 行程从意大利威尼斯出发。本行程为A线（去程威尼斯、回程巴勒莫结束）；B线为去程巴勒莫、回程威尼斯结束。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 10-Day One-Way Tour (Rome to Paris)
title_zh: 法意瑞10天跟团游（罗马至巴黎单程深度线）
short_en: A 10-day one-way escorted journey from Rome to Paris through Tuscany, the Italian lakes, the Swiss Alps and the French capital — travelling by coach and scenic rail, with 4-star hotels all included.
short_zh: 10天单程跟团之旅，从罗马一路深玩至巴黎，纵贯托斯卡纳、意大利名城、瑞士阿尔卑斯与法兰西首都，全程大巴与景观列车出行，四星酒店一价全含。
desc_en: This 10-day one-way tour traces a deep route from Rome to Paris, crossing Italy, Switzerland and France without backtracking. You roam the medieval art towns of Tuscany — Pienza, Siena, Pisa and Florence — ride the scenic train through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre, drift through romantic Venice, then climb into the Swiss Alps via Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken and the Jungfrau region around Lake Thun and Lake Brienz. The journey ends in Paris with an in-depth Louvre tour led by a French national museum guide, a Seine river cruise, and a visit to the Palace of Versailles. With one city explored each day in Italy, all four Swiss language regions crossed, branded 4-star hotels and all taxes included, it is an efficient, all-inclusive grand tour of three countries.
desc_zh: 这条10天单程线路从罗马深度玩到巴黎，贯穿意大利、瑞士与法国，全程不走回头路。你将漫游托斯卡纳的中世纪艺术古城——皮恩扎、锡耶纳、比萨与佛罗伦萨，乘景观列车探访悬崖上的五渔村，畅游浪漫水城威尼斯，再翻越阿尔卑斯山进入瑞士，途经苏黎世、卢塞恩、因特拉肯及图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间的少女峰地区。旅程在巴黎收尾，由法兰西国家博物馆讲解师带领深度参观卢浮宫，乘塞纳河游船，并游览凡尔赛宫。意大利每天一城、瑞士四大语区贯穿、品牌四星酒店加税费全含，是一趟高效又省心的三国深度大环线。

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Rome to Paris — no backtracking, less coach time, more sightseeing
highlights.zh: 罗马至巴黎单程深度线，不走回头路，大幅缩短大巴里程，看得更多

highlights.en: Medieval Tuscan art towns: Pienza, Siena, Pisa and Renaissance Florence
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳中世纪艺术古城：皮恩扎、锡耶纳、比萨与文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨

highlights.en: Scenic train through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车探访悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Romantic Venice — St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the canals
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯——圣马可广场、叹息桥与水巷风情

highlights.en: Swiss Alps highlights: Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken and the Jungfrau region
highlights.zh: 瑞士阿尔卑斯精华：苏黎世、卢塞恩、因特拉肯与少女峰地区

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre tour led by a French national museum guide, plus a Seine river cruise
highlights.zh: 法兰西国家博物馆讲解师深度讲解卢浮宫，并乘塞纳河游船

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels, all listed attractions and all taxes included — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星品牌酒店、所列景点与各项税费全含，绝无强制购物

highlights.en: Visit the Palace of Versailles and stroll Paris's Boulevard Haussmann fashion district
highlights.zh: 游览凡尔赛宫，漫步巴黎奥斯曼大街时尚街区

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels throughout
includes.zh: 全程市中心四星级酒店住宿

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver
includes.zh: 持证中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Intercity transport (coach and scenic rail as per itinerary)
includes.zh: 城际交通（按行程含大巴及景观列车）

includes.en: All listed attraction entries and the Cinque Terre scenic train
includes.zh: 所列景点门票及五渔村景观列车

includes.en: In-depth Louvre tour with a French national museum guide and Seine river cruise
includes.zh: 卢浮宫法兰西国家博物馆讲解师深度讲解及塞纳河游船

includes.en: All taxes and fees — all-inclusive pricing with no hidden costs
includes.zh: 各项税费全含，一价全含、绝无隐藏费用

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Visa fees
excludes.zh: 签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅行保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless noted
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐（特别注明者除外）

excludes.en: Optional activities: Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the top (EUR 230), First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round trip (EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）、菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费

excludes.en: Louvre in-house guide fee (EUR 10 per person, refunded when peak-season capacity limits prevent in-museum guiding)
excludes.zh: 卢浮宫馆内讲解费（10欧元/人，旺季因限流无法馆内讲解时退还）

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Meet in Rome in the morning and set off for the old town of Pienza, stopping for photos along the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia. Visit Pius II Square and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), then continue to Siena to see the Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the town hall and the Torre del Mangia. Overnight in Siena.
timeline.description_zh: 上午罗马集合，出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中在奥尔恰谷的丝柏树小径自由拍照。游览皮恩扎二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观），午餐后前往锡耶纳，参观锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。夜宿锡耶纳。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 比萨 → 五渔村 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli. Then travel to Cinque Terre and ride along the Ligurian coast to explore the beautiful cliffside fishing villages before checking in at Florence. (If weather or rail strikes prevent the Cinque Terre visit, the coast is toured by coach or other means.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，参观比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场。随后前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽漁村，之后入住佛罗伦萨。如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法前往五渔村，将改乘大巴或其它方式游览海岸城市。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Explore the birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). In the afternoon continue to Venice and check in. Overnight in Venice.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场、老桥及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观），之后前往威尼斯入住。夜宿威尼斯。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior), taking in the romance of this city built on water. In the afternoon travel to the fashion capital, Milan. Overnight in Milan.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观），尽享水上之城的浪漫风情，下午前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿米兰。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, see Milan's landmark Duomo (exterior) and the elegant Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon travel along the Alps to Zurich, visiting the Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse and the banks of the Limmat. Overnight in Zurich.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰地标米兰主教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街，并漫步利马特河畔。夜宿苏黎世。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 卢塞恩 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Travel to Lucerne for its lake scenery, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal water tower. Continue to the village of Lungern for its lake and alpine views, then head to Interlaken at the foot of the Jungfrau. Overnight near Sigriswil with mountain and lake views.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往卢塞恩，欣赏卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔；之后前往龙疆小镇欣赏龙疆湖与小镇风光，下午抵达少女峰山脚下的因特拉肯。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 少女峰 → 日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Take in Interlaken between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun. Choose one optional experience: a guided coach tour of the Grindelwald mountain scenery (included), the Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the Top of Europe (EUR 230), or the First-Grindelwald aerial gondola and Cliff Walk (EUR 70). Then continue to Geneva. Overnight in the Geneva area.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯。三选一自费/含项目：跟随导游乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景（费用包含）；或乘少女峰全景缆车登顶——欧洲之巅（230欧元）；或前往菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德乘空中贡多拉游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（70欧元）。随后前往日内瓦入住。夜宿日内瓦地区。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Stroll Geneva's Flower Bridge district full of local food and specialty shops, then visit the old town, the lakefront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau. In the afternoon travel by coach back to Paris. Overnight in Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览酒店旁的“花桥”区域，这里汇集日内瓦当地美食与特色商店，参观日内瓦老城、湖区、花钟与大喷泉；下午乘车返回巴黎。夜宿巴黎。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 卢浮宫 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning at the Louvre with an in-depth themed tour by a French national museum guide. In the afternoon visit Notre-Dame, Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde. Overnight in Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家博物馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解；下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）与战神广场，之后乘塞纳河游船经过荣军院、大小皇宫与协和广场。夜宿巴黎。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 凡尔赛 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore Paris's fashion heart along Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time at the Opéra (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. In the afternoon visit the Palace of Versailles southwest of the city, then return to Place d'Italie in Paris where the tour ends. No hotel tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街与皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爺等时尚街区；下午前往巴黎西南郊的凡尔赛宫游览，之后返回巴黎意大利广场结束行程。当天无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Rome — group meets in central Rome on the morning of Day 1 before departing for Pienza.
meeting_zh: 罗马——第1天上午在罗马市区集合，随后出发前往皮恩扎。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 11-Day Tour (One-Way: Rome to Paris)
title_zh: 法意瑞11天跟团游（罗马至巴黎单程深度线）
short_en: An 11-day one-way escorted journey from Rome to Paris through Italy's Renaissance cities, the Swiss Alps and France's grand capital.
short_zh: 11天罗马至巴黎单程跟团深度游，串联意大利文艺复兴名城、瑞士阿尔卑斯湖光山色与法兰西艺术之都。
desc_en: This 11-day one-way tour runs deep from Rome all the way to Paris, so you cover real ground instead of doubling back. In Italy you visit a different city almost every day — Rome, the Val d'Orcia and Siena, Pisa and the cliff-top fishing villages of Cinque Terre, Florence, Venice and Milan. Crossing the Alps you reach Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken at the foot of the Jungfrau, and lakeside Geneva, before finishing in Paris with the Louvre, a Seine cruise and the Palace of Versailles. Five guided history walks, four city strolls and a national-museum guide bring the route's art and heritage to life.
desc_zh: 这条11天单程线路从罗马一路深入直抵巴黎，单向行程大幅减少大巴折返里程。意大利段几乎每天一座城市——罗马、奥尔恰谷与锡耶纳、比萨与悬崖上的五渔村、佛罗伦萨、威尼斯、米兰；翻越阿尔卑斯山后抵达苏黎世、卢塞恩、少女峰脚下的因特拉肯及湖畔日内瓦，最终在巴黎以卢浮宫、塞纳河游船和凡尔赛宫收尾。全程5场深度历史讲解、4场城市漫步与国家博物馆讲解师，带你读懂沿途艺术与人文。

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Rome to Paris — no backtracking, far less coach mileage
highlights.zh: 罗马至巴黎单程深度线，无折返，大幅降低大巴行车里程

highlights.en: A different Italian city almost every day: Rome, Siena, Pisa, Cinque Terre, Florence, Venice, Milan
highlights.zh: 意大利每天一座城市：罗马、锡耶纳、比萨、五渔村、佛罗伦萨、威尼斯、米兰

highlights.en: Scenic train ride through Cinque Terre's cliff-top fishing villages along the Ligurian coast
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览利古里亚海岸悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Cross all four Swiss language regions — Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken and Geneva
highlights.zh: 贯穿瑞士四大语区深度游——苏黎世、卢塞恩、因特拉肯与日内瓦

highlights.en: Two glittering Alpine lakes at Interlaken with optional Jungfrau 'Top of Europe' ascent
highlights.zh: 因特拉肯两湖之间，可自费登顶少女峰“欧洲之巅”

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre tour with a French national-museum guide, plus a Seine river cruise
highlights.zh: 卢浮宫由法兰西国家馆讲解师深度讲解，并乘塞纳河游船游览巴黎

highlights.en: Baroque masterpiece: a visit to the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 参观巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: Centrally located 4-star hotels and all-inclusive pricing with no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 城区4星级精品酒店，全包价格，无强制购物

includes.en: Centrally located 4-star hotels (or equivalent) for 10 nights
includes.zh: 全程10晚城区4星级酒店（或同等级）

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 每日酒店早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide and driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程中文领队兼司机服务

includes.en: Intercity ground transport along the Rome-to-Paris route
includes.zh: 罗马至巴黎全程城际交通

includes.en: Cinque Terre scenic train ride
includes.zh: 五渔村景观列车

includes.en: Five in-depth guided history walks and four city strolls, with a national-museum guide for the Louvre
includes.zh: 5场深度历史讲解、4场城市漫步，卢浮宫国家博物馆讲解师

includes.en: Listed attraction entries and the optional 'dream slope' Grindelwald coach tour included on Day 8
includes.zh: 行程列明景点门票，含第8天格林德尔瓦尔德“梦幻山坡”乘车游览项目

includes.en: Applicable taxes
includes.zh: 相关税费

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 申根签证费

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless otherwise noted
excludes.zh: 正餐（午餐及晚餐），除非特别注明

excludes.en: Optional activities: Jungfrau panorama cable-car ascent (€230) or First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round trip (€70) on Day 8
excludes.zh: 自费项目：第8天少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）或菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返（70欧元）

excludes.en: Personal expenses and gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 个人消费及领队、司机小费

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and explore the Eternal City on foot with your guide, taking in the Colosseum and Pantheon (exteriors), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain. Free time follows before checking into your hotel. Note: Rome's historic centre is largely pedestrian, so the day involves about 5-6 km of walking.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，在导游带领下徒步游览永恒之城罗马，参观斗兽场、万神殿（外观）、西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉。之后自由活动并入住酒店。备注：罗马古城多为步行街区，当天步行约5-6公里。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Drive from Rome to the medieval hill town of Pienza, stopping for photos along the famous cypress-tree lane in the Val d'Orcia. See Pius II Square and Pienza Cathedral, then continue to Siena for the Cathedral, Piazza del Campo, the town hall and the Mangia Tower (exteriors).
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中在奥尔恰谷绝美的丝柏树小径自由拍照，游览皮恩扎二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）；随后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅及曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 比萨 → 五渔村 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Visit Pisa in the morning for the Leaning Tower and the Square of Miracles, then take the scenic train to explore Cinque Terre's beautiful cliff-top fishing villages along the Ligurian coast before checking in at Florence. (If weather or rail strikes prevent the Cinque Terre visit, the coast is toured by coach instead.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场；随后乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖上的五渔村，之后入住佛罗伦萨。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法前往五渔村，将改乘大巴游览海岸城市。）

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Explore the cradle of the Renaissance in Florence: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exteriors). Continue to Venice for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场、老桥及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Tour romantic Venice in the morning: St Mark's Basilica, St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (exteriors), all set among the city's winding canals. Then travel on to the fashion capital, Milan.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览浪漫水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）及华丽的总督宫（外观），漫步水巷之间。之后前往时尚之都米兰。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, see Milan's landmark Duomo (exterior) and the elegant Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon cross the Alps to Zurich for the Grossmünster (exterior), Lake Zurich, Bahnhofstrasse and a walk along the Limmat River.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰主教堂（外观）及埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街，漫步利马特河畔。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 卢塞恩 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Head to Lucerne for the lake's scenery, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower, then visit the idyllic village of Lungern and its lake. In the afternoon continue to Interlaken, the town at the foot of the Jungfrau.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔；随后前往世外桃源龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。下午前往少女峰脚下的因特拉肯。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 少女峰 → 日内瓦
timeline.description_en: Enjoy Interlaken between Lakes Brienz and Thun — stroll Höheweg and the village freely, or choose one optional activity: an included 'dream slope' Grindelwald coach tour, the Jungfrau panorama cable-car ascent to the Top of Europe (€230), or the First-Grindelwald aerial gondola to the First Cliff Walk (€70). Then transfer to Geneva.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯，可自由漫步何维克街与宁静村庄；并可三选一参加项目：含费用的格林德尔瓦尔德“梦幻山坡”乘车游览、自费少女峰全景缆车登顶“欧洲之巅”（230欧元），或自费菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（70欧元）。随后前往日内瓦。

timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Visit the Flower Bridge district by the hotel, full of local food and specialty shops, then explore Geneva's old town, the lakeside, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain. In the afternoon drive back to Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览酒店旁的“花桥”区域，云集当地美食与特色商店，参观日内瓦老城、湖区、花钟与大喷泉。下午乘车返回巴黎。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 卢浮宫 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning at the Louvre with an in-depth themed tour by a French national-museum guide. In the afternoon see Notre-Dame, the Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine river cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解；下午游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，并乘塞纳河游船游览荣军院、大小皇宫与协和广场（均为外观）。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 凡尔赛 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Paris's fashion district along Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time at the Opera House (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. In the afternoon visit the Palace of Versailles in the city's southwest suburbs, then return to Place d'Italie in Paris to end the tour.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街与皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爷百货等时尚街区。下午前往巴黎西南郊区游览凡尔赛宫，之后返回巴黎意大利广场结束行程。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in the morning in central Rome; tour ends in Paris (one-way route).
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——上午于罗马市区集合；行程在巴黎结束（单程线路）。

title_en: Italy in Depth: Rome to Venice 5-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利深度5天小团游（罗马至威尼斯）
short_en: A 5-day one-way journey from the Eternal City of Rome through Tuscany and the Cinque Terre to romantic Venice, with no backtracking.
short_zh: 5天单程深度之旅，从永恒之城罗马一路经托斯卡纳、五渔村抵达浪漫水城威尼斯，全程不走回头路。
desc_en: Travel one-way through the heart of Italy on this 5-day small-group tour, starting in the Eternal City of Rome and ending in romantic Venice. The route threads together Italy's classic highlights: ancient Roman ruins, the medieval art treasure of Siena and the Val d'Orcia, the cliffside fishing villages of the Cinque Terre reached by scenic train, the Renaissance splendour of Florence, and the waterways of Venice. Designed as a single deep route with no backtracking, the trip blends history, art and Mediterranean coastline, with nights in city-centre 4-star hotels throughout.
desc_zh: 这趟5天小团之旅以单程方式深入意大利腹地，从永恒之城罗马出发，最终抵达浪漫水城威尼斯。行程串联意大利经典亮点：古罗马遗迹、中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳与奥尔恰谷、乘景观列车前往的悬崖渔村五渔村、文艺复兴瑰宝佛罗伦萨，以及威尼斯纵横的水巷。行程设计为单程深度游览，不走回头路，融合历史、艺术与地中海海岸风光，全程入住城市四星级酒店。

highlights.en: Explore Rome, the "Eternal City" and cradle of the ancient Roman Empire, on foot
highlights.zh: 徒步深度探访“永恒之城”罗马，古罗马帝国的发祥地

highlights.en: See the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain in Rome
highlights.zh: 游览罗马斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Discover medieval Siena and the UNESCO Val d'Orcia, with cypress-lined lanes of Tuscany
highlights.zh: 探访中世纪古城锡耶纳与世界遗产奥尔恰谷，邂逅托斯卡纳绝美丝柏小径

highlights.en: Ride the scenic train through the cliffside fishing villages of the Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘坐景观列车游览悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Soak up Renaissance Florence: the Duomo, Ponte Vecchio and Piazza della Signoria
highlights.zh: 在文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨欣赏圣母百花大教堂、老桥与市政广场

highlights.en: Wander romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace
highlights.zh: 漫步浪漫威尼斯：圣马可广场、叹息桥与总督宫

highlights.en: One-way deep route with no backtracking, plus city-centre 4-star hotels throughout
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线不走回头路，全程入住城市四星级酒店

highlights.en: Chinese-speaking guide-driver, intercity transport and key attraction tickets all included
highlights.zh: 全程中文司导、城际交通与重点景点门票全含

includes.en: 4 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 四星级酒店住宿4晚

includes.en: 4 hotel breakfasts (or equivalent meals)
includes.zh: 酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计4餐

includes.en: City tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, tolls, parking and fuel surcharges, and guide/driver meal allowances
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费及司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Tour coach or business travel vehicle
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout (groups of 8 or fewer use a business vehicle with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游全程带领）

includes.en: Luggage allowance of one 23kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Cinque Terre scenic train and Venice island ferry tickets
includes.zh: 五渔村小火车、威尼斯登岛轮渡门票

excludes.en: International flights
excludes.zh: 国际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (confirm coverage of any high-risk activities)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10€ per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共计10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中不包含的午餐、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Optional activities and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自费项目及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and explore Rome on foot with your guide, the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire and the "Eternal City". See the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (all viewed from outside), then enjoy free time before checking in. Roman old-town streets are largely pedestrian, so the day involves roughly 5-6 km of walking.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后由导游带领徒步游览罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，被称为“永恒之城”。参观斗兽场、万神殿（均外观）、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），之后自由活动并入住酒店。罗马古城多为步行街区，当天步行约5-6公里。夜宿罗马四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Drive from Rome to the medieval hilltown of Pienza, stopping to photograph the famous cypress-lined lanes, then see Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior). After lunch continue to Siena to admire Siena Cathedral, the Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico and the Torre del Mangia (all exterior) before checking in.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往中世纪古城皮恩扎，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，游览二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）。午餐后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（均外观），之后入住酒店。夜宿锡耶纳四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 比萨 → 五渔村 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Travel to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, then ride the scenic train to the Cinque Terre, exploring the beautiful clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coast before checking in at Florence. If poor weather or rail strikes prevent the Cinque Terre visit, the coast is toured by coach or another means instead.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和奇迹广场。随后乘景观列车前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村，之后入住佛罗伦萨。如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，行程将改为乘大巴或其他形式游览海岸城市。夜宿佛罗伦萨四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore Renaissance Florence, visiting the Florence Cathedral (Santa Maria del Fiore, exterior), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and Piazza Santa Croce with its basilica (exterior). Continue to Venice in the afternoon and check in.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场、老桥，以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿威尼斯四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning in Venice visiting St Mark's Basilica, St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the magnificent Doge's Palace (all exterior). These waterborne palaces and winding canals capture Venice's lasting romance. The tour ends in Mestre.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建于水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷共同构成威尼斯久久难忘的浪漫风情。之后在梅斯特散团。

meeting_en: Rome city centre; group meets in the morning of Day 1 for a walking tour of central Rome.
meeting_zh: 罗马市中心；第1天上午集合，徒步游览罗马古城。

title_en: Classic Italy in 6 Days: Rome to Milan One-Way Deep Tour
title_zh: 意大利经典6天深度游：罗马至米兰单程之旅
short_en: A 6-day one-way journey from Rome to Milan through Tuscany, Cinque Terre, Florence and Venice, travelling by coach and scenic rail with city-centre 4-star hotels included.
short_zh: 6天单程深度游，从罗马一路向北穿越托斯卡纳、五渔村、佛罗伦萨与威尼斯直抵米兰，全程巴士搭配景观列车，含市中心四星酒店。
desc_en: This 6-day small-group tour traces Italy from south to north without backtracking, starting in the Eternal City of Rome and ending in fashion-capital Milan. Walk the ancient heart of Rome, photograph the cypress lanes of the Val d'Orcia and medieval Siena, ride the scenic train through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre, and immerse yourself in Renaissance Florence and romantic, canal-laced Venice. With intercity transport, listed attractions, daily breakfast and central 4-star hotels all included, it is a relaxed yet richly detailed introduction to classic Italy.
desc_zh: 这条6天精品小团行程自南向北贯穿意大利、全程不走回头路，从永恒之城罗马出发，到时尚之都米兰结束。漫步古罗马城区，在奥尔恰谷的丝柏小径与中世纪古城锡耶纳取景，乘景观列车游览悬崖渔村五渔村，再沉浸于文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨与碧波荡漾的水城威尼斯。城际交通、列出景点、每日早餐及市中心四星酒店全部包含，是一次轻松而细致深入的意大利经典之旅。

highlights.en: Walking tour of ancient Rome: Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步深度游览古罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Renaissance treasure-house Florence and Venice, the romantic 'Pearl of the Adriatic'
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴宝库佛罗伦萨与浪漫水城威尼斯——亚得里亚海明珠

highlights.en: Scenic train ride through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览悬崖渔村五渔村

highlights.en: Medieval Siena and the World Heritage Val d'Orcia cypress lanes around Pienza
highlights.zh: 中世纪古城锡耶纳与世界遗产奥尔恰谷皮恩扎丝柏小径

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Rome to Milan with no backtracking
highlights.zh: 罗马至米兰单程深度路线，不走回头路

highlights.en: Intercity coach transfers and scenic rail included; central 4-star hotels every night
highlights.zh: 含城际巴士接送及景观列车；每晚入住市中心四星酒店

highlights.en: All listed attractions included, with no forced shopping stops
highlights.zh: 所有列出景点全含，绝无强制购物

highlights.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 持证中文司机兼导游，一价全含

includes.en: 5 nights in 4-star city hotels
includes.zh: 四星级酒店住宿5晚

includes.en: 5 breakfasts (hotel breakfast or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店早餐或其他形式餐饮共计5餐

includes.en: Tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking, fuel and guide-driver meal allowance
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Tour coach or business van for all transfers
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout (groups of 8 or fewer: business van with combined guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，带领游览全部城市行程）

includes.en: Luggage allowance: one 23kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attraction entries: Cinque Terre scenic train and Venice island ferry
includes.zh: 门票：五渔村小火车、威尼斯登岛轮渡

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共计10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not listed in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中不包含的午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Optional activities and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自选活动及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and explore the Eternal City on foot with your guide, the birthplace of the Roman Empire. See the Colosseum and Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain, then enjoy free time. The day's walking covers roughly 5-6 km as Rome's old city is largely pedestrian. Overnight in a Rome 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后由导游带领徒步游览古罗马帝国发祥地、永恒之城罗马。参观斗兽场、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉，之后自由活动。罗马古城多为步行区，当天徒步约5-6公里。夜宿罗马四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Drive from Rome to the medieval town of Pienza, stopping for photos along the cypress lanes, then see Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior). After lunch continue to Siena to visit Siena Cathedral, Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Overnight in a Siena 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中在丝柏小径自由拍照，游览二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）。午餐后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。夜宿锡耶纳四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 比萨 → 五渔村 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli. Then explore Cinque Terre, the beautiful cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast. Overnight in a Florence 4-star hotel. (If bad weather or rail strikes prevent the Cinque Terre visit, the coast is toured by coach or other means.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场。之后沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村五渔村。夜宿佛罗伦萨四星级酒店。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其他形式游览海岸线城市。）

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour the cradle of the Renaissance, Florence: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church, exterior), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Then transfer to Venice. Overnight in a Venice 4-star hotel.
