timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨：参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场、老桥，以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿威尼斯四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Morning visit to St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the ornate Doge's Palace (exterior), where buildings rise from the water along winding canals. Then travel on to the fashion capital, Milan. Overnight in a Milan 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观），感受建于水上、水巷蜿蜒的威尼斯风情。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿米兰四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Milan's landmark Cathedral (Duomo, exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, before the tour concludes.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观），以及欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊，之后结束愉快行程。

meeting_en: Rome — meet in the morning in central Rome; the day-1 city tour is on foot (old city is pedestrian-only).
meeting_zh: 罗马——上午于罗马市区集合；第一天为徒步城市游览（古城为步行区）。

title_en: Italy in Depth: 12-Day Grand Tour from Rome (Tuscany, Dolomites & the Amalfi Coast)
title_zh: 意大利深度环游12日小团（罗马往返·托斯卡纳·多洛米蒂·阿马尔菲海岸）
short_en: A 12-day round-trip from Rome circling three seas and the Dolomites — Tuscany, Cinque Terre, Venice, Puglia, Matera, Positano and Capri.
short_zh: 12天罗马往返深度环线，串起三海一山——托斯卡纳、五渔村、威尼斯、普利亚、马泰拉、波西塔诺与卡普里岛。
desc_en: This 12-day small-group journey traces a complete loop of the Italian mainland from Rome, weaving together the Adriatic, Tyrrhenian and Ligurian seas with the soaring peaks of the Dolomites. From the eternal monuments of Rome you roll through the cypress-lined hills of Tuscany's Val d'Orcia and Renaissance Florence, on to fashionable Milan, Lake Garda and the alpine cable cars of Seceda, then romantic Venice. The route then heads deep into the sun-soaked south — Puglia's white trulli town of Alberobello, the cave dwellings of Matera, the lemon-scented cliffs of Positano and the Blue Grotto of Capri — before closing the circle through Pompeii and Naples back to Rome.
desc_zh: 这趟12天的精品小团从罗马出发，完成意大利大陆的一次完整环线，串联亚得里亚海、第勒尼安海、利古里亚海与多洛米蒂山。从罗马的永恒古迹启程，穿越托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷绵延的丝柏树丘陵与文艺复兴之城佛罗伦萨，再到时尚之都米兰、加尔达湖与多洛米蒂的刀锋山缆车，随后抵达浪漫水城威尼斯。行程接着深入阳光灿烂的南意——普利亚的白色蘑菇屋小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛、千年石窟古城马泰拉、檸檬飘香的波西塔诺悬崖小镇与卡普里岛蓝洞——最后经庞贝、那不勒斯返回罗马，画上完美句点。

highlights.en: Round-trip Italian grand loop: three seas (Adriatic, Tyrrhenian, Ligurian) plus the Dolomites in one deep route
highlights.zh: 罗马往返意大利大环线：一次行程畅游三海（亚得里亚海、第勒尼安海、利古里亚海）一山（多洛米蒂）

highlights.en: Tuscany's UNESCO Val d'Orcia, Pienza and Renaissance Florence with the Duomo and Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 世界遗产托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷、皮恩扎古城，文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨圣母百花大教堂与维奇奥桥

highlights.en: Dolomites by cable car — ride up Seceda (or Alpe di Siusi) over jagged peaks and alpine meadows
highlights.zh: 缆车直上多洛米蒂——登顶刀锋山（或休斯高原），俯瞰锯齿峰群与高山草甸

highlights.en: Cinque Terre scenic train along the Ligurian cliffs and a Capri ferry to the Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 五漁村景观列车沿利古里亚海崖行驶，卡普里岛渡船探秘蓝洞

highlights.en: Southern gems: Alberobello's trulli, Matera's Sassi cave town and a Positano boat cruise on the Amalfi Coast
highlights.zh: 南意精华：阿尔贝罗贝洛蘑菇屋、马泰拉Sassi石窟老城、阿马尔菲海岸波西塔诺出海游船

highlights.en: All flagship attractions included — Colosseum, Pantheon, Milan Cathedral, Pompeii and every listed entry and ferry
highlights.zh: 所有重点景点门票全含——罗马斗兽场、万神殿、米兰大教堂、庞贝古城及行程内所有门票与渡船

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (plus a 5-star Tuscan spa night) and a Mandarin-speaking guide-driver throughout
highlights.zh: 全程市中心四星酒店（含托斯卡纳五星SPA酒店1晚），中文司机兼导游贴心带领

highlights.en: All-inclusive small-group pricing (6-15 travellers) with daily breakfasts, taxes and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 6-15人精品小团全包价，含每日早餐与各项税费，绝无强制购物

includes.en: 11 nights of hotels: 1 five-star, 2 four-star in Sorrento, and 8 comfortable four-star hotels
includes.zh: 11晚酒店：五星酒店1晚、索伦托四星酒店2晚、舒适型四星酒店8晚

includes.en: 11 breakfasts (hotel breakfast or equivalent)
includes.zh: 11顿早餐（酒店内早餐或其他形式早餐）

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes: city/tourist tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Private business van or tour coach for all intercity transport
includes.zh: 商务旅行车或旅游巴士，承担全程城际交通

includes.en: Professional driver plus Mandarin-speaking guide, or a Mandarin-speaking guide-driver throughout (groups of 8 or fewer use a business van with a guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机＋中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车＋中文司机兼导游带领游览全部城市）

includes.en: Luggage allowance: 1 checked bag up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attraction entries & transport: Colosseum, Pantheon, Pompeii, Milan Cathedral, Seceda cable car, Cinque Terre scenic train, Venice island ferry, Salerno-Positano boat, Sorrento-Capri return ferry
includes.zh: 行程内活动及门票：罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、米兰大教堂、刀锋山缆车、五漁村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺出海轮渡、索伦托-卡普里岛往返渡船

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Passport fees and tourist/Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 护照费用及行程所列国家旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (confirm high-risk-activity coverage where relevant)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（涉及高风险活动请核实保险是否承保）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费：共10欧元/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners except any special meals stated in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内注明的特色餐外，行程中的午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entries for sights not marked as included, including all 'exterior view' sights and any 'recommended/optional/experience' items (e.g. Capri Blue Grotto boat fee, with a customary 2-5 EUR tip to the boatman)
excludes.zh: 未注明含门票的景点，包括所有标注“外观”的景点及“推荐/可选/体验”等项目（如卡普里岛蓝洞游船费，另按当地习俗付船工小费2-5欧元）

excludes.en: Extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing outside the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程外额外延长的住宿、交通及观光费用

excludes.en: Personal expenses (drinks, taxis, phone, etc.) and other local transport such as Venice gondolas or ZTL-zone shuttle trains/electric taxis
excludes.zh: 个人消费（饮料酒类、出租车、电话等）及其他交通，如威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车/电瓶出租车等

excludes.en: All free-time activities and recommended optional excursions and their associated costs
excludes.zh: 夜间自由活动及行程中推荐项目，以及由此产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 — 永恒之城
timeline.description_en: Begin in Rome, the cradle of the ancient empire. Tour the Colosseum and Pantheon, see the Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (exterior), then enjoy free time in the city before checking into your hotel. Note: Rome's historic centre is a vehicle-restricted (ZTL) walking zone, with about 5 km on foot.
timeline.description_zh: 上午开始游览古罗马帝国的发祥地、被称为“永恒之城”的罗马。参观斗兽场、万神殿，游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），随后自由参观市区，之后入住酒店。提示：罗马古城区属车辆禁行区（ZTL），当天为步行游览约5公里，请穿着轻便。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Drive into Tuscany to Pienza, stopping for photos along the famous cypress-tree lane, then visit Piazza Pio II and the Pienza Cathedral (exterior). Continue to Siena to see the Duomo (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the town hall and Torre del Mangia (exterior).
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马前往皮恩扎古城，途中在絲柏树小径自由拍照，游览二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观）。之后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 佛罗伦萨 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Head to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance, to admire the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria, Ponte Vecchio and Santa Croce (exterior). Overnight at a five-star spa hotel in the Tuscan wellness town of Montecatini.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、领主广场、维奇奥桥及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。之后入住托斯卡纳康养度假地蒙特卡蒂尼的五星SPA酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 比萨 → 五渔村 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Visit Pisa's Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, then ride the scenic train through the Cinque Terre cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast. Continue to Milan for the night (the coast is toured by coach if rail is disrupted by weather or strikes).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场。随后乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖上的五渔村，之后前往米兰入住酒店。如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其他形式游览海岸城市。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 加尔达湖 → 特伦托
timeline.description_en: Explore fashion capital Milan — Sforza Castle (exterior), the Milan Cathedral and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon take in the alpine lake scenery of Lake Garda before continuing to Trento for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往时尚之都米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观），游览米兰大教堂，漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后前往特伦托入住酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento → Bolzano → Ortisei → Val di Funes → Trento
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 → 博尔扎诺 → 奥蒂塞伊 → 富内斯山谷 → 特伦托
timeline.description_en: Stroll the old town of Bolzano, then from Ortisei ride the cable car up to Seceda for sweeping Dolomite views (or visit the Alpe di Siusi meadows). Photo-stop at the Church of St. John in Val di Funes before returning to Trento. (Cable cars may pause for extreme weather or maintenance; fees are refunded if closed.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午漫步博尔扎诺老城街巷。随后前往奥蒂塞伊小镇，可乘缆车登顶刀锋山俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，或前往休斯山高原草甸欣赏高山风光。之后前往富内斯山谷，外观打卡聖马达莱娜村的聖约翰教堂（孤独教堂），返回特伦托入住。（缆车如遇极端天气或检修将暂停，费用退还游客。）

timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 → 威尼斯 → 里米尼
timeline.description_en: Visit the water city of Venice — St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior). Continue to the Adriatic resort of Rimini, with free time to enjoy the lively nightlife and local cuisine.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往水城威尼斯，参观聖马可大教堂（外观）、聖马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观）。之后前往里米尼入住酒店，晚上自由游览市区，融入当地热闹的夜生活，品尝当地美食。

timeline.title_zh: 里米尼 → 佩斯卡拉 → 巴里
timeline.description_en: Travel south along the coast via the Adriatic seafood town of Pescara in Abruzzo. Arrive in Bari, Puglia, with free time to see the Basilica di San Nicola (exterior) or wander the cobbled old town and pedestrian shopping streets.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨从里米尼沿海南下，途经阿布鲁佐大区的佩斯卡拉。午后抵达普利亚大区巴里入住，自由参观聖尼古拉大教堂（外观），或漫步老城区石板街巷与购物步行街，感受南意的松弛感。

timeline.title_en: Bari → Polignano a Mare → Alberobello → Matera
timeline.title_zh: 巴里 → 滨海波利尼亚诺 → 阿尔贝罗贝洛 → 马泰拉
timeline.description_en: From Bari head to the clifftop town of Polignano a Mare, then the fairy-tale white trulli town of Alberobello (a UNESCO site). In the afternoon reach the ancient stone city of Matera to explore its Sassi cave-dwelling old town.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从巴里出发前往悬崖小镇滨海波利尼亚诺，随后前往童话白石小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛。下午抵达石头古城马泰拉，探索Sassi石窟老城区，深度漫步普利亚经典风光。

timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉 → 萨勒诺 → 波西塔诺 → 索伦托半岛
timeline.description_en: Drive to Salerno and cruise by boat to the colourful clifftop town of Positano, passing Amalfi, the jewel of southern Italy's coast. After strolling its beaches and lanes, return by boat to Salerno and continue to Sorrento for the night. (If the sea is closed for safety, Salerno or Sorrento old town is visited instead and the boat fee is refunded.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往萨勒诺，乘船游览波西塔诺，探索悬崖上的彩色小镇，途经南意海岸明珠阿马尔菲。漫步藍海、白沙与浪漫街巷后乘船返回萨勒诺，前往索伦托入住酒店。（如遇海上极端天气，出于安全考虑取消出海游览波西塔诺，改安排乘车参观萨勒诺或索伦托老城，出海费用退还游客。）

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托半岛 → 卡普里岛 → 索伦托半岛
timeline.description_en: Wander cliff-perched Sorrento, then take the ferry to the Mediterranean paradise of Capri. With free time on the island you can stroll the shore and visit the Blue Grotto, take a boat around the island, or head up to Capri town and the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) overlooking the bay, before ferrying back to Sorrento. (Capri activities are at your own arrangement; the Blue Grotto is a natural site that may close for tides or waves.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往索伦托，漫步建于海濱峭壁上的小城，随后坐渡船前往卡普里岛。岛上自由活动：可海边漫步后游览蓝洞，或乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城游览奥古斯都花园（外观）俯瞰海湾，之后乘渡船返回索伦托乘车回酒店。（卡普里岛登岛后自由活动，不含岛上交通；蓝洞为自然景观，如遇涨潮风浪可能关闭。）

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 庞贝 → 那不勒斯 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore the ruins of Pompeii, then visit the old town of Naples with the Royal Palace (exterior) and Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon transfer to Rome, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。之后前往那不勒斯游览老城，参观那不勒斯皇宫（外观）与新堡（外观）。下午返回罗马，结束愉快旅程。

meeting_en: Tour begins and ends in Rome, Italy. Day 1 sightseeing starts in central Rome (a vehicle-restricted ZTL walking zone); the tour concludes back in Rome on Day 12.
meeting_zh: 行程在意大利罗马出发并返回。第1天于罗马市中心开始游览（古城为车辆禁行ZTL步行区），第12天返回罗马结束行程。

title_en: Italy Panorama: 8-Day Tour from Rome to Venice
title_zh: 意大利全景8天跟团游（罗马进威尼斯出）
short_en: An 8-day one-way Italy journey from Rome to Venice via Capri, the Amalfi Coast, Pompeii, Tuscany, Cinque Terre and Florence.
short_zh: 8天意大利单程深度游，从罗马一路玩到威尼斯，途经卡普里岛、阿马尔菲海岸、庞贝、托斯卡纳、五渔村与佛罗伦萨。
desc_en: Travel one-way across Italy from the Eternal City of Rome to the romantic canals of Venice on this 8-day small-group tour. Discover the Mediterranean paradise of Capri and its Blue Grotto, cruise the dramatic Amalfi Coast past Positano, walk the ruins of Pompeii, and lose yourself in medieval Siena, the Val d'Orcia, the cliffside villages of Cinque Terre and Renaissance Florence. With city-centre 4-star hotels, included attractions and ferries, and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout, this deep one-way route keeps daily driving short and the sightseeing rich.
desc_zh: 8天单程深度游，从永恒之城罗马一路向北直抵浪漫水城威尼斯。探访地中海天堂卡普里岛与神秘蓝洞，乘船环游壮美的阿马尔菲海岸与悬崖小镇波西塔诺，走进沉睡千年的庞贝古城，徜徉于中世纪古城锡耶纳、奥尔恰谷、悬崖渔村五渔村以及文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨。全程入住市中心四星级酒店，门票与海上渡轮全含，配中文司机兼导游，单程深度路线大幅缩短行车里程，让游览更从容、更尽兴。

highlights.en: Explore Rome, the "Eternal City" and cradle of the Roman Empire, on a guided walk
highlights.zh: 徒步深度探访古罗马帝国发祥地、永恒之城罗马

highlights.en: Discover Capri's world-famous Blue Grotto, one of the world's natural wonders
highlights.zh: 探秘卡普里岛蓝色奇观蓝洞，世界自然奇景之一

highlights.en: Cruise the Amalfi Coast and the cliffside village of Positano
highlights.zh: 出海环游世界遗产阿马尔菲海岸与悬崖小镇波西塔诺

highlights.en: Walk the ruins of Pompeii, the city buried by Vesuvius
highlights.zh: 走进被维苏威火山掩埋的庞贝古城遗址

highlights.en: Medieval Siena and the UNESCO landscapes of the Val d'Orcia and Pienza
highlights.zh: 中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳与世界遗产奥尔恰谷、皮恩扎

highlights.en: Ride the scenic train through the colourful villages of Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览五彩斑斓的悬崖渔村五渔村

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence and the romantic canals of Venice
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨与浪漫水城威尼斯

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: city-centre 4-star hotels, ferries, attractions and taxes, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 税费全含、绝无强制购物：市中心四星级酒店、海上渡轮、门票及各项税费全含

includes.en: 7 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 四星级酒店住宿7晚

includes.en: 7 breakfasts or equivalent meals (in-hotel breakfast or other form)
includes.zh: 酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计7餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes and fees (city tax, entry tolls, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees)
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费（游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等）

includes.en: Tourist coach or business travel vehicle for intercity transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout (groups of 8 or fewer use a business vehicle with a guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece of 23 kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Sorrento-Amalfi boat tour, Capri round-trip ferry, Venice island ferry, Cinque Terre scenic train, and Pompeii entry (with national-site guide)
includes.zh: 活动及门票：索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）

excludes.en: International flights
excludes.zh: 国际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees for the countries visited
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-sport coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共计10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 行程内午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entries to sights not noted as included (including "exterior view" sights and any "recommended", "optional" or "experience" items)
excludes.zh: 未注明包含的景点门票（含标注"外观"的景点及"推荐""可选""体验"等项目）

excludes.en: Blue Grotto visit (natural site, may close in high tide/wind; tip the boatmen 2-5 EUR per local custom)
excludes.zh: 卡普里蓝洞游览（自然景观，遇涨潮或风浪可能关闭；除船工费外按当地习俗付2-5欧小费）

excludes.en: Capri island local transport (cable car, taxi); recommended port-old town-Gardens of Augustus route ~1.3 km
excludes.zh: 卡普里岛登岛后当地交通（缆车、出租车），推荐路线大港-古城-奥古斯都花园约1.3公里

excludes.en: Other transport not listed (e.g. Venice gondola, restricted-zone tourist trains/electric taxis)
excludes.zh: 未提及的其他交通费（如威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车、电瓶出租车等）

excludes.en: Extended accommodation, personal spending, free-time activities and any other unlisted costs
excludes.zh: 额外延长住宿、私人消费、自由活动及其他未提及的费用

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and set off on a guided walking tour of Rome, the cradle of the Roman Empire and the "Eternal City". See the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), then enjoy free time. The historic centre is largely pedestrianised, so the day involves about 5-6 km of walking. Overnight in a Rome 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，在导游带领下徒步游览古罗马帝国发祥地、永恒之城罗马。参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观），之后自由活动。古城多为步行街区，全天步行约5-6公里。夜宿罗马4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 索伦托 → 卡普里岛 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to Naples/Sorrento and ferry to the island of Capri, a Mediterranean paradise prized since Roman times. At leisure, stroll the seafront, explore the Blue Grotto by boat, or visit the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the bay, then ferry back to Sorrento. Overnight on the Sorrento coast (4-star).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往那不勒斯/索伦托，乘渡船抵达地中海天堂卡普里岛。自由活动，可海边漫步、乘船探秘蓝洞，或前往奥古斯都花园俯瞰整个海湾，之后乘渡船返回索伦托。夜宿索伦托海岸4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 阿马尔菲 → 波西塔诺 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Set off on a scenic boat day tour of the Amalfi Coast, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Sail to the cliffside village of Positano, then on to Amalfi for panoramic coastal views before returning by boat. (In extreme sea conditions the cruise is replaced by a coach visit to Sorrento old town.) Overnight on the Sorrento coast (4-star).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人游船一日游，探索世界遗产阿马尔菲海岸。乘船前往悬崖小镇波西塔诺，再前往阿马尔菲欣赏海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回。（如遇海上极端天气，将改为乘大巴游览索伦托老城。）夜宿索伦托海岸4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 庞贝 → 那不勒斯 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore the ruins of Pompeii, the ancient city buried by Vesuvius in AD 79. Continue to Naples to see the old town, the Royal Palace (exterior) and Castel Nuovo (exterior), then transfer back to Rome. Overnight in a Rome 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索沉睡千年的庞贝古城遗址。之后前往那不勒斯游览老城、那不勒斯皇宫（外观）和新堡（外观），下午返回罗马入住酒店。夜宿罗马4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Depart Rome for the Tuscan town of Pienza, pausing for photos along the famous cypress-lined lane. Visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), then continue to Siena to see the Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Overnight in a Siena 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中在絲柏树小径自由拍照，游览皮恩扎二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）。之后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅（外观）和曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。夜宿锡耶纳4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 比萨 → 五渔村 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit Pisa for the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, then head to Cinque Terre to ride the scenic train along the Ligurian coast and explore its colourful cliffside fishing villages. (Bad weather or rail strikes may switch this to a coach coastal visit.) Overnight in a Florence 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和奇迹广场。之后前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线乘景观列车游览悬崖上五彩斑斓的美丽渔村。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工，将改为乘大巴等方式游览海岸城市。）夜宿佛罗伦萨4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Explore Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance: visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and the Basilica and Piazza di Santa Croce (exterior). Then transfer to Venice for the night (4-star).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场、老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿威尼斯4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior), soaking up the romance of this city built on water. The tour ends with disbandment in Mestre.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）和华丽的总督宫（外观），感受这座水上之城久久不散的浪漫风情。之后在梅斯特散团。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in the morning to begin the guided walking tour of the city centre.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——上午集合，开始罗马市中心徒步导览。

title_en: Italy Grand Tour: Rome to Milan, 9 Days
title_zh: 意大利全景9天跟团游（罗马进米兰出）
short_en: A one-way 9-day journey from Rome to Milan through the Amalfi Coast, Capri, Pompeii, Tuscany, the Cinque Terre, Florence and Venice.
short_zh: 罗马进、米兰出的9天单程深度游，串联阿马尔菲海岸、卡普里岛、庞贝、托斯卡纳、五渔村、佛罗伦萨与威尼斯。
desc_en: Travel the length of Italy in one seamless direction, from the eternal city of Rome up to fashion-capital Milan. This 9-day escorted tour pairs the southern coast's Capri Blue Grotto, the Amalfi clifftop villages and the buried city of Pompeii with the Renaissance heartlands of Tuscany, the cliffside Cinque Terre fishing villages, Florence and the canals of Venice. With one city per day, a one-way deep route that minimises backtracking, brand 4-star hotels and city walks led by officially-licensed guides, it delivers Italy's greatest hits without the rush.
desc_zh: 沿着意大利国土单程北上，从永恒之城罗马一路抵达时尚之都米兰。这趟9天跟团游将南部海岸的卡普里岛蓝洞、阿马尔菲悬崖小镇与被火山掩埋的庞贝古城，与托斯卡纳的文艺复兴腹地、悬崖上的五渔村、佛罗伦萨以及威尼斯水城串联在一起。每天一座城市，单程深度路线大幅减少回头路，搭配品牌四星酒店与官方认证导游带领的城市漫步，让您从容饱览意大利精华。

highlights.en: Explore Rome on foot — Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步深度游览罗马——斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Capri island and the world-famous Blue Grotto in the Mediterranean
highlights.zh: 地中海明珠卡普里岛，探秘世界奇景蓝洞

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast boat cruise to clifftop Positano and Amalfi
highlights.zh: 阿马尔菲海岸出海游船，停靠悬崖小镇波西塔诺与阿马尔菲

highlights.en: Pompeii archaeological site with included entry and expert guide
highlights.zh: 庞贝古城遗址，含门票及国家馆讲解师

highlights.en: Tuscany's Val d'Orcia cypress lanes, Pienza and medieval Siena
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷绝美田园、皮恩扎与中世纪古城锡耶纳

highlights.en: Cinque Terre by scenic train along the Ligurian coast, plus the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 搭乘景观列车游利古里亚海岸五渔村，途经比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Florence, cradle of the Renaissance, and the romantic canals of Venice
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴摇篮佛罗伦萨，以及浪漫的威尼斯水城

highlights.en: All-inclusive one-way route: flights & rail you arrange, but all listed attractions, ferries and taxes are included — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 全含单程路线：行程内所有景点门票、出海轮渡及税费全包，绝无强制购物

includes.en: 8 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 四星级酒店住宿8晚

includes.en: 8 breakfasts (hotel breakfast or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计8餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes — city tax, entry-permit fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls and island-landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Coach or business travel vehicle for all transfers
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: business vehicle with a combined Chinese-speaking driver-guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司兼导）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 checked bag up to 23kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Included activities & entries: Sorrento–Amalfi boat cruise, Capri round-trip ferry, Venice island ferry, Cinque Terre scenic train, Pompeii entry (with national-site guide)
includes.zh: 活动及门票：索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）

excludes.en: International flights and intercity rail to join/leave the tour
excludes.zh: 国际机票及往返集合地的城际交通

excludes.en: Passport and tourist/Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 护照及旅游观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否涵盖）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: €10 per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费共计10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners throughout the tour
excludes.zh: 行程内午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entries to sights not marked as included — incl. all 'exterior view' sights and any 'recommended', 'optional' or 'experience' items; e.g. Capri Blue Grotto boatman fee plus a €2–5 tip
excludes.zh: 未注明含费的景点门票（含所有标注“外观”及“推荐”“可选”“体验”项目），如卡普里岛蓝洞人力船工费及2-5欧小费

excludes.en: Other local transport not listed — e.g. Venice gondola, restricted-zone tourist trains or electric taxis
excludes.zh: 费用未提及的其他交通，如威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车或电瓶出租车

excludes.en: Personal expenses, free-time activities, extended stays and any force-majeure costs
excludes.zh: 个人消费、自由活动、行程外延长住宿及不可抗力产生的额外费用

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and walk the historic centre of Rome, the 'eternal city' and birthplace of the Roman Empire. View the Colosseum, the Pantheon, the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (all exterior), then free time. The day involves about 5–6 km of walking, as the old city is largely pedestrianised.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，由导游带领徒步游览罗马历史名城——古罗马帝国发祥地、被称为“永恒之城”。参观斗兽场、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），之后自由活动。罗马古城多为步行街区，当天徒步约5-6公里。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 索伦托 → 卡普里岛 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Naples/Sorrento and take the ferry to Capri. Stroll the seafront, optionally explore the Blue Grotto by boat, or visit the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the bay, before returning by ferry to Sorrento. Note: on-island activities are free time at your own cost; the Blue Grotto may close in high tide or rough seas.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往那不勒斯/索伦托，乘渡船登卡普里岛。可海边漫步、自行乘船探秘蓝洞，或前往奥古斯都花园俯瞰海湾，之后乘渡船返回索伦托入住。备注：登岛后为自由活动、费用自理；蓝洞如遇涨潮或风浪可能关闭。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 阿马尔菲 → 波西塔诺 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: A scenic boat cruise along the Amalfi Coast. Sail to the clifftop village of Positano, then on to Amalfi for sweeping coastal views, before cruising back to Sorrento. In extreme sea conditions the cruise may be replaced by a coach tour of Sorrento's old town, with the boat fee refunded.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人的游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸。乘船前往悬崖村庄波西塔诺，再驶向阿马尔菲欣赏海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回索伦托。如遇海上极端天气，将改为大巴游览索伦托老城，并退还出海费用。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 庞贝 → 那不勒斯 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore the ruins of ancient Pompeii, buried by the eruption of Vesuvius and rediscovered after a thousand years. Continue to Naples to see the old town, the Royal Palace and Castel Nuovo (exterior), then return to Rome for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探访被维苏威火山掩埋、千年后重见天日的庞贝古城遗址。之后游览那不勒斯老城、那不勒斯皇宫（外观）与新堡（外观），下午返回罗马入住。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Drive into Tuscany for Pienza, stopping for photos along the famous cypress lanes of the Val d'Orcia. Visit Pius II Square and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), then continue to medieval Siena to see the Cathedral, Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall and the Mangia Tower (all exterior).
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中在奥尔恰谷绝美的丝柏树小径自由拍照，游览皮恩扎二世广场与大教堂（外观）。之后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 比萨 → 五渔村 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Visit Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Square of Miracles. Then explore the Cinque Terre, the colourful clifftop fishing villages strung along the Ligurian coast, before checking in at Florence. In bad weather or rail strikes, the coast is toured by coach instead.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与历史文化中心奇迹广场。之后沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖上的五彩渔村五渔村，再入住佛罗伦萨。如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工，将改乘大巴等方式游览海岸城市。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Discover Florence, cradle of the Renaissance: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest, exterior), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and the Basilica of Santa Croce and its square (exterior). Then travel on to Venice for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场、老桥、圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Tour Venice in the morning: St Mark's Basilica, St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (all exterior), where palaces rise from the water along winding canals. Afterwards, travel to fashion-capital Milan for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观），水上建筑与蜿蜒水巷尽显浪漫风情。之后前往时尚之都米兰入住。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, see Milan's landmark Gothic Cathedral (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, before the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰地标米兰大教堂（外观）与欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊，之后结束愉快行程。

meeting_en: Rome — the group meets in central Rome on the morning of Day 1 for the walking tour; the tour ends in Milan.
meeting_zh: 罗马——第1天上午在罗马市区集合开始徒步游览，行程于米兰结束。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland in Depth: 14-Day Small-Group Tour (Rome to Paris)
title_zh: 法意瑞深度14天精品小团游（罗马至巴黎）
short_en: A one-way 14-day small-group journey from Rome to Paris across the Amalfi Coast, Tuscany, Venice, the Swiss Alps and Burgundy — all-inclusive pricing.
short_zh: 14天罗马至巴黎单程深度小团，畅游阿马尔菲海岸、托斯卡纳、威尼斯、瑞士阿尔卑斯与勃艮第，一价全含。
desc_en: This 14-day small-group tour traces a single deep one-way route from Rome to Paris through three of Europe's most beloved countries. Begin on Italy's sun-drenched south with the Amalfi Coast, Capri's Blue Grotto and Sorrento, then wind through medieval Tuscany, Florence, Cinque Terre and Venice. Cross the Alps into Switzerland for the GoldenPass scenic railway, the Jungfrau region and the Lake Geneva shoreline, before finishing in France with Burgundy's wine country, Versailles and the Louvre. With city-centre hotels, scenic rail, included attractions and an all-inclusive price, it's an unhurried, culture-rich grand tour.
desc_zh: 这条14天精品小团沿单程深度路线，从罗马一路畅游至巴黎，串联欧洲三大经典国度。旅程始于阳光灿烂的意大利南部——阿马尔菲海岸、卡普里岛蓝洞与索伦托，随后穿越中世纪托斯卡纳、佛罗伦萨、五渔村与威尼斯。翻越阿尔卑斯进入瑞士，乘金色山口观光列车，畅游少女峰地区与日内瓦湖岸；最后抵达法国，品味勃艮第酒乡，深度游览凡尔赛宫与卢浮宫。全程市中心酒店、观光列车、门票全含，一价全含，从容而充满文化底蕴。

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast boat cruise to Positano and Amalfi, plus Capri island and its famed Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 乘船环游阿马尔菲海岸，探访波西塔诺与阿马尔菲，畅游卡普里岛及著名蓝洞

highlights.en: Medieval Tuscany: Pienza, Siena, San Gimignano's towers, Florence and the Cinque Terre scenic train
highlights.zh: 中世纪托斯卡纳：皮恩扎、锡耶纳、圣吉米尼亚诺塔楼、佛罗伦萨与五渔村观光小火车

highlights.en: Venice's St Mark's Square and Grand Canal, then fashion-capital Milan and its Duomo
highlights.zh: 威尼斯圣马可广场与大运河，再到时尚之都米兰及其大教堂

highlights.en: GoldenPass scenic railway through the Swiss Alps and the Jungfrau region
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口观光列车穿越瑞士阿尔卑斯，畅游少女峰地区

highlights.en: Lake Geneva shoreline, Lausanne, Montreux and the Chillon Castle, with a 5-star Relais & Chateaux château stay
highlights.zh: 日内瓦湖岸、洛桑、蒙特勒与西庸城堡，入住5星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店

highlights.en: Burgundy wine route with a vineyard estate visit and tasting near Dijon
highlights.zh: 勃艮第红酒之路，参观第戎附近名庄酒窖并品鉴美酒

highlights.en: Two deep days in Paris with national-museum guides at Versailles and the Louvre
highlights.zh: 巴黎两天深度行程，法兰西国家博物馆讲解师深度讲解凡尔赛宫与卢浮宫

highlights.en: All-inclusive small-group format: flights & scenic rail, city-centre 4-star hotels, all listed attractions, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含精品小团：含机票与观光列车、市中心四星酒店、全部所列景点门票、无强制购物

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (with a 5-star Relais & Chateaux château and a Tuscan villa) throughout
includes.zh: 全程市中心四星级酒店（含5星罗莱夏朵古堡及托斯卡纳庄园酒店）

includes.en: Daily hotel breakfast
includes.zh: 每日酒店早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver with private vehicle and 7x24 concierge service
includes.zh: 持证中文导游兼司机、专车专导及7x24小时管家服务

includes.en: Intercity ground transport and the Amalfi Coast boat cruise
includes.zh: 城际地面交通及阿马尔菲海岸出海游船

includes.en: GoldenPass scenic train ride through the Swiss Alps
includes.zh: 金色山口观光列车体验

includes.en: All listed attraction entries, with national-museum guides at Versailles and the Louvre
includes.zh: 全部所列景点门票，含凡尔赛宫与卢浮宫国家博物馆讲解师深度讲解

includes.en: Seine River cruise in Paris
includes.zh: 巴黎塞纳河游船

includes.en: All taxes, attraction tickets and listed experience activities (all-inclusive pricing)
includes.zh: 各项税费、景点门票及所列体验活动（一价全含）

excludes.en: International flights to Rome and home from Paris
excludes.zh: 往返国际机票（抵达罗马、离开巴黎）

excludes.en: Visa fees and travel insurance
excludes.zh: 签证费用与旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless noted
excludes.zh: 午餐与晚餐（特别注明者除外）

excludes.en: Optional activities: Interlaken paragliding (EUR 220), Jungfrau panorama summit cable car (EUR 230), First-Grindelwald aerial gondola return (EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：因特拉肯高空滑翔伞（220欧元）、少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）、菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）

excludes.en: Capri Blue Grotto entry and boatman fees (incl. customary EUR 2-5 tip), and any cable car/taxi on Capri
excludes.zh: 卡普里岛蓝洞门票及船工费（含当地惯例2-5欧元小费），及卡普里岛缆车/出租车费用

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide-driver and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 导游司机小费及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Meet in Rome and explore the Eternal City on foot, viewing the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (exteriors). Transfer to a seafront 4-star hotel in Sorrento for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 罗马集合，徒步深度游览古罗马，观赏斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）。下午前往索伦托，入住海景四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 阿马尔菲海岸出海（波西塔诺与阿马尔菲）
timeline.description_en: Set out on a boat cruise along the UNESCO-listed Amalfi Coast, calling at the clifftop village of Positano and the seaside town of Amalfi before returning to Sorrento for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 乘游船一日游探索世界文化遗产阿马尔菲海岸，停靠悬崖小镇波西塔诺，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸全景，之后返回索伦托住宿。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 那不勒斯 - 卡普里岛 - 罗马
timeline.description_en: Ferry from Naples to Capri for free time to explore the island, the Blue Grotto or the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the bay. Return ferry to Naples, then transfer to Rome to check in.
timeline.description_zh: 从那不勒斯乘渡船登卡普里岛，自由活动，可探秘蓝洞或游览奥古斯都花园俯瞰海湾。之后乘渡船返回那不勒斯，前往罗马入住酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Pienza - Siena - San Gimignano - Florence
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 皮恩扎 - 锡耶纳 - 圣吉米尼亚诺 - 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Travel through Tuscany visiting Pienza and the Val d'Orcia cypress lanes, the medieval city of Siena with its Piazza del Campo, and the tower town of San Gimignano. Overnight in a Tuscan villa hotel near Florence.
timeline.description_zh: 穿越托斯卡纳，游览皮恩扎与奥尔恰谷丝柏小径、中世纪锡耶纳古城与田野广场，以及万塔之城圣吉米尼亚诺。入住佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳庄园酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 五渔村 - 比萨 - 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Ride the scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliffside fishing villages of the Cinque Terre, then visit Pisa's Leaning Tower and Piazza dei Miracoli before returning to the Tuscan villa.
timeline.description_zh: 乘五渔村景观火车沿利古里亚海岸，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村，下午前往比萨参观比萨斜塔与奇迹广场，之后返回托斯卡纳庄园酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Discover Renaissance Florence: the Duomo (Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazzale Michelangelo for sweeping city views. Continue to Venice for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 游览文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥及米开朗琪罗广场登高俯瞰全城。随后前往威尼斯入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 米兰
timeline.description_en: Free time in Venice to take in St Mark's Basilica and Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (exteriors) amid the canals. Afternoon transfer to Milan for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 威尼斯自由游览圣马可大教堂与广场、叹息桥及总督宫（外观），漫步水城运河。下午前往米兰入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: See Milan's landmark Duomo and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, then cross the Alps to Zurich for its old town, Lake Zurich, Lindenhof and a stroll along the Limmat River.
timeline.description_zh: 游览米兰标志性大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊，之后沿阿尔卑斯前往瑞士苏黎世，参观老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园并漫步利马特河畔。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 卢塞恩 - 龙疆 - 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Explore Lucerne with the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower, then ride the GoldenPass scenic train over the mountains to Lungern and visit the town of Interlaken. Overnight near Meiringen.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览卢塞恩，观赏狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，之后乘金色山口观光列车穿山越岭前往龙疆，游览龙疆湖与因特拉肯小镇。夜宿迈林根。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰地区 - 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Head into the Jungfrau region, taking in the red Swiss trains at Wilderswil, the storybook scenery of Lauterbrunnen and Grindelwald at the foot of the peaks. Optional cogwheel railway to the Jungfraujoch and Sphinx observation deck.
timeline.description_zh: 前往少女峰地区，观赏维尔德斯维尔的红色瑞士火车、劳特布龙嫩的童话风景与少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德。可自费乘高山铁路登顶少女峰，登斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Montreux - Vevey - Lausanne - Bois Le Roi
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 蒙特勒 - 沃韦 - 洛桑 - 波尔莱斯内
timeline.description_en: Drive the scenic Lake Geneva route via Lausanne's Olympic Park and Ouchy waterfront, the Lavaux vineyard terraces (a UNESCO site) and the Chillon Castle at Montreux. Overnight in a 5-star Relais & Chateaux château.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往洛桑，游览奥林匹克公园与乌希码头，之后沿日内瓦湖景观之路，途经世界文化遗产拉沃葡萄梯田，下午欣赏蒙特勒西庸城堡。夜宿5星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 第戎 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Visit Dijon's old town, the Notre-Dame de Dijon and the Palace of the Dukes of Burgundy (exterior), then tour a Burgundy wine estate's courtyard, cellar and vineyards with a guided tasting. Continue to Paris for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 前往美食之都第戎，游览第戎老城、第戎圣母院与勃艮第公爵馆（外观），午餐后参观勃艮第酒庄的庭院、葡萄园与酒窖并品鉴美酒。返回巴黎入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 凡尔赛 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Tour the Palace of Versailles with an in-depth guided explanation, then return to central Paris for the fashionable Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with the Opera (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette.
timeline.description_zh: 前往凡尔赛宫，由国家馆讲解员深度讲解凡尔赛巴洛克艺术；下午返回巴黎市区，游览奥斯曼大街与皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货与老佛爷等时尚街区。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 卢浮宫 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Visit the Louvre with a national-museum guide's themed deep-dive, then tour Notre-Dame, Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and Champ de Mars. End with a Seine River cruise past Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde.
timeline.description_zh: 参观卢浮宫，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解；游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）与战神广场，之后乘塞纳河游船游览荣军院、大小皇宫与协和广场，结束行程。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in central Rome on the morning of Day 1.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马 — 第一天上午在罗马市区集合。

title_en: Italy in Depth: Dolomites, Puglia & the Amalfi Coast — 9-Day Small-Group Tour (Milan to Rome)
title_zh: 意大利深度9天精品小团：多洛米蒂、普利亚与阿马尔菲海岸（米兰进 罗马出）
short_en: A 9-day one-way journey down Italy from the Dolomite peaks to Venice, Puglia's trulli, the Amalfi Coast and ancient Rome — private coach transport and 4-star hotels all included.
short_zh: 9天单程纵贯意大利：从多洛米蒂雪峰到水城威尼斯，再到普利亚蘑菇屋、阿马尔菲海岸与永恒之城罗马，全程旅游巴士与四星酒店全含。
desc_en: This 9-day small-group tour traces Italy from north to south, weaving together mountains, sea and centuries of history. Begin in fashionable Milan and the Alpine peaks of the Dolomites, glide through romantic Venice, then head down the Adriatic to Puglia's fairy-tale trulli of Alberobello and the ancient cave city of Matera. The journey climaxes along the Amalfi Coast at Positano, Capri's Blue Grotto and the buried city of Pompeii, before finishing in eternal Rome. With city-centre 4-star hotels, a licensed Chinese-speaking guide and key attractions included, it is an unhurried, all-inclusive way to see Italy's classic and lesser-known gems.
desc_zh: 这趟9天精品小团从北到南纵贯意大利，将雪山、海岸与千年历史串联成一线。从时尚之都米兰与阿尔卑斯山脚下的多洛米蒂峰群出发，途经浪漫水城威尼斯，沿亚得里亚海南下，探访普利亚大区童话般的阿尔贝罗贝洛蘑菇屋与千年石头古城马泰拉。行程在阿马尔菲海岸的波西塔诺、卡普里岛蓝洞与火山掩埋的庞贝古城达到高潮，最终抵达永恒之城罗马。全程精选市中心四星酒店、专业中文导游、主要景点门票全含，是一种从容、一价全含的深度玩法，兼顾经典与小众风光。

highlights.en: One-way deep route the length of Italy — Dolomite mountains, Adriatic and Tyrrhenian seas in one trip
highlights.zh: 单程纵贯意大利南北精华，一次看尽多洛米蒂雪山与亚得里亚海、第勒尼安海

highlights.en: Cable car to Seceda / Alpe di Siusi above the Dolomite peaks, plus the iconic St. John church in Val di Funes
highlights.zh: 缆车直登刀锋山/休斯高原，俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，外观打卡富内斯山谷孤独教堂

highlights.en: Romantic Venice — St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯——圣马可广场、叹息桥与总督宫

highlights.en: UNESCO trulli of Alberobello and the millennia-old cave city of Matera
highlights.zh: 世界文化遗产阿尔贝罗贝洛蘑菇屋与千年石头古城马泰拉

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast by boat to clifftop Positano, plus Capri island and its famed Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 乘船游阿马尔菲海岸悬崖小镇波西塔诺，畅游卡普里岛与著名蓝洞

highlights.en: The buried Roman city of Pompeii and Rome's Colosseum and Pantheon
highlights.zh: 火山掩埋的庞贝古城，以及罗马斗兽场与万神殿

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels, including two nights at a Sorrento seafront resort
highlights.zh: 全程精选市中心四星酒店，连住两晚索伦托海滨景观酒店

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing, professional Chinese-speaking guide and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 精选项目一价全含，专业中文导游，全程无强制购物

includes.en: 8 nights in carefully selected comfortable 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 全程精选舒适型四星级酒店，共8晚

includes.en: 8 breakfasts (hotel breakfast or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店内早餐或其他形式早餐8餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes and fees: city tax, entry/road tolls, residence tax, island-landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Business van or tour coach for all intercity transport
includes.zh: 全程商务旅行车或旅游巴士

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: a Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游（8人及以下安排中文司机兼导游全程带领）

includes.en: Baggage allowance of 1 x 23 kg checked bag plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attractions & tickets: Colosseum, Pantheon, Pompeii, Milan Cathedral, Seceda cable car, Venice island ferry, Salerno–Positano round-trip boat, Sorrento–Capri round-trip ferry
includes.zh: 行程内活动及门票：罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、米兰大教堂、刀锋山缆车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺出海轮渡、索伦托-卡普里岛往返渡船

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家所需的旅游观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify coverage if high-risk activities are involved)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内含特色餐外的午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Attractions not marked as included, including all sights noted as exterior view, recommended, optional or experience
excludes.zh: 未注明含费用的景点门票（含标注"外观""推荐""可选""体验"等项目）

excludes.en: Capri Blue Grotto entry and boatman fee (a tip of EUR 2-5 to the boatman is customary)
excludes.zh: 卡普里岛蓝洞游览费用（除船工费外，按当地习俗付2-5欧元小费）

excludes.en: Other transport not listed (e.g. Venice gondola, ZTL sightseeing trains, electric taxis) and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 未提及的其他交通（如威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车、电瓶出租车等）及个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 米兰-加尔达湖-特伦托
timeline.description_en: Morning in fashion-capital Milan to see the Sforza Castle (exterior), the Duomo and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon admire the Alpine scenery of Lake Garda, then transfer to Trento for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览时尚之都米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观）、米兰大教堂，漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后前往特伦托入住酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento → Bolzano → Ortisei → Val di Funes → Trento
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托-博尔扎诺-奥蒂塞伊-富内斯山谷-特伦托
timeline.description_en: Stroll the old streets of Bolzano, then take the cable car up Seceda for sweeping Dolomite views (or visit the meadows of Alpe di Siusi). Photograph the lonely St. John church in Val di Funes before returning to Trento.
timeline.description_zh: 上午漫步博尔扎诺老城街巷，随后前往奥蒂塞伊，乘缆车登顶刀锋山俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，或前往休斯高原草甸欣赏高山风光。之后外观打卡富内斯山谷的孤独教堂，再返回特伦托酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 特伦托-威尼斯-里米尼
timeline.description_en: Visit the water city of Venice — St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (exterior). Transfer to seaside Rimini for the night, with a free evening to enjoy the lively nightlife and local cuisine.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与总督宫（外观）。之后前往海滨城市里米尼入住，晚上自由游览市区，融入当地夜生活、品尝美食。

timeline.title_zh: 里米尼-佩斯卡拉-巴里
timeline.description_en: Drive south along the coast via the Adriatic seafood town of Pescara. Arrive in Bari (Puglia) in the afternoon, where you can see the Basilica of San Nicola (exterior) or wander the cobbled old town and shopping streets at a relaxed southern pace.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨从里米尼沿海南下，途经阿布鲁佐大区的海鲜美食小城佩斯卡拉。午后抵达普利亚大区巴里入住，可自由参观圣尼古拉大教堂（外观），或漫步老城石板街巷与购物步行街，感受南意的松弛。

timeline.title_en: Bari → Polignano a Mare → Alberobello → Matera
timeline.title_zh: 巴里-滨海波利尼亚诺-阿尔贝罗贝洛-马泰拉
timeline.description_en: Visit the clifftop town of Polignano a Mare, then the fairy-tale white village of Alberobello with its UNESCO-listed trulli houses. In the afternoon reach the ancient cave city of Matera to explore the Sassi old quarter.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从巴里出发，先到悬崖小镇滨海波利尼亚诺，再前往童话白石小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛，欣赏世界文化遗产特鲁利蘑菇屋。下午抵达石头古城马泰拉，深度漫步「Sassi」老城区。

timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉-萨勒诺-波西塔诺-索伦托
timeline.description_en: From Salerno, take a boat along the Amalfi Coast to the colourful clifftop town of Positano, passing the gem of Amalfi. After exploring the blue sea and romantic lanes, return by boat to Salerno and continue to Sorrento for the night. (Sailing may be cancelled in extreme sea weather; the boat fee is then refunded.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往萨勒诺，乘船游览阿马尔菲海岸的悬崖彩色小镇波西塔诺，途经海岸明珠阿马尔菲。漫步蓝海、白沙与浪漫街巷后乘船返回萨勒诺，前往索伦托入住。（如遇海上极端天气取消出海，出海费用退还游客。）

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-卡普里岛-索伦托
timeline.description_en: Stroll clifftop Sorrento, then take the ferry to the island of Capri. Spend the day at your own pace — explore the Blue Grotto by boat, circle the island, or visit the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) overlooking the bay — before ferrying back to Sorrento.
timeline.description_zh: 上午漫步建于海滨峭壁上的索伦托，之后乘渡船前往卡普里岛。当天自由活动：可乘船探秘蓝洞、环岛游览，或前往奥古斯都花园（外观）俯瞰整个海湾，之后乘渡船返回索伦托酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-庞贝-那不勒斯-罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore the ruins of ancient Pompeii, buried by Vesuvius, then visit Naples' old town with the Royal Palace and Castel Nuovo (both exterior). In the afternoon transfer to Rome for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索被维苏威火山掩埋的庞贝古城遗址。之后游览那不勒斯老城，参观那不勒斯皇宫（外观）与新堡（外观）。下午前往罗马入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Discover the eternal city, cradle of the Roman Empire: visit the Colosseum and the Pantheon, then see the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). The historic centre is a ZTL pedestrian zone — about 5 km of walking, so wear comfortable shoes. Tour ends here.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览永恒之城罗马，古罗马帝国的发祥地：参观斗兽场、万神殿，游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）。罗马古城为步行游览（限行区ZTL，往返约5公里，请穿轻便鞋），之后结束行程。

meeting_en: Milan, Italy — tour departs from Milan and ends in Rome (one-way route).
meeting_zh: 意大利米兰——行程从米兰出发，于罗马结束（单程线路）。

title_en: Italy in Depth: 12-Day Grand Loop from Milan (Dolomites, Apulia & Amalfi)
title_zh: 意大利深度12日精品小团（米兰往返·多洛米蒂+普利亚+阿马尔菲）
short_en: A 12-day loop from Milan across three seas and the Dolomites — Venice, Apulia, the Amalfi Coast, Capri, Rome, Tuscany and Cinque Terre, all-inclusive.
short_zh: 从米兰出发的12日环意精品小团，跨越三海一山，畅游威尼斯、普利亚、阿马尔菲海岸、卡普里岛、罗马、托斯卡纳与五渔村，一价全含。
desc_en: This 12-day small-group journey makes a complete loop from Milan, tracing three seas and the Dolomites — the Adriatic, the Tyrrhenian, the Ligurian and the alpine peaks. From fashionable Milan and Lake Garda you climb into the Dolomites at Trento, glide through romantic Venice, then head south along the Adriatic to Apulia's trulli villages and the ancient cave city of Matera. The route continues to the Amalfi Coast, Positano, Capri's Blue Grotto, Pompeii and eternal Rome, before finishing through the Tuscan hills of Val d'Orcia, Siena, Renaissance Florence and the cliff-side fishing villages of Cinque Terre. With city-centre 4-star and seafront hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all listed attractions included, it is a relaxed yet deep exploration of Italy from north to south.
desc_zh: 这是一条从米兰出发、完整环游意大利的12日精品小团线路，跨越亚得里亚海、第勒尼安海、利古里亚海与多洛米蒂山，尽览意大利三海一山的风光。从时尚之都米兰与加尔达湖启程，在特伦托登临多洛米蒂群峰，畅游浪漫水城威尼斯，再沿亚得里亚海一路南下，探访普利亚的蘑菇屋小镇与千年石头古城马泰拉。行程随后抵达阿马尔菲海岸、波西塔诺、卡普里岛蓝洞、庞贝古城与永恒之城罗马，最后穿越托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷、锡耶纳、文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨，并以悬崖上的五渔村收尾。全程入住市中心四星及海景酒店，中文司机兼导游随行，景点门票一价全含，让您从北到南轻松深度领略意大利之美。

highlights.en: Grand loop touching three seas and the Dolomites — Adriatic, Tyrrhenian, Ligurian and the alpine peaks
highlights.zh: 环游三海一山：亚得里亚海、第勒尼安海、利古里亚海与多洛米蒂山

highlights.en: Dolomites scenery from Trento: cable car up Seceda / Alpe di Siusi and the lone church of Val di Funes
highlights.zh: 特伦托深入多洛米蒂：缆车登刀锋山/休斯高原，打卡富内斯山谷孤独教堂

highlights.en: Apulia's fairytale white-stone Alberobello trulli and the cave dwellings of Matera, both UNESCO sites
highlights.zh: 普利亚童话白石小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛蘑菇屋与世界遗产马泰拉石头古城

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast by boat to Positano, plus Capri island and the legendary Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 乘船游阿马尔菲海岸与波西塔诺，登卡普里岛探秘传奇蓝洞

highlights.en: Pompeii's buried Roman city and the great monuments of eternal Rome — Colosseum and Pantheon included
highlights.zh: 探访沉睡千年的庞贝古城，畅游永恒之城罗马，含斗兽场与万神殿门票

highlights.en: Tuscany's Val d'Orcia hills, Siena and Renaissance Florence, with a 5-star Tuscan estate-spa hotel
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷、锡耶纳与文艺复兴佛罗伦萨，入住托斯卡纳五星庄园SPA酒店

highlights.en: Scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliff-top fishing villages of Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 搭乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸畅游悬崖渔村五渔村

highlights.en: Relaxed small group with city-centre 4-star & seafront hotels, Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all-inclusive pricing — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 享乐小团，市中心四星及海景酒店，中文司机兼导游，一价全含，无强制购物

includes.en: Accommodation: 1 night 5-star, 2 nights seafront hotel in Sorrento, 8 nights comfortable 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 酒店：五星酒店1晚、索伦托海景酒店2晚、舒适型四星酒店8晚

includes.en: 11 breakfasts (hotel buffet or equivalent)
includes.zh: 11顿早餐（酒店内早餐或其他形式早餐）

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes: city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Transport by tourist coach or business van
includes.zh: 交通：旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout (groups of 8 or fewer: business van + Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage: 1 piece up to 23kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Attractions & tickets: Rome Colosseum, Pantheon, Pompeii, Milan Cathedral, Venice island ferry, Salerno-Positano round-trip boat, Sorrento-Capri round-trip ferry, Cinque Terre scenic train, Seceda cable car
includes.zh: 活动及门票：罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、米兰大教堂、威尼斯登岛轮渡、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺出海轮渡、索伦托-卡普里岛往返渡船、五渔村景观列车、刀锋山缆车

excludes.en: International flights and any flights not listed
excludes.zh: 国际及未列明的机票费用

excludes.en: Passport and tourist visa fees
excludes.zh: 护照及行程所列国家的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请确认保险是否涵盖）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 小费：导游与司机小费共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners except any special meals noted in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内含特色餐外，不含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entries to sights not stated as included, including "exterior view", "recommended" and "optional" sights (e.g. Capri Blue Grotto boatman fee with a 2-5 EUR tip, Capri island transport)
excludes.zh: 未注明含费的景点门票，包括标注"外观""推荐""可选"的项目（如卡普里岛蓝洞人力船工费及2-5欧小费、卡普里岛上交通等）

excludes.en: Extra nights, extended stays, and other transport not listed (e.g. Venice gondola, ZTL sightseeing trains/electric taxis)
excludes.zh: 额外延长住宿及未含的其他交通（如威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车/电瓶车等）

excludes.en: Personal expenses (drinks, taxis, phone, etc.) and costs from free-time/optional activities
excludes.zh: 个人消费（饮料酒水、出租车、电话费等）及自由活动产生的费用

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 加尔达湖 → 特伦托
timeline.description_en: Begin in fashionable Milan with Sforza Castle (exterior), the Duomo and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon admire the alpine lake scenery of Lake Garda, then continue to Trento for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午抵达时尚之都米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观）、米兰大教堂，漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后前往特伦托入住酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento → Bolzano → Ortisei → Val di Funes → Trento
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 → 博尔扎诺 → 奥蒂塞伊 → 富内斯山谷 → 特伦托
timeline.description_en: Stroll the old town of Bolzano, then at Ortisei ride the cable car up Seceda over the Dolomites, or visit the high meadows of Alpe di Siusi. Photograph the lone Church of St John in Val di Funes before returning to Trento. Cable-car operation depends on weather and maintenance.
timeline.description_zh: 上午漫步博尔扎诺老城。随后前往奥蒂塞伊小镇，乘缆车登顶刀锋山俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，或前往休斯高原欣赏高山草甸。之后前往富内斯山谷，外观打卡圣马达莱娜村的圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂），返回特伦托。缆车运营视天气及检修情况而定。

timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 → 威尼斯 → 里米尼
timeline.description_en: Visit the water city of Venice — St Mark's Basilica and Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (exteriors). Continue to the Adriatic resort of Rimini, where you can enjoy the lively nightlife and local cuisine at leisure.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观）。之后前往里米尼入住，晚上自由游览市区，融入当地热闹的夜生活，品尝当地美食。

timeline.title_zh: 里米尼 → 佩斯卡拉 → 巴里
timeline.description_en: Drive south along the coast via the Abruzzo seaside town of Pescara, a Mediterranean seafood haven. Reach Bari in Apulia, where you can visit the Basilica of St Nicholas (exterior) or wander the old town's stone lanes and shopping streets.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨从里米尼沿海南下，途经阿布鲁佐大区的海滨美食小城佩斯卡拉。午后抵达普利亚大区巴里入住，可自由参观圣尼古拉大教堂（外观），或漫步老城石板街巷与购物步行街，感受南意的松弛。

timeline.title_en: Bari → Polignano a Mare → Alberobello → Matera
timeline.title_zh: 巴里 → 滨海波利尼亚诺 → 阿尔贝罗贝洛 → 马泰拉
timeline.description_en: Visit the clifftop town of Polignano a Mare, then the fairytale white-stone town of Alberobello with its UNESCO trulli houses. In the afternoon reach the ancient cave city of Matera and explore its Sassi old town.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从巴里出发，前往悬崖小镇滨海波利尼亚诺，随后游览童话白石小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛，欣赏世界遗产特鲁洛蘑菇屋。下午抵达石头古城马泰拉，深度漫步「Sassi」老城区。

timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉 → 萨勒诺 → 波西塔诺 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Travel to Salerno and take a boat to Positano, the colourful clifftop town on the Amalfi Coast, passing the pearl of Amalfi. Stroll the blue sea, white sand and romantic lanes, then return by boat and continue to Sorrento. (Boat trip subject to sea conditions.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往萨勒诺，乘船游览阿马尔菲海岸悬崖上的彩色小镇波西塔诺，途经海岸明珠阿马尔菲。漫步蓝海白沙与浪漫街巷，随后乘船返回萨勒诺，前往索伦托入住海景酒店。（出海游船视海上天气而定。）

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 卡普里岛 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Stroll clifftop Sorrento, then ferry to the island of Capri. At leisure explore the famed Blue Grotto by small boat, circle the island, or visit the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) overlooking the bay, before ferrying back to Sorrento. (Blue Grotto subject to tides and weather; not included.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午漫步建于海滨峭壁上的索伦托小城，之后乘渡船前往卡普里岛。可自行海边漫步、乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或前往奥古斯都花园（外观）俯瞰海湾，之后乘渡船返回索伦托，乘车回酒店。（蓝洞视潮汐与风浪而定，费用不含。）

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 庞贝 → 那不勒斯 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore the ruins of ancient Pompeii, then visit Naples old town with the Royal Palace and Castel Nuovo (exteriors). In the afternoon continue to Rome for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。之后前往那不勒斯游览老城，外观参观那不勒斯皇宫与新堡。下午前往罗马入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Discover the Eternal City: the Colosseum, the Pantheon, the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), with free time in the city centre. Rome's old town is a walking tour of about 5km within the ZTL traffic-restricted zone, so wear comfortable shoes.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国发祥地，被称为「永恒之城」。参观斗兽场、万神殿，游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），之后自由游览市区。罗马古城当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，位于车辆禁行区（ZTL），请穿着轻便舒适。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: Drive to the hilltop town of Pienza, with photo stops along the cypress-tree lanes of Val d'Orcia, visiting Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior). Continue to Siena to see its cathedral, Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico and Torre del Mangia (exteriors).
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，游览二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）。之后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅（外观）与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。

timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 → 佛罗伦萨 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Visit Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Piazza della Signoria, Ponte Vecchio, and the Basilica of Santa Croce and its square (exterior). Check in to a 5-star estate hotel in the Tuscan countryside.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、领主广场、维奇奥桥以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住托斯卡纳地区五星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 比萨 → 五渔村 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Visit Pisa with its Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli. Take the scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliff-side fishing villages of Cinque Terre, then return to Milan where the tour ends. (Cinque Terre subject to weather/rail conditions.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场。随后搭乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖上的五渔村，之后返回米兰，结束美好行程。（五渔村视天气及铁路运营情况而定。）

meeting_en: Milan, Italy — tour departs from and returns to Milan; pick-up details confirmed before departure.
meeting_zh: 意大利米兰——行程从米兰出发并返回米兰，集合接送细节于出发前确认。

title_en: 9-Day Southern Italy & Sicily: Rome to Palermo Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利南部与西西里9天精品小团（罗马至巴勒莫）
short_en: A 9-day one-way journey from Rome across the Amalfi Coast and Sicily to Palermo, with Pompeii, Capri, Mount Etna and the Valley of the Temples.
short_zh: 9天单程深度游，从罗马出发，途经阿马尔菲海岸与西西里岛直达巴勒莫，遍览庞贝、卡普里、埃特纳火山与神殿之谷。
desc_en: This 9-day one-way tour traces Italy from Rome down through the Sorrento Peninsula and the Amalfi Coast, then crosses by ferry to Sicily and ends in Palermo. Along the way you explore the ruins of ancient Rome, the buried city of Pompeii, the Blue Grotto of Capri, the clifftop village of Positano, the trulli of Alberobello and the cave city of Matera, before discovering Sicily's Mount Etna, Taormina, Syracuse and the Valley of the Temples. With seaside four-star hotels and a deep single-direction route, it minimises driving time and maximises sightseeing across southern Italy's two coasts and two islands.
desc_zh: 这条9天单程线路从罗马出发，一路向南穿越索伦托半岛与阿马尔菲海岸，再乘渡轮跨海登陆西西里岛，终点抵达巴勒莫。沿途探访古罗马遗址、被火山掩埋的庞贝古城、卡普里岛蓝洞、悬崖小镇波西塔诺、阿尔贝罗贝洛的特鲁利石屋以及马泰拉石窟古城，随后深度游览西西里的埃特纳火山、陶尔米纳、锡拉库萨与神殿之谷。全程入住海滨四星酒店，单程深度路线减少行车时间、增加游览时长，横跨意大利南部三海两岛。

highlights.en: Ancient Rome: the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 古罗马精华：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Pompeii ruins and the Blue Grotto of Capri across the Bay of Naples
highlights.zh: 那不勒斯湾畔的庞贝古城遗址与卡普里岛蓝洞

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast cruise to the clifftop village of Positano
highlights.zh: 阿马尔菲海岸游船，前往悬崖彩色小镇波西塔诺

highlights.en: UNESCO trulli stone houses of Alberobello and the cave city of Matera
highlights.zh: 联合国教科文遗产阿尔贝罗贝洛特鲁利石屋与马泰拉石窟古城

highlights.en: Sicily's Mount Etna, hilltop Taormina and ancient Syracuse
highlights.zh: 西西里埃特纳火山、悬崖小镇陶尔米纳与古城锡拉库萨

highlights.en: Valley of the Temples in Agrigento and historic Palermo
highlights.zh: 阿格里真托神殿之谷与历史名城巴勒莫

highlights.en: Ferry crossing to Sicily included; one-way deep route saves driving time
highlights.zh: 含跨海渡轮登陆西西里，单程深度路线节省行车时间

highlights.en: City-centre and seaside four-star hotels with no forced shopping stops
highlights.zh: 全程入住市中心及海滨四星酒店，绝无强制购物

includes.en: 8 nights in comfortable four-star hotels
includes.zh: 舒适型四星级酒店8晚

includes.en: 8 breakfasts (hotel breakfast or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店早餐或其他形式早餐8餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes: city tax, entry tax, residence tax, road/bridge tolls and island landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Tour coach or business travel van for intercity transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Licensed professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: a Chinese-speaking driver-guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机加中文导游（8人及以下安排商务车加中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance of 1 checked bag (23 kg) plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attractions and activities: Colosseum, Pantheon, Pompeii, Capri round-trip ferry, Salerno-Positano boat tickets, Maniace Castle, Taormina amphitheatre, Valley of the Temples
includes.zh: 活动及门票：罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、卡普里岛往返渡轮、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺船票、马尼亚切城堡、陶尔米纳圆形剧场、神殿之谷

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Passport fees and tourist visa fees
excludes.zh: 护照费用及旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk activity coverage)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（高风险运动请核实保险是否涵盖）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费共计10欧元/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners other than any special meals noted in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内含特色餐外的午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Optional and "view from outside"/recommended attractions not stated as included, e.g. Capri Blue Grotto boat fees (plus 2-5 EUR tip per local custom) and the Mount Etna summit cable car
excludes.zh: 行程中未注明含费的景点（含标注"外观"、"推荐"、"可选"等项目），如卡普里蓝洞船费（另付2-5欧元小费）及埃特纳火山登顶缆车费用

excludes.en: Extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary; flights from Palermo back to your departure city
excludes.zh: 行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用；巴勒莫返回原出发城市的机票

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 -> 索伦托半岛
timeline.description_en: Tour the "Eternal City" of Rome on foot (about 5-6 km), seeing the Colosseum and Pantheon and visiting the Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain (exterior), then transfer to the Sorrento Peninsula for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午徒步游览"永恒之城"罗马（步行约5-6公里），参观斗兽场、万神殿，并游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观），随后前往索伦托半岛入住海滨酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 -> 庞贝 -> 卡普里岛 -> 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Explore the ruins of Pompeii in the morning, stroll the clifftop town of Sorrento, then take a ferry to Capri for free time at the Blue Grotto or Gardens of Augustus before returning to the hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨探索庞贝古城遗址，漫步建于海滨峭壁上的索伦托，随后乘渡船前往卡普里岛，自由前往蓝洞或奥古斯都花园（外观）俯瞰海湾，之后乘船返回酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 -> 波西塔诺 -> 萨勒诺 -> 巴里
timeline.description_en: Take a scenic boat cruise to Positano, the colourful clifftop jewel of the Amalfi Coast, then sail back to Salerno and drive on to Bari for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后乘游船前往阿马尔菲海岸明珠波西塔诺，欣赏悬崖上色彩斑斓的小镇，随后乘船返回萨勒诺，之后前往巴里入住酒店。

timeline.title_en: Bari -> Polignano a Mare -> Alberobello -> Matera
timeline.title_zh: 巴里 -> 滨海波利尼亚诺 -> 阿尔贝罗贝洛 -> 马泰拉
timeline.description_en: Visit Bari's Basilica of San Nicola (exterior) and old town, the clifftop seaside town of Polignano a Mare, and the UNESCO trulli stone houses of Alberobello, then continue to Matera.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览巴里圣尼古拉大教堂（外观）与老城区，随后前往依崖而建的滨海波利尼亚诺，下午走进童话般的阿尔贝罗贝洛特鲁利石屋村落（世界文化遗产），之后前往马泰拉入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉 -> 科森扎 -> 墨西拿 -> 卡塔尼亚
timeline.description_en: Explore Matera's ancient Sassi cave dwellings, visit the old town of Cosenza, then take the Villa San Giovanni-Messina ferry to Sicily and Messina's old town before reaching Catania.
timeline.description_zh: 上午深入探索马泰拉"石头之城"的萨西石窟老城区，随后前往科森扎老城，再乘坐圣乔瓦尼-墨西拿渡轮跨海西西里岛，参观墨西拿老城，之后前往卡塔尼亚入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 -> 陶尔米纳 -> 埃特纳火山 -> 卡塔尼亚
timeline.description_en: Visit the UNESCO natural-heritage Mount Etna (summit cable car optional/own expense) and the hilltop town of Taormina with its Piazza IX Aprile and Greek theatre, then return to Catania.
timeline.description_zh: 前往世界自然遗产埃特纳火山自由参观火山景观（登顶缆车自费），并游览悬崖小镇陶尔米纳的四月九日广场与希腊露天剧场，当晚返回卡塔尼亚酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 -> 锡拉库萨 -> 卡塔尼亚
timeline.description_en: Visit Syracuse, birthplace of Archimedes and setting of "Malena", touring Maniace Castle, the Fountain of Arethusa and Ortygia Island with its cathedral square, then enjoy free time back in Catania.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往《西西里岛的美丽传说》取景地、阿基米德故乡锡拉库萨，游览马尼亚切城堡、林仙泉与奥提伽岛大教堂广场，之后返回卡塔尼亚自由游览。

timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 -> 阿格里真托 -> 切法卢 -> 巴勒莫
timeline.description_en: Visit the ancient Greek town of Agrigento and the World Heritage Valley of the Temples, then the seaside town of Cefalu, before continuing to Palermo for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往古希腊小镇阿格里真托，游览老城与世界遗产神殿之谷，随后前往天堂小镇切法卢，之后前往巴勒莫入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴勒莫（送机离团）
timeline.description_en: Explore Palermo's old town on foot (about 3-4 km), including the lively fish market, the Quattro Canti, the Norman Palace and Teatro Massimo (exterior), then transfer to the airport (one group transfer at 16:00 local time) to end the tour.
timeline.description_zh: 上午步行自由游览巴勒莫老城（往返约3-4公里），探访人文气息浓厚的老城鱼市、四角广场、诺曼皇宫与马西莫剧院（外观），随后由导游统一送机（当地时间16:00），结束行程。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy. The tour begins in Rome on Day 1; international flights to Rome are not included and the return flight departs from Palermo.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马。行程第1天于罗马开始；国际机票不含，且返程由巴勒莫出发。

title_en: Italy in Depth: 13-Day North-to-South & Sicily Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利纵贯南北及西西里13天享乐小团
short_en: A one-way 13-day journey across Italy from Milan to Palermo, threading Venice, Tuscany, the Amalfi Coast and five days deep in Sicily.
short_zh: 13天单程纵贯意大利，从米兰一路深入巴勒莫，串联威尼斯、托斯卡纳、阿马尔菲海岸，并深度畅游西西里五天。
desc_en: This 13-day small-group tour runs one-way from Milan to Palermo, crossing Italy from the northern lakes to the Mediterranean south and on to Sicily so you cover three seas and two islands without ever doubling back. You will see Milan Cathedral, the canals of Venice, Cinque Terre and the Leaning Tower of Pisa, Renaissance Florence and eternal Rome, then the Sorrento Peninsula, Pompeii, Capri and the lemon-scented cliffs of Positano. The Adriatic stretch brings Polignano a Mare, the Trulli of Alberobello and the cave city of Matera before a full five days exploring Sicily, from Mount Etna and Taormina to Syracuse, the Valley of the Temples and Palermo. Highlights include two nights in a five-star Tuscan estate spa and seaside stays in Sorrento and Sicily.
desc_zh: 这条13天享乐小团采用单程线路，从米兰一路向南直抵巴勒莫，横跨意大利从北部湖区到地中海南部再到西西里岛，三海两岛一线贯通，全程不走回头路。沿途游览米兰大教堂、水城威尼斯、五渔村与比萨斜塔、文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨与永恒之城罗马，再到索伦托半岛、庞贝古城、卡普里岛与檸檬飘香的悬崖小镇波西塔诺。亚得里亚海段串联滨海波利尼亚诺、阿尔贝罗贝洛的特鲁利蘑菇屋与石头之城马泰拉，随后用整整五天深度环游西西里岛——埃特纳火山、陶尔米纳、锡拉库萨、神殿之谷直到巴勒莫。行程特别安排托斯卡纳五星庄园SPA酒店连住两晚，以及索伦托与西西里海滨酒店连续入住。

highlights.en: One-way deep route across Italy and Sicily — three seas, two islands, no backtracking
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路纵贯意大利与西西里——三海两岛，全程不走回头路

highlights.en: Five full days exploring Sicily: Etna, Taormina, Syracuse, Valley of the Temples and Palermo
highlights.zh: 西西里环岛深度五天：埃特纳火山、陶尔米纳、锡拉库萨、神殿之谷与巴勒莫

highlights.en: Milan Cathedral, the canals of Venice and Renaissance Florence's Duomo
highlights.zh: 米兰大教堂、威尼斯水巷与佛罗伦萨文艺复兴圣母百花大教堂

highlights.en: Rome's Colosseum and Pantheon, the Sorrento Peninsula, Pompeii and Capri
highlights.zh: 罗马斗兽场与万神殿、索伦托半岛、庞贝古城与卡普里岛

highlights.en: Cinque Terre scenic train, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cliffside Positano by boat
highlights.zh: 五渔村景观列车、比萨斜塔与乘船游览悬崖小镇波西塔诺

highlights.en: Two nights in a five-star Tuscan estate spa plus seaside hotels in Sorrento and Sicily
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳五星庄园SPA酒店连住两晚，索伦托与西西里海滨酒店连续入住

highlights.en: UNESCO sites: Alberobello's Trulli and the cave dwellings of Matera
highlights.zh: 联合国教科文世界遗产：阿尔贝罗贝洛特鲁利石屋与马泰拉石窟老城

highlights.en: Flights & ferries, attraction entries and a Chinese-speaking guide included — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 含机票、渡轮、景点门票及中文导游，无强制购物

includes.en: 12 nights' accommodation: 2 nights in a five-star hotel and 10 nights in comfortable 4-star city hotels
includes.zh: 12晚住宿：五星级酒店2晚，舒适型四星级酒店10晚

includes.en: 12 breakfasts (hotel breakfast or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店或其他形式早餐共12餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes: city/tourist tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls and island-landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Tourist coach or business van transport throughout
includes.zh: 全程旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: business van with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机加中文导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车加中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attractions & tickets: Milan Cathedral, Venice island-boat ticket, Cinque Terre scenic train, Rome Colosseum, Pantheon, Pompeii, Capri return ferry, Salerno-Positano boat, Maniace Castle, Taormina amphitheatre and the Valley of the Temples
includes.zh: 行程内活动及门票：米兰大教堂、威尼斯上岛船票、五渔村景观列车、罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、卡普里岛往返渡轮、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺船票、马尼亚切城堡、陶尔米纳圆形剧场、神殿之谷

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: One-way air ticket from Palermo back to your departure city (buy separately; no guide on board)
excludes.zh: 巴勒莫返回出发城市的机票（请自行购买，航班上无导游陪同）

excludes.en: Passport and tourist visa fees
excludes.zh: 护照及旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Guide and driver gratuities: 10 EUR per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费：共10欧元/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners except the special meals noted in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内含特色餐外的午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Attractions not marked as included (incl. 'exterior view' sights and recommended/optional/experience items), e.g. Capri Blue Grotto, Etna summit cable car (tip the Blue Grotto boatmen 2-5 EUR)
excludes.zh: 未注明含费用的景点（含标注“外观”及推荐/可选/体验项目），如卡普里岛蓝洞、埃特纳火山登顶缆车（蓝洞另付船工小费2-5欧元）

excludes.en: Extra nights, personal expenses, optional activities and other transport (e.g. Venice gondola, ZTL sightseeing trains/carts)
excludes.zh: 额外延长住宿、私人消费、自由活动及其他交通（如威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车/电瓶车等）

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and tour Milan, viewing Sforza Castle from outside and visiting the Gothic Milan Cathedral and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Transfer to Venice for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合游览北意名城米兰，外观斯福尔扎城堡，参观哥特式米兰大教堂，漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊，随后前往威尼斯入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Explore the water city of Venice — St Mark's Basilica and Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (exterior). Try the local squid-ink pasta at lunch, then transfer to a five-star Tuscan estate spa hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥与总督宫（外观）；午餐推荐威尼斯特色墨鱼面，之后入住托斯卡纳五星庄园SPA酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Ride the scenic train along the Ligurian coast through the clifftop villages of Cinque Terre, then visit Pisa's Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli before returning to the Tuscan estate. If rail strikes or bad weather prevent the Cinque Terre visit, a coach tour of the coast replaces it.
timeline.description_zh: 上午乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖上的五渔村；下午前往比萨，外观比萨斜塔并游览奇迹广场，之后返回托斯卡纳庄园酒店。如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘车游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 佛罗伦萨 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Visit the Renaissance birthplace of Florence — the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Continue to Rome for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观），下午前往罗马入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 索伦托半岛
timeline.description_en: Tour the Eternal City of Rome — the Colosseum, the Pantheon, the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). The historic centre is largely pedestrian (about 5-6 km on foot). Transfer to the Sorrento Peninsula for a seaside stay.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览永恒之城罗马，参观斗兽场、万神殿，游览西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）；罗马古城多为步行街区，当天徒步约5-6公里。之后前往索伦托半岛入住海滨酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 庞贝 → 卡普里岛 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Explore the ruins of ancient Pompeii, stroll clifftop Sorrento, then ferry to Capri for free time — walk the coast, see the Blue Grotto, take an island boat tour, or visit the Gardens of Augustus (exterior). Return ferry to Sorrento. On-island transport, Blue Grotto entry and a 2-5 EUR boatman tip are not included; the Blue Grotto may close in high tide or rough seas.
timeline.description_zh: 上午探索庞贝古城遗址，随后漫步索伦托海滨小城，乘渡船前往卡普里岛自由活动——可海边漫步、游览蓝洞、乘船环岛或前往奥古斯都花园（外观）俯瞰海湾，之后乘渡船返回索伦托。岛上交通、蓝洞门票及2-5欧元船工小费不含；蓝洞遇涨潮风浪可能关闭。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 萨勒诺 → 波西塔诺 → 巴里
timeline.description_en: From Salerno's harbour sail to Positano, the colourful clifftop jewel of the Amalfi Coast, with its lemon-scented lanes and turquoise sea. Return by boat to Salerno, then transfer to Bari for the night. In extreme sea conditions the boat trip is cancelled (with refund) and replaced by a coach visit to Salerno.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往萨勒诺码头，乘船前往阿马尔菲海岸明珠波西塔诺，探索悬崖上的彩色小镇与檸檬飘香的街巷，随后乘船返回萨勒诺，之后前往巴里入住酒店。如遇海上极端天气取消出海，将改乘车游览萨勒诺并退还出海船费。

timeline.title_en: Bari → Polignano a Mare → Alberobello → Matera
timeline.title_zh: 巴里 → 滨海波利尼亚诺 → 阿尔贝罗贝洛 → 马泰拉
timeline.description_en: Tour Bari old town and the Basilica of St Nicholas (exterior), then drive to clifftop Polignano a Mare above its turquoise bay. In the afternoon enter the fairytale town of Alberobello to wander its UNESCO-listed Trulli stone houses, before continuing to Matera.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览巴里市区，外观圣尼古拉大教堂并漫步老城石板街巷，随后前往悬崖海湾小镇滨海波利尼亚诺。下午进入童话般的阿尔贝罗贝洛，漫步联合国教科文认证的特鲁利石屋村落，之后前往马泰拉入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉 → 科森扎 → 墨西拿 → 卡塔尼亚
timeline.description_en: Explore Matera's Sassi old town — cave dwellings, rock churches and ancient monasteries carved into limestone. Visit Cosenza old town, then take the San Giovanni-Messina ferry across to Sicily, tour Messina's old town and continue to Catania.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览马泰拉“石头之城”——深入Sassi老城区，穿梭于石砌阶梯、洞穴教堂与古修道院之间。随后前往科森扎老城，乘圣乔瓦尼-墨西拿渡轮跨海前往西西里，游览墨西拿老城，之后前往卡塔尼亚入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 → 陶尔米纳 → 埃特纳火山 → 卡塔尼亚
timeline.description_en: Visit the UNESCO natural site of Mount Etna (cable car to the summit is optional and not included) and the clifftop town of Taormina with its Piazza IX Aprile and Greek amphitheatre, then return to Catania. Etna and Taormina may swap order by season; the cable car cannot run in ash, bad weather or maintenance.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往世界自然遗产埃特纳火山，可自由参观火山景观或自费乘缆车登顶（不含登顶缆车费），随后前往陶尔米纳小镇游览四月九日广场与希腊露天剧场，当晚返回卡塔尼亚。火山与陶镇顺序随季节调整；如遇火山灰、天气或检修，缆车无法运行则无法登顶。

timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 → 锡拉库萨 → 卡塔尼亚
timeline.description_en: Visit Syracuse, setting of the film Malèna and home of Archimedes — Maniace Castle, the Fountain of Arethusa, Ortigia Island and the cathedral square. Return to Catania for free time among its elegant streets and the Ionian Sea.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往《西西里岛的美丽传说》取景地锡拉库萨，也是阿基米德的故乡，游览马尼亚切城堡、林仙泉、奥提伽岛及大教堂广场；之后返回卡塔尼亚自由游览，欣赏典雅建筑与碧波荡漾的爱奥尼亚海。

timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 → 阿格里真托 → 切法卢 → 巴勒莫
timeline.description_en: Visit the ancient Greek town of Agrigento and the UNESCO Valley of the Temples, then the seaside town of Cefalù, before continuing to Palermo for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往古希腊小镇阿格里真托，游览老城与世界遗产神殿之谷，随后前往切法卢，之后前往巴勒莫入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 巴勒莫（送机）
timeline.description_en: Free time in Palermo's old town — the lively fish market, the Quattro Canti, the Norman Palace (exterior) and the Teatro Massimo (exterior). The old town is in a vehicle-restricted (ZTL) zone, so sightseeing is on foot (about 3-4 km). One group airport transfer at 16:00 local time; the return air ticket is not included.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由游览巴勒莫老城——人文气息浓郁的老城鱼市、著名的四角广场、诺曼皇宫（外观）与马西莫剧院（外观）。老城位于车辆禁行区（ZTL），当天为步行游览（往返约3-4公里）。当地时间16:00统一安排一次送机，返程机票不含。

meeting_en: Milan, Italy — group meets in the morning of Day 1 in the city centre for the coach tour.
meeting_zh: 意大利米兰——第1天上午于米兰市区集合，乘车开始行程。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland In-Depth: 12-Day Rome-to-Paris Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 法意瑞深度12天精品小团游（罗马至巴黎）
short_en: A 12-day one-way journey from Rome to Paris through Tuscany, Cinque Terre, Venice, the Swiss Alps and Burgundy, in a 4-8 person small group.
short_zh: 12天单程深度之旅，从罗马一路玩到巴黎，途经托斯卡纳、五渔村、威尼斯、瑞士阿尔卑斯与勃艮第，4-8人精品小团。
desc_en: This in-depth 12-day small-group tour traces a one-way deep route from Rome to Paris across three countries. You begin in the Eternal City, wind through Tuscany's hill towns, the cliffside villages of Cinque Terre, Renaissance Florence and romantic Venice, cross the Alps via Milan to Zurich, then ride the GoldenPass panoramic train into the Swiss Lake District around Interlaken and the Jungfrau. The journey continues along Lake Geneva to a five-star Relais & Chateaux chateau, through the wine country of Burgundy and Dijon, finishing with Versailles, the Louvre and the great sights of Paris. City-centre 4-star hotels, included intercity transport and scenic rail, and expert museum guides make this a relaxed, all-inclusive way to see Europe's classic triangle.
desc_zh: 这是一条单程深度路线的12天精品小团之旅，横跨意法瑞三国，从罗马一路畅游至巴黎。行程从永恒之城罗马启程，穿越托斯卡纳山城、五渔村悬崖渔村、文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨与浪漫水城威尼斯，再翻越阿尔卑斯经米兰抵达苏黎世，乘坐金色山口全景列车进入因特拉肯与少女峰所在的瑞士湖区；随后沿日内瓦湖一路前行，入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店，途经勃艮第葡萄酒乡与第戎，最后以凡尔赛宫、卢浮宫与巴黎经典景点收尾。市中心四星酒店、含城际交通与景观火车、专业博物馆讲解，让这趟欧洲经典三国之旅轻松而一价全包。

highlights.en: One-way deep route: Rome to Paris across Italy, Switzerland and France, no backtracking
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线：罗马至巴黎，串联意法瑞三国，绝不走回头路

highlights.en: Ride the GoldenPass panoramic train through the Swiss Alps from Lucerne to Lungern
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口全景列车，从卢塞恩到龙疆饱览瑞士阿尔卑斯美景

highlights.en: Tuscany hill towns, Cinque Terre cliffside villages and the medieval towers of San Gimignano
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳山城、五渔村悬崖渔村与圣吉米尼亚诺中世纪万塔古城

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence, romantic Venice and the fashion capital of Milan
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴佛罗伦萨、浪漫水城威尼斯与时尚之都米兰

highlights.en: Interlaken, Jungfrau region and a stay at the lakeside Giessbach historic hotel (Crash Landing on You filming location)
highlights.zh: 因特拉肯、少女峰地区，入住湖畔吉斯巴赫历史酒店（《爱的迫降》取景地）

highlights.en: A night in a five-star Relais & Chateaux chateau, plus a Burgundy winery visit and tasting
highlights.zh: 入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店一晚，并参观勃艮第酒庄含品酒讲解

highlights.en: Versailles and the Louvre with expert national-museum guides, plus a Seine river cruise
highlights.zh: 凡尔赛宫与卢浮宫由专业国家馆讲解师深度讲解，并含塞纳河游船

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels, included flights & scenic rail, all attractions and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星酒店，含机票与景观火车、所有景点门票，无强制购物

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (with one 5-star chateau night) throughout the tour
includes.zh: 全程市中心四星级酒店（含一晚五星古堡酒店）

includes.en: Daily buffet breakfast at the hotels
includes.zh: 酒店每日自助早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver
includes.zh: 持证中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Intercity transport throughout the route
includes.zh: 全程城际交通

includes.en: GoldenPass panoramic scenic train ride
includes.zh: 金色山口全景景观列车体验

includes.en: Coach tour of the Jungfrau region (option one of the recommended Jungfrau activities)
includes.zh: 乘车游览少女峰地区（少女峰推荐项目三选一中的方案一，费用包含）

includes.en: Listed attraction entries including Versailles and the Louvre with national-museum guides
includes.zh: 行程所列景点门票，含凡尔赛宫与卢浮宫国家馆讲解

includes.en: Seasonal Giessbach cog railway and Interlaken lake cruise (Apr 3-Oct 11, 2026; replaced by a Lake Lucerne cruise outside this period)
includes.zh: 季节性吉斯巴赫齿轮火车与因特拉肯游轮（2026年4月3日至10月11日；该期间外以卢塞恩湖游船替代）

includes.en: Local taxes
includes.zh: 当地税费

excludes.en: International flights to Rome and from Paris
excludes.zh: 往返国际机票（抵达罗马、离开巴黎）

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees
excludes.zh: 申根签证费用

excludes.en: Travel and personal insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游及个人保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners unless noted
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐（除非特别注明）

excludes.en: Optional activities, e.g. Interlaken paragliding (EUR 220), Jungfrau summit cable car (EUR 230), First aerial gondola round-trip (EUR 70)
excludes.zh: 自费推荐项目，如因特拉肯高空滑翔伞（220欧元）、少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）、菲斯特空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 司机及导游小费

excludes.en: Personal expenses
excludes.zh: 个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 罗马
timeline.description_en: Meet and explore Rome, the cradle of the Roman Empire and the Eternal City. View the Colosseum and Pantheon from outside, and stroll the Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain. Self check-in at the hotel from 14:00 (Rome's old town is largely a vehicle-restricted ZTL zone, so the day is on foot, about 5 km return).
timeline.description_zh: 集合后游览古罗马帝国发祥地、永恒之城罗马。外观斗兽场与万神殿，漫步西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉。14点后可凭订单自行入住酒店（罗马古城多为车辆禁行区ZTL，当天为步行游览，往返约5公里）。

timeline.title_en: Rome → Pienza → Siena → San Gimignano → Florence
