timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳 → 圣吉米尼亚诺 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Drive into Tuscany for the cypress lanes and old town of Pienza, then Siena with its cathedral, Piazza del Campo and Mangia Tower (all viewed from outside). Continue to the medieval hilltop town of San Gimignano, famed for its towers and Vernaccia wine, before overnighting in Florence.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往皮恩扎，游览丝柏小路与皮恩扎古城，随后抵达锡耶纳，外观大教堂、田野广场与曼吉亚塔楼。之后游览以塔楼和白葡萄酒闻名的中世纪山城圣吉米尼亚诺，当晚入住佛罗伦萨。

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Visit Pisa's Leaning Tower and the Square of Miracles (from outside), then ride the scenic Cinque Terre train along the Ligurian coast to explore the colourful cliffside fishing villages before returning to Florence. (In bad weather or rail strikes the coast is visited by coach or other means.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，外观比萨斜塔与奇迹广场，随后乘坐五渔村景观火车，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的彩色渔村，之后返回佛罗伦萨。（如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工，将改为乘大巴或其他方式游览海岸线。）

timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Discover the birthplace of the Renaissance: the Florence Cathedral (Santa Maria del Fiore, the world's third-largest), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazzale Michelangelo for sweeping city views. In the afternoon transfer to Venice for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥与米开朗琪罗广场，登高俯瞰全城。下午前往威尼斯入住。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Free time in Venice to admire St Mark's Basilica and Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace (from outside), where water lanes weave between the islands. In the afternoon transfer to Milan.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观圣马可大教堂与圣马可广场、外观叹息桥与总督宫，感受水城的浪漫风情。下午前往米兰入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Free time at Milan's landmark Duomo (from outside) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II shopping arcade. In the afternoon cross into Switzerland to Zurich, exploring the old town, Lake Zurich, Lindenhof park and the banks of the Limmat.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰主教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园，漫步利马特河畔。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 卢塞恩 → 龙疆 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Visit Lucerne with its lake, Lion Monument, Chapel Bridge and octagonal Water Tower, then ride the classic GoldenPass panoramic train to Lungern, taking in fairytale Alpine scenery. Continue to Interlaken for free time, overnighting at the historic lakeside Giessbach hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔，随后乘坐金色山口景观列车前往龙疆，沿途欣赏童话般的瑞士风光。之后前往因特拉肯自由游览，夜宿湖畔吉斯巴赫历史酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 少女峰地区 → 因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: Explore the Jungfrau region: by coach to see Wilderswil's red railway, the storybook scenery of Lauterbrunnen and Grindelwald (included), or optionally take the high railway up to the Jungfraujoch 'Top of Europe' to view the Aletsch Glacier from the Sphinx terrace. Second night at the Giessbach hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 前往少女峰地区，可乘车游览维尔德斯维尔红色火车站、劳特布龙嫩与格林德尔瓦尔德的童话风景（费用包含），或自费乘坐高山铁路登顶少女峰，在斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川。再宿吉斯巴赫酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken → Montreux → Vevey → Lausanne → Bourg-en-Bresse area
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 → 蒙特勒 → 沃韦 → 洛桑 → 波尔莱斯内
timeline.description_en: Drive along Lake Geneva, viewing Chillon Castle at Montreux, the Lavaux terraced vineyards (a UNESCO World Heritage site) and Lausanne with its Ouchy waterfront and Olympic Park. Continue to a five-star Relais & Chateaux chateau hotel for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往蒙特勒，欣赏西庸城堡（外观）在湖中的倒影，沿日内瓦湖一路前行，途经世界文化遗产拉沃葡萄梯田，抵达洛桑，游览乌希码头与奥林匹克公园。之后入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 古堡酒店 → 第戎 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Head to Dijon, home of fine wine and mustard, to see the old town and Notre-Dame de Dijon. After lunch, visit a Burgundy winery's courtyard, cellars and vineyards with a professional sommelier's tasting and commentary, then transfer to a 4-star hotel in central Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 前往红酒与芥末之乡第戎，参观第戎老城与第戎圣母院。午餐后前往勃艮第葡萄产区，参观酒庄庭院、酒窖与葡萄园，由专业侍酒师负责品酒与深度讲解，随后前往巴黎市区四星酒店入住。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 凡尔赛 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Visit the Palace of Versailles southwest of Paris, a masterpiece of Baroque and Rococo art, with an in-depth guided tour. Return to central Paris in the afternoon for free time around the Opera, Boulevard Haussmann and the grand department stores (Printemps, Galeries Lafayette).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎西南郊的凡尔赛宫深度游览，欣赏巴洛克与洛可可艺术瑰宝。下午返回巴黎市区，自由游览奥斯曼大街与皇家大道，外观巴黎歌剧院，逛春天百货、老佛爷等时尚街区。

timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 → 卢浮宫 → 巴黎
timeline.description_en: Tour the Louvre with a French national-museum guide and a curated theme, then see Notre-Dame, the Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (from outside) and the Champ de Mars. A Seine river cruise passes Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and Place de la Concorde, ending the tour in central Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解；随后游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、外观埃菲尔铁塔与战神广场，并乘塞纳河游船观赏荣军院、大小皇宫与协和广场，全天游览巴黎市中心，于意大利广场结束行程。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy. Group meets in Rome on Day 1; hotel self check-in from 14:00. International flights into Rome and out of Paris are not included.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马。第1天在罗马集合，14点后可自行入住酒店。往返国际机票（抵达罗马、离开巴黎）不含。

title_en: Italy in 6 Days: Tuscany, Cinque Terre & the Dolomites Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利6天享乐小团：托斯卡纳、五渔村与多洛米蒂
short_en: A 6-day one-way small-group journey from Rome to Milan through Tuscany's cypress hills, the Cinque Terre, Florence, Venice and the Dolomites.
short_zh: 6天单程小团，从罗马一路畅游至米兰，串联托斯卡纳柏树田园、五渔村、佛罗伦萨、威尼斯与多洛米蒂山。
desc_en: This 6-day small-group tour traces a relaxed one-way route from Rome up to Milan, blending Tuscany's golden countryside with art cities and Alpine drama. Wander the medieval lanes of Pienza and Siena, ride the scenic train through the cliffside villages of the Cinque Terre, marvel at the Leaning Tower of Pisa, soak up Renaissance Florence and romantic Venice, then climb by cable car into the Dolomites before ending beside Lake Garda and at Milan's Gothic cathedral. With two nights in a five-star Tuscan spa hotel and three nights in city-centre four-star hotels, it pairs iconic sights with comfortable, unhurried pacing.
desc_zh: 这条6天小团线路以舒适的单程方式从罗马一路向北抵达米兰，把托斯卡纳的金色田园、艺术名城与阿尔卑斯山的壮丽风光融为一体。漫步皮恩扎与锡耶纳的中世纪街巷，乘景观列车穿行五渔村悬崖上的彩色渔村，仰望比萨斜塔，沉浸于文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨与浪漫水城威尼斯，再乘缆车登上多洛米蒂山，最后在加尔达湖畔与米兰哥特式大教堂前结束旅程。两晚入住五星托斯卡纳SPA酒店、三晚入住市中心四星酒店，经典景点与从容节奏兼得。

highlights.en: Photograph Tuscany's iconic cypress-lined lanes and the UNESCO Val d'Orcia from the walls of medieval Pienza
highlights.zh: 在中世纪古城皮恩扎城墙俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰谷，拍摄托斯卡纳标志性的柏树小径

highlights.en: Ride the scenic coastal train through the cliffside fairy-tale villages of the Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车穿行五渔村，欣赏悬崖上五彩斑斓的童话渔村

highlights.en: See the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the Square of Miracles, then explore Renaissance Florence and its Duomo
highlights.zh: 打卡比萨斜塔与奇迹广场，再走进文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨，参观圣母百花大教堂

highlights.en: Discover romantic Venice — St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and winding canals — with included island ferry
highlights.zh: 畅游浪漫水城威尼斯——圣马可广场、叹息桥与蜿蜒水巷，含威尼斯登岛轮渡

highlights.en: Ride cable cars into the Dolomites at Seceda or Alpe di Siusi for sweeping Alpine meadow and peak views
highlights.zh: 乘缆车登上多洛米蒂的刀锋山或休斯高原，饱览高山草甸与峰峦风光

highlights.en: Relax beside Lake Garda and finish at Milan's Gothic Duomo and the Vittorio Emanuele II Galleria
highlights.zh: 在加尔达湖畔小憩，于米兰大教堂与埃马努埃莱二世长廊收尾

highlights.en: Two nights in a five-star Tuscan spa hotel plus three nights in city-centre four-star hotels — no constant repacking
highlights.zh: 两晚五星托斯卡纳SPA酒店连住、三晚市中心四星酒店，省去频繁换房奔波

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with a 6-15 guest leisure small group, professional Chinese-speaking guide and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含的6-15人享乐小团，专业中文导游全程讲解，绝无强制购物

includes.en: 5 nights' hotels: 2 nights in a five-star hotel and 3 nights in comfort four-star hotels
includes.zh: 5晚酒店：五星酒店2晚、舒适型四星酒店3晚

includes.en: 5 meals (hotel breakfasts or equivalent)
includes.zh: 餐饮共5餐（酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮）

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes and fees: city tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls and island landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Tour coach / intercity transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士及城际交通

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: business van with Chinese-speaking driver-guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游全程带领）

includes.en: Luggage allowance: 1 checked bag (23 kg) plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attractions and activities: Milan Cathedral, Seceda return cable car, Cinque Terre scenic train and Venice island ferry
includes.zh: 活动及门票：米兰大教堂、刀锋山往返缆车、五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡

excludes.en: International and any flights; passport fees
excludes.zh: 国际及任何机票；个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/visa fees for the countries visited
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify coverage if high-risk activities are involved)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共计10欧元/人/天（大小同价）

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary (e.g. the Venetian cuttlefish-ink three-course meal in Venice is at own expense)
excludes.zh: 除行程内特色餐外的午、晚正餐（如威尼斯墨鱼面三道式大餐需自理）

excludes.en: Entries to sights marked "exterior view", "recommended", "optional" or "experience" and any sight not listed as included
excludes.zh: 标注"外观""推荐""可选""体验"等及未注明费用包含的景点门票

excludes.en: Other transport not included (e.g. Venice gondola, in-town tourist trains and electric carts in restricted zones)
excludes.zh: 未包含的其他交通（如威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车及电瓶出租车等）

excludes.en: Optional and free-time activities, extra nights, personal expenses, drinks, taxis, phone charges, and any costs not mentioned as included
excludes.zh: 自由活动与推荐项目、延长住宿、私人消费、饮料酒类、出租车、电话费及费用包含中未提及的其他费用

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 皮恩扎 → 锡耶纳 → 蒙特卡蒂尼
timeline.description_en: Leave Rome for the heart of Tuscany, stopping to photograph the famous cypress lanes and visiting Pienza's Pius II Square and cathedral (exterior). After lunch, explore old Siena — its cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, town hall and Torre del Mangia (exterior) — before checking into a five-star spa hotel in Montecatini.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后离开罗马前往托斯卡纳，先在著名的柏树小径自由拍照，游览皮恩扎古城的二世广场与大教堂（外观）。午餐后前往锡耶纳古城，参观锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观），随后入住蒙特卡蒂尼五星SPA酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 蒙特卡蒂尼 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 蒙特卡蒂尼
timeline.description_en: Travel to La Spezia and ride the scenic train along the Ligurian coast through the cliffside villages of the Cinque Terre. In the afternoon visit Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Square of Miracles, then return to the Montecatini spa hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往拉斯佩齐亚，沿利古里亚海岸线乘景观列车游览悬崖上的五渔村。下午前往比萨，参观比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后返回蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店入住。

timeline.title_zh: 蒙特卡蒂尼 → 佛罗伦萨 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Head to Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, to see the old town: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and Piazza/Basilica di Santa Croce (exterior). Continue to Venice for the night in a four-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观），之后前往威尼斯入住四星酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 特伦托
timeline.description_en: Explore the water city of Venice — St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior) — amid winding canals. You may also try the local cuttlefish-ink three-course meal (own expense) before transferring to Trento for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与华丽的总督宫（外观），漫步蜿蜒水巷。可自费品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式大餐，随后前往特伦托入住四星酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento → Bolzano → Ortisei → Val di Funes → Trento
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 → 博尔扎诺 → 奥蒂塞伊 → 富内斯山谷 → 特伦托
timeline.description_en: Stroll Bolzano's old town, then continue to Ortisei to ride the cable car up Seceda over the Dolomite peaks, or visit the Alpe di Siusi high meadows. Carry on to the Val di Funes and the village of Santa Maddalena to photograph its St John's Church (the "lonely church") before returning to Trento.
timeline.description_zh: 上午漫步博尔扎诺老城街巷，随后前往奥蒂塞伊小镇，可乘缆车登顶刀锋山俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，或前往休斯高原草甸欣赏高山风光。之后前往富内斯山谷，在圣马达莱娜村外观打卡圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂），游览后返回特伦托。

timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 → 加尔达湖 → 米兰
timeline.description_en: Drive to Lake Garda for Alpine lake-and-mountain scenery, then spend the afternoon in Milan: Sforza Castle (exterior), the Gothic masterpiece of Milan Cathedral and a stroll through the Vittorio Emanuele II Galleria, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色。下午游览北意名城米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观）、哥特式杰作米兰大教堂，并漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊，最后结束愉快旅程。

meeting_en: Tour departs from Rome, Italy. The journey is one-way and ends in Milan.
meeting_zh: 行程从意大利罗马出发，单程游览，最终于米兰结束。

title_en: Italy in Depth: Dolomites & 4 Classic Cities, 7-Day Small-Group Tour (Milan to Rome)
title_zh: 意大利深度7天享乐小团：多洛米蒂+四大名城（米兰至罗马）
short_en: A 7-day one-way journey from Milan to Rome through the Dolomites, Venice, Tuscany, Cinque Terre and the Eternal City, in a luxury small group.
short_zh: 7天单程深度游，从米兰直达罗马，穿越多洛米蒂、威尼斯、托斯卡纳、五渔村与永恒之城，轻奢小团沉浸体验。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Milan to Rome on a 7-day boutique small-group tour that links the dramatic peaks of the Dolomites with Italy's greatest art cities. Ride cable cars over Seceda, drift past Lake Garda, glide through canal-laced Venice, soak up Renaissance Florence, ride the scenic train along the cliffside Cinque Terre, and walk medieval Siena and Pienza before reaching ancient Rome. With city-centre 4 and 5-star hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver, and all listed attractions and taxes included, it is a seamless, all-inclusive way to experience the best of northern and central Italy.
desc_zh: 7天精品小团单程之旅，从米兰一路深入罗马，将多洛米蒂的壮丽峰群与意大利顶级艺术名城串联在一起。乘缆车登顶刀锋山，途经加尔达湖，漫游水城威尼斯，沉浸文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨，搭乘景观列车饱览悬崖上的五渔村，再走访中世纪古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，最终抵达古罗马帝国发祥地永恒之城。全程入住市中心四五星酒店，配中文司机兼导游，含所列景点门票与各项税费，一价全含，省心畅游。

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Milan to Rome covering the Dolomites and four classic Italian cities
highlights.zh: 米兰到罗马单程深度路线，串联多洛米蒂与四大经典名城

highlights.en: Ride the Seceda cable car over the jagged peaks and alpine meadows of the Dolomites
highlights.zh: 乘刀锋山（Seceda）缆车，俯瞰多洛米蒂锯齿状峰群与高山草甸

highlights.en: Explore romantic Venice — St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and winding canals
highlights.zh: 游览浪漫水城威尼斯，圣马可广场、叹息桥与蜿蜒水巷

highlights.en: Soak up Renaissance Florence: the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Ponte Vecchio and Piazza della Signoria
highlights.zh: 沉浸文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、老桥与市政广场

highlights.en: Scenic train ride along the colourful cliffside villages of the Cinque Terre, plus the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 搭乘景观列车游览悬崖上五彩的五渔村，并打卡比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Medieval gems Siena and Pienza with the cypress-lined views of the Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 中世纪古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，邂逅奥尔恰谷绝美绝柏树小径

highlights.en: Flights-free intercity transport, city-centre 4 & 5-star hotels, all listed attractions and taxes included — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 城际交通、市中心四五星酒店、所列景点门票及各项税费全含，绝无强制购物

highlights.en: Luxury small group with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver for a relaxed, immersive pace
highlights.zh: 轻奢小团配中文司机兼导游，节奏舒适，深度沉浸体验

includes.en: 6 nights' accommodation: 2 nights 5-star and 4 nights comfort 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 6晚住宿：五星酒店2晚，舒适型四星级酒店4晚

includes.en: 6 meals: daily hotel breakfast or equivalent (6 meals total)
includes.zh: 餐饮共6餐：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes and fees: tourist/city tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Intercity transport by tour coach (business van + Chinese-speaking guide-driver for groups of 8 or fewer)
includes.zh: 旅游巴士交通（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a full-trip Chinese-speaking guide-driver
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Luggage allowance: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attractions & tickets: Milan Cathedral, Rome Pantheon, Seceda return cable car, Cinque Terre scenic train, Venice island ferry
includes.zh: 活动及门票：米兰大教堂、罗马万神殿、刀锋山往返缆车、五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡

excludes.en: International flights and personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 国际机票及个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (confirm high-risk activities are covered if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: €10 per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费：共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary (e.g. Venice cuttlefish-ink pasta set meal is at own cost)
excludes.zh: 行程内未含的午、晚正餐（如威尼斯墨鱼面三道式自理）

excludes.en: Attractions not marked as included, including 'exterior view' sights and recommended/optional/experience items
excludes.zh: 未注明费用包含的景点（含标注"外观"的景点及推荐、可选、体验等项目）

excludes.en: Extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing outside the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用

excludes.en: Personal expenses such as drinks, alcohol, taxis and phone calls
excludes.zh: 私人消费，如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等

excludes.en: Other transport not included: Venice gondola, sightseeing trains/electric carts in restricted zones, etc.
excludes.zh: 费用包含外的其他交通：如威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车、电瓶出租车等

excludes.en: Optional and free-time activities and any related transport, meals, tickets or shopping costs
excludes.zh: 自由活动及推荐项目，以及由此产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 加尔达湖 → 特伦托
timeline.description_en: Begin in the northern Italian style capital of Milan, viewing the Sforza Castle (exterior) before touring the Gothic masterpiece of the Duomo and strolling the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon, take in the alpine lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Garda, then continue to Trento to check in.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往兼具古典气质与现代活力的北意名城米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观），随后游览哥特式杰作米兰大教堂，漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊；下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后前往特伦托入住酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento → Bolzano → Ortisei → Val di Funes → Trento
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 → 博尔扎诺 → 奥蒂塞伊 → 富内斯山谷 → 特伦托
timeline.description_en: Wander the old streets of Bolzano, then ride the cable car up Seceda for sweeping views over the Dolomites (or visit the Alpe di Siusi high meadows). Continue to the Val di Funes and the village of Santa Maddalena to photograph the iconic St John's Church (exterior) before returning to Trento.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往博尔扎诺，漫步于老城街巷。随后前往奥蒂塞伊小镇，可乘缆车登顶刀锋山俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，或前往休斯山高原草甸欣赏高山草原风光。之后前往富内斯山谷，抵达圣马达莱娜村后外观打卡圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂），游览结束后返回特伦托酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Set off for the floating city of Venice. Visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the ornate Doge's Palace (exterior), where beautiful waterborne architecture and winding canals create Venice's unforgettable romance. You may also try the local cuttlefish-ink pasta set meal (at own cost).
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）、华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建于水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久难忘。在此还可品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式（自理）。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 托斯卡纳（佛罗伦萨）
timeline.description_en: Travel to Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance. Explore the old town's highlights: the world's third-largest cathedral Santa Maria del Fiore, Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, and Piazza and Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), before checking into your Tuscan spa hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥，以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住托斯卡纳SPA酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Head to the Cinque Terre and travel the Ligurian coast by scenic train, visiting the colourful cliffside fishing villages. In the afternoon, see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa's historic centre, then return to your Tuscan hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和奇迹广场，之后返回托斯卡纳大区入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 锡耶纳 → 皮恩扎 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Visit the medieval art treasure of Siena — the Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall and Torre del Mangia (exterior). After lunch, explore Pienza's Piazza Pio II and Cathedral (exterior), then drive to Rome, pausing for photos along the cypress-lined paths of the Val d'Orcia before arriving in the capital.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。午餐后前往皮恩扎古城，参观二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观），之后前往罗马，途中在绝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 — 永恒之城
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, take a guided walking tour of historic Rome, birthplace of the Roman Empire. See the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (entry included), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior) before the tour ends. Rome's old city is a pedestrian zone, with around 5–6 km of walking on the day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在导游带领下徒步游览历史名城罗马，古罗马帝国的发祥地、永恒之城。参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（含门票），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观），随后结束愉快旅程。罗马古城为步行区，当天步行约5–6公里。

meeting_en: Milan, Italy — tour departs from Milan; the journey ends in Rome (one-way route).
meeting_zh: 意大利米兰 — 行程从米兰出发，于罗马结束（单程路线）。

title_en: Italy & the Dolomites: 9-Day Small-Group Tour (Milan to Rome)
title_zh: 意大利与多洛米蒂9日享乐小团（米兰至罗马）
short_en: A 9-day small-group journey from Milan to the Amalfi Coast, blending Dolomite peaks, Venice, Tuscany, Rome and Capri.
short_zh: 9天享乐小团，从米兰一路深玩到阿马尔菲海岸，串联多洛米蒂雪峰、威尼斯、托斯卡纳、罗马与卡普里岛。
desc_en: This one-way deep-dive carries you the length of Italy in nine days, from cosmopolitan Milan and the shores of Lake Garda up to the jagged peaks of the Dolomites at Seceda, then on to romantic Venice and Renaissance Florence. You'll ride the scenic train through clifftop Cinque Terre, wander medieval Siena and the Val d'Orcia, walk the streets of eternal Rome, and finish along the Amalfi Coast with boat trips to Positano, Amalfi and the Blue Grotto of Capri. A relaxed 6-15 person small group with city-centre 4- and 5-star hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver, and all core attractions and taxes included.
desc_zh: 这是一条单程深度路线，9天纵贯意大利：从时尚都会米兰与加尔达湖出发，登上多洛米蒂山脉锯齿状的刀锋山（Seceda），再前往浪漫水城威尼斯与文艺复兴之城佛罗伦萨。沿途乘坐景观列车游览悬崖上的五彩童话五渔村，漫步中世纪古城锡耶纳与奥尔恰谷，探访永恒之城罗马，最后沿阿马尔菲海岸乘船游波西塔诺、阿马尔菲与卡普里岛蓝洞。6至15人享乐小团，连住市区4至5星酒店，全程中文司机兼导游，核心景点门票与各项税费全含。

highlights.en: Ride the Seceda cable car for jagged Dolomite ridgelines and high alpine meadows (or Alpe di Siusi plateau)
highlights.zh: 乘刀锋山（Seceda）缆车饱览多洛米蒂锯齿峰群与高山草甸（或登休斯高原草甸）

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace on the water
highlights.zh: 浪漫威尼斯：圣马可广场、叹息桥与水上总督宫

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence with the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore) and the Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之城佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂与老桥

highlights.en: Scenic train through the clifftop fishing villages of the Cinque Terre, plus the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 景观列车穿行悬崖上的五渔村，并打卡比萨斜塔与奇迹广场

highlights.en: Medieval Siena, hilltop Pienza and the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 中世纪古城锡耶纳、皮恩扎与奥尔恰谷的丝柏树小径

highlights.en: Rome the Eternal City: Colosseum, Pantheon (entry included), Trevi Fountain and Spanish Steps
highlights.zh: 永恒之城罗马：斗兽场、万神殿（含门票）、特莱维喷泉与西班牙广场

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast by boat to Positano and Amalfi, plus Capri island and its famed Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 乘船游阿马尔菲海岸的波西塔诺与阿马尔菲，并环游卡普里岛探秘蓝洞

highlights.en: Relaxed 6-15 person small group, city-centre 4-5 star hotels, Chinese-speaking guide, all taxes & core tickets included
highlights.zh: 6-15人享乐小团，连住市区4-5星酒店，全程中文导游，税费与核心门票全含

includes.en: 8 nights' hotels: 2 nights 5-star plus 6 nights comfort 4-star
includes.zh: 8晚酒店：五星酒店2晚＋舒适型四星级酒店6晚

includes.en: 8 breakfasts (hotel breakfast or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共8餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary taxes: city/tourist tax, town-entry, residence tax, road/bridge tolls and island-landing fees
includes.zh: 行程内所有税费：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等

includes.en: Tour coach / intercity ground transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士及城际交通

includes.en: Professional Chinese-speaking guide-driver (groups of 8 or fewer travel by business van with a combined Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机＋中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车＋中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 checked bag up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attractions & tickets: Milan Cathedral, Rome Pantheon, Seceda round-trip cable car, Cinque Terre scenic train, Venice island ferry, Amalfi/Positano boat cruise, Capri round-trip ferry
includes.zh: 活动及门票：米兰大教堂、罗马万神殿、刀锋山往返缆车、五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船

excludes.en: International flights and personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 国际机票及个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/visa fees for the countries visited
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家的旅游观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (confirm high-risk activities are covered if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费共10欧元/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specifically noted as included (e.g. the Venice cuttlefish-ink pasta meal is at own expense)
excludes.zh: 除行程内注明的特色餐外，不含午、晚正餐（如威尼斯墨鱼面三道式自理）

excludes.en: Attractions not marked as included, including all 'exterior view' sites and any 'recommended/optional/experience' items
excludes.zh: 未注明含费用的景点，包括所有标注“外观”的景点及“推荐/可选/体验”等项目

excludes.en: Capri Blue Grotto entry and boat fees (boatman tip 2-5 EUR per local custom); plus on-island transport (cable car/taxi) which is self-arranged
excludes.zh: 卡普里岛蓝洞游览费用（按当地习俗付船工小费2-5欧元）及岛上交通（缆车/出租车）自理

excludes.en: Other transport such as the Venice gondola and restricted-zone sightseeing trains/electric taxis
excludes.zh: 其他交通如威尼斯贡多拉、限行区观光火车及电瓶出租车等

excludes.en: Extra accommodation/transport beyond the itinerary, personal spending, and free-time activities
excludes.zh: 行程外额外住宿/交通、私人消费及自由活动产生的费用

timeline.title_zh: 米兰 → 加尔达湖 → 特伦托
timeline.description_en: Morning in cosmopolitan Milan: Sforza Castle (exterior), the Gothic Duomo and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon enjoy the alpine lake scenery of Lake Garda, then transfer to Trento for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览时尚都会米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观）、哥特式米兰大教堂，漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往加尔达湖欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后入住特伦托酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento → Bolzano → Ortisei → Funes Valley → Trento
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 → 博尔扎诺 → 奥蒂塞伊 → 富内斯山谷 → 特伦托
timeline.description_en: Stroll the German-Austrian old town of Bolzano, then at Ortisei ride the cable car up Seceda for the Dolomite peaks (or visit the Alpe di Siusi plateau). Continue to the Funes Valley to photograph the lonely St John's Church at Santa Maddalena before returning to Trento.
timeline.description_zh: 上午漫步德奥风情的博尔扎诺老城，随后在奥蒂塞伊乘缆车登顶刀锋山俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群（或前往休斯高原草甸）。之后前往富内斯山谷，在圣马达莱娜村外观打卡圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂），返回特伦托。

timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 → 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel to the water city of Venice and visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the Doge's Palace (exterior). Optionally try Venice's signature cuttlefish-ink pasta (at own expense).
timeline.description_zh: 前往水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与总督宫（外观）。可自费品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式。

timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 → 托斯卡纳（佛罗伦萨）
timeline.description_en: Head to the birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence, to see the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Overnight at a 5-star spa hotel in Montecatini, Tuscany.
timeline.description_zh: 前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观聖母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）。入住托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼五星SPA酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 五渔村 → 比萨 → 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: Ride the scenic train along the Ligurian coast through the clifftop fishing villages of the Cinque Terre. In the afternoon visit Pisa's Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli, then return to your Tuscan hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午沿利古里亚海岸乘景观列车游览悬崖上的五渔村；下午前往比萨参观比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场，之后返回托斯卡纳酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 → 锡耶纳 → 皮恩扎 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Explore the medieval gem of Siena — the Duomo (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the town hall and Torre del Mangia (exterior). Continue to hilltop Pienza, then drive on to Rome with a photo stop along the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia.
timeline.description_zh: 游览中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳：锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。之后前往山城皮恩扎，在奥尔恰谷的丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 罗马 → 那不勒斯 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: Walk the Eternal City with your guide (about 5-6 km on foot): the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (entry included), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Then visit the old town of Naples — the Royal Palace and Castel Nuovo (exteriors) — before settling in Sorrento.
timeline.description_zh: 在导游带领下徒步游览永恒之城罗马（约5-6公里）：斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（含门票）、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）。随后游览那不勒斯老城，参观那不勒斯皇宫与新堡（外观），之后入住索伦托。

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 阿马尔菲 → 波西塔诺 → 索伦托
timeline.description_en: A boat day along the Amalfi Coast: sail to the clifftop village of Positano, then on to Amalfi for panoramic coastal views before cruising back to Sorrento. (If rough seas cancel the cruise, the day switches to a coach visit of Sorrento old town and the boat fee is refunded.)
timeline.description_zh: 乘游船一日游探索阿马尔菲海岸：先乘船前往悬崖小镇波西塔诺，再前往阿马尔菲欣赏海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回索伦托。（如遇海上恶劣天气取消出海，将改为大巴游览索伦托老城，出海费用退还。）

timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 → 卡普里岛 → 罗马
timeline.description_en: Ferry to the Mediterranean paradise of Capri for free time — stroll the seafront, circle the island to glimpse the Blue Grotto, or visit the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the bay. Ferry back, then transfer to Rome where the tour ends. (Capri on-island transport and the Blue Grotto are at own expense.)
timeline.description_zh: 乘渡船前往地中海天堂卡普里岛自由活动：可海边漫步、自费乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或前往奥古斯都花园俯瞰海湾。之后乘渡船返回，前往罗马结束行程。（卡普里岛上交通及蓝洞游览费用自理。）

meeting_en: Tour starts in Milan (variant A, Milan to Rome). A reverse Rome-to-Milan routing (variant B) is also available; pickup details confirmed on booking.
meeting_zh: 行程于米兰出发（A线：米兰至罗马）。另设罗马出发、米兰结束的反向B线；具体接站信息以预订确认为准。

title_en: Germany, Switzerland & Austria 7-Day Alpine Tour from Frankfurt
title_zh: 德国瑞士奥地利7天跟团游（法兰克福往返）
short_en: A 7-day Alpine loop from Frankfurt through Heidelberg, Zurich, the Jungfrau region, Neuschwanstein, Innsbruck, Salzburg, Hallstatt, Munich and Nuremberg.
short_zh: 7天阿尔卑斯环线，从法兰克福出发，串联海德堡、苏黎世、少女峰地区、新天鹅堡、因斯布鲁克、萨尔茨堡、哈尔施塔特、慕尼黑与纽伦堡。
desc_en: This 7-day small-group tour traces a 360-degree loop around the Alps across Germany, Switzerland and Austria, departing and returning at Frankfurt. From romantic Heidelberg and the financial city of Zurich, you head into the heart of Switzerland — the Jungfrau region, Interlaken's two lakes, Lucerne and the legendary Glacier Express through the Devil's Bridge. The route then crosses into Bavaria and Tyrol for the fairy-tale Neuschwanstein castle, Innsbruck, Mozart's Salzburg and the storybook lakeside village of Hallstatt, before finishing with beer-hall Munich and medieval Nuremberg.
desc_zh: 这趟7天享乐小团围绕阿尔卑斯山做360度环线游览，串联德国、瑞士、奥地利三国精华，从法兰克福出发并返回。行程从浪漫的海德堡、金融之都苏黎世启程，深入瑞士腹地——少女峰地区、因特拉肯的图恩湖与布里恩茨湖、卢塞恩，以及途经天险魔鬼桥的传奇冰川列车。随后翻越进入巴伐利亚与蒂罗尔，探访童话般的新天鹅堡、因斯布鲁克、莫扎特的故乡萨尔茨堡，以及被誉为世界最美小镇的湖畔哈尔施塔特，最后以啤酒之城慕尼黑与中世纪古城纽伦堡收尾。

highlights.en: Glacier Express scenic rail through the Alps, past the Devil's Bridge and Medel ice peak
highlights.zh: 乘坐冰川列车穿越阿尔卑斯山，途经天险魔鬼桥与梅德尔冰峰

highlights.en: The Jungfrau region — Grindelwald, the two lakes of Interlaken and views of Alpine peaks
highlights.zh: 少女峰地区——格林德尔瓦尔德、因特拉肯两湖与阿尔卑斯雪山全景

highlights.en: Neuschwanstein Castle, the real-life model for the Disney fairy-tale castle
highlights.zh: 新天鹅堡——迪士尼童话城堡的原型

highlights.en: Hallstatt, the UNESCO-listed lakeside village known as the world's most beautiful town
highlights.zh: 哈尔施塔特——列入世界遗产、被誉为世界最美的湖畔小镇

highlights.en: Mozart's Salzburg and Innsbruck, the heart of the Alps with its Golden Roof
highlights.zh: 莫扎特故乡萨尔茨堡，以及拥有黄金屋顶的阿尔卑斯山心脏因斯布鲁克

highlights.en: Bavarian Munich and medieval Nuremberg, with the chance to dine at a historic beer hall
highlights.zh: 巴伐利亚慕尼黑与中世纪古城纽伦堡，可选择在百年啤酒馆品尝烤猪肘

highlights.en: Flights and intercity transport included, with flexible boarding at Frankfurt or Zurich
highlights.zh: 含机票与城际交通，可在法兰克福或苏黎世灵活上团

highlights.en: Small group of 6–15, city-centre 4-star hotels, listed sights included and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 6–15人享乐小团，入住市中心四星酒店，含所列景点，全程无强制购物

includes.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (6 nights)
includes.zh: 市中心四星级酒店住宿（6晚）

includes.en: Daily breakfast at the hotel
includes.zh: 酒店每日早餐

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver
includes.zh: 持证中文导游兼司机

includes.en: Intercity transport by coach throughout the tour
includes.zh: 全程城际旅游巴士交通

includes.en: Sightseeing as listed in the itinerary (city walks and exterior visits)
includes.zh: 行程所列景点游览（城市漫步及外观参观）

includes.en: Local taxes and service fees
includes.zh: 当地税费及服务费

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际段机票

excludes.en: Visa fees
excludes.zh: 签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐

excludes.en: Optional activities: Glacier Express seat reservation (1st class €190 / 2nd class €140), Jungfrau summit cable car + cog railway (€230), First–Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip (€70)
excludes.zh: 自费项目：冰川列车订座（一等€190 / 二等€140）、缆车加齿轮火车登顶少女峰（€230）、菲斯特–格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返（€70）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费

excludes.en: Personal expenses and anything not listed under inclusions
excludes.zh: 个人消费及费用包含以外的项目

timeline.title_zh: 法兰克福 → 海德堡 → 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and head to Heidelberg, the epitome of romantic Germany, to see Heidelberg Castle, the Old Bridge and the university square. In the afternoon continue to Zurich for the old town, Grossmünster cathedral, Lake Zurich and a stroll along the Limmat river. Overnight in Zurich.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后前往浪漫德国的缩影——海德堡，游览海德堡城堡、老桥与海德堡大学广场。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世老城、大教堂、苏黎世湖，并漫步利马特河畔。夜宿苏黎世。

timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 → 少女峰地区 → 因特拉肯 → 萨尔嫩
timeline.description_en: Visit the village of Grindelwald and its dreamy hillside; optionally take the cable car to summit the Jungfrau and the Sphinx observation deck overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. Then continue to Interlaken, set between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, to wander its tranquil streets. Overnight in Sarnen.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观格林德尔瓦尔德小镇与梦幻山坡，可自费乘缆车登顶少女峰，登上斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川。随后前往位于图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间的因特拉肯，自由漫步何维克街等宁静街区。夜宿萨尔嫩。

timeline.title_en: Sarnen → Lucerne → Andermatt → Chur → St. Gallen
timeline.title_zh: 萨尔嫩 → 卢塞恩 → 安德马特 → 库尔 → 圣加仑
timeline.description_en: After breakfast visit Lucerne — Lake Lucerne, the Lion Monument, the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal water tower. Continue to Andermatt, where you can optionally ride the Glacier Express on its dramatic Andermatt–Chur stretch over Alpine passes, past the Medel ice peak and the Devil's Bridge. Arrive in St. Gallen for the evening. Overnight in St. Gallen.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥与八角水塔。之后前往安德马特，可自费乘坐冰川列车体验精彩的安德马特–库尔段，途经阿尔卑斯山口、梅德尔冰峰与魔鬼桥。傍晚抵达圣加仑，晚上可自由游览老城。夜宿圣加仑。

timeline.title_zh: 圣加仑 → 新天鹅堡 → 菲森 → 因斯布鲁克
timeline.description_en: Visit Neuschwanstein Castle, the model for the Disney fairy-tale castle, then explore the town of Füssen. In the afternoon head to Innsbruck, the heart of the Alps, to see the famous Golden Roof (exterior), the old town and Maria-Theresien-Straße. Overnight in Innsbruck.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往参观迪士尼城堡原型——新天鹅堡，随后游览菲森小镇。下午前往阿尔卑斯山心脏因斯布鲁克，游览著名的黄金屋顶（外观）、老城区与玛丽亚·特雷西亚大街。夜宿因斯布鲁克。

timeline.title_zh: 因斯布鲁克 → 萨尔茨堡 → 哈尔施塔特
timeline.description_en: Head to Salzburg, Mozart's birthplace and a filming location of The Sound of Music, to see the old town, the cathedral, Getreidegasse, Mozart's house (exterior) and Mirabell Gardens. In the afternoon visit the Austrian fairy-tale village of Hallstatt — its lake, market square and church. Overnight in Bad Goisern (Hallstatt area).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往莫扎特故乡、《音乐之声》拍摄地萨尔茨堡，参观老城、大教堂、粮食街、莫扎特故居（外观）与米拉贝尔花园。下午前往奥地利童话小镇哈尔施塔特，游览哈尔施塔特湖、集市广场与天主教堂。夜宿戈伊瑟恩（哈尔施塔特地区）。

timeline.title_zh: 哈尔施塔特 → 慕尼黑
timeline.description_en: Travel via the Wolfgangsee lake district to Munich, the Bavarian capital. Explore the old town, Marienplatz and the old and new town halls, with the option to dine at the historic Hofbräuhaus beer hall over a Bavarian pork knuckle. Overnight in Munich.
timeline.description_zh: 上午途经圣沃尔夫冈湖区前往巴伐利亚州首府慕尼黑，游览慕尼黑老城、玛丽恩广场、新旧市政厅，可选择到拥有四百多年历史的HB皇家啤酒馆品尝烤猪肘。夜宿慕尼黑。

timeline.title_zh: 慕尼黑 → 纽伦堡 → 法兰克福
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit Nuremberg, a medieval city where many German emperors were born, to see the old town, St. Lawrence Church and the Imperial Castle. In the afternoon return to Frankfurt train station, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往中世纪古城纽伦堡，这里曾是多位德意志皇帝的诞生地，游览纽伦堡古城、圣劳伦茨教堂与国王堡。下午返回法兰克福火车站，结束愉快行程。

meeting_en: Frankfurt, Germany — departs and returns to Frankfurt (flexible boarding at Frankfurt or Zurich).
meeting_zh: 德国法兰克福——法兰克福出发并返回（可在法兰克福或苏黎世灵活上团）。

title_en: Canary Islands 4-Island Volcanic Escape — 8-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 加那利群岛四岛火山之旅 8日跟团游
short_en: Island-hop Lanzarote, Fuerteventura, Gran Canaria and Tenerife in 8 days — lava caves, Timanfaya volcanoes, Mount Teide and Atlantic whale watching.
short_zh: 8天畅游兰萨罗特、富埃特文图拉、大加那利与特内里费四岛——火山熔岩洞、蒂曼法亚火山、泰德峰雪山与大西洋观鲸。
desc_en: A one-way deep journey across the Spanish Canary Islands, from the black-lava world of Lanzarote through Fuerteventura and Gran Canaria to Mount Teide on Tenerife. Explore César Manrique's volcanic-art caves at Jameos del Agua and Cueva de los Verdes, watch a live volcanic eruption show at Timanfaya, ride a submarine off Mogán, hike the Mars-like White Canyon below Teide's snow-capped summit, and sail the Atlantic to meet pilot whales and dolphins. With ferries, 4-star hotels, every listed attraction and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver included, it is an effortless way to see four utterly different islands in a single trip.
desc_zh: 一条单程深度的西班牙加那利群岛之旅，从兰萨罗特岛的黑色熔岩世界，经富埃特文图拉岛、大加那利岛，直达特内里费岛的泰德峰。探访塞萨尔·曼里克设计的哈迈奥斯水洞与绿洞火山艺术馆，观看蒂曼法亚国家公园的真实火山喷发表演，在莫甘港乘潜水艇潜入海底，在泰德峰雪山脚下徒步火星般的白色峡谷，并出海与领航鲸、海豚相遇。渡轮、四星酒店、行程内全部景点门票及中文司导全程含，让你在一次旅程中轻松领略四座截然不同的海岛。

highlights.en: Whale and dolphin watching by boat on the Atlantic, in a certified Whale Heritage Site
highlights.zh: 出海观赏大西洋鲸鱼与海豚，置身世界认证的鲸鱼遗产地

highlights.en: Cable car to the snow-capped summit of Mount Teide and a hike through the White Canyon
highlights.zh: 乘缆车登顶泰德峰雪山之巅，徒步穿行火星般的白色峡谷

highlights.en: Timanfaya National Park live volcanic-eruption demonstration
highlights.zh: 蒂曼法亚国家公园现场火山喷发表演

highlights.en: César Manrique's volcanic-art caves: Jameos del Agua and Cueva de los Verdes
highlights.zh: 塞萨尔·曼里克火山艺术杰作：哈迈奥斯水洞与绿洞

highlights.en: Ride a real submarine to 25m off Mogán to see the underwater Atlantic world
highlights.zh: 在莫甘港乘坐潜水艇下潜25米，探索海底大西洋世界

highlights.en: Three inter-island ferries — see four distinct island landscapes in one route
highlights.zh: 三段跨岛渡轮，一程看遍四座风格迥异的海岛

highlights.en: Camel ride across the black volcanic fields of Lanzarote
highlights.zh: 兰萨罗特岛黑色火山原野骑骆驼漫游

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels, all listed attractions and Chinese-speaking guide-driver included — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星酒店、全部景点门票及中文司导全程含，绝无强制购物

includes.en: 7 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 四星级酒店住宿7晚

includes.en: 7 buffet breakfasts and 7 dinners in-hotel (14 meals total)
includes.zh: 酒店内自助早餐7餐及晚餐7餐，共计14餐

includes.en: Tourist taxes, city-entry and residence taxes, road/bridge tolls, parking, fuel and guide-driver meal allowances
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费及司导餐补等执行费用

includes.en: Tour coach or business van transport throughout
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或旅游商务车全程用车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机加中文导游（8人及以下安排商务车加中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: one 23kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 行李额：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: All listed attraction tickets: Jameos del Agua, Cueva de los Verdes (with guide), Mirador del Río, Cactus Garden, Timanfaya National Park pass, La Geria winery, LagOmar Museum, Dragon Tree Park, Teide cable-car return ticket, camel ride, Mogán submarine, and whale & dolphin watching
includes.zh: 全部景点门票：哈迈奥斯水洞、绿洞（含向导讲解）、里奥观景台、仙人掌花园、蒂曼法亚国家公园通票、拉赫里亚酒庄、拉戈马尔博物馆、龙血树公园、泰德峰缆车往返票、骆驼之旅、莫甘港潜水艇、出海观鲸与海豚

includes.en: Three inter-island ferries: Lanzarote–Fuerteventura, Fuerteventura–Gran Canaria, Gran Canaria–Tenerife
includes.zh: 三段跨岛渡轮：兰萨罗特岛–富埃特文图拉岛、富埃特文图拉岛–大加那利岛、大加那利岛–特内里费岛

excludes.en: International and inbound flights to the Canary Islands
excludes.zh: 往返加那利群岛的国际及大交通机票

excludes.en: Passport fees
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (note: standard travel insurance does not cover snorkelling/diving risks)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险（请注意：普通旅游保险不包含浮潜风险）

excludes.en: Lunches and any meals not listed
excludes.zh: 午餐及行程内未注明的其他餐食

excludes.en: Optional activities such as the Gran Canaria stargazing tour and the Tenerife paragliding experience (subject to weather, volcano conditions and a 10-person minimum)
excludes.zh: 自费选择项目，如大加那利岛观星之旅、特内里费岛滑翔伞体验（视天气、火山情况而定，自费项目10人成团）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费

excludes.en: Personal expenses
excludes.zh: 个人消费

timeline.title_zh: 抵达兰萨罗特岛
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Lanzarote and check in to the seafront hotel after 14:00. The rest of the day is free to rest or take a first look around the island.
timeline.description_zh: 自行飞抵兰萨罗特岛，14点后入住海滨酒店。当天为自由活动时间，可根据抵达时间自行休息或初步探索目的地。

timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛 火山洞穴与艺术
timeline.description_en: Discover northern Lanzarote: descend into the Cueva de los Verdes lava tube and the surreal Jameos del Agua water cave designed by César Manrique, take in the panoramic Mirador del Río, then stroll the sculptural Cactus Garden.
timeline.description_zh: 深入兰萨罗特岛北部，探访绿洞熔岩管道与塞萨尔·曼里克设计的哈迈奥斯水洞，登临里奥观景台饱览海天美景，再漫步设计独特的仙人掌花园。

timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛 蒂曼法亚与骑骆驼
timeline.description_en: Explore southern Lanzarote: enter Timanfaya National Park for its alien volcanic landscape and live eruption demonstration, take a camel ride across the black lava fields, visit the La Geria vineyards and the storied LagOmar Museum.
timeline.description_zh: 探索兰萨罗特岛南部，深入蒂曼法亚国家公园欣赏外星般的火山地貌与现场火山喷发表演，骑骆驼穿行黑色火山原野，走访拉赫里亚葡萄种植区与拉戈马尔博物馆。

timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛 → 富埃特文图拉岛 → 大加那利岛
timeline.description_en: A three-island day by ferry: cross to Fuerteventura for its wild west coast — La Oliva's purple wildflower hills, the Ajuy caves and a black volcanic beach — then ferry on to Gran Canaria, with an optional stargazing tour in the evening. (Ferries may be replaced by a flight in poor sea conditions.)
timeline.description_zh: 一日跳三岛：乘渡轮前往富埃特文图拉岛，欣赏原始壮丽的西海岸——拉奥利瓦的紫色花海、阿胡伊洞穴与黑色火山海滩，随后继续乘渡轮抵达大加那利岛，当晚可自费选择观星之旅。（如海况不佳，渡轮可能由航班替代。）

timeline.title_zh: 大加那利岛 莫甘港与潜水艇
timeline.description_en: Classic Gran Canaria circuit: wander the colourful Mediterranean village and harbour of Mogán and take a submarine dive to explore the seabed, then visit the historic Casa de Colón (Columbus House).
timeline.description_zh: 大加那利岛经典环岛之旅：漫步充满地中海风情的莫甘港彩色小镇与港湾，乘潜水艇探索海底世界，随后参观历史地标哥伦布之家。

timeline.title_en: Gran Canaria → Tenerife — La Laguna & Dragon Trees
timeline.title_zh: 大加那利岛 → 特内里费岛 拉拉古纳与龙血树
timeline.description_en: Ferry to Tenerife and tour its architecture and culture: the UNESCO-listed colonial old town of La Laguna and the seaside Puerto de la Cruz, followed by the Dragon Tree park, before checking in near Playa de las Américas.
timeline.description_zh: 乘渡轮前往特内里费岛，开启文化巡礼：游览联合国教科文世界遗产拉拉古纳古城与克鲁斯港海滨风情，随后前往千年龙血树公园，当晚入住美洲海滩附近。

timeline.title_zh: 特内里费岛 泰德峰与白色峡谷
timeline.description_en: Enter the UNESCO World Heritage Teide National Park, ride the cable car to the snow-capped summit of Mount Teide (3,715m) and hike the striking White Canyon. The afternoon is free at Playa de las Américas or an optional paragliding experience after 16:00. (Hiking boots required; cable car subject to weather.)
timeline.description_zh: 深入世界自然遗产泰德国家公园，乘缆车直达泰德峰雪山峰顶（海拔3715米），徒步独特的白色峡谷。下午自由游览美洲沙滩，或自费选择16:00后的滑翔伞体验。（须穿系带徒步鞋；缆车视天气情况运行。）

timeline.title_zh: 特内里费岛 出海观鲸与海豚 / 返程
timeline.description_en: Set sail into the Atlantic for whale and dolphin watching in the Teno–Rasca special protection area, home to resident pilot whales and playful bottlenose dolphins, before the tour concludes.
timeline.description_zh: 乘船出海，在特内里费–拉戈梅拉海特别保护区观赏野生鲸鱼与海豚——这里常年栖息着短肢领航鲸与活泼的宽吻海豚，随后结束愉快的旅途。

meeting_en: Lanzarote, Canary Islands (Spain) — travellers arrive independently; the tour begins at the Los Jameos seafront hotel (or equivalent 4-star), with the guide assembling the group at the hotel each morning.
meeting_zh: 西班牙加那利群岛兰萨罗特岛——游客自行抵达，于洛斯哈梅奥斯海滨酒店（或同等4星级酒店）开始行程，每日由导游在酒店集合出发。

title_en: Canary Islands 4-Island Escape: 9-Day Guided Tour (Lanzarote to Tenerife)
title_zh: 加那利群岛四岛探索9日跟团游（兰萨罗特岛—特内里费岛）
short_en: A one-way 9-day journey across four Canary Islands — volcanoes, lava caves, whale watching and Mount Teide, with included attractions and city hotels.
short_zh: 一段9天单程深度之旅，跨越加那利四座海岛：火山、熔岩洞穴、出海观鲸与泰德峰登顶，景点全含、入住海滨四星酒店。
desc_en: This 9-day one-way adventure island-hops across four of the Canary Islands, beginning on volcanic Lanzarote and ending on Tenerife. You will explore the surreal lava caves of Jameos del Agua and Cueva de los Verdes, ride a camel through Timanfaya National Park's black volcanic fields, ferry past the curve of the Earth to Gran Canaria, dive in a submarine off Mogan, climb snow-capped Mount Teide by cable car, and sail the Atlantic to watch resident pilot whales and dolphins. Eight nights of seafront 4-star hotels plus a final night in a 5-star Moorish-palace resort round out the trip, with all listed attractions, ferries and a Chinese-speaking guide included.
desc_zh: 这是一段9天单程的群岛跳岛之旅，从火山遍布的兰萨罗特岛出发，最终抵达特内里费岛，沿途跨越四座加那利海岛。您将深入超现实的哈迈奥斯水洞与绿洞熔岩洞穴，在蒂曼法亚国家公园的黑色火山原野上骑骆驼漫游，乘渡轮在大西洋上欣赏地球曲线前往大加那利岛，在莫甘港乘潜水艇探索海底世界，搭乘缆车登顶雪山泰德峰，并出海邂逅常年栖息于此的领航鲸与海豚。全程入住8晚海滨四星酒店，最后一晚升级入住五星红色摩尔宫殿度假酒店；所列景点、岛际渡轮及中文导游全部包含。

highlights.en: Whale and dolphin watching by boat in the Atlantic's certified 'Whale Heritage Site'
highlights.zh: 出海观赏鲸鱼与海豚，畅游获认证的大西洋“鲸鱼遗产地”

highlights.en: Cable-car ascent to the snow-capped summit of Mount Teide, a UNESCO World Heritage site
highlights.zh: 搭乘缆车登顶世界自然遗产泰德峰，俯瞰雪山云海

highlights.en: Hike the otherworldly White Canyon (Cañada Blanca) lava landscape in Teide National Park
highlights.zh: 徒步穿行泰德国家公园如火星般的白色峡谷火山地貌

highlights.en: Watch a simulated volcanic eruption at Timanfaya National Park and ride a camel across the lava
highlights.zh: 在蒂曼法亚国家公园观看模拟火山喷发表演，并体验火山熔岩骑骆驼漫游

highlights.en: Explore the surreal lava caves of Jameos del Agua and Cueva de los Verdes with a geo-guide
highlights.zh: 在地质向导带领下探索哈迈奥斯水洞与绿洞超现实熔岩洞穴

highlights.en: Dive in a real submarine off Mogan to see Atlantic reefs, shipwrecks and marine life
highlights.zh: 在莫甘港乘坐潜水艇下潜海底，观赏大西洋沉船、鱼群与海洋生态

highlights.en: One-day island-hop across Lanzarote, Fuerteventura and Gran Canaria — three islands, three worlds
highlights.zh: 一日跳三岛，跨越兰萨罗特、富埃特文图拉与大加那利岛，一岛一世界

highlights.en: Included attractions, inter-island ferries and Chinese-speaking guide — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 景点门票、岛际渡轮与中文导游全含，无强制购物

includes.en: 7 nights in 4-star hotels plus 1 night in a 5-star feature/scenic hotel (per Booking/Ctrip star standards)
includes.zh: 四星级酒店7晚，五星特色景观酒店1晚（酒店星级参考Booking或携程标准）

includes.en: 15 meals: 8 buffet (or other) breakfasts and 7 buffet (or other) dinners (5-star Moorish palace night: breakfast only)
includes.zh: 共15餐：自助早餐或其他形式早餐8餐、自助晚餐或其他形式晚餐7餐（五星摩尔宫殿酒店含早餐不含晚餐）

includes.en: Operational fees: city tax, entry tax, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, parking and fuel, guide-driver meal allowance
includes.zh: 执行费用：城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Tourist coach or business van for the whole trip
includes.zh: 全程旅游巴士或旅游商务车

includes.en: Professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: business van with Chinese-speaking driver-guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游（8人及以下安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Luggage allowance: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: All listed attraction tickets: Jameos del Agua, Cueva de los Verdes (incl. guide), Mirador del Río, Cactus Garden, Timanfaya National Park pass, La Geria winery, LagOmar Museum, Dragon Tree Park, Mount Teide cable car (round-trip), camel ride, Mogan submarine, whale & dolphin boat trip
includes.zh: 全部所列门票：哈迈奥斯水洞、绿洞（含向导讲解费）、里奥观景台、仙人掌花园、蒂曼法亚国家公园通票、拉赫里亚酒庄、拉戈马尔博物馆、龙血树公园、泰德峰缆车往返票、骆驼之旅、莫甘港潜水艇、出海观鲸鱼与海豚

includes.en: Three inter-island ferry segments: Lanzarote-Fuerteventura, Fuerteventura-Gran Canaria, Gran Canaria-Tenerife
includes.zh: 三段岛际渡轮：兰萨罗特岛—富埃特文图拉岛、富埃特文图拉岛—大加那利岛、大加那利岛—特内里费岛

excludes.en: International flights to Lanzarote and home from Tenerife
excludes.zh: 往返国际机票（飞抵兰萨罗特岛及从特内里费岛返程）

excludes.en: Passport and visa fees
excludes.zh: 护照及签证费用

excludes.en: Travel and personal insurance (note: standard travel insurance does not cover snorkelling/free-diving)
excludes.zh: 旅游及个人保险（注意：普通旅游保险不含浮潜风险，敬请自行查看保单）

excludes.en: Lunches throughout the trip and the dinner on the 5-star Moorish-palace night
excludes.zh: 全程午餐，以及五星摩尔宫殿酒店当晚的晚餐

excludes.en: Optional activities (e.g. Gran Canaria stargazing, paragliding) — quoted as group price for 10 pax; may be cancelled below that number
excludes.zh: 自费选择性活动（如大加那利岛观星、滑翔伞等）——团队价按10人成团报价，少于该人数可能取消

excludes.en: Personal expenses and gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 个人消费及司机、导游小费

timeline.title_zh: 抵达兰萨罗特岛
timeline.description_en: Fly independently to Lanzarote and make your own way to the seafront 4-star hotel; check-in is available after 14:00. The rest of the day is free to rest or begin exploring this volcanic island.
timeline.description_zh: 自行飞往兰萨罗特岛，抵达后根据酒店订单信息前往海滨四星酒店办理入住，14点后可办理入住。当天为自由活动时间，可自行安排休息或初步探索这座火山海岛。

timeline.title_en: Lanzarote: Lava Caves & Art (Jameos del Agua, Cueva de los Verdes)
timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛：熔岩洞穴与艺术（哈迈奥斯水洞、绿洞）
timeline.description_en: A northern nature-and-art tour: descend into the mysterious lava tubes of Cueva de los Verdes and the crystalline Jameos del Agua, take in sweeping sea views from Mirador del Río, then stroll the uniquely designed Cactus Garden where art meets nature.
timeline.description_zh: 开启兰萨罗特岛北部自然与艺术之旅：深入神秘的绿洞与晶莹剔透的哈迈奥斯水洞熔岩洞穴，登临里奥观景台将海天美景尽收眼底，再漫步设计独特的仙人掌花园，体验艺术与自然的融合。

timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛：蒂曼法亚火山与骆驼之旅
timeline.description_en: Explore the island's volcanic south: enter Timanfaya National Park's alien landscapes, ride a camel across the black lava fields and watch a live simulated eruption, then visit the La Geria wine region and the imaginative LagOmar Museum.
timeline.description_zh: 探索兰萨罗特岛南部火山地貌：深入蒂曼法亚国家公园领略如外星球般的壮丽景观，特别安排骆驼之旅穿行黑色火山原野并观看现场模拟火山喷发表演，随后走访拉赫里亚葡萄种植区与充满传奇色彩的拉戈马尔博物馆。

timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛—富埃特文图拉岛—大加那利岛：一日跳三岛
timeline.description_en: An Atlantic crossing touching three islands in one day. Ferry to Fuerteventura for its wild west coast — La Oliva's purple flower fields, the dramatic Ajuy caves and black volcanic beaches — then continue by ferry to Gran Canaria. An optional stargazing experience is available in the evening.
timeline.description_zh: 一日跨三岛的大西洋海面之旅。乘渡轮前往富埃特文图拉岛，探访原始壮丽的西海岸：拉奥利瓦小镇雨季后的紫色花海、震撼的阿胡伊洞穴与黑色火山砂砾海滩，随后继续乘渡轮前往大加那利岛。当晚可自费选择大加那利岛观星之旅。

timeline.title_en: Gran Canaria: Mogan Harbour & Submarine Dive
timeline.title_zh: 大加那利岛：莫甘港与潜水艇
timeline.description_en: A classic island tour starting at the colourful Mediterranean-style harbour town of Mogan, where you board a submarine to explore the underwater world at depths around 25 metres. Afterwards visit the historic Columbus House and its Age of Discovery heritage.
timeline.description_zh: 开启大加那利岛经典环岛之旅：先前往充满地中海风情的莫甘港，漫步彩色小镇与宁静港湾，乘坐潜水艇下潜约25米探索海底世界；随后参观历史文化地标哥伦布之家，感受大航海时代的印记。

timeline.title_en: Gran Canaria - Tenerife: La Laguna Old Town & Dragon Tree
timeline.title_zh: 大加那利岛—特内里费岛：拉拉古纳古城与龙血树
timeline.description_en: Ferry to Tenerife for a cultural tour: wander the UNESCO-listed colonial old town of La Laguna with its colourful mansions, the seaside town of Puerto de la Cruz, and the millennia-old Dragon Tree Park, before settling in near Playa de las Américas.
timeline.description_zh: 乘渡轮前往特内里费岛开启文化巡礼：游览被联合国教科文组织列为世界遗产的拉拉古纳殖民时代古城与彩色洋房，欣赏海滨小镇克鲁斯港，并前往千年龙血树公园，当晚入住美洲沙滩区域。

timeline.title_en: Tenerife: Mount Teide & White Canyon Hike
timeline.title_zh: 特内里费岛：泰德峰与白色峡谷徒步
timeline.description_en: Enter the UNESCO World Heritage Teide National Park, ride the cable car to the snow-capped summit and hike the silver-and-pink lava landscape of the White Canyon (Cañada Blanca). The afternoon is free at Playa de las Américas, or an optional paragliding experience after 16:00. Note: lace-up hiking shoes are required for the cable car and canyon hike.
timeline.description_zh: 深入世界自然遗产泰德国家公园，乘坐缆车直达雪山峰顶，徒步由火山熔岩塑造的银白色峡谷（白色峡谷）。下午自由游览美洲沙滩，或自费选择16:00后的滑翔伞体验。特别提醒：登缆车及峡谷徒步必须穿着有系带的徒步鞋。

timeline.title_en: Tenerife: Whale & Dolphin Watching, 5-Star Palace Stay
timeline.title_zh: 特内里费岛：出海观鲸观豚，入住五星宫殿酒店
timeline.description_en: Set sail across the Atlantic to encounter wild marine life in the Teno-Rasca special reserve — a certified Whale Heritage Site home to over 400 resident pilot whales plus playful bottlenose dolphins. Tonight, check into a luxurious 5-star Moorish-palace seaview resort.
timeline.description_zh: 乘船开启观鲸与观海豚之旅，在特内里费—拉戈梅拉特别保护区邂逅野生海洋生物：这里是获认证的“鲸鱼遗产地”，常年栖息超过400头短肢领航鲸，还有活泼的宽吻海豚。当晚入住奢华五星红色摩尔宫殿海景度假酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 特内里费岛：返程
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, check out by the hotel's stated time. The day is free until you make your own way to the airport for your flight home, ending a memorable journey.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后按酒店规定时间办理退房，随后自由活动。可根据个人航班时间自行前往机场搭乘航班返回，结束愉快的旅程。

meeting_en: Lanzarote (Canary Islands), Spain — guests arrive independently and check in at the seafront 4-star hotel; the guided tour begins after breakfast on Day 2.
meeting_zh: 西班牙加那利群岛兰萨罗特岛——游客自行抵达并入住海滨四星酒店，跟团行程于第2天早餐后开始。

title_en: Denmark & Norway 4-Day Small-Group Tour: Oslo to Copenhagen
title_zh: 丹麦挪威4天跟团游：奥斯陆至哥本哈根
short_en: A one-way Scandinavian journey from Oslo to Copenhagen via Gothenburg, Aalborg and Andersen's fairy-tale town of Odense.
short_zh: 从奥斯陆到哥本哈根的单程斯堪的纳维亚之旅，途经哥德堡、奥尔堡与安徒生童话小镇欧登塞。
desc_en: This 4-day one-way small-group tour links the Scandinavian capitals of Oslo and Copenhagen, threading through Sweden's port city of Gothenburg, the Danish town of Aalborg, and Hans Christian Andersen's fairy-tale hometown of Odense. You'll wander Oslo's Vigeland Sculpture Park and waterfront opera house, cross the Kattegat Strait by ferry, step into 19th-century rural Denmark at the Funen Village open-air museum, and finish among the colourful canal houses of Copenhagen's Nyhavn and the Little Mermaid. Art, architecture, Nordic 'slow living' and fairy-tale charm unfold across four unhurried days.
desc_zh: 这是一条连接斯堪的纳维亚两大首都奥斯陆与哥本哈根的4天单程小团之旅，沿途串联瑞典港口城市哥德堡、丹麦城市奥尔堡，以及安徒生的童话故乡欧登塞。您将漫步奥斯陆的维格兰雕塑公园与海滨歌剧院，乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡，在菲英村露天博物馆走进19世纪的丹麦乡村，最后在哥本哈根新港色彩斑斓的运河小屋与小美人鱼像旁结束旅程。艺术、建筑、北欧式的慢生活与童话浪漫，在四天里徐徐展开。

highlights.en: One-way deep route linking the Scandinavian capitals Oslo and Copenhagen
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路，串联斯堪的纳维亚两大首都奥斯陆与哥本哈根

highlights.en: Vigeland Sculpture Park, Oslo's iconic meditation on life and humanity
highlights.zh: 维格兰雕塑公园，奥斯陆以思考生命与人生为主题的标志性艺术地标

highlights.en: Ferry crossing of the Kattegat Strait between Denmark and Sweden
highlights.zh: 乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡，往返丹麦与瑞典之间

highlights.en: Andersen's fairy-tale town of Odense, with the Andersen Museum and childhood home
highlights.zh: 安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆与儿时故居

highlights.en: Funen Village open-air museum recreating 19th-century rural Denmark
highlights.zh: 菲英村露天博物馆，重现19世纪丹麦乡村生活

highlights.en: Copenhagen highlights: the Little Mermaid, Nyhavn and Amalienborg Palace
highlights.zh: 哥本哈根经典：小美人鱼像、新港与阿美琳堡宫

highlights.en: Brand-name city-centre 4-star hotels, perfect for evening strolls and dining
highlights.zh: 入住品牌连锁市区4星级酒店，方便夜间自由漫步与用餐

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with attraction tickets and ferry included, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含，含景点门票与渡轮，无强制购物

includes.en: 3 nights in 4-star hotels (Norway hotels rated per Booking/Ctrip standards)
includes.zh: 四星级酒店3晚（挪威酒店星级参考Booking或携程标准）

includes.en: 3 Scandinavian-style hotel buffet breakfasts
includes.zh: 斯堪的纳维亚式酒店自助早餐3餐

includes.en: In-itinerary operating fees: city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, parking and fuel, driver-guide meal allowance
includes.zh: 行程内执行费用：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补

includes.en: Tourist coach or business-class touring vehicle
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或旅游商务车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or full-trip Chinese-speaking driver-guide (8 pax or fewer: business vehicle with Chinese-speaking driver-guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文华人司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece of 23kg checked plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Attraction tickets: Andersen Museum, Andersen's childhood home, Funen Village, Frederikshavn-Gothenburg ferry, Vigeland Sculpture Park
includes.zh: 门票：安徒生博物馆、安徒生儿时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港至哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园

excludes.en: International flights
excludes.zh: 国际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 午餐及晚餐

excludes.en: Any personal expenses and optional activities not listed
excludes.zh: 个人消费及未列明的自选项目

timeline.title_zh: 奥斯陆 → 哥德堡
timeline.description_en: Meet in central Oslo at 11:00. Tour the Nobel Peace Prize venue Oslo City Hall (exterior), watch the changing of the guard at the Royal Palace, visit the medieval Akershus Fortress and the glacier-like Oslo Opera House (exterior), where you can walk up the sloping roof for fjord views. End at the Vigeland Sculpture Park before driving to Sweden's west-coast port of Gothenburg for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午11:00在挪威首都奥斯陆市区集合。参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地奥斯陆市政厅（外观），在皇宫外观看卫兵换岗，游览中世纪的阿克斯胡斯城堡，以及如冰川般的奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），可走上倾斜的屋顶俯瞰峡湾风光。随后参观以思考生命与人生为主题的维格兰雕塑公园，之后前往瑞典西海岸港口城市哥德堡入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡 → 腓特烈港 → 奥尔堡
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Gothenburg at leisure: Masthugget Church (exterior), the Poseidon statue and Avenyn boulevard. Board a ferry at Gothenburg harbour across the Kattegat Strait to Frederikshavn, then continue to Aalborg. On arrival, stroll the city centre freely: Aalborg Castle (exterior), Budolfi Church and the historic Duus Vinkjaelder old street and pedestrian zone, then check in.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观哥德堡的马斯塔盖特教堂（外观）、海神波塞冬雕塑与Avenyn大道。之后在哥德堡港口乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡前往腓特烈港，再前往奥尔堡。抵达后自由游览市区景点：奥尔堡城堡（外观）、Budolfi教堂、杜赫芬老街及步行街，随后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡 → 欧登塞 → 哥本哈根
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Andersen's fairy-tale town of Odense to visit the Hans Christian Andersen Museum and childhood home and St. Canute's Cathedral. Step into 19th-century Danish country life at the Funen Village open-air museum and feel the rural inspiration behind Andersen's tales. In the afternoon, drive on to Copenhagen and check in.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆和故居、圣克努特教堂，之后在菲英村体验19世纪的丹麦乡村生活，感受故乡带给安徒生的创作灵感。下午前往哥本哈根入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, see the symbol of Denmark, the Little Mermaid statue, the grand Gefion Fountain, the star-shaped Kastellet citadel, and the royal splendour of Amalienborg Palace (exterior). In the afternoon, visit Frederik's Church (the Marble Church, exterior), the historic Round Tower (exterior), the Royal Danish Library 'Black Diamond', the landmark Nyhavn harbour and the famous Stroget shopping street, where the tour concludes.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观丹麦的象征小美人鱼雕像、气势磅礴的吉菲昂喷泉、文艺复兴时期星形要塞之一卡斯特雷特五角要塞，以及阿美琳堡宫（外观）感受王室气派与卫队风采。下午参观腓特烈教堂（又名大理石教堂，外观）、欧洲古老的天文台圆塔（外观）、哥本哈根的黑钻石丹麦皇家图书馆、地标新港，以及著名的购物步行街斯楚格街，行程圆满结束。

meeting_en: Central Oslo, Norway. Group meets at 11:00 on Day 1 in the Oslo city centre.
meeting_zh: 挪威奥斯陆市区。第1天上午11:00在奥斯陆市区集合。

title_en: Norway Fjords in Depth: 8-Day Small-Group Tour from Copenhagen
title_zh: 挪威峡湾深度8天小团游（哥本哈根往返）
short_en: Fly into Norway and journey one-way through its greatest fjords, glaciers and clifftops over 8 days, returning to Copenhagen.
short_zh: 8天单程深度畅游挪威最壮丽的峡湾、冰川与悬崖奇石，哥本哈根航班往返，效率与美景兼得。
desc_en: An 8-day one-way journey through the heart of Norway's fjordland, beginning with a flight from Copenhagen to the millennium-old Viking city of Trondheim and ending with an art-and-architecture stroll through Oslo. Along the way you cross the iconic Atlantic Ocean Road, cruise the UNESCO-listed Geirangerfjord, walk to the blue ice of Briksdal Glacier, ride the world-famous Flam mountain railway, and hike to the legendary Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) high above Lysefjord. With domestic flights and scenic rail included, fjord-view hotels and city-centre 4-star stays, and all six signature experiences pre-booked, it is an efficient, all-inclusive deep dive into western Norway.
desc_zh: 8天单程贯穿挪威峡湾腹地的深度旅程：从哥本哈根飞抵千年维京古城特隆赫姆开篇，以奥斯陆的艺术与建筑漫步收尾。沿途驰骋摄影圣地大西洋之路，乘船巡游世界遗产盖朗厄尔峡湾，徒步抵达布里克斯达尔冰川的蓝冰前沿，搭乘世界闻名的弗洛姆高山火车，并登顶吕瑟峡湾之上的传奇布道石。内陆机票与景观火车全包，入住峡湾特色景观酒店与市区四星级酒店，六大特色体验提前预订，是一次高效而全包的挪威西部深度之旅。

highlights.en: Cruise the UNESCO-listed Geirangerfjord past the Seven Sisters and Suitor waterfalls
highlights.zh: 乘船巡游世界遗产盖朗厄尔峡湾，近距离观赏七姐妹瀑布与求婚者瀑布

highlights.en: Drive the Atlantic Ocean Road, named one of the world's great road-trip routes
highlights.zh: 驰骋摄影师朝圣的大西洋之路，世界级公路旅行目的地之一

highlights.en: Walk to the blue ice of Briksdal Glacier aboard an open-top troll car
highlights.zh: 乘精灵敞篷车徒步至布里克斯达尔冰川蓝冰前沿

highlights.en: Ride the world-famous Flam mountain railway, one of Europe's top scenic rail journeys
highlights.zh: 搭乘世界闻名的弗洛姆陡峭高山火车，欧洲十大观光铁路之一

highlights.en: Hike to Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) for breathtaking views over Lysefjord
highlights.zh: 徒步登顶布道石，俯瞰吕瑟峡湾令人窒息的壮阔美景

highlights.en: Explore the millennium-old Viking city of Trondheim and the World Heritage Bryggen in Bergen
highlights.zh: 探访千年维京古城特隆赫姆，打卡卑尔根世界遗产布吕根

highlights.en: Domestic flights and scenic rail included, with a one-way deep route for maximum sightseeing efficiency
highlights.zh: 内陆机票与景观火车全包，单程深度线路大幅提高游览效率

highlights.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver, fjord-view and city-centre 4-star hotels, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 中文司导全程随行，峡湾景观酒店+市区四星级酒店，全程无强制购物

includes.en: Domestic taxed flights: Copenhagen-Trondheim & Oslo-Copenhagen (Route A), or Copenhagen-Oslo & Trondheim-Copenhagen (Route B)
includes.zh: 内陆含税机票：A线哥本哈根-特隆赫姆及奥斯陆-哥本哈根，B线哥本哈根-奥斯陆及特隆赫姆-哥本哈根

includes.en: 7 nights' hotels: 5 nights 4-star plus 2 nights special fjord-view hotels
includes.zh: 酒店7晚：四星级酒店5晚 + 峡湾特色景观酒店2晚

includes.en: 9 meals total: 1 Norwegian fish dinner, 1 buffet dinner and 7 Scandinavian breakfasts
includes.zh: 共9餐：1餐挪威特色鱼餐、1餐自助晚餐及7次斯堪的纳维亚式早餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary operating fees: city/tourist tax, congestion charges, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel, guide-driver meal allowance
includes.zh: 行程内执行费用：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等

includes.en: Tour coach or business van transport throughout
includes.zh: 全程旅游巴士或旅游商务车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: business van with Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游（8人及以下安排商务车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李 + 1件随身行李

includes.en: 6 included experiences: Preikestolen hike with guide, Floyen funicular, Flam railway ticket, Briksdal Glacier, troll car, Geirangerfjord cruise
includes.zh: 6项门票体验：布道石徒步及向导服务、弗洛伊恩山缆车、弗洛姆高山列车火车票、布里克斯达尔冰川、精灵敞篷车、盖朗厄尔峡湾游船

excludes.en: International flights to/from Copenhagen
excludes.zh: 往返哥本哈根的国际机票

excludes.en: Passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist/Schengen visa fees for countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家所需的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk activity coverage for hikes)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（含徒步等高风险运动，请核实保险是否涵盖）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not listed above (e.g. self-arranged lunch on the Preikestolen hike day)
excludes.zh: 上述未含的午餐及晚餐（如布道石徒步日需自备午餐及饮用水）

excludes.en: Personal expenses and any optional activities
excludes.zh: 个人消费及任何自费项目

timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根 → 特隆赫姆
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Copenhagen airport and fly to Trondheim, where your guide-driver meets you. Explore the millennium-old Viking capital, including Scandinavia's most important medieval building, Nidaros Cathedral, and the colourful Old Town Bridge and Bakklandet district. Overnight at a 4-star hotel in the historic Bakklandet quarter.
timeline.description_zh: 自行前往哥本哈根机场，乘机飞往特隆赫姆，司导接机后入住酒店。游览千年维京古都，参观斯堪的纳维亚半岛最重要的中世纪建筑——尼德罗斯主教座堂，步行至色彩缤纷的老城桥与巴克兰德历史街区，并可品尝当地传统甜品特隆赫姆球。夜宿巴克兰德街区四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trondheim → Kristiansund → Atlantic Ocean Road → Molde → Stranda
timeline.title_zh: 特隆赫姆 → 克里斯蒂安松 → 大西洋之路 → 莫尔德 → 斯特兰达
timeline.description_en: Drive to the pretty town of Kristiansund at the eastern end of the Atlantic Ocean Road and visit its harbour and old town. After lunch, traverse the legendary 36km scenic Atlantic Ocean Road with its 11 sweeping curves, then visit Molde before reaching Stranda or the Valldal valley. Overnight at a classic Norwegian riverside hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往大西洋之路东端的美丽小镇克里斯蒂安松，参观港口码头与老城区；午餐后驰骋全长36公里、拥有11个急弯的景观公路大西洋之路；随后游览午夜阳光之城莫尔德，抵达斯特兰达或瓦尔河谷入住。夜宿经典挪威河畔酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯特兰达 → 盖朗厄尔 → 布里克斯达尔冰川 → 松达尔
timeline.description_en: Cruise the spectacular Geirangerfjord past sheer cliffs and waterfalls, then take the Eagle Road. In the afternoon, ride an open-top troll car past Volefossen waterfall to the foot of Briksdal Glacier and walk to its ancient blue ice. Overnight at a fjord-view hotel in Sogndal.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后乘坐盖朗厄尔峡灣游轮欣赏峡湾美景，随后行经老鹰之路；下午前往奥尔登小镇，乘精灵敞篷车途经沃伦福斯大瀑布抵达布里克斯达尔冰川，徒步至万古蓝冰前沿。夜宿松达尔峡湾景观酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 松达尔 → 弗洛姆 → 沃斯 → 卑尔根
timeline.description_en: Visit Flam and the Sognefjord, then ride the world-famous Flam mountain railway to Myrdal and continue by train to the town of Voss. Arrive in rainy Bergen to see the World Heritage Bryggen wharf, ride the Floyen funicular for city views, and sample seafood at the fish market. Overnight at a 4-star hotel in Bergen.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往弗洛姆，游览弗洛姆铁路博物馆、小镇与松恩峡湾，乘坐世界闻名的陡峭高山火车至米达尔，转乘挪威官方火车前往美丽小镇沃斯；之后抵达雨城卑尔根，参观世界遗产布吕根，乘弗洛伊恩山缆车俯瞰全城，在鱼市品尝海鲜大餐。夜宿卑尔根四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 卑尔根 → 哈当厄尔峡湾 → 奥达 → 海于格松
timeline.description_en: Stop at Steinsdalsfossen waterfall, where a path lets you walk behind the cascade, then follow the gentle, painterly Hardangerfjord lined with colourful cottages, apple and cherry orchards. Visit the quiet town of Odda before reaching Haugesund. Overnight at a 4-star hotel in the heart of Haugesund.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后来到斯坦达尔瀑布，体验穿行于水帘之后的奇观；随后沿点缀着彩色小屋、苹果园与樱桃园的哈当厄尔峡湾田园而行，游览宁静的奥达小镇，感受挪威西部丘陵森林风光，抵达海于格松。夜宿海于格松市中心四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 海于格松 → 布道石 → 斯塔万格
timeline.description_en: Set off from Haugesund to Lysefjord for the highlight hike to Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock), a flat clifftop with breathtaking fjord views. The round trip is about 8km and takes 4-5 hours over rugged terrain, so sturdy hiking boots and self-arranged lunch and water are advised. Reach Stavanger in the afternoon and overnight at a 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从海于格松出发前往吕瑟峡湾布道石景区，徒步登顶奇迹之石布道台，俯瞰吕瑟峡湾壮阔美景。布道石往返约8公里、需4-5小时，山路崎岖，建议穿防滑防水高帮登山鞋并自备午餐及饮用水。下午抵达斯塔万格入住四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯塔万格 → 克里斯蒂安桑 → 桑讷菲尤尔
timeline.description_en: Discover Norway's oil capital Stavanger: the white wooden houses of the European Capital of Culture old town, the colourful, street-art-filled Fargegata lane, and the Sword in Rock monument. After lunch drive on toward Sandefjord, resting at Kristiansand en route. Overnight at a 4-star hotel by Sandefjord harbour.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观挪威石油之都斯塔万格，品味欧洲文化之都的老城区与色彩缤纷的网红法格卡腾街区，跟随导游参观斯塔万格巨剑阵；午餐后乘车前往桑讷菲尤尔，途中在克里斯蒂安桑休息。夜宿桑讷菲尤尔海港四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 桑讷菲尤尔 → 奥斯陆 → 哥本哈根
timeline.description_en: Visit Vigeland Sculpture Park, see the Nobel Peace Prize venue Oslo City Hall (exterior), the Royal Palace guard change, medieval Akershus Fortress and the glacier-like Oslo Opera House (exterior), where you can climb the sloping roof for fjord views. Then take the train to Oslo airport and fly back to Copenhagen, ending your journey.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览以生命为主题的维格兰雕塑公园，参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地奥斯陆市政厅（外观）、皇宫卫兵换岗、中世纪阿克斯胡斯城堡及如冰川般的奥斯陆歌剧院（外观，可登顶斜坡屋顶俯瞰峡湾城景）。之后乘火车前往奥斯陆机场，自行办理登机手续飞回哥本哈根，结束愉快旅程。

meeting_en: Copenhagen Airport, Denmark. Travellers make their own way to Copenhagen and fly to Norway; the guide-driver meets the group on arrival in Trondheim (Route A) or Oslo (Route B).
meeting_zh: 丹麦哥本哈根机场。游客自行前往哥本哈根并乘机飞往挪威，司导在抵达特隆赫姆（A线）或奥斯陆（B线）时接机。

title_en: Denmark & Norway Fjords 11-Day Group Tour
title_zh: 丹麦挪威峡湾11天跟团游
short_en: An 11-day Scandinavian odyssey from Copenhagen through Norway's epic fjords, glaciers and the Atlantic Road, ending in Andersen's fairy-tale Denmark.
short_zh: 11天斯堪的纳维亚深度之旅，从哥本哈根穿越挪威壮丽峡湾、冰川与大西洋之路，最后回到安徒生的童话丹麦。
desc_en: This 11-day small-group journey loops out from Copenhagen across the heart of Scandinavia. Fly north to the Viking city of Trondheim, then trace Norway's western coast along the world-famous Atlantic Road, cruise the Geirangerfjord, hike to the Briksdal Glacier, ride the Flåm Railway, and explore Bergen, the Hardangerfjord and the Pulpit Rock above Lysefjorden. The route then crosses into Sweden at Gothenburg and returns through Denmark via Aalborg and Hans Christian Andersen's Odense to finish in Copenhagen. It blends dramatic fjord scenery, signature rail and ferry rides, two Scandinavian capitals and a Danish fairy-tale town into one seamless one-way deep route.
desc_zh: 这是一段为期11天的精品小团旅程，以哥本哈根为起点环游斯堪的纳维亚腹地。先飞抵维京古城特隆赫姆，随后沿挪威西海岸驶上举世闻名的大西洋之路，乘船巡游盖朗厄尔峡湾，徒步布里克斯达尔冰川，搭乘弗洛姆高山火车，畅游卑尔根、哈当厄尔峡湾以及吕瑟峡湾之上的布道石。行程随后跨入瑞典哥德堡，再经丹麦奥尔堡与安徒生故乡欧登塞返回哥本哈根。壮丽峡湾、特色火车与渡轮、两国首都和丹麦童话小镇尽在一条单程深度线路之中。

highlights.en: Cruise the UNESCO-listed Geirangerfjord past the Seven Sisters waterfall and towering cliffs
highlights.zh: 巡游世界遗产盖朗厄尔峡湾，近赏七姐妹瀑布与近乎垂直的峭壁

highlights.en: Drive the Atlantic Road, named Norway's 'construction of the century' and a photographer's pilgrimage
highlights.zh: 驾驶被誉为挪威世纪性建筑、摄影师朝圣地的大西洋之路

highlights.en: Ride the Flåm Railway, one of the world's steepest and most scenic mountain trains
highlights.zh: 搭乘世界上最美、最陡峭的高山铁路之一——弗洛姆高山火车

highlights.en: Hike to the Pulpit Rock (Preikestolen) for breathtaking views over Lysefjorden
highlights.zh: 徒步奇迹之石布道石，俯瞰呂瑟峡湾令人窒息的壮阔美景

highlights.en: Walk to the blue ice of the Briksdal Glacier aboard a fun open-top troll car
highlights.zh: 乘坐有趣的精灵敞篷车前往布里克斯达尔冰川的蓝冰前沿

highlights.en: Step into Hans Christian Andersen's fairy-tale world in Odense and the Funen open-air village
highlights.zh: 走进安徒生童话故乡欧登塞与菲英村，重温19世纪丹麦乡村生活

highlights.en: Internal/domestic flight sector & scenic rail included, with city-centre 4-star hotels and fjord-view stays
highlights.zh: 含内陆段航班与观光火车，入住市区四星级酒店及峡湾特色景观酒店

highlights.en: All-inclusive one-way deep route with listed attractions, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 全含单程深度线路，包含所列景点门票，无强制购物

includes.en: Domestic taxed flight sector within the tour (Copenhagen–Trondheim on Line A, or Trondheim–Copenhagen on Line B)
includes.zh: 行程内的内陆段含税机票（A线哥本哈根-特隆赫姆，或B线特隆赫姆-哥本哈根）

includes.en: 10 nights' hotels: 8 nights 4-star plus 2 nights fjord-view feature hotels
includes.zh: 10晚酒店：四星级酒店8晚，峡湾特色景观酒店2晚

includes.en: 12 meals total: 1 Norwegian specialty fish dinner, 1 buffet dinner and 10 Scandinavian breakfasts
includes.zh: 共计12餐：1餐挪威特色鱼餐、1餐自助晚餐及10次斯堪的纳维亚式早餐

includes.en: City taxes, entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, parking and fuel, and guide-driver meal allowances
includes.zh: 城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Tour coach or business van transport throughout
includes.zh: 全程旅游巴士或旅游商务车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide (groups of 8 or fewer: business van with Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机加中文导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车加中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: 1 checked bag (23kg) plus 1 carry-on per person
includes.zh: 每人1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attraction entries: Andersen Museum, Andersen's childhood home, Funen Village, Frederikshavn–Gothenburg ferry, Vigeland Sculpture Park, Pulpit Rock guided hike, Fløyen funicular, Flåm Railway ticket, Briksdal Glacier, troll car and Geirangerfjord cruise
includes.zh: 所列门票：安徒生博物馆、安徒生儿时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港至哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园、布道石徒步及向导服务、弗洛伊恩山缆车、弗洛姆高山列车火车票、布里克斯达尔冰川、精灵敞篷车、盖朗厄尔峡湾游船

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Personal passport and visa fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照及签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the inclusions (10 breakfasts, 1 fish dinner and 1 buffet dinner are included; the Pulpit Rock day requires you to bring your own lunch and water)
excludes.zh: 未列明的午餐和晚餐（已含10次早餐、1餐鱼餐及1餐自助晚餐；布道石当天需自备午餐及饮用水）

excludes.en: Optional activities and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自费项目及个人消费

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费

timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根 → 特隆赫姆
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Copenhagen Airport and fly to Trondheim, where the guide-driver meets you. Explore the 'thousand-year-old capital': Nidaros Cathedral, the colourful Old Town Bridge and the Bakklandet district, and try the local Trondheim ball pastry before resting at the hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 请自行前往哥本哈根机场，乘机飞往特隆赫姆，司导接机。游览这座千年古都，参观斯堪的纳维亚半岛最重要的中世纪建筑尼德罗斯主教座堂，步行至色彩缤纷的老城桥与巴克兰德街区，并品尝当地传统甜品特隆赫姆球，之后返回酒店休息。

timeline.title_en: Trondheim → Kristiansund → Atlantic Road → Molde → Stranda
timeline.title_zh: 特隆赫姆 → 克里斯蒂安松 → 大西洋之路 → 莫尔德 → 斯特兰达
timeline.description_en: Drive to the pretty town of Kristiansund at the eastern end of the Atlantic Road and see its harbour and old town. After lunch, travel the scenic Atlantic Road, then visit the 'midnight sun city' of Molde before reaching Stranda or the Valldal valley for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 前往大西洋之路东端的美丽小镇克里斯蒂安松，参观港口码头与老城区；午餐后驶上景观公路大西洋之路，随后游览午夜阳光之城莫尔德，之后抵达斯特兰达或瓦尔河谷入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯特兰达 → 盖朗厄尔 → 布里克斯达尔冰川 → 松达尔
timeline.description_en: Take the Eagle Road and cruise the Geirangerfjord amid its sheer cliffs and waterfalls. Then ride an open-top troll car past the Vøringsfossen-style falls to the Briksdal Glacier's blue ice, before continuing to Sogndal for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 出发前往老鹰之路，乘坐盖朗厄尔峡灣游轮欣赏峡湾美景；随后乘车前往奥尔登小镇，搭乘精灵敞篷山地车途经沃伦福斯大瀑布游览布里克斯达尔冰川，前往蓝冰前沿，下午抵达松达尔入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 松达尔 → 弗洛姆 → 沃斯 → 卑尔根
timeline.description_en: Visit Flåm and the Sognefjord, then board the world-famous steep Flåm Railway to Myrdal and continue by train to Voss. Arrive in rainy Bergen to see the UNESCO Bryggen wharf, ride the Fløyen funicular for city views, and enjoy a seafood feast at the fish market.
timeline.description_zh: 乘车前往弗洛姆，游览弗洛姆铁路博物馆、弗洛姆小镇和松恩峡湾，随后乘坐世界闻名的陡峭高山火车到达米达尔，再换乘火车前往沃斯；之后前往雨城卑尔根，自由参观世界遗产布吕根，乘弗洛伊恩山缆车俯瞰全城，并在鱼市享用海鲜大餐。

timeline.title_zh: 卑尔根 → 哈当厄尔峡湾 → 奥达 → 海于格松
timeline.description_en: Visit the Steinsdalsfossen waterfall, where you can walk behind the cascade, then follow the Hardangerfjord with its orchards and colourful cottages. Pass through the tranquil town of Odda before arriving in Haugesund for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 乘车前往斯坦达尔瀑布，体验穿行于水帘之后的奇观；之后沿哈当厄尔峡湾前行，欣赏两岸点缀彩色小屋的田园及著名的苹果园与樱桃园，随后游览宁静的奥达小镇，最后抵达海于格松入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 海于格松 → 布道石 → 斯塔万格
timeline.description_en: Set out for the Pulpit Rock (Preikestolen) in Lysefjorden and hike the roughly 8km round-trip trail (4-5 hours) to the cliff-top for spectacular fjord views. In the afternoon continue to Stavanger to check in. Bring your own lunch and water and sturdy hiking shoes.
timeline.description_zh: 从海于格松出发前往呂瑟峡湾布道石景区，徒步奇迹之石布道台（往返约8公里，需4-5小时），登上巨石俯瞰呂瑟峡湾壮丽美景；下午抵达斯塔万格入住酒店。山路崎岖，请自备午餐与饮用水并穿着防滑登山鞋。

timeline.title_zh: 斯塔万格 → 克里斯蒂安桑 → 桑讷菲尤尔
timeline.description_en: Explore Stavanger, Norway's oil capital and a European Capital of Culture: the white-timber Old Town, the colourful Fargegaten street and the Sword in Rock monument. Rest at Kristiansand en route, then reach the southern coastal town of Sandefjord for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 游览挪威石油之都、欧洲文化之都斯塔万格，漫步纯白木屋的老城区与色彩缤纷的网红街区法格卡腾，参观斯塔万格巨剑阵；中途在克里斯蒂安桑休息，下午抵达南部海滨城市桑讷菲尤尔入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 桑讷菲尤尔 → 奥斯陆 → 哥德堡
timeline.description_en: Travel to Oslo to see the City Hall (exterior, Nobel Peace Prize venue), the Royal Palace guard change, Akershus Fortress, the Opera House (exterior) and the Vigeland Sculpture Park. Then cross into Sweden to the harbour city of Gothenburg for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 前往奥斯陆，参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地奥斯陆市政厅（外观），在皇宫外观看卫兵换岗，游览中世纪城堡阿克斯胡斯城堡、奥斯陆歌剧院（外观）及维格兰雕塑公园；之后前往瑞典西海岸海港城市哥德堡入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡 → 腓特烈港 → 奥尔堡
timeline.description_en: Freely explore Gothenburg's Masthugget Church (exterior), the Poseidon statue and Avenyn boulevard. Then take the ferry across the Kattegat to Frederikshavn and continue to Aalborg to see Aalborghus Castle (exterior), Budolfi Church and the old streets before checking in.
timeline.description_zh: 自由参观哥德堡马斯塔盖特教堂（外观）、海神波赛冬雕塑及Avenyn大道；之后在哥德堡港口乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡前往腓特烈港，再前往奥尔堡，自由参观奥尔堡城堡（外观）、Budolfi教堂、杜赫芬老街与步行街，随后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡 → 欧登塞 → 哥本哈根
timeline.description_en: Visit the Andersen fairy-tale town of Odense, with the Andersen Museum and childhood home and St Canute's Cathedral, then experience 19th-century Danish rural life at the Funen Village open-air museum. Continue to Copenhagen in the afternoon to check in.
timeline.description_zh: 前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆与故居、圣克努特教堂，并在菲英村体验19世纪丹麦乡村生活，感受带给安徒生灵感的故乡氛围；下午前往哥本哈根入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根
timeline.description_en: See the Little Mermaid, the Gefion Fountain, the star-shaped Kastellet fortress and the Amalienborg Palace (exterior). In the afternoon visit Frederik's (Marble) Church and the Round Tower (exteriors), the Royal Library 'Black Diamond', the iconic Nyhavn waterfront and the Strøget shopping street, where the journey ends in central Copenhagen.
timeline.description_zh: 参观丹麦象征小美人鱼雕像、吉菲昂喷泉、星形要塞卡斯特雷特五角要塞、阿美琳堡宫（外观）；下午参观腓特烈教堂（大理石教堂，外观）、圆塔（外观）、丹麦皇家图书馆黑钻石、地标新港及著名购物步行街斯楚格街，随后在哥本哈根市区结束美好旅程。

meeting_en: Copenhagen, Denmark. Travellers make their own way to Copenhagen Airport for the flight to Trondheim, where the guide-driver meets the group.
meeting_zh: 丹麦哥本哈根。游客自行前往哥本哈根机场乘机飞往特隆赫姆，由司导在特隆赫姆接机。

title_en: Scandinavia 3 Capitals: Oslo to Stockholm 6-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 北欧三国6天小团游：奥斯陆至斯德哥尔摩
short_en: A one-way 6-day small-group journey across Norway, Denmark and Sweden, linking three Nordic capitals, Andersen's fairytale town and a Kattegat ferry crossing.
short_zh: 6天单程小团之旅，串联挪威、丹麦、瑞典三国首都，畅游安徒生童话小镇，体验卡特加特海峡渡轮，尽享北欧慢生活。
desc_en: This one-way Scandinavian adventure runs from Oslo to Stockholm, weaving together three Nordic capitals with the charm of small Danish towns. Cross the Kattegat by ferry, wander Hans Christian Andersen's hometown of Odense, admire Copenhagen's Little Mermaid and royal palaces, and glide by sightseeing boat to Stockholm's UNESCO-listed Drottningholm Palace. Along the way you experience the relaxed Nordic pace of life, blending art, architecture, fairytales and waterside cities into one seamless route.
desc_zh: 这是一段从奥斯陆到斯德哥尔摩的单程北欧之旅，串联挪威、丹麦、瑞典三国首都，融汇丹麦小镇的温柔与浪漫。乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡，走进安徒生故乡欧登塞的童话世界，欣赏哥本哈根的小美人鱼与皇家宫殿，再乘观光游船驶向斯德哥尔摩的世界文化遗产卓宁霍姆宫。一路体验北欧式慢生活，将艺术、建筑、童话与水畔城市完美融合于一条线路之中。

highlights.en: Three Nordic capitals in one trip: Oslo, Copenhagen and Stockholm
highlights.zh: 一次畅游三国首都：奥斯陆、哥本哈根与斯德哥尔摩
