highlights.en: Vigeland Sculpture Park and Oslo's striking opera house and waterfront architecture
highlights.zh: 维格兰雕塑公园，以及奥斯陆歌剧院与峡湾海港建筑之美

highlights.en: Step into Hans Christian Andersen's fairytale town of Odense and the Funen Village
highlights.zh: 走进安徒生童话小镇欧登塞与菲英村，化身童话里的人物

highlights.en: Copenhagen icons: the Little Mermaid, Nyhavn harbour and Amalienborg Palace
highlights.zh: 哥本哈根经典：小美人鱼雕像、彩色新港与阿美琳堡宫

highlights.en: Ferry across the Kattegat from Frederikshavn to Gothenburg
highlights.zh: 乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡，从腓特烈港抵达哥德堡

highlights.en: Sightseeing cruise to Stockholm's UNESCO World Heritage Drottningholm Palace
highlights.zh: 乘观光游船前往世界文化遗产卓宁霍姆宫

highlights.en: One-way deep route with city-centre 4-star hotels and all attractions included
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路，入住市区品牌4星级酒店，景点门票一价全含

highlights.en: Small group with Chinese-speaking guide-driver and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 中文司导陪同的享乐小团，绝无强制购物

includes.en: 5 nights in 4-star city-centre hotels (Norwegian hotels per Booking/Ctrip star standards)
includes.zh: 市区四星级酒店5晚（挪威酒店参考Booking或携程星级标准）

includes.en: 5 Scandinavian-style hotel buffet breakfasts
includes.zh: 斯堪的纳维亚式酒店自助早餐5餐

includes.en: Tourist coach or premium tour vehicle for all transfers
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或旅游商务车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking guide-driver (groups of 8 or fewer use a business van with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文华人司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: All in-itinerary execution costs: city tax, entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel, driver-guide meal allowance
includes.zh: 行程内执行费用：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等

includes.en: Baggage allowance of one 23kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: All listed attraction entries: Stockholm City Hall (ticket + official guide), Vasa Museum (ticket + official guide), Stockholm sightseeing cruise, Hans Christian Andersen Museum, Andersen's childhood home, Funen Village, Frederikshavn-Gothenburg ferry, Vigeland Sculpture Park
includes.zh: 门票：斯德哥尔摩市政厅（门票+官导讲解）、瓦萨沉船博物馆（门票+官导讲解）、斯德哥尔摩观光游船、安徒生博物馆、安徒生儿时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港至哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园

excludes.en: International flights to Oslo and from Stockholm
excludes.zh: 往返国际机票（奥斯陆进、斯德哥尔摩出）

excludes.en: Passport fees
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动，请核实保险是否包含该项目）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver, totalling EUR 10 per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 小费：导游和司机小费共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中未注明的午餐与晚餐

excludes.en: Personal expenses and any optional activities
excludes.zh: 个人消费及任何自费项目

timeline.title_zh: 奥斯陆 → 哥德堡
timeline.description_en: Meet at 11:00 in central Oslo and tour the Nobel Peace Prize venue City Hall (exterior), the changing of the guard at the Royal Palace, medieval Akershus Fortress, the glacier-like Oslo Opera House (exterior) with its sloping rooftop, and the Vigeland Sculpture Park. Then transfer to the Swedish west-coast port city of Gothenburg for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午11:00在奥斯陆市中心集合，游览诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地奥斯陆市政厅（外观）、皇宫卫兵换岗、中世纪阿克斯胡斯城堡、宛如冰川的奥斯陆歌剧院（外观，可登上倾斜屋顶俯瞰峡湾），以及思考生命主题的维格兰雕塑公园，随后前往瑞典西海岸港城哥德堡入住。

timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡 → 腓特烈港 → 奥尔堡
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely explore Gothenburg's Masthugget Church (exterior), the Poseidon statue and Avenyn boulevard. Board a ferry across the Kattegat to Frederikshavn in Denmark, then continue to Aalborg to wander its old town: Aalborg Castle (exterior), Budolfi Church and the historic Duus old street and pedestrian zone.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观哥德堡马斯塔盖特教堂（外观）、海神波塞冬雕塑与Avenyn大道，随后乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡前往丹麦腓特烈港，再前往奥尔堡，自由游览奥尔堡城堡（外观）、Budolfi教堂、杜赫芬老街与步行街。

timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡 → 欧登塞 → 哥本哈根
timeline.description_en: Travel to Andersen's fairytale town of Odense to visit the Hans Christian Andersen Museum and his childhood home, plus St Canute's Cathedral. At the open-air Funen Village, step into 19th-century rural Danish life and the world that inspired Andersen's tales. In the afternoon continue to Copenhagen for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆与故居、圣克努特教堂，再到菲英村体验19世纪丹麦乡村生活，感受激发安徒生灵感的故乡气息。下午前往哥本哈根入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根 → 马尔默
timeline.description_en: See Copenhagen's icons: the Little Mermaid, the Gefion Fountain, the star-shaped Kastellet fortress and Amalienborg Palace (exterior). In the afternoon visit the Marble Church (exterior), the Round Tower (exterior), the Royal Library 'Black Diamond', colourful Nyhavn harbour and the Stroget shopping street, then cross the Oresund Bridge to Malmo for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 参观哥本哈根象征小美人鱼雕像、吉菲昂喷泉、星形卡斯特雷特五角要塞与阿美琳堡宫（外观）；下午游览大理石教堂（外观）、圆塔（外观）、皇家图书馆“黑钻石”、地标新港与斯楚格购物步行街，随后穿越厄勒海峡大桥前往马尔默入住。

timeline.title_zh: 马尔默 → 延雪平 → 斯德哥尔摩
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour Malmo's landmark Turning Torso, Ribersborg Beach, Stortorget square and city hall, St Peter's Church (exterior) and the little Lilla Torg square. After lunch, head to the 'match city' of Jonkoping before checking in near Stockholm for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观马尔默地标旋转中心、里伯斯海滩、斯托特广场与市政厅、圣彼得教堂（外观）及Lilla Torg小广场；午餐后前往“火柴之城”延雪平，随后入住斯德哥尔摩附近酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Stockholm City Hall and the Old Town, then the Vasa Museum. Board a sightseeing cruise to view the city skyline from the water, glide across tranquil Lake Malaren and arrive at the UNESCO World Heritage Drottningholm Palace (exterior) and its royal gardens, where the tour concludes back in the city.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观斯德哥尔摩市政厅与老城、瓦萨沉船博物馆，随后乘观光游船从水上欣赏城市轮廓，缓缓驶入梅拉伦湖，抵达世界文化遗产皇后岛，自由参观卓宁霍姆宫（外观）及宫廷花园，最后于市区结束愉快旅程。

meeting_en: Central Oslo, Norway. Group meets at 11:00 in the city centre on Day 1; the tour ends one-way in Stockholm, Sweden.
meeting_zh: 挪威奥斯陆市中心。第1天上午11:00在市中心集合；单程线路，于瑞典斯德哥尔摩结束。

title_en: Norway Fjords 8-Day Group Tour (Stockholm Round-Trip)
title_zh: 挪威峡湾8天跟团游（斯德哥尔摩往返）
short_en: An 8-day one-way deep route through Norway's greatest fjords from Stockholm: Geirangerfjord cruise, Briksdal Glacier, Flam railway and the iconic Pulpit Rock hike.
short_zh: 8天斯德哥尔摩往返、单程深度畅游挪威经典峡湾：盖朗厄尔峡湾游船、布里克斯达尔冰川、弗洛姆高山火车与布道石徒步。
desc_en: This 8-day small-group journey loops out of Stockholm by air to explore the heart of Norway's western fjordland on an efficient one-way deep route. From the Viking city of Trondheim you follow the famous Atlantic Ocean Road south through Geiranger, Briksdal Glacier, Flam, Bergen and the orchard-lined Hardangerfjord, then hike the legendary Pulpit Rock above Lysefjord before finishing in Stavanger, Sandefjord and Oslo. Highlights blend epic nature (fjord cruises, glaciers, waterfalls, mountain rail) with Scandinavian city culture, brand-name 4-star and scenic fjord hotels, and Norwegian fish-feast dining.
desc_zh: 这是一条8天的小团旅程，从斯德哥尔摩飞抵挪威，以高效的单程深度线路畅游挪威西部峡湾腹地。行程从维京古城特隆赫姆出发，沿著名的大西洋之路一路南下，途经盖朗厄尔峡湾、布里克斯达尔冰川、弗洛姆、卑尔根和点缀着果园的哈当厄尔峡湾，随后攀登吕瑟峡湾之上的传奇布道石，最后游览斯塔万格、桑讷菲尤尔与奥斯陆。行程将壮丽自然（峡湾游船、冰川、瀑布、高山火车）与北欧城市文化相融合，入住品牌4星级及峡湾特色景观酒店，并品鉴挪威鱼餐等当地美食。

highlights.en: Geirangerfjord cruise past the Seven Sisters and Suitor waterfalls beneath near-vertical cliffs
highlights.zh: 乘船巡游盖朗厄尔峡湾，于近乎垂直的峭壁间近观七姐妹瀑布与求婚者瀑布

highlights.en: Briksdal Glacier by open-top troll car, hiking to the edge of the ancient blue ice
highlights.zh: 乘精灵敞篷车前往布里克斯达尔冰川，徒步至万古蓝冰前沿

highlights.en: Flam Railway, one of the world's steepest and most scenic mountain trains, into the Sognefjord
highlights.zh: 搭乘世界最美、最陡峭的弗洛姆高山火车，深入松恩峡湾美景

highlights.en: Pulpit Rock (Preikestolen) hike for breathtaking views over Lysefjord
highlights.zh: 徒步布道石（奇迹之石），俯瞰呂瑟峡湾壮阔美景

highlights.en: The Atlantic Ocean Road, voted Norway's Construction of the Century and a photographer's dream
highlights.zh: 驰骋大西洋之路，被誉为挪威世纪性建筑，更是摄影师的朝圣之旅

highlights.en: Bergen's UNESCO Bryggen wharf and the Floibanen funicular over the rainy harbour city
highlights.zh: 游览卑尔根世界遗产布吕根码头，乘弗洛伊恩山缆车俯瞰雨城全景

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with internal flights, fjord cruise, mountain rail and six experiences included
highlights.zh: 一价全含：内陆机票、峡湾游船、高山火车及六项体验项目全部包含

highlights.en: Efficient one-way deep route from Stockholm, city-centre 4-star and scenic fjord hotels, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 斯德哥尔摩往返单程深度线路，入住市中心4星级及峡湾特色景观酒店，全程无强制购物

includes.en: Round-trip internal flights with taxes (Stockholm-Trondheim and Oslo-Stockholm on Route A; Stockholm-Oslo and Trondheim-Stockholm on Route B)
includes.zh: 含税内陆往返机票（A线：斯德哥尔摩-特隆赫姆及奥斯陆-斯德哥尔摩；B线：斯德哥尔摩-奥斯陆及特隆赫姆-斯德哥尔摩）

includes.en: 7 nights' hotels: 5 nights brand-name 4-star plus 2 nights scenic fjord hotels (Norway has discontinued official star ratings; ratings per Booking/Ctrip standards)
includes.zh: 7晚住宿：5晚品牌4星级酒店及2晚峡湾特色景观酒店（挪威已取消星级评定，星级参考Booking或携程标准）

includes.en: 9 meals: 7 Scandinavian breakfasts, 1 Norwegian fish dinner and 1 buffet dinner
includes.zh: 共9餐：7次斯堪的纳维亚式早餐、1餐挪威特色鱼餐及1餐自助晚餐

includes.en: Operational costs: city/tourist tax, congestion charges, road and bridge tolls, parking, fuel and guide-driver meal allowances
includes.zh: 执行费用：城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费及司导餐补等

includes.en: Tour coach or business van for the whole trip
includes.zh: 全程旅游巴士或旅游商务车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout (groups of 8 or fewer: business van with Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文华人司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 checked bag of 23 kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Six included experiences/entries: Pulpit Rock hike with guide service, Floibanen funicular, Flam Railway ticket, Briksdal Glacier, open-top troll car and Geirangerfjord cruise
includes.zh: 六项门票/体验：布道石徒步及向导服务、弗洛伊恩山缆车、弗洛姆高山列车火车票、布里克斯达尔冰川、精灵敞篷车及盖朗厄尔峡湾游船

excludes.en: International flights to and from Scandinavia
excludes.zh: 往返斯堪的纳维亚的国际机票

excludes.en: Passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage given the hiking on this trip)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（行程含徒步等项目，请核实保险是否涵盖相关运动）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 司机及导游小费

excludes.en: Lunches and any dinners not listed as included
excludes.zh: 午餐及未列明包含的晚餐

excludes.en: Personal expenses and any optional activities
excludes.zh: 个人消费及任何自费项目

timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩 → 特隆赫姆
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Stockholm airport and fly (via connection) to Trondheim, where your guide-driver meets you. Explore the millennium-old Viking capital, visit Nidaros Cathedral—Scandinavia's most important medieval building—and stroll the colourful Old Town Bridge and Bakklandet quarter; if you can, try the local Trondheim-ball pastry. Overnight in a 4-star hotel in the historic Bakklandet district.
timeline.description_zh: 请自行前往斯德哥尔摩机场，转机飞往特隆赫姆，由司导接机。游览这座千年维京古都，参观斯堪的纳维亚半岛最重要的中世纪建筑尼德罗斯主教座堂，漫步色彩缤纷的老城桥与巴克兰德街区，有机会可品尝当地传统甜品特隆赫姆球。入住巴克兰德历史街区4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trondheim → Kristiansund → Atlantic Ocean Road → Molde → Stranda
timeline.title_zh: 特隆赫姆 → 克里斯蒂安松 → 大西洋之路 → 莫尔德 → 斯特兰达
timeline.description_en: After breakfast drive to the pretty town of Kristiansund at the eastern end of the Atlantic Ocean Road, visiting its harbour and old town. Then cruise the famous scenic Atlantic Ocean Road, with its 11 sharp bends and dramatic bridges, before visiting Molde, the city of the midnight sun, and reaching Stranda or the Valldal valley for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往大西洋之路东端的美丽小镇克里斯蒂安松，参观港口码头与老城区。随后驰骋著名景观公路大西洋之路，途经11个急弯与壮观桥梁，再前往午夜阳光之城莫尔德参观，之后抵达斯特兰达或瓦尔河谷入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯特兰达 → 盖朗厄尔 → 布里克斯达尔冰川 → 松达尔
timeline.description_en: Cruise the Geirangerfjord between steep cliffs and countless waterfalls, then take the Eagle Road. In the afternoon, at the town of Olden, ride an open-top troll car past Volefossen waterfall to Briksdal Glacier and hike to the edge of the blue ice. Overnight in a fjord-view hotel in Sogndal.
timeline.description_zh: 乘坐盖朗厄尔峡灣游轮，在陡峭崖壁与无数瀑布间欣赏峡湾美景，随后前往老鹰之路。下午在奥尔登小镇乘精灵敞篷车，途经沃伦福斯大瀑布前往布里克斯达尔冰川，徒步至蓝冰前沿。入住松达尔峡湾景观酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 松达尔 → 弗洛姆 → 沃斯 → 卑尔根
timeline.description_en: Drive to Flam to see the railway museum, village and Sognefjord, then ride the world-famous steep mountain railway to Myrdal and continue by train to the town of Voss. Carry on to the 'rainy city' of Bergen: visit the UNESCO Bryggen wharf, ride the Floibanen funicular for city views, and enjoy a seafood feast at the fish market. Overnight in a Bergen 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 乘车前往弗洛姆，游览弗洛姆铁路博物馆、弗洛姆小镇和松恩峡湾，随后乘坐世界闻名的陡峭高山火车到达米达尔，换乘火车前往美丽小镇沃斯。之后前往雨城卑尔根，参观世界遗产布吕根，乘弗洛伊恩山缆车俯瞰全城，并在卑尔根鱼市品尝海鲜大餐。入住卑尔根4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 卑尔根 → 哈当厄尔峡湾 → 奥达 → 海于格松
timeline.description_en: Drive to Steinsdalsfossen waterfall, where you can walk behind the cascade, then continue to the gentle, orchard-lined Hardangerfjord dotted with colourful cottages, apple and cherry groves. Visit the quiet town of Odda amid western Norway's rolling hills and forests, then reach Haugesund for the night in a 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后乘车来到斯坦达尔瀑布，体验穿行水帘后方的奇观；之后前往哈当厄尔峡湾，两岸点缀着彩色小屋、苹果园与樱桃园的田园风光，前往宁静的奥达小镇游览，一路欣赏挪威西部丘陵与森林地貌。随后抵达海于格松，入住4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 海于格松 → 布道石 → 斯塔万格
timeline.description_en: From Haugesund head to the Pulpit Rock (Preikestolen) area on Lysefjord and hike to the famous cliff for sweeping fjord views. The round trip is about 8 km and takes 4-5 hours over rugged terrain—wear sturdy hiking boots and bring your own lunch and water, as there are no shops en route. Arrive in Stavanger in the afternoon and check into a 4-star city-centre hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从海于格松出发前往呂瑟峡湾布道石景区，徒步奇迹之石布道台，俯瞰呂瑟峡湾壮丽美景。往返约8公里，需4-5小时，山路崎岖，请穿着登山鞋并自备午餐及饮用水，沿途无商店餐厅。下午抵达斯塔万格，入住市中心4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯塔万格 → 克里斯蒂安桑 → 桑讷菲尤尔
timeline.description_en: Explore Stavanger, Norway's oil capital and a European Capital of Culture: wander the white timber houses of the old town and the colourful, street-art-filled Fargegaten lane, then visit the Sword in Rock monument with your guide. Drive on to Sandefjord, pausing at Kristiansand, and overnight in a 4-star hotel by the harbour.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览挪威石油之都斯塔万格，品味欧洲文化之都的老城区，以及色彩缤纷的网红街区法格卡腾街。午餐后随导游参观斯塔万格巨剑阵，随后乘车前往桑讷菲尤尔，中途在克里斯蒂安桑休息，抵达后入住海港4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 桑讷菲尤尔 → 奥斯陆 → 斯德哥尔摩
timeline.description_en: Visit Vigeland Sculpture Park, then see the Nobel Peace Prize venue Oslo City Hall (exterior), the changing of the guard at the Royal Palace, the medieval Akershus Fortress and the glacier-like Oslo Opera House (exterior)—walk its sloping roof for fjord-city views. Following your flight time, take the train from central Oslo to the airport and fly back to Stockholm, ending the trip.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往以思考生命为主题的维格兰雕塑公园，之后参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地奥斯陆市政厅（外观）、皇宫卫兵换岗、中世纪城堡阿克斯胡斯城堡，以及如冰川般的奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），可走上倾斜屋顶俯瞰峡湾城市风光。之后根据航班时间乘火车前往奥斯陆机场，自行办理登机手续飞回斯德哥尔摩，结束愉快旅程。

meeting_en: Stockholm Arlanda Airport (Sweden); travellers make their own way to the airport for the internal flight to Trondheim, where the guide-driver meets the group.
meeting_zh: 瑞典斯德哥尔摩阿兰达机场；游客自行前往机场搭乘内陆航班飞往特隆赫姆，由司导在特隆赫姆接机。

title_en: Nordic Three-Country Fjord Tour: Norway, Sweden & Denmark, 13 Days
title_zh: 北欧三国峡湾13天跟团游：挪威·瑞典·丹麦
short_en: A 13-day Scandinavian loop from Stockholm through Norway's grand fjords to Sweden and Denmark, with one domestic flight, scenic rail and ferries included.
short_zh: 13天斯堪的纳维亚环线，从斯德哥尔摩深入挪威壮丽峡湾，再到瑞典与丹麦，含一段内陆航班、景观火车与渡轮。
desc_en: This 13-day small-group journey loops out of Stockholm and into the heart of Scandinavia, pairing Norway's four great fjords with the capitals and coastal towns of three countries. You fly to the Viking city of Trondheim, drive the legendary Atlantic Road, cruise the Geirangerfjord, walk to the Briksdal glacier, ride the world-famous Flåm Railway into Bergen, and hike to the cliff-top Preikestolen above Lysefjord. The route then winds through Oslo's art and architecture, the harbour cities of Gothenburg and Aalborg, Andersen's fairy-tale Odense, design-capital Copenhagen and Malmö before returning to Stockholm. With city-centre 4-star hotels, fjord-view lodges, included attractions and a one-way deep route, it captures both the wild beauty of the fjords and the slow living of the North.
desc_zh: 这趟13天精品小团从斯德哥尔摩出发，深入斯堪的纳维亚腹地，把挪威四大峡湾与三国首都及海港小镇串联成一条环线。您将飞往维京古城特隆赫姆，驾行传奇的大西洋之路，乘船巡游盖朗厄尔峡湾，徒步布里克斯达尔冰川，搭乘举世闻名的弗洛姆高山火车进入卑尔根，并登上吕瑟峡湾之上的布道石。随后途经奥斯陆的艺术与建筑、海港城市哥德堡与奥尔堡、安徒生童话故乡欧登塞、设计之都哥本哈根与马尔默，最终返回斯德哥尔摩。市中心四星级酒店、峡湾景观酒店、含门票、单程深度环线，让您一次领略峡湾的磅礴之美与北欧的慢生活。

highlights.en: Hike to Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock), the cliff-top platform high above Lysefjord
highlights.zh: 徒步布道石，登上吕瑟峡湾之巅的悬崖平台

highlights.en: Cruise the UNESCO Geirangerfjord past the Seven Sisters waterfalls
highlights.zh: 巡游世界遗产盖朗厄尔峡湾，近赏七姐妹瀑布

highlights.en: Ride the world-famous Flåm Railway, one of Europe's great scenic train routes
highlights.zh: 乘坐举世闻名的弗洛姆高山火车，欧洲十大观光铁路之一

highlights.en: Drive the Atlantic Road, a 'photographer's journey' bridging islands across the sea
highlights.zh: 驾行大西洋之路，跨海连岛的摄影师朝圣公路

highlights.en: Walk to the Briksdal glacier by 'troll car' and explore Andersen's Odense
highlights.zh: 乘精灵车前往布里克斯达尔冰川，并探访安徒生故乡欧登塞

highlights.en: Three capitals and four great fjords on one deep one-way route, internal flight & scenic rail included
highlights.zh: 三国首都＋四大峡湾，单程深度环线，含内陆段航班与景观火车

highlights.en: City-centre brand-name 4-star hotels plus 2 nights in fjord-view lodges, more sightseeing time
highlights.zh: 市区品牌连锁四星级酒店，外加2晚峡湾景观酒店，大幅增加游览时间

highlights.en: All listed attractions included, no forced shopping, all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 所有列明景点门票全含，无强制购物，全包价格

includes.en: Internal taxed flight Stockholm–Trondheim (A-route) or Trondheim–Stockholm (B-route)
includes.zh: 斯德哥尔摩-特隆赫姆（A线）或特隆赫姆-斯德哥尔摩（B线）内陆段含税机票

includes.en: 12 nights' hotels: 10 nights 4-star city hotels plus 2 nights fjord-view lodges
includes.zh: 12晚酒店：四星级酒店10晚，峡湾特色景观酒店2晚

includes.en: 14 meals: 12 Scandinavian breakfasts, 1 Norwegian specialty fish dinner, 1 buffet dinner
includes.zh: 共14餐：12次斯堪的纳维亚式早餐、1餐挪威特色鱼餐、1餐自助晚餐

includes.en: All in-trip operating fees: city/tourist tax, congestion & residence fees, tolls, parking & fuel, driver-guide meal allowances
includes.zh: 全程执行费用：城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等

includes.en: Tour coach or business van throughout
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或旅游商务车

includes.en: Professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide (groups of 8 or fewer: business van + Chinese-speaking driver-guide)
includes.zh: 职业司机＋中文导游，或全程中文华人司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务车＋中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 checked bag up to 23kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: All listed attraction entries: Stockholm City Hall (ticket + official guide), Vasa Museum (ticket + official guide), Stockholm sightseeing cruise, Hans Christian Andersen Museum & childhood home, Funen Village, Frederikshavn–Gothenburg ferry, Vigeland Sculpture Park, Preikestolen hike with guide service, Fløibanen funicular, Flåm Railway train ticket, Briksdal glacier, troll car, Geirangerfjord cruise
includes.zh: 所有列明门票：斯德哥尔摩市政厅（门票+官导讲解）、瓦萨沉船博物馆（门票+官导讲解）、斯德哥尔摩观光游船、安徒生博物馆与儿时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港至哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园、布道石徒步及向导服务、弗洛伊恩山缆车、弗洛姆高山列车火车票、布里克斯达尔冰川、精灵敞篷车、盖朗厄尔峡湾游船

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Schengen visa fees and assistance
excludes.zh: 申根签证费用及办理

excludes.en: Travel and personal insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游及个人保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified (only the 14 listed meals are included)
excludes.zh: 未列明的午餐与晚餐（仅含上述14餐）

excludes.en: Optional activities and any personal expenses
excludes.zh: 自选活动及个人消费

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 司机及导游小费

excludes.en: Single-room supplement (included only in the solo-traveller price)
excludes.zh: 单房差（仅单人成行价格已含）

timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩 → 特隆赫姆
timeline.description_en: Fly from Stockholm to the millennium-old Viking capital of Trondheim, where your driver-guide meets you. Visit the Nidaros Cathedral, Scandinavia's most important medieval building, then stroll the colourful Old Town Bridge and the Bakklandet district. Try the local Trondheim-ball pastry before resting at your 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 从斯德哥尔摩飞往千年维京古都特隆赫姆，由司导接机。参观斯堪的纳维亚半岛最重要的中世纪建筑——尼德罗斯主教座堂，步行至色彩缤纷的老城桥与巴克兰德历史街区，品尝当地百余年历史的传统甜品特隆赫姆球，随后入住四星级酒店休息。（注：受航班安排影响，斯德哥尔摩飞特隆赫姆需中转，部分团期调整为B线去程坐车、回程乘机，游览内容不变。）

timeline.title_en: Trondheim → Kristiansund → Atlantic Road → Molde → Stranda
timeline.title_zh: 特隆赫姆 → 克里斯蒂安松 → 大西洋之路 → 莫尔德 → 斯特兰达
timeline.description_en: Drive to the pretty harbour town of Kristiansund and explore its port and old quarter, then take in the spectacular Atlantic Road, the coastal scenic route Norwegians voted their 'Construction of the Century'. Continue via the midnight-sun town of Molde to Stranda or the Valldal valley for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 前往大西洋之路东端的美丽小镇克里斯蒂安松，参观港口码头与老城区；午餐后驾行景观公路大西洋之路——挪威人评选的“世纪性建筑”，沿海跨岛、急弯与跨瀑石桥相连。随后途经午夜阳光之城莫尔德，抵达斯特兰达或瓦尔河谷入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯特兰达 → 盖朗厄尔 → 布里克斯达尔冰川 → 松达尔
timeline.description_en: Take the Eagle Road and cruise the Geirangerfjord, ringed by waterfalls including the Seven Sisters. Then ride a 'troll' open buggy past the Vøringfossen-style falls to the Briksdal glacier and its ancient blue ice. Continue to Sogndal on the Sognefjord for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 走老鹰之路，在盖朗厄尔峡灣乘游轮欣赏被瀑布环绕的峡湾美景，近赏七姐妹瀑布与求婚者瀑布；随后前往奥尔登小镇，乘精灵敞篷山地车途经沃伦福斯大瀑布，徒步至布里克斯达尔冰川蓝冰前沿。下午前往松恩峡湾畔的松达尔入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 松达尔 → 弗洛姆 → 沃斯 → 卑尔根
timeline.description_en: Visit Flåm and the Sognefjord, then board the world-famous Flåm Railway, one of Europe's steepest and most scenic lines, to Myrdal and on by train to Voss. Reach 'rainy city' Bergen to see UNESCO-listed Bryggen, ride the Fløibanen funicular for city views and enjoy a seafood feast at the fish market.
timeline.description_zh: 前往弗洛姆，游览弗洛姆铁路博物馆、弗洛姆小镇与松恩峡湾，随后乘坐举世闻名的弗洛姆陡峭高山火车至米达尔，再换乘挪威官方火车前往美丽小镇沃斯。之后抵达“雨城”卑尔根，自由参观世界遗产布吕根，乘弗洛伊恩山缆车俯瞰全城，在卑尔根鱼市享用海鲜大餐。

timeline.title_zh: 卑尔根 → 哈当厄尔峡湾 → 奥达 → 海于格松
timeline.description_en: Visit the Steinsdalsfossen waterfall, where you can walk behind the curtain of water, then follow the gentle Hardangerfjord past orchards and colourful farms to the quiet town of Odda. Continue to Haugesund for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 先抵达斯坦达尔瀑布，体验可从瀑布后方“穿行而过”的水帘洞奇观；之后沿以柔美著称的哈当厄尔峡湾而行，两岸点缀着彩色小屋、苹果园与樱桃园，前往宁静小镇奥达游览。随后抵达海于格松入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 海于格松 → 布道石 → 斯塔万格
timeline.description_en: Hike to Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock), the dramatic flat cliff towering above Lysefjord, for one of Norway's most breathtaking fjord views (about 8km round trip, 4–5 hours, moderate). In the afternoon arrive in the oil capital Stavanger and check in. Bring your own lunch and water; sturdy hiking shoes recommended.
timeline.description_zh: 从海于格松出发前往吕瑟峡湾布道石景区，徒步登上凌空巨岩——布道台，俯瞰吕瑟峡湾的壮丽美景（往返约8公里，需4-5小时，中等强度）。下午抵达斯塔万格入住酒店。山路崎岖请量力而行，建议穿防滑防水登山鞋，并自备午餐及饮用水。

timeline.title_zh: 斯塔万格 → 克里斯蒂安桑 → 桑讷菲尤尔
timeline.description_en: Tour the oil capital Stavanger, a European Capital of Culture, including the white timber lanes of Gamle Stavanger and the colourful Fargegata street, then see the Swords in Rock monument. Rest at Kristiansand en route before reaching the southern coastal town of Sandefjord for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 游览挪威石油之都斯塔万格，体验欧洲文化之都的老城区与网红景点法格卡腾街区，并参观斯塔万格巨剑阵。中途在克里斯蒂安桑休息，下午抵达南部海滨城市桑讷菲尤尔入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 桑讷菲尤尔 → 奥斯陆 → 哥德堡
timeline.description_en: In Oslo see the City Hall (exterior, where the Nobel Peace Prize is awarded), the changing of the guard at the Royal Palace, the medieval Akershus Fortress, the glacier-like Opera House (exterior) and the life-themed Vigeland Sculpture Park. Then cross into Sweden to the west-coast harbour city of Gothenburg.
timeline.description_zh: 前往奥斯陆，参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地奥斯陆市政厅（外观），观看皇宫卫兵换岗，游览中世纪阿克斯胡斯城堡，参观如冰川般的奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），并漫步以思考生命为主题的维格兰雕塑公园。结束后前往瑞典西海岸海港城市哥德堡入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡 → 腓特烈港 → 奥尔堡
timeline.description_en: Explore Gothenburg's Masthugget Church (exterior), the Poseidon statue and Avenyn boulevard, then sail by ferry across the Kattegat to Frederikshavn in Denmark. Continue to Aalborg to see Aalborg Castle (exterior), Budolfi Church and the old Duus quarter on foot.
timeline.description_zh: 自由参观哥德堡马斯塔盖特教堂（外观）、海神波塞冬雕塑与Avenyn大道，随后在哥德堡港乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡前往丹麦腓特烈港。短暂休息后前往奥尔堡，自由参观奥尔堡城堡（外观）、Budolfi教堂、杜赫芬老街与步行街，随后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡 → 欧登塞 → 哥本哈根
timeline.description_en: Visit Hans Christian Andersen's fairy-tale hometown of Odense, including the Andersen Museum and childhood home and St Canute's Church, then step into 19th-century rural Denmark at the open-air Funen Village. In the afternoon transfer to Copenhagen.
timeline.description_zh: 前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆与故居、圣克努特教堂，并在菲英村露天博物馆体验19世纪丹麦乡村生活，感受安徒生时代的质朴与温暖。下午前往哥本哈根入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根 → 马尔默
timeline.description_en: See Copenhagen's Little Mermaid, the Gefion Fountain and the star-shaped Kastellet fortress; pass Amalienborg Palace (exterior), the marble Frederik's Church (exterior), the Round Tower (exterior), the 'Black Diamond' Royal Library, the iconic Nyhavn waterfront and the Strøget shopping street. Then cross the Øresund Bridge to Malmö for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 参观丹麦象征小美人鱼雕像、吉菲昂喷泉、文艺复兴星形要塞卡斯特雷特五角要塞，在阿美琳堡宫（外观）欣赏王室风采；下午参观大理石教堂腓特烈教堂（外观）、古老天文台圆塔（外观）、“黑钻石”丹麦皇家图书馆、地标新港与著名购物步行街斯楚格街。随后穿越厄勒海峡大桥前往马尔默入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 马尔默 → 延雪平 → 斯德哥尔摩
timeline.description_en: Discover Malmö, Sweden's 'old-and-modern' third city: the Turning Torso tower, Ribersborg beach, Stortorget square and City Hall, St Peter's Church (exterior) and the Lilla Torg square. After lunch visit the 'match city' of Jönköping, then continue to Stockholm for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 参观马尔默地标HSB旋转中心、里伯斯海滩、斯托特广场与市政厅、圣彼得教堂（外观）与Lilla Torg小广场，感受这座“古老又现代的混血城市”。午餐后前往游览“火柴之城”延雪平，随后返回斯德哥尔摩入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩
timeline.description_en: Visit Stockholm City Hall and the Old Town and the Vasa Museum, then take a sightseeing cruise from the city across tranquil Lake Mälaren to the UNESCO World Heritage Drottningholm Palace (exterior) and its royal gardens, ending the tour in central Stockholm.
timeline.description_zh: 参观斯德哥尔摩市政厅与老城、瓦萨沉船博物馆，随后乘坐观光游船从水上欣赏城市轮廓，缓缓驶入宁静的梅拉伦湖，抵达世界文化遗产皇后岛，自由参观卓宁霍姆宫（外观）及宫廷花园，在斯德哥尔摩市区结束美好行程。

meeting_en: Stockholm, Sweden. Travellers make their own way to Stockholm Arlanda Airport on Day 1 for the flight to Trondheim, where the driver-guide meets the group; tour ends back in central Stockholm on Day 13.
meeting_zh: 瑞典斯德哥尔摩。第1天游客自行前往斯德哥尔摩机场乘机飞往特隆赫姆，由司导在特隆赫姆接机；第13天在斯德哥尔摩市区结束行程。

title_en: Nordic Four-Country Fjords: 14-Day Scandinavia Grand Tour (Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Finland)
title_zh: 北欧四国峡湾14天跟团游（挪威·瑞典·丹麦·芬兰）
short_en: 14 days across Norway, Sweden, Denmark and Finland: Atlantic Road, Geiranger fjord, Flam railway, Preikestolen and four capitals, by flight, rail and cruise ferry.
short_zh: 14天畅游挪威、瑞典、丹麦、芬兰四国：大西洋之路、盖朗厄尔峡湾、弗洛姆高山火车、布道石与四大首都，含航班、火车与维京号游轮。
desc_en: This 14-day small-group journey traces a deep one-way arc through Scandinavia, starting and ending in Helsinki. You will fly into the Viking city of Trondheim, drive the legendary Atlantic Road, cruise the Geiranger fjord and hike to the Briksdal glacier, ride the world-famous Flam mountain railway, and stand on the Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) above Lysefjord. From the fjords of western Norway the route turns to the four Nordic capitals and Hans Christian Andersen's Odense, finishing with a scenic Viking Line cruise from Stockholm back to Helsinki. The trip blends Norway's wild fjord scenery with the culture, design and fairy-tale charm of Sweden, Denmark and Finland.
desc_zh: 这是一条由赫尔辛基出发、最终回到赫尔辛基的14天单程深度小团北欧之旅。您将飞抵维京古城特隆赫姆，自驾般驰骋传奇的大西洋之路，乘船巡游盖朗厄尔峡湾并徒步布里克斯达尔冰川，搭乘举世闻名的弗洛姆高山火车，登上吕瑟峡湾之上的布道石。从挪威西海岸的壮丽峡湾，行程转入北欧四大首都与安徒生故乡欧登塞，最后乘坐维京号游轮从斯德哥尔摩跨海返回赫尔辛基。一路将挪威的野性峡湾风光，与瑞典、丹麦、芬兰的文化、设计与童话气息完美交织。

highlights.en: Drive the Atlantic Road, one of the world's great coastal routes and Norway's 'building of the century'
highlights.zh: 驰骋被誉为挪威世纪性建筑、世界级海滨景观公路的大西洋之路

highlights.en: Cruise the Geiranger fjord past the Seven Sisters waterfalls and hike to the blue ice of Briksdal Glacier by troll buggy
highlights.zh: 乘船巡游盖朗厄尔峡湾，观赏七姐妹瀑布，并乘精灵敞篷车徒步布里克斯达尔冰川蓝冰

highlights.en: Ride the Flam Railway, one of the world's steepest and most scenic mountain trains
highlights.zh: 搭乘弗洛姆高山火车，体验世界上最陡峭、最壮美的观光铁路之一

highlights.en: Hike to Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) for breathtaking views over Lysefjord
highlights.zh: 徒步登上布道石，俯瞰震撼人心的吕瑟峡湾壮阔美景

highlights.en: Visit all four Nordic capitals - Oslo, Copenhagen, Stockholm and Helsinki - plus Bergen and Aalborg
highlights.zh: 遍览北欧四大首都奥斯陆、哥本哈根、斯德哥尔摩、赫尔辛基，以及卑尔根、奥尔堡等名城

highlights.en: Step into Hans Christian Andersen's fairy-tale world in Odense and the Funen open-air village
highlights.zh: 走进安徒生故乡欧登塞与菲英村，沉浸于童话大师的世界

highlights.en: Sail the Baltic overnight on a Viking Line cruise with a sea-view cabin, watching the Nordic midnight sun
highlights.zh: 乘坐维京号游轮跨越波罗的海，入住海景舱，欣赏北欧夏夜的午夜阳光

highlights.en: Intercity flight and Flam rail included, city-centre 4-star hotels, all listed attractions covered, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 含内陆航班与弗洛姆火车票，城市市区4星级酒店，所含景点门票全包，无强制购物

includes.en: Intercity flight (A-route: Helsinki-Trondheim; B-route: Trondheim-Helsinki), taxes included
includes.zh: 内陆含税机票（A线：赫尔辛基-特隆赫姆；B线：特隆赫姆-赫尔辛基）

includes.en: 13 nights' accommodation: 10 nights 4-star city hotels, 2 nights special fjord-view hotels, 1 night Viking Line 4-berth sea-view cabin
includes.zh: 13晚住宿：四星级城市酒店10晚、峡湾特色景观酒店2晚、维京号游轮四人海景舱1晚

includes.en: 15 meals: 13 Scandinavian breakfasts, 1 Norwegian fish dinner and 1 buffet dinner
includes.zh: 共15餐：13次斯堪的纳维亚式早餐、1餐挪威特色鱼餐、1餐自助晚餐

includes.en: All in-itinerary operating fees: city tax, congestion/entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel, driver-guide meal allowance
includes.zh: 行程内执行费用：城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等

includes.en: Tour coach or business van; Chinese-speaking guide plus driver, or Chinese-speaking driver-guide (van + driver-guide for groups of 8 or fewer)
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或商务车；职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文华人司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Listed attraction entries: Stockholm City Hall (ticket + official guide), Vasa Museum (ticket + official guide), Stockholm sightseeing boat, Hans Christian Andersen Museum and childhood home, Funen Village, Frederikshavn-Gothenburg ferry, Vigeland Sculpture Park
includes.zh: 门票：斯德哥尔摩市政厅（门票+官导讲解）、瓦萨沉船博物馆（门票+官导讲解）、斯德哥尔摩观光游船、安徒生博物馆与儿时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港至哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园

includes.en: Activities included: Preikestolen guided hike, Floyen funicular, Flam Railway ticket, Briksdal Glacier troll buggy, Geiranger fjord cruise
includes.zh: 活动：布道石徒步及向导服务、弗洛伊恩山缆车、弗洛姆高山列车火车票、布里克斯达尔冰川精灵敞篷车、盖朗厄尔峡湾游船

includes.en: Baggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

excludes.en: International flights to and from Helsinki
excludes.zh: 往返赫尔辛基的国际机票

excludes.en: Visa fees and Schengen visa service
excludes.zh: 签证费及签证服务费

excludes.en: Travel and medical insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游及医疗保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary (e.g. self-arranged lunch and water on the Preikestolen hike day)
excludes.zh: 行程未注明的午餐及晚餐（如布道石徒步当日需自备午餐及饮用水）

excludes.en: Optional activities and any attractions marked 'exterior view only'
excludes.zh: 自选活动及标注“外观”的景点内部参观

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费

excludes.en: Personal expenses and anything not listed under inclusions
excludes.zh: 个人消费及费用包含以外的所有项目

timeline.title_zh: 赫尔辛基 - 特隆赫姆
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Helsinki Vantaa Airport and fly to Trondheim, where your driver-guide meets you. Explore the millennium-old city: Nidaros Cathedral, the colourful Old Town Bridge and the Bakklandet district at dusk, and taste the local Trondheim ball pastry. Note: Helsinki-Trondheim is not direct and requires a connection; on some departures the order reverses to B-route (outbound by coach, return flight).
timeline.description_zh: 自行前往赫尔辛基万塔机场，乘机飞往特隆赫姆，司导接机。游览千年古都特隆赫姆：参观斯堪的纳维亚半岛重要的中世纪建筑尼德罗斯主教座堂，步行至色彩缤纷的老城桥与巴克兰德街区拍摄傍晚美景，品尝百年历史的传统甜品特隆赫姆球。注：赫尔辛基飞特隆赫姆需转机；部分团期行程调整为B线（去程坐车、回程飞机），游览内容不变。

timeline.title_en: Trondheim - Kristiansund - Atlantic Road - Molde - Stranda
timeline.title_zh: 特隆赫姆 - 克里斯蒂安松 - 大西洋之路 - 莫尔德 - 斯特兰达
timeline.description_en: Drive to the pretty town of Kristiansund at the eastern end of the Atlantic Road, visiting its harbour and old town. After lunch, take the scenic Atlantic Road, then visit the midnight-sun city of Molde before reaching Stranda or the Valldal valley for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往坐落在大西洋之路东端的美丽小镇克里斯蒂安松，参观港口码头与老城区。午餐后驰骋景观公路大西洋之路，随后游览午夜阳光之城莫尔德，之后抵达斯特兰达或瓦尔河谷入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯特兰达 - 盖朗厄尔 - 布里克斯达尔冰川 - 松达尔
timeline.description_en: Drive the Eagle Road and cruise the Geiranger fjord among towering cliffs and waterfalls. Then ride a troll buggy past Volefossen waterfall to hike to the Briksdal Glacier ice front. Continue to Sogndal for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往老鹰之路，乘坐盖朗厄尔峡湾游船欣赏陡峭崖壁与飞瀑美景。随后前往奥尔登小镇，乘精灵敞篷山地车途经沃伦福斯大瀑布，徒步至布里克斯达尔冰川前沿。下午前往松达尔入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 松达尔 - 弗洛姆 - 沃斯 - 卑尔根
timeline.description_en: Visit Flam and the Sognefjord, then ride the world-famous steep mountain train to Myrdal and onward by train to Voss. Continue to rainy Bergen: see the UNESCO Bryggen wharf, ride the Floyen funicular for city views and enjoy a seafood feast at the fish market.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往弗洛姆，游览弗洛姆铁路博物馆、弗洛姆小镇与松恩峡湾，乘坐世界闻名的陡峭高山火车至米达尔，再换乘火车前往沃斯，之后前往雨城卑尔根。自由参观世界遗产布吕根，乘弗洛伊恩山缆车俯瞰全城，并在鱼市品尝海鲜大餐。

timeline.title_zh: 卑尔根 - 哈当厄尔峡湾 - 奥达 - 海于格松
timeline.description_en: Visit Steinsdalsfossen waterfall, where you can walk behind the cascade, then follow the Hardangerfjord past orchards and colourful villages to the quiet town of Odda. Continue to Haugesund for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后来到斯坦达尔瀑布，体验穿行水帘之后的奇观；随后沿哈当厄尔峡湾欣赏点缀彩色小屋与苹果樱桃园的田园风光，前往宁静的奥达小镇游览，之后抵达海于格松入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 海于格松 - 布道石 - 斯塔万格
timeline.description_en: Hike to Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) for spectacular views over Lysefjord; the 8 km round trip takes 4-5 hours on rugged mountain trail. Bring your own lunch and water. Arrive in Stavanger in the afternoon. Wear sturdy non-slip hiking boots and proceed within your limits.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从海于格松前往吕瑟峡湾布道石景区，徒步奇迹之石布道台，俯瞰吕瑟峡湾壮阔美景。往返约8公里，需4-5小时，山路崎岖请量力而为，建议穿防滑登山鞋，并自备午餐及饮用水。下午抵达斯塔万格入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯塔万格 - 克里斯蒂安桑 - 桑讷菲尤尔
timeline.description_en: Explore Stavanger, Norway's oil capital and a European Capital of Culture: the white timber houses of the Old Town, the colourful Fargegaten street and the Sword in Rock monument. Rest at Kristiansand en route and reach the southern seaside town of Sandefjord for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览挪威石油之都斯塔万格，漫步欧洲文化之都的老城区与色彩缤纷的网红街区法格卡腾，参观斯塔万格巨剑阵。中途在克里斯蒂安桑休息，下午抵达南部海滨城市桑讷菲尤尔入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 桑讷菲尤尔 - 奥斯陆 - 哥德堡
timeline.description_en: In Oslo see the City Hall (exterior, where the Nobel Peace Prize is awarded), the changing of the guard at the Royal Palace, Akershus Fortress, the Opera House (exterior, walk its sloping roof) and the life-themed Vigeland Sculpture Park. Continue to the Swedish port city of Gothenburg for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往奥斯陆，参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地市政厅（外观），在皇宫外观看卫兵换岗，游览中世纪阿克斯胡斯城堡，参观冰川般的奥斯陆歌剧院（外观、可登屋顶俯瞰峡湾），再游以生命为主题的维格兰雕塑公园。之后前往瑞典西海岸海港城市哥德堡入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡 - 腓特烈港 - 奥尔堡
timeline.description_en: See Masthugget Church (exterior), the Poseidon statue and the Avenyn boulevard, then cross the Kattegat by ferry from Gothenburg to Frederikshavn. Continue to Aalborg, Denmark, to explore Aalborg Castle (exterior), Budolfi Church, the Duus old street and the pedestrian zone.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观马斯塔盖特教堂（外观）、海神波赛冬雕塑与Avenyn大道，之后在哥德堡港乘渡轮跨越卡特加特海峡前往腓特烈港。随后前往丹麦奥尔堡，自由参观奥尔堡城堡（外观）、Budolfi教堂、杜赫芬老街与步行街，之后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡 - 欧登塞 - 哥本哈根
timeline.description_en: Visit Hans Christian Andersen's hometown of Odense: the Andersen Museum and childhood home, St Canute's Cathedral, and the Funen open-air village recreating 19th-century rural Denmark. Continue to Copenhagen in the afternoon.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆与故居、圣克努特教堂，并在菲英村体验19世纪丹麦乡村生活，感受安徒生的创作灵感。下午前往哥本哈根入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根 - 马尔默
timeline.description_en: See the Little Mermaid, the Gefion Fountain, the star-shaped Kastellet citadel and Amalienborg Palace (exterior). In the afternoon visit Frederik's Church (Marble Church, exterior), the Round Tower (exterior), the Royal Library 'Black Diamond', Nyhavn and the Stroget shopping street. Cross the Oresund Bridge to Malmo for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观丹麦象征小美人鱼雕像、吉菲昂喷泉、星形要塞卡斯特雷特五角要塞、阿美琳堡宫（外观）。下午参观大理石教堂（腓特烈教堂，外观）、圆塔（外观）、皇家图书馆“黑钻石”、地标新港与购物步行街斯楚格街。之后穿越厄勒海峡大桥前往马尔默入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 马尔默 - 延雪平 - 斯德哥尔摩
timeline.description_en: Explore Malmo: the Turning Torso, Ribersborg beach, Stortorget square and City Hall, St Peter's Church (exterior) and Lilla Torg. After lunch visit the 'match city' of Jonkoping, then continue to Stockholm for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览马尔默：参观HSB旋转中心、里伯斯海滩、斯托特广场与市政厅、圣彼得教堂（外观）、Lilla Torg小广场。午餐后前往火柴之城延雪平，随后前往斯德哥尔摩入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩 - 赫尔辛基（游轮过夜）
timeline.description_en: Visit Stockholm City Hall, the Old Town and the Vasa Museum, then take a sightseeing boat across Lake Malaren to the UNESCO World Heritage Drottningholm Palace (exterior) and gardens. In the evening board the Viking Line cruise to Helsinki, staying in a sea-view cabin. Check in at least one hour before departure.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观斯德哥尔摩市政厅与老城、瓦萨沉船博物馆，乘观光游船从水上欣赏城市轮廓，驶入梅拉伦湖抵达世界文化遗产皇后岛，自由参观卓宁霍姆宫（外观）及宫廷花园。傍晚乘坐维京号游轮前往赫尔辛基，入住海景舱。请至少提前1小时办理登船手续。

timeline.title_zh: 赫尔辛基
timeline.description_en: Arrive in Helsinki around 10am. Enjoy the compact city centre at your own pace: Senate Square, the white Helsinki Cathedral, the Uspenski (Red) Cathedral, the Viking harbour and market, and the Rock Church, before the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 上午约10点抵达赫尔辛基后自行安排游览。市区景点集中，可游览参议院广场、白教堂（大教堂）、红教堂、维京码头与碼头鱼市、岩石教堂等景点，随后结束美好旅程。

meeting_en: Helsinki, Finland - travellers make their own way to Helsinki Vantaa Airport on Day 1 for the flight to Trondheim, where the driver-guide meets the group.
meeting_zh: 芬兰赫尔辛基 - 第1天自行前往赫尔辛基万塔机场乘机飞往特隆赫姆，司导在特隆赫姆接机。

title_en: Nordic Four Capitals: Oslo to Helsinki 7-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 北欧四国7天小团游：奥斯陆至赫尔辛基
short_en: A one-way 7-day journey across four Nordic capitals plus Andersen's fairy-tale Odense, with Viking Line cruise, scenic boat trips and all attractions included.
short_zh: 7天单程畅游北欧四国首都，外加安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，含维京号游轮、观光游船与全程门票，一价全含。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Oslo to Helsinki across Norway, Sweden, Denmark and Finland, taking in four Nordic capitals plus Hans Christian Andersen's fairy-tale town of Odense. The route blends art and architecture (Vigeland Sculpture Park, the Oslo Opera House, Malmo's Turning Torso) with classic Scandinavian experiences: a ferry across the Kattegat, a sightseeing cruise to the UNESCO-listed Drottningholm Palace, and an overnight Viking Line cruise across the Baltic Sea. With city-centre 4-star hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide and all listed attractions included, it is an all-inclusive, deep dive into Scandinavian culture and design.
desc_zh: 从挪威奥斯陆单程畅游至芬兰赫尔辛基，途经挪威、瑞典、丹麦、芬兰四国，饱览四座北欧首都，并探访安徒生的童话故乡欧登塞。线路将艺术建筑（维格兰雕塑公园、奥斯陆歌剧院、马尔默旋转大厦）与经典北欧体验融为一体：渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡、乘观光游船前往世界文化遗产卓宁霍姆宫、搭乘维京号游轮夜渡波罗的海。入住市区四星级酒店，配中文导游，全程门票一价全含，深度领略斯堪的纳维亚的文化与设计。

highlights.en: Four Nordic capitals on one route: Oslo, Copenhagen, Stockholm and Helsinki
highlights.zh: 一条线路畅游四国首都：奥斯陆、哥本哈根、斯德哥尔摩、赫尔辛基

highlights.en: Andersen's fairy-tale town of Odense with the Andersen Museum and the Funen Village open-air museum
highlights.zh: 安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆与菲英村露天博物馆

highlights.en: Overnight Viking Line cruise across the Baltic Sea in a sea-view cabin
highlights.zh: 搭乘维京号游轮夜渡波罗的海，入住海景舱

highlights.en: Sightseeing cruise to the UNESCO World Heritage Drottningholm Palace via Lake Malaren
highlights.zh: 乘观光游船经梅拉伦湖前往世界文化遗产卓宁霍姆宫

highlights.en: Iconic Scandinavian sights: Copenhagen's Little Mermaid, Nyhavn, and Stockholm's Vasa Museum
highlights.zh: 北欧地标尽收眼底：哥本哈根小美人鱼、新港，斯德哥尔摩瓦萨沉船博物馆

highlights.en: Architecture and art tour: Vigeland Sculpture Park, Oslo Opera House and Malmo's Turning Torso
highlights.zh: 艺术与建筑巡礼：维格兰雕塑公园、奥斯陆歌剧院、马尔默旋转大厦

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
highlights.zh: 全程入住市区四星级酒店，配中文司导

highlights.en: One-way deep route with all listed attractions, ferries and cruises included (all-inclusive pricing)
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路，门票、渡轮与游轮一价全含

includes.en: 5 nights in 4-star city-centre hotels plus 1 night in a 4-person sea-view cabin on the Viking Line cruise
includes.zh: 市区四星级酒店5晚，外加维京号游轮四人海景舱1晚

includes.en: 6 Scandinavian-style hotel buffet breakfasts
includes.zh: 斯堪的纳维亚式酒店自助早餐6餐

includes.en: Tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, tolls, parking and fuel, and guide-driver meal allowances
includes.zh: 游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费及司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Tour coach or business van transport
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或旅游商务车

includes.en: Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout (groups of 8 or fewer get a business van with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver)
includes.zh: 职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文华人司机兼导游（8人及以下安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: 1 checked bag (23kg) and 1 carry-on per person
includes.zh: 1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: All listed attraction entries: Stockholm City Hall (ticket + official guide), Vasa Museum (ticket + official guide), Stockholm sightseeing cruise, Andersen Museum, Andersen's childhood home, Funen Village, Frederikshavn-Gothenburg ferry, and Vigeland Sculpture Park
includes.zh: 全部所列门票：斯德哥尔摩市政厅（门票+官导讲解）、瓦萨沉船博物馆（门票+官导讲解）、斯德哥尔摩观光游船、安徒生博物馆、安徒生儿时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港至哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园

excludes.en: International flights
excludes.zh: 国际往返机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify it covers any high-risk activities in the itinerary)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（若行程涉及高风险运动，请核实保险是否承保）

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified
excludes.zh: 未注明的午餐及晚餐

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费：共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Personal expenses and optional activities
excludes.zh: 个人消费及自费项目

timeline.title_zh: 奥斯陆 - 哥德堡
timeline.description_en: Meet at 11:00 in central Oslo and tour the Nobel Peace Prize venue Oslo City Hall (exterior), the Royal Palace changing of the guard, the medieval Akershus Fortress, and the glacier-like Oslo Opera House (exterior) whose sloping roof offers fjord views. Visit the Vigeland Sculpture Park, then transfer to the Swedish port city of Gothenburg for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午11:00在奥斯陆市中心集合，参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地奥斯陆市政厅（外观）、皇宫卫兵换岗、中世纪阿克斯胡斯城堡，以及如冰川般的奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），可登上斜屋顶俯瞰峡湾风光，再游览以生命为主题的维格兰雕塑公园，随后前往瑞典海港城市哥德堡入住。

timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡 - 腓特烈港 - 奥尔堡
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Gothenburg's Masthugget Church (exterior), the Poseidon statue and Avenyn boulevard at leisure. Board a ferry across the Kattegat strait to Frederikshavn in Denmark, then continue to Aalborg to see Aalborg Castle (exterior), Budolfi Church and the old Duchess street and pedestrian zone before checking in.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观哥德堡马斯塔盖特教堂（外观）、海神波塞冬雕塑与Avenyn大道，随后乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡前往丹麦腓特烈港，再前往奥尔堡，自由参观奥尔堡城堡（外观）、Budolfi教堂、杜赫芬老街与步行街后入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡 - 欧登塞 - 哥本哈根
timeline.description_en: Travel to Andersen's fairy-tale town of Odense to visit the Andersen Museum and childhood home and St. Knud's Church, then step into 19th-century Danish rural life at the Funen Village open-air museum. In the afternoon, continue to Copenhagen for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆与故居、圣克努特教堂，再到菲英村体验19世纪丹麦乡村生活，感受安徒生的创作灵感。下午前往哥本哈根入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根 - 马尔默
timeline.description_en: See Copenhagen's symbol the Little Mermaid, the Gefion Fountain, the star-shaped Kastellet fortress and Amalienborg Palace (exterior). In the afternoon, visit the Marble Church (exterior), the Round Tower (exterior), the Royal Library 'Black Diamond', colourful Nyhavn and the Stroget shopping street, then cross the Oresund Bridge to Malmo for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 参观丹麦象征小美人鱼雕像、吉菲昂喷泉、星形卡斯特雷特五角要塞、阿美琳堡宫（外观）；下午游览大理石教堂（外观）、圆塔（外观）、皇家图书馆"黑钻石"、地标新港与斯楚格购物步行街，随后穿越厄勒海峡大桥前往马尔默入住。

timeline.title_zh: 马尔默 - 延雪平 - 斯德哥尔摩
timeline.description_en: Tour Malmo's HSB Turning Torso, Ribersborg beach, Stortorget square and city hall, St. Peter's Church (exterior) and the Lilla Torg square. After lunch, pass through the 'matchstick city' of Jonkoping en route to Stockholm for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 参观马尔默HSB旋转大厦、里伯斯海滩、斯托特广场与市政厅、圣彼得教堂（外观）、Lilla Torg小广场，午餐后途经"火柴之城"延雪平，随后前往斯德哥尔摩入住酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩 - 赫尔辛基（夜渡游轮）
timeline.description_en: Visit Stockholm City Hall and the Old Town and the Vasa Museum, then take a sightseeing cruise across Lake Malaren to the UNESCO World Heritage Drottningholm Palace (exterior) and its gardens. Check in at least one hour ahead for the Viking Line cruise to Helsinki (no guide aboard); overnight in a sea-view cabin.
timeline.description_zh: 参观斯德哥尔摩市政厅、老城与瓦萨沉船博物馆，乘观光游船经梅拉伦湖抵达世界文化遗产卓宁霍姆宫（外观）及宫廷花园。请至少提前1小时办理登船手续，乘维京号游轮前往赫尔辛基（船上无导游陪同），夜宿海景舱。

timeline.title_zh: 赫尔辛基
timeline.description_en: Arrive in Helsinki around 10:00 and explore the compact city centre on your own: Senate Square, the Helsinki Cathedral (White Church), Uspenski Cathedral (Red Church), the Viking harbour and market quay, and the Rock Church, before the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 上午约10点抵达赫尔辛基，自行游览景点集中的市中心：参议院广场、白教堂（赫尔辛基大教堂）、红教堂、维京码头与码头鱼市、岩石教堂等，随后结束美好旅程。

meeting_en: Central Oslo, Norway. The group meets at 11:00 on Day 1 in central Oslo; the tour ends in Helsinki, Finland.
meeting_zh: 挪威奥斯陆市中心。第1天上午11:00在奥斯陆市中心集合，行程在芬兰赫尔辛基结束。

title_en: Lofoten Islands 4-Day Small-Group Tour from Tromsø
title_zh: 罗弗敦群岛4天半自助小团游（特罗姆瑟出发）
short_en: A 4-day Arctic road trip from Tromsø through Senja and the Lofoten Islands, with fjord ferries, fishing villages and photographer's-paradise scenery.
short_zh: 4天北极极地深度游，从特罗姆瑟出发，穿越塞尼亚岛与罗弗敦群岛，乘峡湾轮渡、探访渔村、饱览摄影天堂般的极地美景。
desc_en: This 4-day semi-self-guided tour runs a one-way deep route through Arctic Norway, beginning in Tromsø and crossing by polar fjord ferry to the still-secret island of Senja before reaching the legendary Lofoten Islands. Along the way you follow Norway's national scenic routes past Ersfjord beach, the Devil's Jaw at Tungeneset and the Bergsbotn viewpoint, then drive King Olav V's Road through the fishing villages of Henningsvær, Å, Reine and Hamnøy. Praised by Lonely Planet and National Geographic as a 'paradise on earth', the Lofoten archipelago rewards travellers with cold, still beauty, dramatic peaks rising from the sea and Norway's iconic red rorbu cabins. The route never doubles back, so no precious sightseeing time is wasted.
desc_zh: 这是一条4天的半自助单程深度线路，带您深入挪威北极地区：从特罗姆瑟出发，乘坐极地峡湾轮渡横渡至尚属小众的塞尼亚岛，再前往传奇的罗弗敦群岛。沿途沿挪威国家观景公路游览精灵峡湾海滩（Ersfjord）、奇迹山峦瞭望台（Tungeneset，可眺望“恶魔之齿”）与贝格斯景观台（Bergsbotn），随后沿“奥拉夫五世国王之路”驶过亨宁斯韦尔、奥镇（Å）、雷纳与哈姆诺伊等渔村。被《孤独星球》与国家地理频道誉为“落入人间的天堂”，罗弗敦群岛以冷冽静谧之美、拔海而起的险峻山峰与挪威标志性的红色渔屋令人难忘。全程单程不走回头路，绝不浪费宝贵的游览时间。

highlights.en: Lofoten Islands — hailed by Lonely Planet and National Geographic as a 'paradise on earth' for photographers
highlights.zh: 罗弗敦群岛——被《孤独星球》与国家地理频道誉为摄影师眼中“落入人间的天堂”

highlights.en: Senja Island scenic route: Ersfjord beach, the Devil's Jaw at Tungeneset and the Bergsbotn viewpoint
highlights.zh: 塞尼亚岛风景路线：精灵峡湾海滩、奇迹山峦瞭望台（恶魔之齿）与贝格斯景观台

highlights.en: Drive King Olav V's Road, the 130 km scenic stretch linking the Lofoten islands by bridge and tunnel
highlights.zh: 驾行“奥拉夫五世国王之路”——以桥梁隧道串联罗弗敦群岛的130公里观景路段

highlights.en: Iconic fishing villages: Henningsvær, Å, Reine, Hamnøy red cabins and yellow rorbu houses
highlights.zh: 标志性渔村：亨宁斯韦尔、奥镇、雷纳、哈姆诺伊红房子与黄色渔屋

highlights.en: Polar fjord ferries instead of backtracking — a true one-way deep route, no wasted time
highlights.zh: 乘极地峡湾轮渡而非原路返回——真正的单程深度线路，不走回头路

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotel in Harstad plus characterful converted fishermen's-cabin hotels in Lofoten
highlights.zh: 哈尔斯塔市中心四星级酒店，加由传统渔民小屋改建、北欧风情浓郁的罗弗敦特色酒店

highlights.en: Small group of 6-15 with professional driver and licensed Chinese-speaking guide
highlights.zh: 6-15人享乐小团，配职业司机与专业中文导游深度讲解

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with daily breakfasts, ferries and listed attractions — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全包：含每日早餐、轮渡船票与所列景点，绝无强制购物

includes.en: Ground transport by tourist minibus plus polar fjord ferry crossings
includes.zh: 地面交通：旅游小型巴士及极地峡湾轮渡

includes.en: 3 nights' hotels: 1 night 4-star plus 2 nights 3-star (Nordic hotels no longer use star ratings; classification per Booking.com/Ctrip)
includes.zh: 3晚酒店住宿：四星级酒店1晚、三星级酒店2晚（北欧酒店已取消星级评定，星级以Booking.com或携程为标准）

includes.en: 3 breakfasts: hotel or equivalent breakfast throughout
includes.zh: 含餐：全程酒店或其他形式早餐共3餐

includes.en: Professional guide service, or a Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (groups of 8 or fewer use a driver-guide)
includes.zh: 导游服务：专业导游，或中文司机兼职导游（8人及以下安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Tromsø–Harstad (or Harstad–Tromsø) ferry tickets
includes.zh: 特罗姆瑟–哈尔斯塔或哈尔斯塔–特罗姆瑟轮渡船票

includes.en: Botnhamn–Brensholmen (or reverse) ferry tickets
includes.zh: 博特漢姆港–布伦霍尔门或布伦霍尔门–博特漢姆港轮渡船票

includes.en: Luggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23 kg plus 1 small carry-on
includes.zh: 行李说明：1件23公斤行李及1件随身小行李

excludes.en: International and domestic flights
excludes.zh: 国际及国内段机票

excludes.en: Passport fees and tourist visa fees for countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 护照费用及行程所列国家所需的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费：10欧/人/天（大小同价）

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners other than any meals specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内注明的餐食外，午餐与晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entrance fees for attractions not stated as included, and optional/recommended/experience activities
excludes.zh: 未注明含费用的景点门票，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等自费项目

excludes.en: Optional Lofoten cod-fishing trip at sea (group price EUR 138; runs for 10+ participants)
excludes.zh: 罗弗敦出海钓鳕鱼自费项目（团队预定价138欧，10人以上成行）

excludes.en: Extended accommodation, personal expenses (drinks, taxis, phone) and free-time activities
excludes.zh: 额外延长住宿、个人消费（饮料酒水、出租车、电话费等）及自由活动相关费用

timeline.title_zh: 特罗姆瑟 → 塞尼亚群岛 → 哈尔斯塔
timeline.description_en: After meeting in the morning, take the Botnhamn fjord ferry to Senja Island and follow its national scenic route: Ersfjord beach with its famous 'golden toilet' viewpoint, the Devil's Jaw seen from Tungeneset, the Okshornan peaks, and the Bergsbotn platform overlooking Bergsfjord. Continue to Harstad for the night at the Scandic Harstad or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后，乘坐博特漢姆峡湾渡轮前往塞尼亚岛，沿挪威国家观景公路游览：以“黄金厕所”观景台闻名的精灵峡湾海滩、从奇迹山峦瞭望台眺望的“恶魔之齿”、奥克斯曼群锋山，以及可俯瞰贝格斯峡湾的贝格斯景观台。随后前往哈尔斯塔，夜宿斯堪迪克哈尔斯塔酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哈尔斯塔 → 斯沃尔维尔 / 莱克内斯
timeline.description_en: Drive along the E10 to Svolvær, where you may optionally join local fishermen to fish for North Atlantic cod. Visit Henningsvær, famous for its football pitch built on the rocks, before checking in to the Scandic Lofoten or a similar 3–4 star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午沿E10公路前往斯沃尔韦尔，抵达后可选择跟随当地渔民海钓北大西洋鳕鱼，之后前往亨宁斯韦尔小镇，参观修建在岩石上的小岛足球场。游览结束后入住罗弗敦斯堪迪克或同等3-4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔韦尔 / 莱克内斯 → 奥镇 → 雷纳 → 莱克内斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Å at the end of the European road — the town with the world's shortest name and a long-time favourite of photographers. Continue to Reine for views of Reinebringen, then the red-cabin village of Hamnøy and the yellow rorbu houses of Sakrisøy, before returning to Leknes for the night at the Scandic Lofoten or a similar 3–4 star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往欧洲公路尽头、世界上名称最短却深受摄影师喜爱的奥镇（Å）游览拍摄；随后前往雷纳俯览雷讷山壮丽景色，再到挪威标志红房子小镇哈姆诺伊及黄色渔屋萨克里索伊。游览结束后返回莱克内斯，夜宿罗弗敦斯堪迪克或同等3-4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 莱克内斯 → 哈尔斯塔 → 特罗姆瑟（行程结束）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Harstad, then board the polar fjord ferry back to Tromsø on your own (about 3 hours, no guide on this leg). The tour ends on arrival in Tromsø.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后乘车前往哈尔斯塔，随后凭票自行乘坐极地峡湾轮渡返回特罗姆瑟（约3小时，本段渡轮无导游陪同）。抵达特罗姆瑟后散团，行程结束。

meeting_en: Tromsø, Norway — group meets in the morning in central Tromsø; the tour ends back in Tromsø after a self-boarded ferry.
meeting_zh: 挪威特罗姆瑟——上午于特罗姆瑟市区集合；行程最后一天自行乘轮渡返回特罗姆瑟后散团。

title_en: Lofoten Islands & Senja 5-Day Semi-Independent Tour from Tromsø
title_zh: 挪威罗弗敦群岛与塞尼亚岛5天半自助游（特罗姆瑟出发）
short_en: A 5-day small-group fjord journey from Tromsø across Senja and the Lofoten Islands, with polar ferries, fishing villages and a free day in Tromsø.
short_zh: 5天特罗姆瑟出发小团，穿越塞尼亚岛与罗弗敦群岛，搭乘极地峡湾轮渡，畅游渔村美景，并在特罗姆瑟自由活动。
desc_en: Travel from Tromsø deep into Arctic Norway on this 5-day semi-independent small-group tour. Cross the Bjorholmen fjord by ferry to scenic Senja Island, then follow the 'King Olav V Road' across the Lofoten archipelago to photographer favourites like Å, Reine and the red-and-yellow fishing huts of Hamnøy and Sakrisøy. A polar fjord ferry returns you to Tromsø, the 'Gateway to the Arctic', where a free final day lets you explore the harbour, Storgata old town and the Arctic Cathedral at your own pace. A one-way deep route with no backtracking, blending guided fjord touring with independent city time.
desc_zh: 这趟5天半自助小团带您从特罗姆瑟深入北极挪威。乘渡轮跨越博特漢姆峡湾前往风景如画的塞尼亚岛，再沿着“奥拉夫五世国王之路”穿越罗弗敦群岛，探访摄影师钟爱的奥镇、雷纳，以及哈姆诺伊、萨克里索伊的红黄渔屋。随后搭乘极地峡湾轮渡返回“北极之门”特罗姆瑟，最后一天自由活动，悠闲游览码头商业街、斯托加塔老城与极地教堂。单程深度线路，不走回头路，将导游带领的峡湾深度游与城市自由时光完美结合。

highlights.en: Senja Island — one of Norway's most celebrated National Tourist Routes, with Tungeneset, Bergsbotn and Ersfjord
highlights.zh: 塞尼亚岛——挪威最著名的国家旅游路线之一，包含奇迹山峦、贝格斯景观台与精灵峡湾

highlights.en: The Lofoten Islands, praised by Lonely Planet as 'breathtakingly beautiful'
highlights.zh: 罗弗敦群岛，被《孤独星球》盛赞“美得令人窒息”

highlights.en: The 130 km 'King Olav V Road' linking five islands by bridges and tunnels
highlights.zh: 贯穿五岛的130公里“奥拉夫五世国王之路”，以桥梁与隧道相连

highlights.en: Photographer's paradise: Å, Reine, and the iconic red huts of Hamnøy and yellow huts of Sakrisøy
highlights.zh: 摄影天堂：奥镇、雷纳，以及标志性的哈姆诺伊红房子与萨克里索伊黄渔屋

highlights.en: Scenic polar fjord ferries instead of backtracking by road — a true one-way route
highlights.zh: 搭乘极地峡湾轮渡而非原路返回——真正的单程线路

highlights.en: Free day in Tromsø, the 'Gateway to the Arctic', with its harbour, Arctic Cathedral and Tromsø Bridge
highlights.zh: 在“北极之门”特罗姆瑟自由活动，游览码头、极地教堂与跨海大桥

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star Scandic hotels by the harbour, with rich Nordic breakfasts
highlights.zh: 市中心海港旁四星级斯堪迪克连锁酒店，含丰盛北欧自助早餐

highlights.en: Small group of 6-15 with a professional driver and Chinese-speaking guide, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 6-15人小团，专业司机与中文导游，绝无强制购物

includes.en: Ground transport by tourist minibus and polar fjord ferries
includes.zh: 地面交通：旅游小型巴士及极地峡湾轮渡

includes.en: 4 nights' hotel: 2 nights 4-star + 2 nights 3-star (Nordic hotels no longer star-rated; ratings per Booking.com/Ctrip)
includes.zh: 4晚酒店住宿：四星级2晚、三星级2晚（北欧酒店已取消星级评定，星级以Booking.com或携程为准）

includes.en: 4 hotel (or equivalent) breakfasts, one each morning
includes.zh: 全程酒店或其他形式早餐，共计4餐

includes.en: Professional guide service, or Chinese-speaking driver-guide (groups of 8 or fewer get a driver-guide)
includes.zh: 专业导游服务或中文司机兼职导游（8人及以下安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: one 23 kg checked bag plus one small carry-on
includes.zh: 行李说明：1件23公斤行李及1件随身小行李

includes.en: Tromsø–Harstad (or Harstad–Tromsø) ferry ticket
includes.zh: 特罗姆瑟-哈尔斯塔或哈尔斯塔-特罗姆瑟轮渡船票

includes.en: Bjorholmen–Brensholmen (or reverse) ferry ticket
includes.zh: 博特漢姆港-布伦霍尔门或布伦霍尔门-博特漢姆港轮渡船票

excludes.en: International flights and personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 国际机票及个人护照费用

excludes.en: Schengen / tourist visa fees for the countries visited
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk-activity coverage if applicable)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: total €10 per person per day, same for adults and children
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费：共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程内未包含的午餐与晚餐费用

excludes.en: Attraction entries not marked as included, and all 'optional'/'recommended'/'experience' activities
excludes.zh: 未注明包含的景点门票，以及所有“推荐”“可选”“体验”等项目

excludes.en: Optional Lofoten cod-fishing trip (group price €138, for groups of 10+)
excludes.zh: 可选罗弗敦出海钓鳕鱼（团队预订价138欧，适用于10人以上团队）

excludes.en: Extended accommodation/transport/sightseeing beyond the itinerary, and personal expenses
excludes.zh: 行程外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用及个人消费

excludes.en: Any costs not explicitly listed under inclusions
excludes.zh: 费用包含中未提及的其他费用

timeline.title_zh: 特罗姆瑟 → 塞尼亚岛 → 哈尔斯塔
timeline.description_en: After the morning meet-up, take the Bjorholmen fjord ferry to Senja Island and follow Norway's Senja National Tourist Route, visiting Ersfjord (Elf Fjord) beach, the Tungeneset 'Devil's Teeth' viewpoint and Bergsbotn lookout. Continue to Harstad for the night at the Scandic Harstad or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后，乘坐博特漢姆峡湾渡轮前往塞尼亚岛，沿挪威国家旅游路线塞尼亚环半岛之旅游览精灵峡湾海滩、欣赏“恶魔之齿”的奇迹山峦瞭望点及贝格斯景观台，随后前往哈尔斯塔。夜宿斯堪迪克哈尔斯塔酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哈尔斯塔 → 斯沃尔维尔 / 莱克内斯
timeline.description_en: Drive the E10 along the 'King Olav V Road' to Svolvær, where you can optionally join local fishermen to catch North Atlantic cod. Visit the village of Henningsvær and its famous football pitch built on a rocky islet, then check in at the Scandic Lofoten or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午沿E10公路、循“奥拉夫五世国王之路”前往斯沃尔维尔，抵达后可选择跟随当地渔民海钓北大西洋鳕鱼，之后前往亨宁斯韦尔小镇，参观修建在岩石上的小岛足球场。夜宿罗弗敦斯堪迪克或同等3-4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔维尔/莱克内斯 → 奥镇 → 雷纳 → 莱克内斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Å, the much-photographed village at the very end of the European road with the world's shortest name. Then take in the majestic view of Reinebringen at Reine, and visit Norway's iconic red-hut village of Hamnøy and the yellow fishing huts of Sakrisøy before returning to Leknes. Overnight at the Scandic Lofoten or equivalent 3-4 star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往欧洲公路的尽头、世界上名称最短的城市奥镇拍摄游览，随后前往雷纳俯瞰雷讷山壮丽景色，再探访挪威标志性红房子小镇哈姆诺伊与黄色渔屋萨克里索伊，之后返回莱克内斯。夜宿罗弗敦斯堪迪克或同等3-4星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 莱克内斯 → 哈尔斯塔 → 特罗姆瑟
timeline.description_en: Drive to Harstad, then board the polar fjord ferry to Tromsø on your own (about 3 hours, no guide aboard) and check in independently at the city-centre hotel near the ferry terminal. Overnight at the Scandic Tromsø or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: Sunday-departure groups finish here with no Tromsø night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后乘车前往哈尔斯塔，随后自行乘坐极地峡湾轮渡前往特罗姆瑟（约3小时，本段轮渡无导游陪同），抵达后自行办理入住，酒店位于市中心步行街区，便于直达渡轮码头。夜宿特罗姆瑟松恩酒店或同等四星级酒店。备注：周日出发团期当天为最后一天，无特罗姆瑟住宿。

timeline.title_zh: 特罗姆瑟——自由活动与离团
timeline.description_en: Enjoy a full free day in Tromsø. We recommend exploring the harbour shopping street, the Storgata old-town walkway, the public library, the Arctic Cathedral and Tromsø Bridge (about a 2 km walk) before your journey ends. The hotel can be held until 11:00; there is no vehicle or Chinese-speaking guide service on this day.
timeline.description_zh: 全天特罗姆瑟自由活动，推荐自行游览码头商业街、斯托加塔步行街区、公共图书馆、北极之门、极地教堂及跨海大桥（步行约2公里），随后结束愉快旅程。备注：酒店可保留至当天中午11点，当天无用车及中文导游服务。

meeting_en: Tromsø, Norway — group meet-up on the morning of Day 1; the tour also ends in Tromsø.
meeting_zh: 挪威特罗姆瑟——第1天上午集合出发，行程同样在特罗姆瑟结束。

title_en: Northern Norway & Lofoten 6-Day Small-Group Tour from Tromsø
title_zh: 挪威北部与罗弗敦群岛6天跟团游（特罗姆瑟往返）
short_en: A 6-day round-trip from Tromsø through Narvik, the Lofoten islands, Senja and Sommarøy — Arctic fjords, fishing villages and the aurora.
short_zh: 特罗姆瑟往返6天深度环线，串联纳尔维克、罗弗敦群岛、塞尼亚岛与索玛罗伊，尽览北极峡湾、传统渔村与北极光。
desc_en: This relaxed six-day round-trip starts and ends in Tromsø, threading the heart of Arctic Norway. You follow King Olav V's Road across the Lofoten archipelago, stay two nights in an authentic five-star fishing-village water cabin in Svolvær, and explore the dramatic landscapes of Senja and the 'Arctic Caribbean' island of Sommarøy. Along the way you pass blue-hour views over Tromsø, the red-house villages of Reine and Hamnøy, Henningsvær's island football pitch, and Senja's national-scenic lookouts — with optional Arctic cod fishing, sea kayaking, whale watching and king-crab safaris.
desc_zh: 这是一条节奏宽松的特罗姆瑟往返六天环线，深入挪威北极腹地。沿“奥拉夫五世国王之路”贯穿罗弗敦群岛，在斯沃尔韦尔的五星级传统渔村水屋酒店连住两晚，再探访地貌浓缩了整个挪威的塞尼亚岛与被誉为“极地加勒比”的索玛罗伊岛。一路饱览特罗姆瑟的“蓝调时刻”、雷纳与哈姆诺伊的红房子小镇、亨宁斯韦尔的岩石小岛足球场，以及塞尼亚国家级景观路线，并可自费体验北大西洋鳕鱼海钓、北冰洋漂浮、出海观鲸与帝王蟹捕捞。

highlights.en: Cross the Lofoten islands on the scenic 'King Olav V's Road' linking five sea-bound isles
highlights.zh: 沿“奥拉夫五世国王之路”贯穿罗弗敦五座连岛的风景公路

highlights.en: Two nights in an authentic five-star fishing-village water-cabin hotel in Svolvær
highlights.zh: 在斯沃尔韦尔五星级传统渔村水屋酒店连住两晚

highlights.en: Tromsø's famous 'blue hour' over snow-capped peaks and fjords from the viewpoint
highlights.zh: 在观景台俯瞰特罗姆瑟雪山与峡湾的著名“蓝调时刻”

highlights.en: Red-house photo villages of Reine and Hamnøy, plus Henningsvær's island football pitch
highlights.zh: 雷纳与哈姆诺伊红房子摄影小镇，以及亨宁斯韦尔岩石小岛足球场

highlights.en: Senja island — a 'miniature Norway' of fjords, peaks and national-scenic lookouts
highlights.zh: 塞尼亚岛——汇集峡湾、雪山与国家级观景台的“挪威缩影”

highlights.en: Sommarøy, the 'Arctic Caribbean' fishing village with white beaches and aurora skies
highlights.zh: 被誉为“极地加勒比”的索玛罗伊渔村，白色沙滩与极光夜空

highlights.en: All intercity coach transport and the polar-fjord ferry included, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 含全程旅游巴士与极地峡湾渡轮，绝无强制购物

highlights.en: Relaxed pace with consecutive stays and all-inclusive base pricing
highlights.zh: 行程宽松、连续入住，一价全含的透明报价

includes.en: Ground transport: tour coach or minibus, plus the polar-fjord ferry
includes.zh: 地面交通：旅游巴士或小型巴士，以及极地峡湾渡轮

includes.en: 5 nights' hotels: 2 nights five-star fishing-village hotel + 3 nights four-star hotels
includes.zh: 5晚酒店住宿：五星级渔村酒店2晚 + 四星级酒店3晚

includes.en: 5 breakfasts (hotel or equivalent) throughout the trip
includes.zh: 全程酒店或其他形式早餐，共5餐

includes.en: Professional guide service, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide (for groups of 15 or fewer)
includes.zh: 专业导游服务，或中文司机兼职导游（15人及以下安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Professional driver service
includes.zh: 职业司机服务

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece up to 23 kg plus 1 small carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身小行李

excludes.en: International and domestic flights
excludes.zh: 国际及境内机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify coverage of high-risk activities)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（高风险活动请核实保险是否承保）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费：共10欧元/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程内未注明的午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entries to sights not marked as included (e.g. 'exterior view', 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' items)
excludes.zh: 未注明含门票的景点（如标注“外观”“推荐”“可选”“体验”等项目）

excludes.en: Optional activities, e.g. Lofoten cod fishing (149 EUR group rate), night Arctic Ocean floating (59 EUR group rate), Tromsø whale watching (adult 180 EUR / child 6-15 yrs 90 EUR), Tromsø king-crab safari (adult 290 EUR / child 6-15 yrs 150 EUR)
excludes.zh: 自费体验项目，如罗弗敦海钓鳕鱼（团队价149欧）、夜间北冰洋漂浮（团队价59欧）、特罗姆瑟出海观鲸（成人180欧/6-15岁儿童90欧）、特罗姆瑟帝王蟹（成人290欧/6-15岁儿童150欧）

excludes.en: Extended accommodation, personal spending, other transport, and force-majeure costs
excludes.zh: 延长住宿、私人消费、其他交通及不可抗力所产生的额外费用

timeline.title_zh: 特罗姆瑟 → 纳尔维克
timeline.description_en: Meet in Tromsø in the morning and tour the city, including the fjord-side district and the Arctic Cathedral, then ride the cable car up to the Tromsø viewpoint for 360-degree panoramas of the city and fjords — home of the famous 'blue hour'. Continue to Narvik for the night. Overnight in a four-star hotel (the historic Quality Hotel Royal or similar).
timeline.description_zh: 上午在特罗姆瑟集合，游览市区峡湾镇与北极教堂，并搭乘缆车登上特罗姆瑟观景台，360度俯瞰城市与峡湾全景，欣赏著名的“蓝调时刻”。随后前往纳尔维克。夜宿纳尔维克皇家品质酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 纳尔维克 → 斯沃尔韦尔（罗弗敦）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive into the Lofoten archipelago, following the scenic 130 km 'King Olav V's Road' that links five of the islands by bridges and tunnels. Continue to Svolvær. Overnight in a five-star traditional fishing-village water-cabin hotel (Anker Brygge or similar).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后驶入罗弗敦群岛，沿连接五座主岛、长约130公里的“奥拉夫五世国王之路”一路饱览风光，随后抵达斯沃尔韦尔。夜宿安克尔布里嘉酒店或同等五星级传统渔村水屋酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔韦尔 → 奥镇 → 雷纳 → 亨宁斯韦尔
timeline.description_en: Drive via Leknes to Å, the village at the very end of the European road and a photographer's favourite, then on to Reine for sweeping mountain views, the iconic red-house village of Hamnøy, and Henningsvær with its famous football pitch built on the rocks. Return to Svolvær for the night in the same five-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 经莱肯奈斯前往欧洲公路尽头、摄影师挚爱的奥镇（Å）拍摄，再赴雷纳俯览壮丽山色，途经挪威标志性红房子小镇哈姆诺伊，并到访建在岩石上的亨宁斯韦尔小岛足球场。随后返回斯沃尔韦尔，夜宿同等五星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔韦尔 → 塞尼亚岛
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you may join local fishermen for North Atlantic cod fishing or explore Svolvær freely, then travel along Ofotfjord to Senja — an island said to hold 'all of Norway's landscapes in miniature'. Overnight at the aurora-favourite Senja waterfront hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后可跟随当地渔民海钓北大西洋鳕鱼，或自由游览斯沃尔韦尔市区，随后沿奥福特峡灣前往被誉为挪威“缩影”的塞尼亚岛。夜宿有“极光天堂”之称的塞尼亚碼头酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 塞尼亚岛 → 索玛罗伊
timeline.description_en: Drive the Senja national-scenic route, stopping at the Bergsbotn lookout over Bergsfjord, the Tungeneset viewpoint facing the jagged Okshornan peaks ('Devil's Jaw'), and Ersfjord beach with its famously designed 'golden toilet'. Then board the polar-fjord ferry to Sommarøy near Tromsø, enjoying fjord scenery en route. Overnight at the Sommarøy Arctic Hotel or similar four-star.
timeline.description_zh: 沿塞尼亚国家级景观路线行驶，停留贝格斯景观台俯瞰贝格斯峡灣、奇迹山峦瞭望台远眺“恶魔之齿”奥克斯曼群峰，并到访以独特“黄金厕所”闻名的精灵峡灣海滩。随后乘极地峡灣渡轮前往特罗姆瑟附近的索玛罗伊岛，沿途欣赏峡灣风光。夜宿索玛罗伊北极酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索玛罗伊 → 特罗姆瑟
timeline.description_en: After breakfast enjoy free time or join an optional boat trip to see polar fjords and migrating whales, then return to Tromsø for a final city visit and the end of the tour. Optional extras include Tromsø whale watching and a king-crab safari.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后可市区自由活动，或自费乘观光船出海观赏极地峡灣与迁徙的大型鲸鱼，随后返回特罗姆瑟参观市区，行程结束。可自费参加特罗姆瑟出海观鲸及帝王蟹捕捞体验。

meeting_en: Tromsø, Norway — group meets in the morning of Day 1; tour is a round-trip ending back in Tromsø.
meeting_zh: 挪威特罗姆瑟——第1天上午集合；行程为特罗姆瑟往返，最终返回特罗姆瑟。

title_en: Norway Lofoten & Arctic Fjords: 6-Day Small-Group Tour (Oslo–Tromsø)
title_zh: 挪威罗弗敦群岛与北极峡湾6天小团游（奥斯陆—特罗姆瑟）
short_en: A 6-day one-way Arctic adventure through Lofoten's fishing villages, Senja's wild coast, Narvik's fjords and Tromsø, with domestic flight legs, whale watching and city-centre hotels included.
short_zh: 6天单程北极深度之旅，畅游罗弗敦渔村、塞尼亚野性海岸、纳尔维克峡湾与特罗姆瑟，含两段内陆航班、出海观鲸及市中心酒店。
desc_en: This 6-day small-group journey runs one-way through Arctic Norway, from Oslo via a flight to Evenes, then deep into the Lofoten archipelago, on through Narvik, the dramatic Senja island loop and finally Tromsø. You will photograph the iconic red-and-yellow fishing houses of Reine and Hamnøy, drive the scenic 'King Olav V Road' linking the islands, watch sea eagles and seals from a boat, and end with a winter whale-watching cruise on the Arctic Ocean. Highlights include two nights in traditional five-star fishing-village water cabins, a panoramic glass-house stay overlooking Narvik's fjord, and the famous 'blue hour' over Tromsø. International flights are excluded, but the two domestic flight legs, all hotels, and listed activities are included.
desc_zh: 这是一趟单程的6天北极挪威小团之旅，从奥斯陆飞往埃沃内斯，深入罗弗敦群岛，再经纳尔维克、壮丽的塞尼亚环岛之旅，最终抵达特罗姆瑟。您将拍摄雷纳与哈姆诺伊标志性的红黄渔屋，行驶贯穿群岛的“奥拉夫五世国王之路”，乘船观赏海鹰与海豹栖息地，并以一场北冰洋冬季出海观鲸结束旅程。亮点包括两晚传统五星级渔村水上木屋、俯瞰纳尔维克峡湾的全景玻璃屋，以及著名的特罗姆瑟“蓝调时刻”。行程不含国际段机票，但包含两段内陆机票、全程酒店及所列活动。

highlights.en: Deep exploration of the Lofoten archipelago, called 'heaven fallen to earth' by Lonely Planet
highlights.zh: 深度游览被《孤独星球》誉为落入人间天堂的罗弗敦群岛

highlights.en: Photographer's paradise: Reine, Hamnøy's red houses and Å, the village at Europe's road's end
highlights.zh: 摄影天堂：雷纳、哈姆诺伊红房子与欧洲公路尽头小镇奥镇（Å）

highlights.en: Senja island scenic loop — Tungeneset, Bergsbotn viewpoint and Ersfjord beach
highlights.zh: 塞尼亚环岛景观路线——奇迹山峦、贝格斯观景台与精灵峡湾海滩

highlights.en: Winter Arctic Ocean whale-watching cruise (mid-Oct to mid-Feb), spotting orcas and humpbacks
highlights.zh: 北冰洋冬季出海观鲸（10月中至次年2月中），有机会看到虎鲸与座头鲸

highlights.en: Two nights in traditional five-star fishing-village water cabins plus a panoramic glass-house stay
highlights.zh: 两晚传统五星级渔村水上木屋，外加全景玻璃屋特色住宿

highlights.en: Two internal/domestic flight legs and the scenic 'King Olav V Road' linking five islands included
highlights.zh: 含两段内陆航班及贯穿五岛的“奥拉夫五世国王之路”

highlights.en: One-way deep route — no backtracking, no wasted sightseeing time
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路，不走回头路，绝不浪费宝贵游览时间

highlights.en: 6–15 person small group with professional driver and Chinese-speaking guide
highlights.zh: 6-15人享乐小团，职业司机与中文导游深度讲解

includes.en: Two internal/domestic flight legs: Oslo–Evenes and Tromsø–Oslo
includes.zh: 内陆段航班：奥斯陆—埃沃内斯、特罗姆瑟—奥斯陆，共2段内陆航班

includes.en: Ground transport by tour coach
includes.zh: 地面交通：旅游巴士

includes.en: 5 nights' hotels: 2 nights five-star fishing-village hotel + 3 nights four-star hotel (Nordic hotels no longer star-rated; standard per Booking.com/Ctrip)
includes.zh: 酒店住宿：五星级渔村酒店2晚、四星级酒店3晚，共5晚（北欧酒店已取消星级评定，星级以Booking.com或携程为准）

includes.en: 5 breakfasts (hotel or equivalent throughout)
includes.zh: 餐饮：全程酒店或其他形式早餐，共计5餐

includes.en: Professional guide service, or Chinese-speaking driver-guide (driver-guide arranged for groups of 8 or fewer)
includes.zh: 导游服务：专业导游或中文司机兼职导游（8人及以下安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 checked bag (23 kg) + 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身小行李

includes.en: Activities: sea-eagle & seal habitat boat tour; Tromsø whale-watching cruise (15 Oct–mid Feb)
includes.zh: 活动项目：乘船游览海鹰海豹栖息地；特罗姆瑟出海观鲸（10月15日至次年2月中旬）

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Passport and tourist visa fees
excludes.zh: 护照及行程所列国家所需观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk activity coverage)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 小费：导游和司机小费共计10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内含特色餐外，不含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entry tickets to attractions not noted as included (incl. 'exterior view', 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' items)
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（含“外观”、“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等项目）

excludes.en: Extra accommodation, personal expenses, and optional/free-time activities and their costs
excludes.zh: 延长住宿、私人消费及自由活动、推荐项目所产生的费用

excludes.en: Any costs not mentioned under 'includes' and force-majeure-related expenses
excludes.zh: 费用包含中未提及的其他费用，及不可抗力所产生的费用

timeline.title_zh: 奥斯陆 → 埃沃内斯 → 斯沃尔维尔
timeline.description_en: Fly from Oslo to Evenes in the morning (no guide on flights); your guide meets you on arrival. Tour Harstad — Northern Norway's culinary capital on Hinnøya island — before continuing to the fishing town of Svolvær. Overnight in a traditional five-star water-cabin hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自行从奥斯陆飞往埃沃内斯（航班无导游陪同），抵达后导游接机。游览位于欣岛、被誉为挪威北欧美食之都的哈尔斯塔，随后前往渔镇斯沃尔维尔。夜宿传统五星级水上木屋酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔维尔 → 奥镇 → 雷纳 → 斯沃尔维尔
timeline.description_en: Drive to Å, the village with the world's shortest name at Europe's road's end, then to Reine for sweeping views of Reinebringen. Visit Hamnøy, Norway's iconic red-house village, and its yellow fishing cabins — classic photography spots. Return to Svolvær for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 前往欧洲公路尽头、世界上名字最短的城市奥镇（Å），随后前往雷纳全览雷讷山壮丽景色；探访挪威标志性红房子小镇哈姆诺伊及黄色渔屋等经典摄影场景。返回斯沃尔维尔传统渔村夜宿。

timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔维尔 → 亨宁斯韦尔 → 纳尔维克
timeline.description_en: Visit Henningsvær to see its famous football pitch built on a rocky islet, then travel along Ofotfjord — part of the scenic 130 km 'King Olav V Road' linking five of Lofoten's islands — to Narvik. Overnight at a ski-resort hotel set on the Narvikfjellet mountainside with panoramic fjord views.
timeline.description_zh: 前往亨宁斯韦尔小镇，参观修建在岩石小岛上的足球场；随后途经奥福特峡湾，沿连接罗弗敦五岛的“奥拉夫五世国王之路”前往纳尔维克。夜宿藏于Narvikfjellet山腰、坐拥峡湾全景的滑雪场度假村酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 纳尔维克 → 塞尼亚群岛
timeline.description_en: Drive to Senja and follow the Norwegian National Scenic Route around the island: first the Bergsbotn viewpoint, then Tungeneset (the best spot for the 'Devil's Teeth' peaks), and finally the beach at Ersfjord with its famous 'golden toilet'. Overnight at the aurora-favoured Senja Pier hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 前往塞尼亚岛，沿挪威国家公园旅游路线环半岛游览：先抵贝格斯观景台，再到欣赏“恶魔之齿”最佳地点奇迹山峦瞭望台，最后到精灵峡湾海滩（拥有著名的“黄金厕所”）。夜宿被称为极光天堂的塞尼亚码头酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 塞尼亚群岛 → 特罗姆瑟
timeline.description_en: Take a boat to a seal and sea-eagle habitat, then head to Tromsø to see the Arctic Cathedral and the landmark Tromsø Bridge. Optionally ride the Fjellheisen cable car (weather permitting) to the viewpoint for the famed 'blue hour' panorama. Overnight at a four-star hotel in central Tromsø.
timeline.description_zh: 乘船游览海豹、海鹰栖息地，随后前往特罗姆瑟，游览极地教堂与地标跨海大桥。可乘缆车登菲耶尔海森观景台（视天气而定），360度欣赏著名的特罗姆瑟“蓝调时刻”。夜宿特罗姆瑟市中心四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 特罗姆瑟 → 奥斯陆（出海观鲸）
timeline.description_en: Board a whale-watching boat from Tromsø harbour to watch polar fjords and migrating whales — orcas, humpbacks and fin whales gather in winter (season mid-Oct to mid-Feb). Afterwards transfer to the airport for your flight back to Oslo, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 前往特罗姆瑟海港乘坐出海观鲸船，观赏极地峡湾及鲸鱼迁徙，冬季有机会看到虎鲸、座头鲸与长须鲸（观鲸季为10月中旬至次年2月中旬）。之后按航班时间送机，乘机返回奥斯陆，结束美好行程。

meeting_en: Oslo, Norway — depart on a morning domestic flight from Oslo Airport to Evenes (no guide on the flight); your guide meets the group on arrival.
meeting_zh: 挪威奥斯陆——上午自行乘奥斯陆机场国内航班飞往埃沃内斯（航班无导游陪同），抵达后由导游接机集合。

title_en: Norway Lofoten & Arctic Coast 6-Day Group Tour
title_zh: 挪威罗弗敦群岛与北极海岸6天跟团游
short_en: A 6-day Arctic odyssey through Lofoten's fairy-tale fishing villages, Senja's scenic peninsula and Tromsø, with internal Norwegian flights and city-centre hotels included.
short_zh: 6天北极奇境之旅，深度游览罗弗敦童话渔村、塞尼亚风景半岛与特罗姆瑟，含挪威内陆段往返机票及特色酒店。
desc_en: Fly into the Arctic and journey one-way through Norway's most photographed landscapes, from the fairy-tale fishing villages of the Lofoten Islands to the dramatic peninsula of Senja and the gateway city of Tromsø. Over six days you'll see the red and yellow rorbu cabins of Hamnøy and Reine, the island football pitch of Henningsvær, the viewpoints of Senja's national scenic route, and the chance to chase whales or cod off the Arctic coast. Two nights are spent in a five-star traditional Lofoten waterside cabin hotel, with the route ending at Narvik, the world's northernmost ice-free port.
desc_zh: 飞入北极圈，单程深度穿越挪威最上镜的风景线——从罗弗敦群岛的童话渔村，到雄奇壮丽的塞尼亚半岛，再到北极门户之城特罗姆瑟。六天行程中，您将欣赏哈姆诺伊与雷纳的红黄渔屋、亨宁斯韦尔岩石上的小岛足球场、塞尼亚国家风景之路的观景台，并有机会出海观鲸或海钓北大西洋鳕鱼。其中两晚入住罗弗敦传统五星级水上木屋酒店，行程终点纳尔维克是世界最北的不冻港。

highlights.en: Lofoten Islands deep-dive: the 'heaven on earth' archipelago praised by Lonely Planet
highlights.zh: 罗弗敦群岛深度游览：被《孤独星球》誉为落入人间的天堂

highlights.en: Iconic red and yellow fishing cabins of Hamnøy and Reine, a photographer's paradise
highlights.zh: 哈姆诺伊与雷纳标志性红黄渔屋，摄影爱好者的天堂

highlights.en: Senja scenic peninsula loop with Bergsbotn, Tungeneset and Ersfjord viewpoints
highlights.zh: 塞尼亚风景半岛环线：贝格斯、奇迹山峦与精灵峡湾观景台

highlights.en: Two nights in a traditional five-star Lofoten waterside rorbu cabin hotel
highlights.zh: 两晚入住罗弗敦传统五星级水上木屋特色景观酒店

highlights.en: Henningsvær's famous island football pitch built on the rocks
highlights.zh: 参观亨宁斯韦尔修建在岩石上的著名小岛足球场

highlights.en: Optional Arctic whale-watching cruise and traditional cod fishing trip
highlights.zh: 可选北冰洋观鲸巡航及罗弗敦传统海钓鳕鱼体验

highlights.en: Round-trip Oslo-Evenes internal/domestic flights included; relaxed one-way deep route
highlights.zh: 含奥斯陆-埃沃内斯往返内陆段机票，宽松行程单程深度游

highlights.en: Professional driver, Chinese-speaking guide and city-centre hotels throughout
highlights.zh: 全程职业司机、专业中文导游及市中心特色酒店

includes.en: Round-trip Oslo-Evenes internal/domestic flights (2 internal sectors)
includes.zh: 奥斯陆-埃沃内斯往返2程内陆段机票

includes.en: Ground transport by tour coach or minibus
includes.zh: 地面交通：旅游巴士或小型巴士

includes.en: 5 nights' hotel: 2 nights five-star fishing-village cabin hotel + 3 nights four-star hotel
includes.zh: 5晚酒店住宿：五星级漁村酒店2晚，四星级酒店3晚

includes.en: Daily breakfast at the hotel (5 breakfasts total)
includes.zh: 全程酒店或其他形式早餐，共计5餐

includes.en: Professional guide or Chinese-speaking driver-guide service
includes.zh: 专业导游或中文司机兼职导游服务

includes.en: Professional driver service
includes.zh: 职业司机服务

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23kg plus 1 small carry-on
includes.zh: 行李：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身小行李

excludes.en: International round-trip flights to/from Europe
excludes.zh: 往返欧洲的国际机票

excludes.en: Passport and Schengen visa fees (single or multiple entry)
excludes.zh: 护照及申根签证费用（单次或多次入境）

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk activity coverage)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动请核实保险是否承保）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: EUR 10 per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费：共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners except meals specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内含特色餐外的午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entrance fees for attractions not marked as included
excludes.zh: 未注明费用包含的景点门票

excludes.en: Optional/experience activities, e.g. Lofoten cod-fishing trip (group price EUR 149) and the Arctic whale-watching cruise
excludes.zh: 自费体验活动，如罗弗敦海钓鳕鱼（团队预定价149欧）及北冰洋观鲸巡航

excludes.en: Extended accommodation, personal expenses and any costs not listed as included
excludes.zh: 延长住宿、私人消费及其他费用包含中未提及的费用

timeline.title_zh: 奥斯陆 → 埃沃内斯 → 斯沃尔维尔
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Oslo airport for the direct flight to Evenes, where your guide meets you and drives to Svolvær. Snow-capped peaks, fjords and fishing villages welcome you into this Arctic fairy-tale world. Overnight at the five-star traditional Lofoten waterside cabin hotel in central Svolvær.
timeline.description_zh: 根据航班时间自行前往奥斯陆机场，乘坐航班直飞埃沃内斯，抵达后导游接机前往斯沃尔维尔。雪山、峡湾、渔村，带您走进北极童话世界。夜宿斯沃尔维尔市中心五星级传统罗弗敦水上木屋酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔维尔 → 奥镇 → 雷纳 → 斯沃尔维尔
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Å, the village at the very end of the European highway with the world's shortest name, then continue to Reine for its magnificent panorama. Visit the iconic red-cabin village of Hamnøy and its yellow fishing huts before returning to Svolvær for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往欧洲公路的尽头、世界上名称最短的城市奥镇，随后前往雷纳全览壮丽景色；探访挪威标志性红房子小镇哈姆诺伊及黄色渔屋。随后返回斯沃尔维尔传统漁村，夜宿同一五星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔维尔 → 亨宁斯韦尔 → 哈尔斯塔
timeline.description_en: Optionally join local fishermen to catch North Atlantic cod, or explore Svolvær town at leisure. Then visit Henningsvær to see its famous football pitch built on a rocky islet, before following the E10 road to Harstad. Overnight at a four-star hotel in Harstad's old town facing the harbour.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后可选择跟随当地渔民海钓北大西洋鳕鱼，或自由游览斯沃尔维尔市区，之后前往亨宁斯韦尔小镇，参观修建在岩石上的小岛足球场。随后沿E10公路前往哈尔斯塔。夜宿哈尔斯塔老城面海的四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 哈尔斯塔 → 塞尼亚群岛 → 索玛罗伊
timeline.description_en: Drive onto Senja Island to follow Norway's national scenic route around the peninsula, stopping at the Bergsbotn viewpoint, the Tungeneset 'Devil's Teeth' lookout and the beautiful Ersfjord beach.
