Cross by Arctic fjord ferry to Sommarøy island. Overnight at a four-star Arctic hotel near Tromsø, the so-called 'Arctic Caribbean'.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往塞尼亚岛，沿挪威国家公园旅游路线塞尼亚环半岛之旅游览，依次抵达贝格斯观景台、欣赏惡魔之齿的奇迹山峦瞭望台，以及精灵峡湾海灘。随后乘坐极地峡湾渡轮前往索玛罗伊岛。夜宿特罗姆瑟被誉为极地加勒比的四星级北极酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 索玛罗伊 → 特罗姆瑟 → 纳尔维克
timeline.description_en: Head to Tromsø harbour to stroll the Arctic gateway city's main street and visit the Arctic library, or take an optional cruise out to watch Arctic fjords and migrating whales (whale season Nov to mid-Feb). Continue to Narvik for the night at a historic four-star hotel overlooking Ofotfjord.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往特罗姆瑟海港碼头，在此游览北极门户之城步行街及北极图书馆，或选择自费乘坐观光船出海，观赏极地峡湾及大型鲸鱼迁移（观鲸季节为11月至次年2月中旬）。随后前往纳尔维克，夜宿俯瞰奥福特峡湾的四星级历史酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 纳尔维克 → 埃沃内斯 → 奥斯陆
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you are transferred to Evenes airport according to your flight time to fly back to Oslo, where the happy journey ends. This day provides airport transfer only, with no sightseeing or guide service after arrival at Evenes.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后根据航班时间送至埃沃内斯机场，自行乘坐航班到达奥斯陆，结束愉快旅行。当天仅提供纳尔维克至机场的送机服务，抵达埃沃内斯机场后行程结束，不提供游览、导游及其它车辆服务。

meeting_en: Oslo Airport — depart on the included domestic flight to Evenes; your guide meets you on arrival at Evenes.
meeting_zh: 奥斯陆机场——乘坐含内陆段航班飞往埃沃内斯，导游在埃沃内斯接机。

title_en: Iceland 5-Day Small-Group Tour: Blue Lagoon, Golden Circle & Glacier Lagoon
title_zh: 冰岛5天跟团游：蓝湖温泉、黄金圈与冰河湖
short_en: A 5-day Iceland adventure from Reykjavik soaking in the Blue Lagoon, circling the Golden Circle, crossing black-sand beaches and reaching the Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach.
short_zh: 5天冰岛深度跟团游，从雷克雅未克出发，畅泡蓝湖温泉、环游黄金圈、穿越黑沙滩，直抵杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩。
desc_en: This 5-day round trip from Reykjavik distills Iceland's greatest hits into one relaxed itinerary. You'll spend an extended session soaking in the geothermal Blue Lagoon (or head out whale-watching instead), tour the classic Golden Circle of Thingvellir, Geysir and Gullfoss, then drive the south coast past Seljalandsfoss, Vik's black-sand beaches and the DC-3 plane wreck. The journey climaxes at the Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach, with optional glacier hiking or a super-jeep ride into a crystal blue ice cave. Two nights in Reykjavik and two nights at a glacier-lagoon hotel keep the pace comfortable, with northern-lights chances from your window.
desc_zh: 这条以雷克雅未克为起终点的5天环线，把冰岛最经典的精华浓缩进一段轻松的行程。您将用超长时间畅泡地热蓝湖温泉（也可改为出海观鲸），游览辛格维利尔、盖歇尔间歇泉与黄金瀑布组成的经典黄金圈，再沿南海岸经过塞里雅兰瀑布、维克黑沙滩与DC-3飞机残骸。行程高潮是杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩，并可选择冰川徒步或乘超级吉普车探访水晶蓝冰洞。雷克雅未克两晚加冰河湖景观酒店两晚，节奏从容，幸运时还能在房间窗前邂逅极光。

highlights.en: Extended soak in the geothermal Blue Lagoon (or whale-watching alternative)
highlights.zh: 超长时间畅泡地热蓝湖温泉（或可选出海观鲸）

highlights.en: Classic Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park, Geysir geothermal area and Gullfoss waterfall
highlights.zh: 经典黄金圈：辛格维利尔国家公园、盖歇尔间歇泉区与黄金瀑布

highlights.en: South-coast wonders: Seljalandsfoss, Vik black-sand beach, Reynisdrangar basalt columns and the DC-3 plane wreck
highlights.zh: 南海岸奇景：塞里雅兰瀑布、维克黑沙滩、雷尼斯岩柱群与DC-3飞机残骸

highlights.en: Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and the dazzling Diamond Beach
highlights.zh: 杰古沙龙冰河湖与璀璨的钻石沙滩

highlights.en: Optional crystal blue ice-cave exploration by glacier hike or super-jeep
highlights.zh: 可选冰川徒步或超级吉普车探访水晶蓝冰洞

highlights.en: Comfortable city-centre 4-star hotels and scenic glacier-lagoon lodging with northern-lights chances
highlights.zh: 市中心舒适四星级酒店及冰河湖景观住宿，有机会邂逅极光

highlights.en: Professional Chinese-speaking guide or guide-driver throughout, with private touring vehicle
highlights.zh: 全程专业中文导游或中文司机兼导游，专用旅游车接送

highlights.en: Reykjavik city walk: Hallgrimskirkja cathedral, Harpa concert hall, Tjornin lake and the Sun Voyager sculpture
highlights.zh: 雷克雅未克城市漫步：大教堂、哈帕音乐厅、托宁湖与太阳航海者雕塑

includes.en: Ground transport: private tour coach or business touring vehicle
includes.zh: 地面交通：专用旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: 4 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 舒适型四星级酒店住宿4晚

includes.en: Daily breakfast (hotel or equivalent) throughout
includes.zh: 全程酒店或其他形式早餐

includes.en: Professional Chinese-speaking guide, or Chinese-speaking guide-driver for groups of 15 or fewer
includes.zh: 专业中文导游服务；15人及以下安排中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Professional European driver, or Chinese-speaking guide-driver for groups of 15 or fewer
includes.zh: 专业欧洲司机服务；15人及以下安排中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Baggage allowance: one 23kg checked bag plus one small carry-on
includes.zh: 行李说明：1件23公斤行李及1件随身小行李

excludes.en: International flights
excludes.zh: 国际段往返机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (please confirm coverage for high-risk activities)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动，请核实保险是否包含该项目）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver
excludes.zh: 导游与司机小费

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 午餐与晚餐

excludes.en: Optional activities: Blue Lagoon ticket package; black-sand-beach electric shuttle car (EUR 36); glacier hike + blue ice cave with transfers and booking fee (EUR 178/adult); super-jeep + blue ice cave with transfers and booking fee (EUR 198/adult)
excludes.zh: 自费可选项目：蓝湖温泉门票套票；黑沙滩极地专用电瓶摆渡车（36欧）；冰川徒步+探索蓝冰洞+往返交通+预订服务费（178欧/成人）；超级吉普车+探索蓝冰洞+往返交通+预订服务费（198欧/成人）

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 → 蓝湖温泉 → 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: Meet in central Reykjavik (or at Keflavik Airport) and head to the Blue Lagoon, where you can choose a ticket package for an extended soak in the milky-blue geothermal waters ringed by jagged lava; whale-watching is an alternative. Return to Reykjavik for the night at the 4-star Grandi Central or similar.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在雷克雅未克市区（或凯夫拉维克机场）集合，前往蓝湖温泉景区，可选购门票套票，在熔岩环绕的淡蓝色地热湖水中超长时间畅泡；亦可改为中午出海观鲸。之后返回雷克雅未克，夜宿四星级雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 → 黄金圈 → 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour Iceland's famous Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park's rift valley, the Geysir geothermal area's spouting hot springs, and the thundering 50-metre Gullfoss waterfall. Return to Reykjavik for the night at the 4-star Grandi Central or similar.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，游览冰岛著名的黄金圈：辛格维利尔国家公园大裂谷、盖歇尔间歇泉地热区喷涌的热泉，以及落差逾50米、气势磅礴的黄金瀑布。结束后返回雷克雅未克，夜宿四星级雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 → 维克 → 冰河湖
timeline.description_en: Drive the south coast to Seljalandsfoss and the rainbow waterfall, then on to Vik. Reach the DC-3 plane wreck on the black-sand beach on foot, by electric shuttle car or by ATV, then explore the black-sand beach and Reynisdrangar basalt columns. Continue to the glacier lagoon area for the night at a 4-star Glacier Lagoon hotel or similar.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后沿南海岸前往塞里雅兰瀑布与彩虹瀑布，随后抵达维克，可徒步、乘电瓶摆渡车或ATV越野车穿越黑沙滩，前往拍摄DC-3飞机残骸，再游览黑沙滩与雷尼斯岩柱群。之后前往冰河湖，夜宿四星级冰河泻湖酒店或同级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Glacier Lagoon → Diamond Beach → Glacier Lagoon
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖 → 钻石沙滩 → 冰河湖
timeline.description_en: Optionally explore a crystal blue ice cave at the foot of Vatnajokull glacier, led by an expert guide on foot or by glacier jeep (Oct-Apr only, weather permitting). In the afternoon visit the jewel of Vatnajokull, the Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon, and the adjacent Diamond Beach. Night at a 4-star Glacier Lagoon hotel or similar.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，可选择在专业向导带领下，于瓦特纳冰川脚下徒步或乘冰川吉普车探索水晶蓝冰洞（仅10月至次年4月、视天气而定）。下午游览瓦特纳冰川皇冠上的明珠——杰古沙龙冰河湖以及钻石沙滩。夜宿四星级冰河泻湖酒店或同级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖 → 雷克雅未克 → 凯夫拉维克机场
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive back to Reykjavik for free time exploring Hallgrimskirkja cathedral, Harpa concert hall, a stroll by Tjornin lake, the Sun Voyager sculpture and the old Grandi harbour district. Disembark in central Reykjavik (15:30) or transfer to Keflavik Airport (17:00) to conclude the trip.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后乘车返回雷克雅未克，自由参观雷克雅未克大教堂、哈帕音乐厅、托宁湖畔漫步、太阳航海者雕塑，并游走于格兰迪旧港地区。可于雷克雅未克市区（15:30）下团，或随车前往凯夫拉维克机场（17:00），结束愉快行程。

meeting_en: Central Reykjavik (09:00) or Keflavik Airport (09:45); afternoon meeting options at 16:00 (city) / 16:45 (airport) also available. Exact times per the dispatch notice.
meeting_zh: 雷克雅未克市区（09:00）或凯夫拉维克机场（09:45）集合；亦提供下午16:00（市区）/16:45（机场）集合选项，具体时间以《出团通知书》为准。

title_en: Winter Iceland 6-Day Boutique Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 冬季冰岛6天精品小团游
short_en: A relaxed 6-day winter circuit from Reykjavik: Blue Lagoon, Golden Circle, black sand beaches, glacier lagoon, blue ice cave and whale watching.
short_zh: 雷克雅未克出发的6天悠闲冬季环线：蓝湖温泉、黄金圈、黑沙滩、冰河湖、蓝冰洞与出海观鲸。
desc_en: This boutique small-group tour explores the wonders of winter Iceland at an unhurried pace, beginning and ending in Reykjavik. Soak in the famous Blue Lagoon, follow the classic Golden Circle past Thingvellir, Geysir and Gullfoss, then chase the wild south coast with its DC-3 plane wreck, Reynisfjara black sand beach, glacier lagoon and a super-jeep expedition into a blue ice cave. The journey closes with the otherworldly Snaefellsnes Peninsula and a whale-watching cruise from the capital. With scenic landmark hotels, a deliberately spacious itinerary and all-inclusive pricing, it is built for savouring Iceland rather than rushing it.
desc_zh: 这趟精品小团以悠闲的节奏深度探索冬季冰岛之美，往返均在雷克雅未克。畅泡著名的蓝湖温泉，沿经典黄金圈饱览辛格维利尔国家公园、间歇泉与黄金瀑布，再深入狂野的南部海岸：DC-3飞机残骸、雷尼斯黑沙滩、傑古沙龙冰河湖，并乘超级吉普车探秘蓝冰洞。行程尾声前往宛如外星球的斯奈山半岛，并在首都乘船出海观鲸。配合特色景观酒店、刻意宽松的行程与一价全含的报价，旨在让你细细品味冰岛，而非赶路。

highlights.en: Full-day soak at the iconic Blue Lagoon with a Premium VIP ticket and lava-view hotel stay
highlights.zh: 畅享标志性蓝湖温泉一整天，含Premium VIP门票及熔岩景观酒店住宿

highlights.en: Classic Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park, Geysir geothermal area and Gullfoss waterfall
highlights.zh: 经典黄金圈：辛格维利尔国家公园、蓋歇尔间歇泉地热区与黄金瀑布

highlights.en: Wild south coast: DC-3 plane wreck, Reynisfjara black sand beach and basalt columns
highlights.zh: 狂野南岸：DC-3飞机残骸、雷尼斯黑沙滩与玄武岩柱

highlights.en: Super-jeep expedition and hike into a natural blue ice cave inside Vatnajokull glacier
highlights.zh: 乘超级吉普车并徒步深入瓦特纳冰川的天然蓝冰洞

highlights.en: Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and the sparkling Diamond Beach
highlights.zh: 傑古沙龙冰河湖与璀璨的钻石沙滩

highlights.en: Snaefellsnes Peninsula photo spots: Kirkjufell (Church Mountain) and Arnarstapi fishing village
highlights.zh: 斯奈山半岛摄影胜地：草帽山（教会山）与阿尔纳斯塔皮小渔村

highlights.en: Whale-watching cruise from Reykjavik old harbour with English-speaking guide
highlights.zh: 从雷克雅未克旧港乘船出海观鲸，配英文向导

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing, scenic landmark hotels and a deliberately relaxed, no-rush itinerary
highlights.zh: 一价全含、特色景观酒店、刻意宽松不赶路的行程

includes.en: Private business touring vehicle for all listed transfers
includes.zh: 全程商务旅行车接送

includes.en: 5 nights' accommodation: 3 nights comfortable 4-star hotels plus 2 nights signature scenic hotels
includes.zh: 5晚住宿：舒适型四星级酒店3晚，特色景观酒店2晚

includes.en: 5 breakfasts (hotel buffet or equivalent)
includes.zh: 酒店自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计5餐

includes.en: Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout
includes.zh: 全程中文司机兼导游服务

includes.en: Luggage allowance: one 23kg checked bag plus one small carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身小包

includes.en: Included activities: Blue Lagoon (Premium VIP), plane-wreck shuttle, super-jeep blue ice cave (winter route) and whale-watching cruise
includes.zh: 活动：蓝湖温泉（Premium VIP）、飞机残骸擺渡车、吉普车蓝冰洞探险（冬季路线）、出海观鲸

excludes.en: International and intercontinental flights
excludes.zh: 国际及洲际往返机票

excludes.en: Personal passport and tourist visa fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照及旅游观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (confirm high-risk activities are covered)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（请核实是否涵盖高风险活动）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游和司机小费共计10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内含特色餐外，行程中的午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Entry fees for attractions not marked as included, and any optional/recommended activities
excludes.zh: 未注明费用包含的景点门票，以及推荐、可选、体验等自费项目

excludes.en: Extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用

excludes.en: Personal expenses (drinks, taxis, phone, etc.) and other transport not listed
excludes.zh: 私人消费（饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等）及其他未明确包含的交通费用

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 / 凯夫拉维克 → 蓝湖
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to the Blue Lagoon spa hotel and check in with your booking. Spend the whole day savouring the Premium VIP Blue Lagoon, soaking in the warm geothermal waters with views of green moss fields and distant snowy mountains. (No vehicle or guide on this day.)
timeline.description_zh: 自行前往冰岛蓝湖温泉酒店，持订单办理入住。拒绝赶景点，用一整天细细品味Premium VIP蓝湖温泉，浸泡在温暖的蓝色泉水中，远眺绿色苔原与雪山壮景。（当日无用车、无导游陪同。）

timeline.title_zh: 蓝湖 → 黄金圈 → 塞里雅兰瀑布
timeline.description_en: Meet at the Blue Lagoon hotel and set off on Iceland's classic Golden Circle, taking in Thingvellir National Park, the Geysir geothermal area and the thundering Gullfoss waterfall. Overnight at the Horizon, ION Adventure or UMI hotel area near Seljalandsfoss.
timeline.description_zh: 在蓝湖酒店集合，前往冰岛经典黄金圈，游览辛格维利尔国家公园、蓋歇尔间歇泉区与气势磅礴的黄金瀑布。夜宿塞里雅兰瀑布旁的冰岛地平线酒店、ION冒险酒店或UMI酒店等同级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Seljalandsfoss → Plane Wreck → Black Sand Beach → Reynisdrangar → Glacier Lagoon
timeline.title_zh: 塞里雅兰瀑布 → 飞机残骸 → 黑沙滩 → 雷尼斯岩柱群 → 冰河湖
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the haunting DC-3 plane wreck on Solheimasandur, then visit Reynisfjara black sand beach and the Reynisdrangar basalt sea stacks beside the charming village of Vik. Continue east to the glacier lagoon for the night at the Jokulsarlon hotel or similar.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往DC-3飞机残骸，感受世界末日般的苍凉之美，随后游览黑沙滩及雷尼斯岩柱群，毗邻风景如画的维克小镇。之后前往冰河湖，夜宿傑古沙龙冰河湖酒店或同等级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Glacier Lagoon → Blue Ice Cave → Reykjavik
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖 → 蓝冰洞 → 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: Explore Vatnajokull National Park, then ride a glacier super-jeep and hike to a natural blue ice cave to discover its crystal-blue walls. Visit the famous Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach before driving to Reykjavik for the night at the Grandi hotel or an equivalent 4-star property.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览瓦特纳冰川国家公园，乘坐冰川吉普车并徒步前往蓝冰洞，探秘水晶般的冰蓝仙境。随后游览傑古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩，夜宿雷克雅未克格蓝迪酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 → 斯奈山半岛 → 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: After breakfast visit Kirkjufell (Church Mountain), then the village of Arnarstapi with its sea cliffs and rock arches. The Snaefellsnes Peninsula is one of Iceland's great photography spots. Return to Reykjavik for the night at the Grandi hotel or an equivalent 4-star property.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往草帽山，随后游览阿尔纳斯塔皮小镇，参观章鱼爷爷、鸟之吻、海蚀柱悬崖等景点。斯奈山半岛是冰岛公认的摄影胜地。返回雷克雅未克，夜宿格蓝迪酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 → 出海观鲸 → 离团
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore the capital at leisure: Hallgrimskirkja cathedral, a stroll around Tjornin lake, the Sun Voyager sculpture and the old harbour. At midday make your own way to the pier for a whale-watching cruise with an English-speaking guide (about 2.5-3.5 hours). City sightseeing is free time with no vehicle or guide.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由游览首都地标雷克雅未克大教堂，在托宁湖边漫步，欣赏太阳航海者雕塑，游走旧港地区。中午自行前往码头，在英文向导带领下乘船出海观鲸，活动时长约2.5-3.5小时。市区行程为自由活动，当日无导游陪同及用车服务。

meeting_en: Reykjavik, Iceland — tour begins at the Blue Lagoon spa hotel (near Keflavik International Airport) and ends in Reykjavik after the whale-watching cruise.
meeting_zh: 冰岛雷克雅未克——行程从蓝湖温泉酒店（邻近凯夫拉维克国际机场）开始，观鲸结束后在雷克雅未克散团。

title_en: Iceland in Depth: 6-Day Small-Group Tour from Reykjavik
title_zh: 冰岛深度6天跟团游（雷克雅未克往返）
short_en: 6 days circling Iceland's south coast: Blue Lagoon, Golden Circle, black-sand beaches, glacier lagoon, blue ice caves and Northern Lights.
short_zh: 6天畅游冰岛南岸：蓝湖温泉、黄金圈、黑沙滩、冰河湖、蓝冰洞与北极光，雷克雅未克往返一价全包。
desc_en: This 6-day round-trip from Reykjavik takes you across Iceland's most iconic landscapes, from the geothermal Blue Lagoon and the classic Golden Circle to the volcanic black-sand beaches of Vik and the otherworldly Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon. Venture inside a crystal-blue ice cave by glacier jeep or on foot, chase the Northern Lights over Faxafloi Bay, and finish with the dramatic fjord scenery of the Snaefellsnes Peninsula. With city-centre 4-star hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all transport included, it's an all-inclusive deep dive into Iceland's fire and ice.
desc_zh: 本行程从雷克雅未克出发往返，6天串联冰岛最具标志性的自然奇观：从地热蓝湖温泉、经典黄金圈，到维克的火山黑沙滩，再到宛如仙境的杰古沙龙冰河湖。可乘超级冰川吉普车或徒步深入水晶蓝冰洞，在法赫萨海湾乘船追猎北极光，最后在斯奈山半岛饱览格陵兰风情的峡湾小镇风光。全程入住市中心四星级酒店，配中文司机兼导游，含全部交通，是一次深入冰岛冰与火世界的一价全包之旅。

highlights.en: Long, relaxed soak in the geothermal Blue Lagoon amid otherworldly lava fields
highlights.zh: 超长时间畅享地热蓝湖温泉，沉浸于嶙峋熔岩环抱的梦幻湖水

highlights.en: Classic Golden Circle: Thingvellir rift valley, Geysir geothermal area and Gullfoss waterfall
highlights.zh: 经典黄金圈：辛格维利尔大裂谷、盖歇尔间歇泉地热区与黄金瀑布

highlights.en: Reynisfjara black-sand beach, basalt columns and the DC-3 plane wreck
highlights.zh: 雷尼斯黑沙滩、玄武岩柱群与DC-3飞机残骸网红打卡地

highlights.en: Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach, the crown jewels of Vatnajokull
highlights.zh: 瓦特纳冰川皇冠上的明珠——杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩

highlights.en: Explore a natural crystal-blue ice cave by super glacier jeep or glacier hike
highlights.zh: 乘超级冰川吉普车或冰川徒步，探索天然水晶蓝冰洞巨型冰宫殿

highlights.en: Northern Lights cruise across Faxafloi Bay with onboard aurora guides
highlights.zh: 法赫萨海湾乘船出海追猎北极光，船上配专业极光向导

highlights.en: Snaefellsnes Peninsula panorama: Kirkjufell, Arnarstapi village and the Black Church
highlights.zh: 斯奈山半岛全景游：草帽山、阿尔纳斯塔皮渔村与黑教堂

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with city-centre 4-star hotels and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 一价全包，入住市中心四星级酒店，配中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Ground transport by dedicated tour coach or business vehicle
includes.zh: 地面交通：专用旅游巴士或商务旅行车

includes.en: 5 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels (star rating per Booking.com/Ctrip, as Iceland no longer issues official ratings)
includes.zh: 舒适型四星级酒店住宿5晚（冰岛已取消官方星级评定，星级以Booking.com或携程标准为准）

includes.en: Daily breakfast at the hotel or in another form throughout
includes.zh: 全程酒店或其他形式早餐

includes.en: Professional Chinese-speaking guide, or Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (driver-guide for groups of 15 or fewer)
includes.zh: 专业中文导游，或中文司机兼职导游（15人及以下安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Professional European driver service, or Chinese-speaking driver-guide
includes.zh: 专业欧洲司机服务，或中文司机兼职导游（15人及以下安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece of 23kg checked luggage plus 1 small carry-on
includes.zh: 行李说明：1件23公斤行李及1件随身小行李

excludes.en: International flights
excludes.zh: 国际往返机票

excludes.en: Personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 个人护照费用

excludes.en: Tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify coverage of high-risk activities such as glacier/snow activities)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如涉及高风险运动，请核实保险是否包含该项目）

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 午餐与晚餐

excludes.en: Optional activities, e.g. Blue Lagoon Comfort package (EUR 128/adult), electric shuttle to the DC-3 wreck (EUR 36), ATV ride across the black sand (EUR 198), glacier hike + blue ice cave (EUR 178/adult), super jeep + blue ice cave (EUR 198/adult)
excludes.zh: 自费项目，如蓝湖温泉Comfort套票（128欧/成人）、飞机残骸电瓶摆渡车（36欧）、ATV越野车穿越黑沙滩（198欧）、冰川徒步+蓝冰洞（178欧/成人）、超级吉普车+蓝冰洞（198欧/成人）

excludes.en: Gratuities
excludes.zh: 司机及导游小费

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 → 蓝湖温泉 → 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: Meet in central Reykjavik in the morning and head toward Keflavik Airport and the Blue Lagoon, where you can soak in the famous geothermal spa (optional ticket) or instead join a midday whale-watching cruise. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or a similar 4-star.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在雷克雅未克市区集合，前往凯夫拉维克机场及蓝湖温泉，可选择享受蓝湖温泉门票套票，或随车返回雷克雅未克选择中午出海观鲸。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 → 黄金圈 → 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour Iceland's famed Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park, the Geysir geothermal area and the thundering Gullfoss waterfall, three world-renowned sights set along a scenic loop. Return to Reykjavik for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览冰岛黄金圈：辛格维利尔国家公园、盖歇尔间歇泉地热区与气势磅礴的黄金瀑布，三大景点串联成著名的旅游黄金圈，景观为冰岛独有、闻名世界。结束后返回雷克雅未克住宿。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 → 维克 → 冰河湖
timeline.description_en: Visit Seljalandsfoss and Skogafoss waterfalls, then continue to Vik. Reach the DC-3 plane wreck on foot, by electric shuttle or by ATV across the black sand, then explore Reynisfjara black-sand beach and its basalt columns. Continue to the glacier lagoon for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往塞里雅兰瀑布与彩虹瀑布，随后抵达维克，可徒步、乘电瓶摆渡车或乘ATV越野车穿越黑沙滩前往DC-3飞机残骸，之后游览黑沙滩及雷尼斯岩柱群。结束后前往冰河湖，夜宿冰河泻湖酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Glacier Lagoon → Diamond Beach → Glacier Lagoon
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖 → 钻石沙滩 → 冰河湖
timeline.description_en: Choose a guided glacier hike or a super glacier jeep ride to a natural crystal-blue ice cave beneath Vatnajokull National Park. In the afternoon, visit the stunning Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach. Overnight near the glacier lagoon.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后可选择由专业向导带领的冰川徒步，或乘冰川吉普车前往瓦特纳冰川国家公园脚下的天然水晶蓝冰洞。下午游览瓦特纳冰川皇冠上的明珠——杰古沙龙冰河湖及钻石沙滩。夜宿冰河泻湖酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖 → 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: Return to Reykjavik and explore the city at leisure: Hallgrimskirkja cathedral, Harpa concert hall, Tjornin lake, the Sun Voyager sculpture and the Grandi old harbour. Optionally join an evening Northern Lights cruise (about 2 hours) across Faxafloi Bay. Overnight in Reykjavik.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后返回雷克雅未克，自由参观雷克雅未克大教堂、哈帕音乐厅、托宁湖、太阳航海者雕塑，漫步格兰迪旧港地区。亦可选择当晚自行前往码头乘船，开启约2小时的法赫萨海湾追光之旅（当日无中文导游，船上有英文向导）。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 → 斯奈山 → 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour the Snaefellsnes Peninsula, often called 'a miniature Iceland.' Visit Kirkjufell (the 'straw-hat' mountain), the fishing village of Arnarstapi with its sea-eroded rock formations, and the Black Church before returning to Reykjavik, where the tour ends.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往斯奈山半岛，先游览草帽山，随后前往阿尔纳斯塔皮小镇，参观章鱼爷爷、海之吻等景点，之后参观黑教堂。结束后返回雷克雅未克，结束美好行程。（如遇暴风雪等恶劣天气，斯奈山行程将改为雷克雅未克一日游，含珍珠楼或飞越冰岛项目。）

meeting_en: Central Reykjavik (morning meet-up; pickup also available at Keflavik Airport). Exact times per the final departure notice.
meeting_zh: 雷克雅未克市区（上午集合，亦可在凯夫拉维克机场上车）。具体时间以《出团通知书》为准。

title_en: Iceland Ring of Wonders: 7-Day Small-Group Tour from Reykjavik
title_zh: 冰岛奇境环线：7天雷克雅未克小团跟团游
short_en: 7 days from Reykjavik through the Blue Lagoon, Golden Circle, black-sand beaches, the Glacier Lagoon and Snaefellsnes, with northern-lights and whale-watching options.
short_zh: 7天从雷克雅未克出发，畅游蓝湖温泉、黄金圈、黑沙滩、冰河湖与斯奈山半岛，可选追极光与出海观鲸。
desc_en: This 7-day round-trip from Reykjavik traces Iceland's most iconic landscapes: soak in the geothermal Blue Lagoon, witness erupting geysers and thundering Gullfoss on the Golden Circle, then drive the south coast past Seljalandsfoss, the Vik black-sand beach and basalt columns to the dazzling Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon and Diamond Beach. Explore crystal-blue ice caves beneath Vatnajokull, then return via the wild Snaefellsnes Peninsula with Kirkjufell and its Greenlandic fishing villages. Optional northern-lights cruises and whale-watching round out an all-inclusive journey staying in city-centre 4-star hotels.
desc_zh: 本行程为7天雷克雅未克往返之旅，串联冰岛最经典的风景：先在地热蓝湖温泉舒缓身心，再于黄金圈饱览喷涌的间歇泉与气势磅礴的黄金瀑布；沿南海岸一路前往塞里雅兰瀑布、维克黑沙滩与玄武岩柱群，直抵璀璨的杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩。深入瓦特纳冰川探访水晶蓝冰洞，最后取道狂野的斯奈山半岛，欣赏草帽山与格陵兰风情渔村。可选出海追极光与观鲸，全程入住市中心四星级酒店，价格全包。

highlights.en: Long, unhurried soak in the geothermal Blue Lagoon
highlights.zh: 超长时间畅享地热蓝湖温泉

highlights.en: Golden Circle: Thingvellir rift, Geysir hot springs and Gullfoss waterfall
highlights.zh: 黄金圈：辛格维利尔大裂谷、盖歇尔间歇泉与黄金瀑布

highlights.en: South coast: Seljalandsfoss, Vik black-sand beach and Reynisdrangar basalt columns
highlights.zh: 南海岸：塞里雅兰瀑布、维克黑沙滩与雷尼斯岩柱群

highlights.en: Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon and Diamond Beach
highlights.zh: 杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩

highlights.en: Crystal-blue ice cave beneath the Vatnajokull glacier
highlights.zh: 瓦特纳冰川下的水晶蓝冰洞

highlights.en: Snaefellsnes Peninsula: Kirkjufell, Arnarstapi and the black church
highlights.zh: 斯奈山半岛：草帽山、阿尔纳斯塔皮与黑教堂

highlights.en: Optional Faxafloi northern-lights cruise and Reykjavik whale-watching
highlights.zh: 可选法赫萨峡湾出海追极光与雷克雅未克观鲸

highlights.en: Central 4-star hotels, all-inclusive pricing, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星级酒店、价格全包、全程无强制购物

includes.en: 6 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 6晚舒适型四星级酒店住宿

includes.en: Ground transport by tour coach or minibus
includes.zh: 旅游巴士或小型巴士地面交通

includes.en: Daily breakfast at the hotel (6 breakfasts)
includes.zh: 全程酒店早餐（共6份早餐）

includes.en: Professional guide or Chinese-speaking driver-guide (driver-guide for groups of 15 or fewer)
includes.zh: 专业导游或中文司机兼职导游（15人及以下安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Professional driver service
includes.zh: 职业司机服务

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23 kg plus 1 small carry-on
includes.zh: 行李额度：1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身小行李

includes.en: Listed sightseeing per the itinerary (18 attractions; some entrance tickets not included)
includes.zh: 行程列明的游览安排（18个景点/场馆，部分景点不含门票）

excludes.en: International flights to and from Iceland
excludes.zh: 往返冰岛的国际机票

excludes.en: Passport and visa fees
excludes.zh: 护照及签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance
excludes.zh: 旅游保险

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners
excludes.zh: 全程午餐与晚餐

excludes.en: Optional activities, e.g. Blue Lagoon Comfort ticket (EUR128/adult), shuttle buggy to the DC-3 wreck (EUR36), ATV black-sand ride (EUR198), glacier hike + ice cave (EUR178/adult), northern-lights cruise (EUR128), whale-watching (EUR120/person)
excludes.zh: 自选活动，如蓝湖温泉Comfort套票（128欧/成人）、飞机残骸专用电瓶摆渡车（36欧）、ATV黑沙滩越野（198欧）、冰川徒步+蓝冰洞（178欧/成人）、出海追极光（128欧）、出海观鲸（120欧/人）

excludes.en: Entrance tickets to attractions not specified as included
excludes.zh: 未注明包含的景点门票

excludes.en: Gratuities
excludes.zh: 小费

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 - 蓝湖温泉 - 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: Meet in central Reykjavik in the morning, then head via Keflavik Airport to the geothermal Blue Lagoon, where you can enjoy an extended soak in its dreamy milky-blue waters surrounded by lava fields. Return to Reykjavik for the night at a central 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在雷克雅未克市区集合，经凯夫拉维克机场前往地热蓝湖温泉，可在熔岩环绕的梦幻淡蓝湖水中超长时间畅泡。之后返回雷克雅未克市区，入住市中心四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 - 黄金圈 - 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Iceland's Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park and its great rift valley, the Geysir geothermal area with its erupting hot springs, and the powerful Gullfoss waterfall plunging over 50 metres. Overnight in Reykjavik at a central 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览冰岛黄金圈：辛格维利尔国家公园大裂谷、间歇喷涌的盖歇尔间歇泉地热区，以及落差超过50米、气势磅礴的黄金瀑布。夜宿雷克雅未克市中心四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 - 维克 - 冰河湖
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Seljalandsfoss and the rainbow waterfall, then head to Vik. Reach the DC-3 plane-wreck beach on foot, by shuttle buggy or by optional ATV, and explore the black-sand beach and Reynisdrangar basalt columns. Continue to the Glacier Lagoon area for the night at a 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往塞里雅兰瀑布与彩虹瀑布，随后抵达维克，可徒步、乘专用电瓶摆渡车或自选ATV越野车前往DC-3飞机残骸所在的黑沙滩，并游览黑沙滩及雷尼斯岩柱群。之后前往冰河湖地区，夜宿四星级冰河泻湖酒店。

timeline.title_en: Glacier Lagoon - Diamond Beach - Glacier Lagoon
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖 - 钻石沙滩 - 冰河湖
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, choose between a guided glacier hike to explore the blue ice cave or a super-jeep ride to the ice cave beneath Vatnajokull National Park. In the afternoon, visit the jewel of Vatnajokull, Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon, and Diamond Beach. Overnight at a 4-star hotel near the lagoon.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后可选择由专业向导带领的冰川徒步探索蓝冰洞，或乘坐超级冰川吉普车前往瓦特纳冰川国家公园下的蓝冰洞。下午游览瓦特纳冰川皇冠上的明珠——杰古沙龙冰河湖以及钻石沙滩。夜宿四星级冰河泻湖酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖 - 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, return to Reykjavik and explore the city at leisure: Hallgrimskirkja cathedral, Harpa Concert Hall, Tjornin lake, the Sun Voyager sculpture and the Grandi old harbour district. In the evening you can join an optional Faxafloi northern-lights cruise. Overnight at a central 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后返回雷克雅未克，自由参观雷克雅未克大教堂、哈帕音乐厅、托宁湖、太阳航海者雕塑，漫步格兰迪旧港地区。傍晚可自选乘船前往法赫萨峡湾出海追极光。夜宿市中心四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 - 斯奈山 - 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour the Snaefellsnes Peninsula: Kirkjufell (the iconic 'hat mountain'), the fishing village of Arnarstapi with its sea-arch and basalt landmarks, and the black church. Return to Reykjavik for the night at a central 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往斯奈山半岛，先游览草帽山，随后前往阿尔纳斯塔皮小镇，参观章鱼爷爷、鸟之吻等景点，之后参观黑教堂。结束后返回雷克雅未克，夜宿市中心四星级酒店。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 - 凯夫拉维克机场
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, choose to explore Reykjavik at leisure, transfer to Keflavik Airport, or join an optional North Atlantic whale-watching cruise before the tour concludes. Check-out is by 11:00; luggage can be stored at the hotel near the harbour.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后可选择自由游览雷克雅未克市区、随大巴前往凯夫拉维克机场，或自选出海观鲸，随后结束愉快行程。请于11点前退房，行李可寄存于海港附近的酒店。

meeting_en: Central Reykjavik (morning meet-up); pick-up also available at Keflavik Airport per the departure notice.
meeting_zh: 雷克雅未克市区集合（上午）；亦可按出团通知书安排在凯夫拉维克机场集合。

title_en: Ring Road Iceland: 7-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 环冰岛7天精品小团
short_en: A 7-day small-group loop around Iceland from Reykjavik: erupting volcanoes, glacier lagoons, waterfalls, the Snaefellsnes peninsula and the Golden Circle.
short_zh: 雷克雅未克出发的7天环岛精品小团：火山熔岩、冰河湖、瀑布、斯奈山半岛与黄金圈一次看遍。
desc_en: This relaxed 7-day small-group tour traces a full loop around Iceland from Reykjavik, pairing the country's most dramatic natural sights with comfortable city-centre and landscape hotels. Cruise the Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon by amphibious boat, walk the black-sand and Diamond beaches, soak in the Myvatn geothermal baths, photograph Vestrahorn and the Snaefellsnes peninsula, then close the loop on the classic Golden Circle of Thingvellir, Geysir and Gullfoss. With a Chinese-speaking guide-driver and no forced shopping, it is an easy, all-in way to see the island's volcanoes, glaciers and waterfalls.
desc_zh: 这条轻松的7天环岛精品小团从雷克雅未克出发，绕冰岛一整圈，把全国最震撼的自然奇景与市中心及景观酒店巧妙串联。乘水陆两栖船畅游杰古沙龙冰河湖，漫步黑沙滩与钻石沙滩，浸泡米湖地热温泉，在西角山与斯奈山半岛尽情取景，最后以辛格维利尔国家公园、盖歇尔间歇泉和黄金瀑布组成的经典黄金圈收官。全程华人中文司兼导、无强制购物，是一次省心又尽兴的火山、冰川与瀑布之旅。

highlights.en: Cruise Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon by amphibious boat among floating icebergs
highlights.zh: 乘水陆两栖船穿行于杰古沙龙冰河湖的浮冰之间

highlights.en: Walk the Diamond Beach and the dramatic Reynisfjara black-sand beach
highlights.zh: 漫步钻石沙滩与气势磅礴的黑沙滩

highlights.en: Soak in the Myvatn Nature Baths geothermal springs in Iceland's 'Diamond Circle'
highlights.zh: 在北境钻石圈泡米湖地热温泉

highlights.en: Photograph iconic Vestrahorn and the fairytale Snaefellsnes peninsula
highlights.zh: 拍摄经典西角山与梦幻斯奈山半岛

highlights.en: Classic Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park, Geysir and Gullfoss waterfall
highlights.zh: 经典黄金圈：辛格维利尔国家公园、盖歇尔间歇泉与黄金瀑布

highlights.en: Seljalandsfoss, Studlagil basalt canyon, Godafoss and more waterfalls and falls en route
highlights.zh: 塞里雅兰瀑布、玄武岩大峡谷、众神瀑布等沿途瀑布奇景

highlights.en: Relaxed 6-15 person small group with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 6-15人轻松精品小团，华人中文司兼导，无强制购物

highlights.en: All-inclusive: 6 nights of 3-4 star hotels, breakfasts and listed attraction entries
highlights.zh: 全包价：6晚三到四星酒店、每日早餐及指定景点门票

includes.en: 6 nights in comfortable 3-4 star hotels (incl. landscape/adventure hotels)
includes.zh: 6晚舒适三到四星酒店（含景观/冒险酒店）

includes.en: 6 buffet breakfasts at the hotels (guide assists with breakfast where the hotel has none)
includes.zh: 酒店自助式早餐6餐（若酒店无早餐，由导游带领购买）

includes.en: Tour coach with Chinese-speaking guide-driver (business van for groups under 8)
includes.zh: 旅游巴士及华人中文司兼导服务（8人以下成团改为商务旅行车）

includes.en: Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程华人中文司兼导服务

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece up to 23kg plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Attraction entries: Jokulsarlon amphibious boat, Myvatn Nature Baths, Vestrahorn
includes.zh: 门票：冰河湖两栖船票、米湖温泉、西角山门票

excludes.en: International flights and personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 国际机票及个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 行程所列国家所需的旅游签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify it covers any high-risk activities)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（高风险运动请核实保险是否包含）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners except meals specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内含特色餐外的午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Attractions not marked as included; optional activities such as whale watching, Blue Lagoon Comfort ticket (100 EUR/person) and Silfra snorkelling (180 EUR/person)
excludes.zh: 未注明含的门票；自费项目如出海观鲸、蓝湖温泉Comfort套票（100欧/人）、丝浮拉大裂缝浮潜（180欧/人）

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik / Keflavik → Seljalandsfoss → Black Sand Beach
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克/凯夫拉维克 → 塞里雅兰瀑布 → 黑沙滩
timeline.description_en: Airport or city pickup, then drive past the Fagradalsfjall volcano canyon to view its lava fields. Visit Seljalandsfoss, the veil-like rainbow waterfall with a 60-metre drop, then the otherworldly black-sand beach. Overnight near Vik (Church Town).
timeline.description_zh: 机场或市区接机后，途经法格拉达尔火山峡谷车览熔岩遗迹。游览如新娘面纱般的塞里雅兰彩虹瀑布，感受60米落差的气势，随后前往末日般空旷的黑沙滩。夜宿教堂城。

timeline.title_zh: 羽毛峡谷 → 钻石沙滩 → 霍芬
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit the feather canyon, then the glacier lagoon area to see Jokulsarlon and Diamond Beach. Ride the lagoon's amphibious boat for a close encounter with the icebergs, then continue to the lobster town of Hofn for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往羽毛峡谷参观，随后到冰河湖景区游览冰河湖与钻石沙滩。体验冰河湖两栖船，近距离接触冰川冰山，之后前往龙虾镇霍芬，夜宿霍芬。

timeline.title_zh: 霍芬 → 西角山 → 玄武岩大峡谷 → 埃伊尔斯塔迪尔
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit the much-photographed Vestrahorn (Batman) mountain mirrored in its quiet bay, then the dramatic basalt canyon. Overnight in the eastern town of Egilsstadir, surrounded by green meadows and calm lakes.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往摄影师钟爱的西角山，欣赏蝙蝠山倒影于宁静海湾，再参观玄武岩大峡谷。夜宿冰岛东部埃伊尔斯塔迪尔镇，周围尽是青翠原野与宁静湖泊。

timeline.title_zh: 米湖温泉 → 黑暗城堡 → 众神瀑布 → 阿克雷里
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Krafla volcano, then soak in the Myvatn Nature Baths. Explore the Dimmuborgir lava formations and the Godafoss (Waterfall of the Gods). Overnight in Akureyri, capital of the north.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往克拉夫拉火山参观，之后体验米湖温泉，随后游览黑暗城堡熔岩群与众神瀑布。夜宿北境之都阿克雷里。

timeline.title_zh: 阿克雷里 → 斯蒂基斯霍尔米 → 草帽山 → 海德利桑德
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to the whale church, then visit Stykkisholmur (which stood in for Greenland in The Secret Life of Walter Mitty) and Kirkjufell (Church Mountain). Stop at the photogenic red-roofed church and overnight in Hellissandur.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往鲸鱼教堂，随后游览曾在《白日梦想家》中扮演格陵兰的斯蒂基斯霍尔米，再到教会山（草帽山）与网红红顶教堂。夜宿海德利桑德。

timeline.title_zh: 海德利桑德 → 阿尔纳斯塔皮 → 黑教堂 → 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit the black-pebble beach, Arnarstapi, the black church and the seal beach on the Snaefellsnes peninsula. Continue to Reykjavik for free time at landmarks like Hallgrimskirkja, Harpa and the Sun Voyager, or join an optional whale-watching trip. Overnight in Reykjavik.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往黑卵石沙滩、阿尔纳斯塔皮，参观黑教堂与海豹沙滩。之后前往雷克雅未克市区，自由游览大教堂、哈帕音乐厅、珍珠楼、托宁湖等地标，或可自选出海观鲸。夜宿雷克雅未克。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 → 黄金圈 → 凯夫拉维克送机
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour Iceland's classic Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park, the Geysir geothermal field and the thundering Gullfoss waterfall. Transfer via Reykjavik to Keflavik International Airport, with the trip ending at the Blue Lagoon.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览冰岛经典黄金圈：辛格维利尔国家公园、盖歇尔间歇泉地热区与气势磅礴的黄金瀑布。结束后途经雷克雅未克前往凯夫拉维克国际机场送机，最后以蓝湖温泉结束行程。

meeting_en: Reykjavik city centre or Keflavik International Airport (KEF) pickup; the tour begins and ends in Reykjavik.
meeting_zh: 雷克雅未克市区或凯夫拉维克国际机场（KEF）接机；行程在雷克雅未克起止。

title_en: Iceland Ring Road Grand Tour - 8-Day Small-Group Adventure
title_zh: 冰岛环岛全景8日精品小团游
short_en: Circle all of Iceland in 8 days: soak in the Blue Lagoon, cruise Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon by amphibian boat, and chase waterfalls, black sands and the Golden Circle.
short_zh: 8天环游整个冰岛：畅享蓝湖温泉，乘水陆两栖船巡游杰古沙龙冰河湖，追逐瀑布、黑沙滩与黄金圈秘境。
desc_en: This 8-day round-Iceland loop departs and returns to Reykjavik, tracing the full Ring Road through the island's most dramatic landscapes. Begin with a full relaxing day at the iconic Blue Lagoon geothermal spa, then journey past the Fagradalsfjall lava fields, Seljalandsfoss waterfall and the famed Black Sand Beach. Ride an amphibian boat among the icebergs of Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon, photograph Vestrahorn and the basalt canyon in the east, bathe in the Myvatn Nature Baths, and explore the Snaefellsnes peninsula made famous by The Secret Life of Walter Mitty. The route closes with the classic Golden Circle - Thingvellir National Park, Geysir and Gullfoss - on a relaxed small-group itinerary staying in distinctive scenic hotels throughout.
desc_zh: 这条8天环冰岛线路从雷克雅未克出发并返回，沿著名的一号环岛公路串联起冰岛最震撼的自然景观。首日在标志性的蓝湖地热温泉酒店悠享一整天慢生活，随后途经法格拉达尔火山熔岩区、塞里雅兰瀑布与著名的黑沙滩；乘坐水陆两栖船穿行于杰古沙龙冰河湖的冰山之间，在东部拍摄西角山与玄武岩大峡谷，畅泡米湖温泉，并探访因电影《白日梦想家》而闻名的斯奈山半岛。行程以经典黄金圈——辛格维利尔国家公园、间歇泉与黄金瀑布——收尾，全程入住各具特色的景观酒店，是一条轻松舒适的深度全景小团路线。

highlights.en: A full relaxing day at the iconic Blue Lagoon, staying at the Blue Lagoon spa hotel with private access to the Premium VIP geothermal area
highlights.zh: 在标志性蓝湖整整悠享一天，入住蓝湖温泉酒店并私享Premium VIP高级温泉区

highlights.en: Amphibian boat cruise on Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon, weaving among icebergs beside the Diamond Beach
highlights.zh: 乘水陆两栖船巡游杰古沙龙冰河湖，在冰山间穿行并游览邻近的钻石沙滩

highlights.en: Waterfall hunting: Seljalandsfoss (the Bridal Veil), Godafoss (Falls of the Gods) and Gullfoss on the Golden Circle
highlights.zh: 瀑布巡礼：新娘面纱塞里雅兰瀑布、众神瀑布与黄金圈的黄金瀑布

highlights.en: Geothermal soaking at both the Blue Lagoon and the Myvatn Nature Baths in the north
highlights.zh: 南北双温泉体验：蓝湖与北部的米湖温泉

highlights.en: Snaefellsnes peninsula and Stykkisholmur, the Greenland stand-in from The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
highlights.zh: 斯奈山半岛与斯蒂基斯霍尔米——电影《白日梦想家》中的格陵兰取景地

highlights.en: Iconic photo stops: Vestrahorn (Batman Mountain), the basalt canyon, Black Sand Beach and the Golden Circle's Thingvellir & Geysir
highlights.zh: 经典打卡:西角山(蝙蝠山)、玄武岩大峡谷、黑沙滩，以及黄金圈的辛格维利尔国家公园与间歇泉

highlights.en: Relaxed 6-15 person small group with a licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver and distinctive scenic hotels every night
highlights.zh: 6-15人轻松小团，职业华人中文司兼导，每晚入住各具特色的景观酒店

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with intercity transport, listed attraction entries and daily breakfast - no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全包，含城际交通、列明景点门票及每日早餐，全程无强制购物

includes.en: 7 nights in comfortable 3-4 star hotels (including the Blue Lagoon spa hotel and scenic adventure hotels)
includes.zh: 7晚舒适型3-4星级酒店住宿（含蓝湖温泉酒店及特色景观/冒险酒店）

includes.en: 7 buffet breakfasts at the hotels (where a hotel has no breakfast, the guide assists in purchasing one)
includes.zh: 酒店内自助式早餐7餐（若所住酒店无早餐，由导游带领购买早餐）

includes.en: Tour coach with a licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver; groups under 8 use a business van with guide-driver
includes.zh: 旅游巴士及中文司兼导服务；8人以下成团自动改为商务旅行车及司兼导服务

includes.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
includes.zh: 全程华人中文司兼导服务

includes.en: Baggage allowance of 1 checked bag (23 kg) plus 1 carry-on
includes.zh: 1件23公斤托运行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Listed attraction entries: Blue Lagoon (Premium VIP), Jokulsarlon amphibian boat ticket, Myvatn Nature Baths and Vestrahorn entry
includes.zh: 门票：蓝湖温泉（Premium VIP）、冰河湖两栖船票、米湖温泉、西角山门票

excludes.en: International and domestic flights
excludes.zh: 国际及国内段机票

excludes.en: Passport fees and tourist visa fees for the countries visited
excludes.zh: 护照费用及行程所列旅游国家的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Travel insurance (verify high-risk activity coverage if you join optional adventures)
excludes.zh: 旅游保险费用（如参与高风险运动，请核实保险是否包含该项目）

excludes.en: Gratuities for guide and driver: 10 EUR per person per day (same rate for adults and children)
excludes.zh: 导游及司机小费共10欧元/人/天（大小同价）

excludes.en: Lunches and dinners not specified in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 除行程内注明的特色餐外，午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Optional activities, e.g. Reykjavik whale watching (120 EUR) and the Silfra fissure snorkelling (180 EUR per person)
excludes.zh: 推荐自费项目，如雷克雅未克出海观鲸（120欧元）、丝浮拉大裂缝浮潜（180欧元/人）

excludes.en: Entries to attractions not noted as included (including exterior-only, recommended, optional or experience items)
excludes.zh: 未注明费用包含的景点（含标注"外观"、"推荐"、"可选"、"体验"等景点）

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 - 蓝湖
timeline.description_en: Make your way to the Blue Lagoon spa hotel and check in, then spend a full unhurried day soaking in the milky-blue Premium VIP geothermal waters surrounded by volcanic lava. Your room rate includes a Blue Lagoon Premium ticket with silica mud mask and towel/robe rental.
timeline.description_zh: 前往蓝湖温泉酒店自行办理入住，拒绝赶景点，用一整天细细品味被火山熔岩环绕的奶蓝色温泉。房费含每人蓝湖Premium门票，套餐包含入场券、矽泥面膜及毛巾浴袍免费租用一次。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Fagradalsfjall - Seljalandsfoss - Black Sand Beach
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 - 法格拉达尔火山峡谷 - 塞里雅兰瀑布 - 黑沙滩
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive past the Fagradalsfjall volcanic valley and its lava fields, then visit Seljalandsfoss, the 60-metre 'Bridal Veil' waterfall you can walk behind. Continue to the dramatic Black Sand Beach before overnighting near the church town of Kirkjubaejarklaustur.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后途经法格拉达尔火山峡谷，车览火山喷发后的熔岩遗迹，随后游览如新娘面纱般、落差约60米的塞里雅兰瀑布。之后前往末日般空旷的黑沙滩，夜宿教堂城。

timeline.title_zh: 羽毛峡谷 - 钻石沙滩 - 霍芬
timeline.description_en: Visit the Feather Canyon, then reach the Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach. Board an amphibian boat to glide among the icebergs and up close to the glacier - keep an eye out for seals - before continuing to the lobster town of Hofn for the night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往羽毛峡谷参观，随后抵达冰河湖景区，游览杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩，乘水陆两栖船近距离接触冰河冰川（留意湖中海豹）。之后前往龙虾镇霍芬，夜宿霍芬。

timeline.title_zh: 霍芬 - 西角山 - 玄武岩大峡谷
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Vestrahorn (Batman Mountain), a photographer's favourite whose jagged peaks mirror in the calm bay below, then visit the basalt canyon. Overnight in the eastern town of Egilsstadir amid green meadows and quiet lakes.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往西角山参观，层次分明的山峰尖角倒影于山脚宁静海湾，深受摄影师喜爱；随后参观玄武岩大峡谷。夜宿东部小镇埃伊尔斯塔迪尔，周围尽是青翠原野与宁静湖泊。

timeline.title_en: Myvatn Nature Baths - Dimmuborgir - Godafoss - Akureyri
timeline.title_zh: 米湖温泉 - 黑暗城堡 - 众神瀑布 - 阿克雷里
timeline.description_en: Visit the Krafla volcano, soak in the Myvatn Nature Baths and explore the otherworldly Dimmuborgir lava formations. Stop at the Godafoss 'Falls of the Gods' before overnighting in Akureyri, the capital of the north, on the diamond circle.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往克拉夫拉火山参观，畅泡米湖温泉，随后游览黑暗城堡熔岩群与众神瀑布，体验"北境"之都的钻石圈。夜宿阿克雷里。

timeline.title_zh: 阿克雷里 - 斯蒂基斯霍尔米 - 草帽山 - 海德利桑德
timeline.description_en: Drive to the Whale Church, then visit Stykkisholmur - the Greenland stand-in from The Secret Life of Walter Mitty - with its quirky church and red harbour lighthouse. Continue to Kirkjufell (Hat Mountain) and a photogenic red-roofed church before overnighting in Hellissandur.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往鲸鱼教堂，随后游览电影《白日梦想家》取景地斯蒂基斯霍尔米，欣赏奇特造型教堂与港口红色小灯塔。之后前往草帽山(教会山)与网红红顶教堂，夜宿海德利桑德。

timeline.title_zh: 海德利桑德 - 阿尔纳斯塔皮 - 黑教堂 - 雷克雅未克
timeline.description_en: Explore the Snaefellsnes peninsula: a black pebble beach, the village of Arnarstapi, the Budakirkja black church and a seal beach. Arrive in Reykjavik to wander the landmark Hallgrimskirkja cathedral, Harpa concert hall and Tjornin lake at leisure, with an optional whale-watching cruise (120 EUR). Overnight in Reykjavik.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往黑卵石沙滩，随后游览阿尔纳斯塔皮，参观黑教堂与海豹沙滩。结束后抵达雷克雅未克市区，自由游览大教堂、哈帕音乐厅、珍珠楼并漫步托宁湖畔，或自费选择出海观鲸（120欧元）。夜宿雷克雅未克。

timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 - 黄金圈 - 送机
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour the classic Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park, the Geysir geothermal area and the thundering Gullfoss waterfall. An optional Silfra fissure snorkel (180 EUR per person) is available. Transfer to Keflavik International Airport for departure.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往冰岛黄金圈——辛格维利尔国家公园、盖歇尔间歇泉区与气势磅礴的黄金瀑布，可自费选择丝浮拉大裂缝浮潜（180欧元/人）。结束后途经雷克雅未克前往凯夫拉维克国际机场送机，结束行程。

meeting_en: Reykjavik, Iceland - tour starts and ends in the Reykjavik area; day 1 transfer to the Blue Lagoon spa hotel (Keflavik Airport shuttle reference times: 07:30 / 09:30 / 12:30 / 16:30).
meeting_zh: 冰岛雷克雅未克——行程在雷克雅未克地区出发并结束；第1天前往蓝湖温泉酒店（凯夫拉维克机场至蓝湖shuttle参考时刻：07:30 / 09:30 / 12:30 / 16:30）。
